E: Laudatory Press Release

C: 在圣杯战争的系统中，男子被定性为{RUBY_B#Archer}弓兵{RUBY_E#}。这对于一个以「剑」为本源的人来说似乎是某种嘲讽，但男子不以为意。 「拜托，比起正面搏斗，从远处狙杀敌人才是更有效率的作战方式吧？ 「还是说你指望我像那些{RUBY_B#Saber}剑士{RUBY_E#}一样用光炮轰平一切？别闹了，我只是个普通人，可没有他们那么强的魔力。」 话虽如此，只要情势需要，男子也从不拒绝近身格斗。得益于可谓无限量的「干将•莫邪」，他可以使出令人眼花缭乱的剑技，让对手难以招架。 「如果用普通的子弹就能杀死敌人，我才不想多费这些力气。 「不过，你要是真想学会这招——平常可以多下下厨房，从切菜的刀工练起。 「我可没开玩笑。只要认真思考，你可以从做饭里学到很多。就拿最基础的备菜来说吧——想要尽快吃到美味的一餐，你需要把制作每一种食物的工序都加以拆解，重新编排它们的顺序，尽可能多的同时完成一些事…一旦你熟练于这种思考方式，就可以把它应用在身边的各种事情上，为自己节省出大把的时间。 「再比如说炒菜的火候。初学者往往会陷入一个误区，认为炒菜就是把不同的食材按次序加进锅里，直到所有的食物都熟透为止。 「这对于那些耐炸耐煮的食材倒不成问题，但除此以外的却不能如此处理。它们都有自己最优的烹饪时间和烹饪温度，彼此之间出现矛盾是很正常的情况。 因此，大多数情况下，我们都要将食材分门别类，用不同的火候加以处理，关火出锅也得够果断——最后再把它们全部组合在一起，完成一道色香味俱全的佳肴。」 是的，只要打开了关于厨房的话匣子，男子就会一改平常言简意赅的作风，发表出许多饱含心得的长篇大论。这个终其一生都在战斗的男人，其生命的本质，似乎并不是正义或苦难，而是某种带着生活气息的烟火滋味。 「就像我之前说的，如果能在远处就用狙击的方式杀死敌人，那么没人愿意冒着生命危险去和他们近身搏斗。面对命运也是一样。 「我的存在只不过说明了一件事：在某个遥远的角落，有那样一个世界，那里的人们每天只能和命运进行你死我活的白刃格斗，否则就毫无活下去的希望。 「虽然我曾在那里为他们战斗过，但世界得以改变，还是因为人们始终在与命运毫不停歇地搏斗。 「而我…不过是一个一无所有，还远未{RUBY_B#抵达理想乡}赢过命运{RUBY_E#}的男人罢了。」 毫无疑问，他仍会沿着这条「拯救人类」的道路走下去。 就像他总是乐意为朋友们下厨一样。
E: Within the Holy Grail War's formal classification system, the man is categorized as {RUBY_B#Archer}a bow user{RUBY_E#}. This designation might seem like a subtle mockery for someone whose very essence revolves around "swords," yet the man himself remains completely unbothered by this apparent contradiction. "Let's be practical. Isn't eliminating enemies from a distance far more efficient than facing them head-on?" "Or were you expecting me to act like those {RUBY_B#Sabers}swordmasters{RUBY_E#}, unleashing devastating beams of light that level everything? Don't be absurd. I'm just an ordinary person without their overwhelming magical energy reserves." However, contrary to his statements, the man never hesitates to engage in close combat when the situation demands it. Leveraging his practically infinite supply of "Kanshou and Bakuya," he uses dazzlingly complex sword skills that leave opponents struggling to defend themselves. "If regular bullets could get the job done, I wouldn't bother going through all this trouble." "But if you really wanna learn this move? Spend some time in the kitchen. Start by getting good with a knife." "I'm not messing around. Cooking teaches you a lot if you actually think about it. Take meal prep, for instance. You want a great dish on the table fast? You gotta break down every step, figure out what can be done at the same time, and streamline the whole process. Once you get the hang of that mindset, you'll start applying it to everything in your life. It saves you a ton of time." "Same with cooking temps. Newbies always think stir-frying means tossing everything into the pan in order until it's all cooked through." "That works fine for stuff that can take the heat. But other ingredients? They've got their own ideal cooking time and temp, so they don't always get along." "So most of the time, you've gotta sort your ingredients, adjust the heat for each one, and pull them off the burner at just the right moment. Then, bring everything back together to finish the dish balanced, flavorful, and just right." Once he starts talking about cooking, the guy shifts gears entirely. Gone is his usual short-and-sharp talk. Instead, he dives into these long, thoughtful monologues, full of hard-won insight. For a man who's spent his whole life on the battlefield, it seems like what defines him isn't justice or suffering, but something quieter. Something like the everyday warmth of a home-cooked meal. "Like I said before, if you could take out your enemies from a distance with a sniper shot, nobody would risk getting up close and personal. It's the same when it comes to fate." "I exist to prove one thing: somewhere out there, in a corner of the world, there are people who have no choice but to fight fate in brutal, hand-to-hand combat, every single day. Because if they don't, they die." "I fought for them once. But the world only changed because people kept going, kept fighting fate without pause." "As for me... I'm just a man with nothing left, who's still a long way from ever {RUBY_B#reaching utopia}beating fate{RUBY_E#}." One thing's for sure: He's not turning away from his mission to save humanity. Just like he never says no to cooking for his friends.

C: 冒险集团「鼹鼠党」的头头，自称「漆黑的虎克大人」。\n不喜欢被人称作小家伙，认为自己不依靠大人也能独挡一面。\n大人们去裂界里冒险，桑博先生去地面上冒险，病人们冒险接受娜塔莎的治疗…在虎克的带领下，孩子们也要有自己的冒险！
E: Head of the adventure squad "The Moles," she calls herself Pitch-Dark Hook the Great.\nShe doesn't like to be called a "kid" and believes she can handle things herself without any help from adults.\nAdults adventure into the Fragmentum, Mr. Sampo adventures on the surface, and patients take their risky adventure seeking treatment from Natasha... Under the leadership of Hook, children can also have their own adventures!

C: 曜青军队常年征战域外星球，他又对鼎镬药式进行了诸多改进，以应对日渐艰巨又复杂多变的驻扎环境。 因药式的罕见与奇效，他的名声迅速传遍曜青军队，赢得了诸位将士的信任。 然而这些成就全然无法减轻他内心的沉重。 每一日， 当出发的鸣笛响起之时，他曾治好的病患将重新踏上战场。 每一日，当归营的脚步响起之时，围坐在鼎镬边的面孔，总会少上几个。 就在刚刚，那位每次回营都嚷嚷着要吃鼎镬的士兵，永远地离开了。 他完成了今日的问诊，走出临时搭建的战地医院，长叹了一口气。漫天风雪扑向他，而他似乎感受不到半分寒冷。 鸣笛声已重新响起，军队已整备出发。很快，战地医院中又会挤满重伤的士兵。即便他使出生死人，肉白骨的医术，无休止的战争依然在吞噬那些年轻的生命。 每晚，他都会同那位月御将军对谈，但这一日，他少见地沉默良久。 「这段时日，我一直在思考…如果我医治的病患注定还要奔赴死亡，那医者的意义是什么？」 病房中传来喑哑的哭声。他使劲眨了眨眼睛，才发现不知从何时起，自己的双眼已经干涩 ——干涩到流不出泪来。
E: The Yaoqing's troops perennially fought on outer planets. He continued to improve the cauldron-based medicinal formula in a multitude of ways so that he could adapt it to the increasingly challenging, complex, and unpredictable environments that the soldiers must brave. The unusual yet profoundly effective formulation his medicine came in soon made his name a common utterance across the forces of the Yaoqing, winning him the trust of officers and soldiers alike. Such achievements nevertheless failed to assuage his heavy heart. Every day, when the bugle call for departure sounded, he knew the wounded that he had nursed back to health would have to step onto the battlefield once more. Every day, when he heard the footsteps of returning troops, he knew he would be missing a few more familiar faces among those that gathered around his cauldron. Just recently, even the soldier who always returned to camp yelling about wanting to eat from the cauldron had departed this world for good. He finished up the day's consultation and left the field hospital, letting out a long sigh. The cold did not bother him in the slightest, even with the snow flurries pelting at him. When the bugle call sounded yet again, the army was equipped and ready to depart. The field hospital will soon be burdened with grievously wounded soldiers like before. Yes, he has the skills to bring the wounded back from the gates of hell, but these young lives still end up lost in the endless, ravenous war. Every night, he would always talk with General Yueyu. This day, however, he was uncharacteristically silent for a long time. "Recently, I have been thinking... If the patients that I nurse to health are destined to hurtle toward death once more, what is my purpose as a healer?" A dull cry sounded from the direction of the wards. It was only after blinking several times that he realized both his eyes had gone dry, probably since some time ago... So dry that he no longer had tears to shed.

C: 离开家乡后，他跟随一位年迈的师门老者。 除了日常的淬炼肉体、精神修行外，偶尔午后小憩时，老者也会向其描述他所从未亲眼见证的时代——那些古时的星际吟游客，声称自己见证「纯美」的瞬间。 「那是一个静止的玛瑙世界，众人皆为其中所存封的奇谲壮美之现象泪流满面。」 「据传伊德莉拉会在陨落后经过数次十三琥珀纪的轮回，于第十三个月在宇宙某处回归。」 在那些年头里，师者日复一日向他传授「纯美」的精神： 如何以虔诚的「战」代替吟咏的「诗」，将「纯美」的精神贯彻。 ——他知晓了，那是一种名为「骑士」的准则与品格。 但师者未曾同他说起过多便匆匆离世。他再次独行，一如早些时候他刚远离家乡时，冥思自己的存在。只是他不再有过关于孤独的「愁闷」，他思考着，要如何成为一名「骑士」。 他曾呆在老城，将污脏的街道翻新，像沐光的婴孩。 他剿灭如噩梦般的怪物，次年春日，兔子们再一次蹦蹦跳跳穿过林间。 他也曾同另一位「骑士」短暂并行于世，那位骑士说，他坚信盔甲上有女神的祝福。 「奉献灵魂带有这种意味：每次都可能一去无回，但每次都将决不退缩。」 「共勉，我的挚友。」 他凝视长枪上的斑驳，这是捍卫「纯美」的证明。 他擦拭长枪上的斑驳，这是踏上「纯美」的证明。
E: After leaving his hometown, he became the apprentice of an elderly master. Alongside physical and mental training, he would often listen to his master's tales of bygone eras — stories of transcendent beauty and mystical phenomena witnessed by the Minstrels. "It was a world bathed in amber, draped in undisturbed stillness, where every being shed tears for the magnificent wonders veiled beneath its surface." "Rumor has it that Idrila, after embarking on a journey spanning numerous cycles of Thirteen Amber Eras, will make a triumphant return to the universe during the elusive thirteenth month." Day after day, his master imparted the essence of beauty to him. He learned to go beyond mere poetic recitation and embrace devotion as the embodiment of beauty, truly upholding its philosophy. He understood that beauty was not just a code to follow but a way of life, an existence known as a knight. However, his master departed from this world, and he once again set out on his lonely journey. He contemplated his existence, pondering the nature of his being. Instead of lamenting his solitude, he focused on becoming a true knight. During his stay in an old city, he labored to restore its dilapidated streets. He vanquished nightmarish monsters, and with the arrival of spring, rabbits frolicked once again in the woods. He also briefly found companionship in the presence of another knight, who professed his faith in the blessings of the goddess residing within his armor. "To give one's soul requires understanding that each encounter might be one's last, yet retreating is never an option." "Carry these words of courage with you, my dear friend." He contemplated on his lance, which bore the stains of countless battles fought in the name of Beauty. With solemn reverence, he wiped away each mark, a testament to his tireless odyssey toward the pursuit of Beauty.

C: 阿兰似乎担心自己会拖累你们，但你们在说服他这点上已经产生了一种微妙的默契，难道这就是同伴么？\n和同伴一起，抓紧时间去往最上层吧。
E: Arlan seems to worry that he would be a hindrance, but you as a group already developed a sort of delicate rapport in how to persuade him. Could this be what it means to be companions?\nHurry and reach the top floor with your companions.

C:
现在，你的脑海里又回响起了这句话：「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
你还未下决心，又或是你心中已经有了决定，只是你还不确定，这么想的是不是只有自己……
没关系，你还可以把它藏在心中，听听别人的想法……
说不定，你们想的完全一样呢？
E:
These words resurface in your mind once more. "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."
You haven't made up your mind yet, or could it be that you have. However, you're just not sure if anyone else shares your point of view...
It's alright. You can hide it deep in your heart and listen to what others think...
Is it possible that you all think the same?

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 深入矿区的路途中，你可以听到惊叫哭喊始终此起彼伏、不绝于耳——看来此处事态已至危殆，你必须对沿途逃难的矿民伸出援手。\n你似乎听到附近有痛苦的呻吟声传来…在四周仔细搜索吧。
E: On the way deeper into the mines, you can hear the constant screams in the distance. It is obvious that things have gotten pretty serious, you must help the fleeing miners along the way.\nYou seem to hear a painful moan nearby... Search for it in the vicinity.

C: 你的去路被一辆报废矿车强行隔断。在希儿指示下，你们决定在附近搜集备用件修理矿车，修好后再把矿车移走。\n「找东找西又得累个半死，」你不禁想，「可惜杨叔不在，要不一个黑洞全都给他扬了…」
E: The way forward is cut off by a mine cart out of order. With Seele's instructions, you decide to search for backup parts in the area to repair the mine cart and move it out of the way.\n"It's gonna be hectic trying to look for the parts." You can't help but picture Mr. Yang destroying the cart with his black hole.

C: 娜塔莎告诉你，三月七和丹恒正和「地火」首领奥列格在一起。看来在你离开的时间里，你的同伴也在有条不紊地进行着各自的工作——\n至少，他们这次没有丢下你跑去和小朋友捉迷藏，或者是去拳馆赚外快…\n总之，现在就出发与同伴会合，看看他们的工作成果如何吧。
E: Natasha tells you that March 7th and Dan Heng are with Oleg, the chief of Wildfire. Seems like your companions have been busy with work during your time away...\nAt least they didn't leave you behind and go play hide-and-seek or earn a little pocket money at the boxing gym this time...\nAnyways, head out and meet up with your companions and see how their work is going.

C: 你从史瓦罗处得知了这个世界的真相。\n本应履行「存护」职责的守护者却刻意对贝洛伯格的人们隐藏了「星核」的信息，残酷的真相无疑会震惊世人。\n无论如何，列车组的动机都得到了澄清——该问问娜塔莎，「地火」接下来会如何行动了……
E: You learn the truths of the world from Svarog.\nThe Guardians tasked with Preservation chose to purposely hide information regarding the Stellaron from the people of Belobog. The brutal truth is a shock to all.\nBut whatever the case, the motives of the crew have been cleared — it's time to ask Natasha about Wildfire's next moves...

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ上旅行至此，你已经充分学会如何以理服人了。大守护者最忠实的戍卫官此刻也终于同你站在一条战线上…只可惜他无法同你一道前进，共同见证贝洛伯格的结局。\n但杰帕德在此处把守着阻隔裂界的大门——只要你一声令下，他和他的亲信铁卫便会迅速结成战阵，为你们开辟前路。
E: Thanks to your time on Jarilo-VI, you have mastered the art of persuasion. The Supreme Guardian's most loyal Captain is now on your side... It's a pity that he cannot go with you and witness what awaits Belobog.\nGepard is guarding the gate to the Fragmentum. He and his best guards will form up and clear the way for you once you are ready.

C: 故事尘埃落定，布洛妮娅继任成为大守护者，上下层区再次交融，组建成了完整的贝洛伯格。\n天下没有不散的筵席，道别的时间总伴随着一丝感伤。\n最后再和布洛妮娅聊聊，把你们从瓦尔特那儿了解到的一切都说给她听吧。
E: The story ended and Bronya succeeded as the Supreme Guardian. The Overworld and Underworld reunited to create a complete Belobog.\nAll things must end. There is always a bit of sadness at the time of farewell.\nIt is best to talk to Bronya again before you leave and tell her everything you heard from Welt.

C: 列车之上，遥望不容踏足的故土，你曾以为此生再也不会见到罗浮「玉界门」的景色。\n然而翻看卡芙卡所留下的通讯影像，你意识到她的邀请中潜藏着致命的危险——她的同伴，名为「刃」的男子，与你之间曾有刻骨宿怨。\n你决心违犯禁令，再踏罗浮。
E: As you cast your gaze from the Express toward a home you can never return to, you recall a time when the prospect of looking upon the Jade Gate of the Luofu seemed utterly unbelievable.\nAs you review the video communication sent by Kafka, you realize there is a hidden and lethal danger in her invitation — Her companion, the man named Blade, has an ancient and indelible feud with you.\nYou decide to go against the ban and set foot on the Luofu once again.

C: 工造司中风波平息，捷径也随之通畅。依将军嘱托，你们应当穿过此处，前往丹鼎司。
E: The storm calms in the Artisanship Commission and the shortcut also opens up. You should pass through here as per the general's recommendations and head to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 丹鼎司中一处市集，云骑军驻扎在此暂作休整。与此同时，符玄与斥候一同前去探查敌情。\n眼下你们能做的只有暂时等待…或是，向云骑们打探此前的战况。
E: The Cloud Knights are stationed temporarily in a market in the Alchemy Commission. You learn that Fu Xuan had left with the scouts to assess the enemy.\nAll you can do for now is wait... or talk with the Knights to find out about the fighting so far.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n黑天鹅认为情况或许比想象中的更严重，你们应当尽快赶到烙印着流萤痕迹的那片忆域才是。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nBlack Swan believes that the situation may be even more serious than she imagined. You must hurry to the Memory Zone branded with traces of Firefly as quickly as possible.

C: 你们来到了一座雕像丛生的玄关大厅，发现这里根本没有前进的道路…换句话说，连门都没有。看来你们现在得想办法变出一扇门了——\n你们取得了有关隐夜鸫雕像的线索，希望它能帮助各位打通前进的道路。
E: You two reach a foyer full of statues and realize there is no way to proceed further... In other words, there is not even a door in sight. Looks like you have to find a way to conjure up a door...\nYou two have obtained the clue regarding the Nightingale Statue, hoping that it can open up the path ahead.

C: 终归是发生在梦境中的异常，借由调律，想必能够解决。不过，此处最为优秀的调律师，显然不受信任。\n拜托万维克为停云进行调律，再将最优秀的调律师作为人质——这很合理。
E: If this is an anomaly that occurred within the Dreamscape, it should be fixable through tuning. However, the most talented tuner present is clearly someone not to be trusted.\nAsk Wonweek to tune Tingyun and then take the most talented tuner hostage... An extremely rational plan.

C: 和其他人一样，她们谈论着过去——不是除却过去无话可说，而是想借此说清自己要如何走向未来。
E: Like everyone else, they are speaking about the past... That's not to say they have nothing to discuss except the past. It's just that they want to use it to explain how they will move towards the future.

C: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
E: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 朝气蓬勃的悬锋稚童们让你再度思索悬锋城的未来，你决定找到悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯一叙。
E: Seeing the energetic Kremnoan children prompts you to reflect on Castrum Kremnos's future. You decide to seek out the Kremnoan veteran Krateros for a discussion.

C: 公民大会的事情暂告一段落，逐火之旅将会继续，元老院深受打击——这一切的缔造者阿那克萨戈拉斯也即将迎来最后的审判。\n直到最后的时刻，阿格莱雅才能和那刻夏打破彼此的芥蒂。
E: The events in the citizens' assembly come to a temporary halt, and the Flame-Chase Journey will continue. The Council of Elders has suffered a heavy blow — and the one behind it all, Anaxagoras, is about to face the final judgment.\nOnly at the very last moment can Aglaea and Anaxa finally break down the barriers between them.

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n你当然也记得，你是如何成为一名行刑者，一名督战圣女的。
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nOf course, you also remember how you became an executioner and a Maiden of War.

C: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
E: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

C:
你还记得她们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
英雄撕裂天空，圣女飞落悬崖，棋手扬起初火，以负世神谕之名。
多么可敬！然而，命运从来慷慨，赴死的若虫必得赴死的结局。
你啊，救世主，看她们无光的死灰！难道还要妄想留住？
那推石攀升的，必遭大地倾覆；搅扰岁月的，也只能徒增一副零落的甲壳。
听我说，你与她们无异：正如那欢唱的也嘶声，明眸的也盲目。
去！尽管独自向前——
狂欢，起舞，投入不倦的火，永不停歇！
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
The hero tore through the sky, the Holy Maiden fell from the cliff, and the chessmaster ignited the first Flame, all in the name of prophecy of Worldbearer.
What noble deeds! And yet fate, ever generous, ensures that the death-bound nymphs shall find their death nevertheless.
O Deliverer, behold the lifeless ash they've become! Do you still futilely dream of saving them?
Those who push the boulder upward will see the earth swallow them whole. Those who meddle with time earn nothing but a shattered shell.
Hear me. You're no different from them: The singers still scream, and the bright-eyed still go blind.
Go, then! March on alone —
Revel, dance, throw yourself into the tireless flame, and never stop!

C: 拿着万能的圣杯就整了这出，这让你着实有些好奇，那老矮子到底想实现什么愿望？
E: So this was their big move with the all-powerful Holy Grail? Now you're really curious about what kind of wish that stumpy old man is trying to make.

C: 《外太空计划六号》\n简介：在为匹诺康尼开拓银轨的途中，灯蛾家系偶然接收到一条求救讯息，并发现了一座废弃的空间站。进入其中调查的他们并未意识到，自己已打开了一扇通往地狱的大门。潜藏在其中的怪物神出鬼没，不断制造惨绝人寰的血案。而直面恐惧的灯蛾战士，也将用枪炮和血浆回应它们的嚎叫。
E: Plan 6 from Outer Space\nSynopsis: While trailblazing the silver rail in Penacony, the Lampmoth Family intercepted a distress signal and stumbled upon an abandoned space station. But the moment they stepped inside to investigate, they unknowingly unsealed hell's gates. Lurking monsters moved like phantoms, striking without warning — leaving behind only grisly slaughter, over and over. And yet the Lampmoth warriors, who dare face this terror, answer their howls with gore and gunfire.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 退场歌已终。你要亲手用火种烧尽台下无人的剧场，再亲手拉开下一场序幕——又是荒唐的悲剧，还是荒诞的喜剧？这一切仅有前进才得以窥见，身后万物都将迎来又一次退场。\n但无需遗憾，无需留连，因为世代如落叶，英雄亦如是。
E: The curtain call music has ended. You must use the Coreflame to burn down this empty theater, then raise the curtain for the next act. Will it be an absurd tragedy, or a preposterous comedy? Only by moving forward can we glimpse what lies ahead, while everything behind us faces another final bow.\nBut there's no need for regret or lingering attachment, for generations fall like leaves, and so, too, do heroes.

C:
丹恒，你最信任的列车护卫，「开拓」之旅中最靠谱的伙伴。
他接受了「大地」的神权，只为与你，与黄金裔的伙伴们一起，并肩面对新世界，以及即将到来的决战——仅仅是知道他回到了翁法罗斯，就让你多了一份、不，一百份的安心感。

当他的神识深入无人可及的忆潮中时，他既是层岩，他也是海浪，他还是霜风…
他是大地，亦是其上的万物。
他为你而来，现在你们要为小三月而去。

烈阳已经指明了方向，继续前进吧。
E:
Dan Heng, your most trusted Express Guard, and the most reliable companion on your Trailblaze journey.
He accepted Earth's divine authority, solely to stand alongside you and the Chrysos Heir friends, facing the new world and the impending final clash together. Just knowing he's back in Amphoreus gives you not just one, but a hundred times more peace of mind.

When his consciousness delves into the memoria tide where no one else can reach, he is the bedrock, the waves, and the frosty gales...
He is the Earth and all that exists upon it.
He came for you, and now you will both go for March.

The blazing sun has shown the way. Press onward.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 在这永恒的居所，昔涟保护着银河众生的记忆，却也几乎散尽了自我。我必须与她一同铭记被铁墓抹消的银河众生，踏上记忆的命途，为故事写下不同的结局。
E: In this eternal dwelling, Cyrene guards the memories of all cosmic beings, yet has almost lost herself in the process. I must join her in remembering those erased by the Irontomb, embark on the Path of Remembrance, and write a different ending to the story.

C: 据遐蝶和赛飞儿所说，黄金裔们在大战结束后便出现在星穹列车之中。或许，这就是史诗落幕前，最后的一次告别机会了。多和伙伴们聊聊天吧，这大概是他们此生唯一一次登上星穹列车的机会了。
E: According to Castorice and Cipher, the Chrysos Heirs appeared on the Astral Express after the great battle. Perhaps this is the last chance to say goodbye before the epic tale comes to an end. Take some time to chat with your companions, for this might be their only opportunity to ever board the Astral Express.

C: 拉明娜履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹，抵达第一可疑藏匿点后，你们决定守株待兔——虽然似乎早已猜到无功而返的结局。
E: Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. After arriving at its first potential hiding place, you decide to wait here... Although you know you might find nothing in the end.

C: 原来呜呜伯所要的东西，是科员荣仓终的遗物。\n在得到呜呜伯的认可后，它将族群据点的位置告诉你，你与阿兰决定前去一探究竟。
E: It turns out that the Wubbaboo was after possessions the researcher Eikura Shuu had left behind.\nWith the Wubbaboo's approval, it tells you the location of the Wubbaboo stronghold. You and Arlan decide to go investigate.

C: 维修人员接过备用电源，成功重启了电梯，你乘坐电梯前往下层。\n迎接你的不知会是「瓜农」帕梅拉，还是未知的危险。
E: The Maintenance Staff took the backup batteries and successfully restarted the elevator. You step into the elevator to make your way down.\nThere's no telling whether you will be greeted by the Gossipmonger, Pamela, or unknown danger.

C: 你确定乔安就是真正的感染者，你将这个结果上报给艾丝妲。但对于另外两位可疑人员，艾丝妲的解释却令你大吃一惊。
E: You're sure that Joanne is the one infected, so you report this finding to Asta. But Asta's revelation about the other two suspects is a big surprise.

C: 基座舱段的气氛比你想象中喧闹得多，听说有位贵客即将到访，科员们都开始了繁忙的工作。从阿兰的只言片语中，你隐约猜到了来者的身份。\n他正是模拟宇宙的另一位缔造者，天才俱乐部#76，螺丝咕姆。
E: The atmosphere in the base zone seems much more boisterous than you would expect. Hearing of the imminent arrival of an honored guest, researchers all begin their busy work. From Arlan's words, you vaguely guessed the identity of the visitor.\nHe is one of the other creators of the Simulated Universe, Genius Society No. <unbreak>76</unbreak>, Screwllum.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助完成一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to complete a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 管理空间站的艾丝妲应该能提供些什么线索
E: Asta, who manages the space station, should be able to provide some clues

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n找到托帕了。开始交涉。希望别说错话。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nFound Topaz. Negotiations are starting. Hopefully we don't say the wrong things.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n找到了公司的混蛋。小扑满挺有用的。该出手了。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nFound the IPC's rascals. Little Trotter was pretty useful. Time to smash.

C: 作为人气拳手，科鲁泽却并没有出现在搏击俱乐部中。急着找到他的你，开始向四周观看拳赛的观众，打听科鲁泽的下落。
E: Despite being a popular boxer, Kluzer doesn't show up in the Fight Club. You're anxious to find him, so you turn to the audience to ask if they know of Kluzer's whereabouts.

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录来看，<color=#dbc291ff>还有3个章节隐藏在边缘通路、铆钉镇、以及铁卫禁区。</color>找到了缺失的书页就能找到宝藏的线索，如果有什么不清楚的，还可以和尤利安再商量商量。一旦将它们收集齐后，就去找尤利安聊聊吧。
E: Based on the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, there are still 3 chapters hidden at Backwater Pass, Rivet Town, and the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone respectively. If you find these missing pages, you can find clues to the treasure. Ask Julian if you have any questions. Once you've collected everything, talk to Julian.

C: 佩拉窘迫的模样引起了你的好奇，但现在似乎不是拿她打趣的好时候——\n因为，你们已经发现传家宝上写有的线索正指向如今被称为「残响回廊」的旧要塞。和佩拉一同出发，前往探索吧。
E: Pela's embarrassment piqued your curiosity, but now isn't the time to tease her...\nYou've discovered a clue written on the family heirloom that points you towards an old fort called the Corridor of Fading Echoes. Go with Pela to explore it.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第一个目标是…帮忙打杂。\n你修好了机器人「小飞」，它的自动寻路功能会带你们找到卡西迪的另一个机械伙伴，「大奔」，的下落。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "training plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe first goal of the trial is to... help with chores.\nYou fix Little Fay the robot. Its auto-navigation function will lead you to Big Ben, Cassidy's other robot friend.

C: 你找到了陶德的笔记本，但上面并非如他所说那样记满笔记，你对此有些奇怪，却毫无头绪…无论如何，你都得将笔记本交还给他。
E: You find Todd's notebook, but it's not full of notes as he mentioned. You find it a little odd, but don't know what to make of it... In any case, you ought to return the notebook back to him.

C: 一位是痴情医护，一位是寻药病患，若说没奇缘，今生偏又遇着他。帮半夏治好她的心上人，事情就能告一段落。\n总之先找着那位被「药王秘传」追缉的化外民吧，希望人没事儿。
E: One is an obsessed nurse, and the other a patient seeking medicine. She bumped into him too many times to say that it isn't destiny. Help Banxia treat her sweetheart and put this saga to rest.\nFind the Outworlder wanted by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Hopefully he's hanging on.

C: 你领到了快递，希望能和白露一起拆开。\n虽然这不是寄给你们的包裹，但是半夏已经不在了，看看梁沐都说了些什么吧。
E: You receive the parcel and want to open it with Bailu.\nThis isn't a parcel sent to either of you, but since Banxia is no longer around, look at what he wrote.

C: 比试的终点，镜流已先到一步。她邀请我一同试剑。每次我想要出剑，她却总能快我一步。末了这杀神仿佛对一路的战绩不尽兴，还要我接她一剑。我、我本以为自己是要成为剑首的人…却没成想今日要就捐躯。\n最后关头，我硬着头皮接了她一剑，杀意寒透了整个身子骨。天可怜见，一定是我平时学艺勤恳，不曾偷懒，才能活下来。这样可怕的人现身仙舟，必须快些回报将军……
E: This is the end of the competition, Jingliu won. She challenges me to a bout of sword fight. Every time I try to go on the offense, she would be a step ahead of me. This lady doesn't seem to be satisfied with her achievement this whole way and wanted me to take an attack from her. I—I thought I would be the one to become the Sword Champion, but I didn't expect myself to be utterly decimated in this way.\nIn the last moment, I took her attack, her Killing Intent shook me to my core. Thank the heavens, it must be because I have never slacked in my training that I managed to survive. With someone like this on the Xianzhou, I must report it to the general...

C: 很显然，铖杰师傅并不知道莱恩老师有受到过星际和平公司公司的邀请，莱恩老师也未曾告诉过他。\n不知道这份入职邀请函会不会增加铖杰的愧疚感，但要是不给，会增加你的愧疚感。
E: Obviously, Chengjie didn't know about the invitation the Interastral Peace Corporation extended to Master Ryan, and Master Ryan never told him.\nYou wonder if the invitation letter would cause more guilt to Chengjie. However, if you don't hand it over, it might cause you to feel guilty as well.

C: 铖杰老师需要星槎的影像资料用作参考，帮他拍一张对应阶段的培养舱照片应该就可以了。\n青雀管照片叫作「绘影图形」，仙舟上还有很多这样熟悉又陌生的说法，你得学会适应它。
E: Chengjie requires a visual reference of a starskiff. Take a picture of an incubator in its corresponding phase.\nQingque calls these pictures "visiographs." There are probably more of these familiar-yet-foreign terminology used all over the Xianzhou, you should get used to them.

C: 铖杰师傅决心完成莱恩老师的设计，希望你也能从旁监督。你也不知道这样的监督有何意义，要是有空就去看看吧。\n当一个人需要他人的监督才有信心继续完成时，这已经说明了很多问题。
E: Chengjie decides to complete Master Ryan's design and hopes you can accompany him while he works. You don't know if supervision like this can yield any result, but go ahead and do it anyway.\nWhen someone requires supervision before they have the confidence to complete a task, that says a lot about that supervisee.

C: 无论前半生接受过什么科学、魔法、信仰其他随便什么的教育，当一个三流网络红人向你发来垃圾短消息宣称她在某处荒废园子里撞见灵异鬼怪时，你的反应是——1、好耶，可以和她贴贴！2、什么新式诈骗短信，拉黑不送。3、算了，去看看吧。\n当然，不管选什么，你都暗自下定决心，任她巧舌如簧，绝不为此行掏哪怕五十信用点，绝不！再说了，你兜里哪儿有闲钱啊。
E: No matter what kind of science-, magic-, faith-, or whatever-based upbringing you've had, when a third-tier influencer sends you a spam message claiming to have encountered supernatural entities in a deserted garden, your reaction would be: 1. "Sweet lol, I can meet up with this hot babe!" 2. "A new online scam? Blocked." 3. "Whatever. Let's check this out."\nNaturally, no matter which one you choose, you would have steeled your mind to not give even <unbreak>50</unbreak> credits for this trip no matter what she says! No matter what! Besides, it's not like you have any disposable income.

C: 你们，是的，就你们俩抵达了荒弃已久的绥园。大部分恐怖片里，主角总喜欢不知死活、不问人数多寡地闯进有着闹鬼传闻的荒园。但凡他们停下来思考一番，那之后的种种故事都不会发生了。\n一路上桂乃芬尽职尽责地给你讲起绥园被荒废的历史…顺带拍下不少瘆人的素材。你不禁感慨，网络主播混口饭吃确实不容易，得在这么阴森的地方忍住拔腿就跑的冲动像个采访凶杀案的记者般拍个不停。这儿确实像个会闹鬼的地方，但鬼…鬼在哪儿呢？
E: You two — yes, only you two — arrive at the long-abandoned Fyxestroll Garden. The protagonists in most horror movies always like to brashly break into derelict buildings that are rumored to be haunted, completely disregarding all safety concerns and bringing in only a small party. If only they stopped to think things over, then none of the stories that follow would ever have happened.\nOn the way over, Guinaifen diligently recounts for you how Fyxestroll Garden ended up getting abandoned... all the while shooting plenty of spooky footage along the way. You can't help but feel it's actually quite hard for internet influencers to make a living, especially if they have to keep taking photos while resisting the urge to run away from such an ominous place, like a reporter at a homicide scene. This place really does feel as though it's haunted... Where, then, are the ghosts?

C: 抵达罗浮，迎面而来是星槎渡口人满为患的景象。
E: Arriving at the Luofu, you are greeted by an overwhelming sight of starskiffs.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 你预感到猎犬家族可能会对莱斯利•迪恩不利——最好回到黄金的时刻看看他的情况。
E: You have a bad feeling that the Bloodhound Family might be working against Lesley Dean. Return to the Golden Hour and check in on him.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n一群恶心的虫子挡住了去路——清除它们。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nA swarm of disgusting insects are blocking your way. Eliminate them.

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n查德威克想方设法找到了螺丝咕姆——聆听他们彼时的对话吧。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nNow, Chadwick has finally found Screwllum after many attempts. Listen to their conversation at that time.

C: 见证查德威克生命中最后的时光。\n扶起查德威克，陪伴他离开这场心灵迷局。
E: Witness the final moments of Chadwick's life.\nAssist Chadwick in standing up and guide him out of his spiritual labyrinth.

C: 这里貌似是「湛蓝爵士」的回忆，先看看附近有什么线索吧。
E: This place seems to be Dr. Blues' memories. Let's see if there are any clues nearby.

C: 这个由大量皮皮西人组成的「四尺圣堂」不欢迎像你这种大个子的闯入。\n你必须想想办法，或许小小哈努兄弟能帮你蒙混过关……
E: This cult named Four-Foot Hall, formed of Pepeshi, do not welcome tall visitors like yourself.\nYou need to find another way. Transforming into Brother Hanu might do the trick...

C: 三月提出与彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人。\n朱明仙舟的怀炎将军、云璃姑娘已经到达港口，灵砂大人也到场了。\n即便星海浩瀚，你坚信大家会再次见面的。
E: March suggests going with Yanqing to bid farewell to all of the guests from the other Xianzhou ships.\nGeneral Huaiyan and Miss Yunli of the Xianzhou Zhuming have arrived at the port. It seems that Master Lingsha is here, too...\nEven if you are separated by the vast starry skies, you firmly believe that everyone will meet again.

C: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？\n你选择以强硬作答，一百个善举也不能为一桩恶行开脱。
E: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?\nYou have chosen to respond with toughness. Even a hundred kind actions do not excuse a bad deed.

C: 在纷争面前，浪漫似乎总是无力的，纤细的丝保护不了任何东西。那丝依然能在黑暗中隐隐发光，即便最终破碎消亡，也能让人赞赏它残余的美好——或许，那欣赏者并不存在，只是破碎的丝破碎前的想象，以此来掩盖那毫无浪漫可言的沦亡。\n「 美和丑起于做这些行动的方式，一切行动，专就其本身看，并没有美丑之分。做的方式美，所做的行动就美，做的方式丑，所做的行动就丑。」
E: Romance is seemingly powerless in the face of strife. Its brittle thread is unable to protect anything. This thread can still glow faintly in the darkness. Even if it is broken and withered, people can still appreciate its lingering beauty... Perhaps there isn't even anyone present to appreciate the beauty of an ending. This is all just the imagination of the thread itself as it breaks. Perhaps this is all just their attempt to cover up a loss that never had any romance to speak of in the first place.\n"Whether something is beautiful or ugly is decided in how an action is carried out. No action is beautiful or ugly in itself. If the methods of this action are beautiful, then the action itself is beautiful. If the methods of this action are ugly, then the action itself is ugly."

C: 现在，孩子，让我们回到故事的起点，所有的悲剧都仍未发生的时刻。欧洛尼斯慷慨地给予了你一双窥见未来的眼睛，一切都还来得及改变。
E: Now, child. Let us return to where this story all began, before all of this tragedy had occurred. Oronyx has graciously granted you the eyes to see the future. Everything can still be changed.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n你帮华劳斯拍了一张照片——真不错。拿去给他看看吧。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nYou helped Wallace take a photo — It looks good. Show it to him.

C: 去把物资捡起来。别问为什么，让你捡你就捡。
E: Pick up the supplies and don't ask why.

C: 民间科学家雷金正在找人帮忙。\n他在努力寻找投递论文的门路，还指望你能帮上些忙。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, is looking for help.\nHe is looking to submit his thesis and wants your help.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 将你发现了绒毛一事告诉帕姆，破解事情的真相。
E: Tell Pom-Pom about the fur that you found and solve the mystery.

C: 试着向佩拉讨教一些管理学经验。
E: Ask Pela about her managerial experiences.

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 根据梓桥的记录，这艘星槎应该丢失在大衍穷观阵了，去那里仔细找找看吧。
E: Ziqiao's records say this starskiff was lost in Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Go there to have a closer look.

C: 「爱当轻语低喃，令无人知晓，唯有天空。」你无意间撞见一对爱侣的秘密约会，但今天两人的交流似乎不太愉快……
E: "Love should be soft whispers that none but the sky can hear." You accidentally run into a secret rendezvous between two lovers, but their conversation doesn't seem happy...

C: 柯库翁提出可以用散落各处的盾牌先搭出街垒的雏形。四处看看，收集盾牌、搭建壁垒吧。
E: Glykon stated that you can use the scattered shields to create the shape of prototypical fortress. Look around, collect shields, and build a fortification.

C: 阿波罗尼居然失踪了…最后的目击记录位于城下的古遗迹，顺着记忆的残像前进，寻找他的踪迹吧。
E: Who would have thought that Apollonius disappeared... He was last seen in the ancient ruins under the city. Advance after the fragments of memory and look for traces of him.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往城郊雪原为冰封的反物质军团虚卒拍摄照片，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to take a picture of a frozen Antimatter Legion Voidranger at the Outlying Snow Plains to help the museum make a replica.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是铆钉镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Rivet Town...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是支援舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Supply Zone...

C: 差不多该去听听西衍先生要怎么编造下一段故事了。希望这次他能克制一点，不要再编出那么离谱的展开了…算了，这不现实。
E: It's time to go listen to what Mr. Xiyan will make up for the next part of the story. Hopefully he'll hold himself back this time and don't write any more ridiculous twists and turns... Never mind. That's not gonna happen.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 在竞技场，你们撞见了公司员工威胁埃里克的一幕。这么多大人居然欺负一个小孩子，真不害臊！\n在乔瓦尼的调停下，你们决定用《以太战线》的胜负解决纠纷。来吧，热血沸腾的第一战！
E: You run into IPC workers threatening Eric in the arena. This group of adults is ganging up on one child. How shameless!\nWith Giovanni's mediation, you decide to resolve the issue with a match of Aetherium Wars. Come, the hotblooded debut match!

C: 胸腔激荡，脚步也变得轻快。你将与另一个人展开角逐，唯有强大且好运的那方能够继续前进。
E: With your chest surging and your footwork brisk, you and your foe begin a struggle for victory. Only the one who is powerful and fortunate may continue onward.

C: 信念与希望足以构成通往胜利的桥梁。在踏上擂台之前，你还有时间从朋友的支持中汲取力量。
E: Faith and hope are more than sufficient materials to build a bridge toward eventual success. Before you rise to the arena, you still have time to draw strength from the support of your friends.

C: 藿藿在幻障中再次体验「被人抛下的孤独体验」，尽管她知道这是假的，却难以独自克服困境。\n想必是尾巴大爷的离开又进一步加深了藿藿的孤独感受。\n尾巴大爷必须做点什么，比如「将每个人都带回来」。
E: Within the illusion, Huohuo once more experienced "the loneliness of being abandoned." Despite knowing that it is merely an illusion, she struggles to overcome it on her own.\nSurely, Mr. Tail's departure has only intensified Huohuo's feelings of being alone.\nMr. Tail must do something, such as "bring everyone back."

C: 黑塔等人给「扩展装置」加了一个新的演算分支：他们给它起名叫「黄金与机械」。斯蒂芬•劳艾德这一次似乎为你制作了一个「自定义骰」，他保证这次比之前的觐见之骰都更加有趣。
E: Herta and others have added a new Calculation branch named "Gold and Gears" to the Expansion Module. This time, Stephen Lloyd has created a "custom dice" for you, promising it to be even more interesting than any previous Audience Dice.

C: 云端自动更新了高难度模式，通关…你要拿全通成就…现在你脑海里徘徊着的只有这个念头。
E: The cloud has automatically updated the Hard Mode. To clear the stage... you have to get the All-Clear achievement... Now this is the only thought lingering in your mind.

C: 美食庆典正在进行中！去问问杰伊今日需要什么食材吧。
E: The gourmet carnival is in progress! Ask Jay what ingredients are needed for today.

C: 许多区划的囚犯从未喝过苏乐达。哈努兄弟决定用苏乐达支援这些囚犯，将它们变成伙伴。
E: Inmates from many areas have never tasted SoulGlad. Brother Hanu decides to use SoulGlad to assist these inmates, turning them into companions.

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 你们成功了！是时候抱抱你的狱友，分享这幸存的喜悦了。
E: You did it! It's time to hug your cellmate and rejoice in the fact that you survived.

C: 错乱的梦境空间中散落着（在辛格勒看来）家族犯事的证据。\n再次进入错乱的迷梦空间，打开空间里的战利品宝箱，收集并拼凑所有线索。
E: According to Singler, evidence of The Family's "crimes" is scattered throughout the chaotic space.\nEnter the chaotic space once more and open the treasure chests in the area to collect and assemble all the clues.

C: 你已经收集完了所有散落的拼图，回到画框那里去吧。
E: You have collected all the scattered jigsaw pieces. Return to the jigsaw frame.

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 和司令约好了去寻找舒翁。司令好像找错了地方…还是继续跟着它前进吧。
E: Meet up with Mr. Bigwig to search for Siobhan. Mr. Bigwig has arrived at the wrong place... but let's continue following it.

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n《美梦往事》的最后一部似乎无法进行剪辑，去找皮斯问问怎么回事吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nIt looks like editing can't go ahead for the final part of Dreamjoy Memoir! Find Pisce and ask what's going on.

C: 青雀对伊戈尔遗物的研究似乎又有了新进展，去太卜司找她们聊聊吧。
E: Qingque seems to have made more progress with Igor's relic. Go to the Divination Commission to chat with them.

C: 完成「大衍万象」简单模式I
E: Complete Mutare Magnus Easy Mode I

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在贝洛伯格的广场到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around Belobog's plaza, to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C:
用辛勤的劳动，将这个闲置的储物间建设成自己的温馨小窝吧！

哦对了，还要给你看个重要文献——

《关于浴室的Q&A》

Q：列车组成员平时都在哪里洗澡？
A：各自的房间。

Q：可一些乘员的房间里也没有浴室啊？
A：隐藏式设计，我的朋友。

Q：丹恒的房间不是资料室吗？那里也有隐藏式的浴室？
A：苍龙濯世，我的朋友。
E: Transform this unused storage space into your very own cozy little nest with a little hard work! Ah yes, I wanted to show you an important document... A Bathroom Q&A Q: Where do the Express Crew usually take their baths? A: In their own rooms. Q: But some don't have a bathroom in their room. A: Hidden designs, my friend. Q: Isn't Dan Heng's room the Archives? There's a hidden bathroom in there? A: The Azure Dragon ablutes all, my friend.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 你将在第一场小组赛中迎击「超级英雄」沐浴皂冠名赞助的提摩斯选手。\n夺走他的胜利，粉碎他的代言协议吧。
E: You will face Timos, sponsored by Superhero Shower Soap, in the first group match.\nSeize his victory and shatter his endorsement deal!

C: 咦？邮箱中怎么突然多出一封来自假面愚者的邀请？要不…去看看？
E: Huh? How'd an invitation from the Masked Fools suddenly show up in your mailbox? Couldn't hurt to... take a look?

C: 美食评审顺利通过，餐馆升为了迷其林二星！在休息前，去和昔涟简单聊聊吧。
E: The food review was a success. The restaurant has earned its second Memchelin star! Go have a quick chat with Cyrene before you rest.

C: 该做的事都做完了，是时候宣布宴会开场了。别管那么多，直接开吃！
E: Everything's ready to go, time to kick off this feast. Forget the formalities, just dig in!

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: 协助银狼调查监控室内的终端

C: …虽然有时候摔在冰上，比摔在地上还疼。
E: ...Though sometimes falling on the ice actually hurts more than falling on the ground.

C: 你们不一起去吗？
E: You're not coming?

C: 真的吗？我怎么有点怀疑……
E: Really? I find that hard to believe...

C: …这个世界还真是多灾多难。先是遇到星核，现在又被你惦记上……
E: ...I feel sorry for this world. First the Stellaron, and now you...

C: 仙舟很危险！…这个人，这个人——
E: The Xianzhou is in danger! ...This man, he—

C: 与你们无关？谁信啊，哪有这么巧的事情，星核刚爆发你就出现了……
E: Nothing to do with you? Yeah right — sounds like a weird coincidence to me. You just happened to show up after the Stellaron burst...?

C: …你的那位同伴，叫刃的，也无法幸免，对吗？
E: ...This companion of yours, Blade, he'd perish too, right?

C: 原本的目的地能透露吗？
E: Are you allowed to divulge our original destination...?

C: 那这次的「开拓之旅」就交给你啦，瓦尔特？看你摩拳擦掌很久了。要把{NICKNAME}和小三月照顾好喔。
E: In that case... Welt. Ready for a trailblazing expedition? I know you've been itching to get out there for a while now. But make sure you take good care of {NICKNAME} and March.

C: 和当权者搞好关系。
E: Getting to know the people with power.

C: 是的。
E: Precisely.

C: 也就是说，我们要尽快决定接下来的目的地了。
E: ...Which means we need to decide where our next destination is, soon.

C: 最好传说不实，我可不想当赞达尔猎手。
E: Well they better be false. I don't want to be a Zandar hunter.

C: 本月财务报销提醒通知：请各位科员将本月度的报销材料整理好，汇总到报销单上，时间节点分为两次。（如有加急单据，请单独联络对应科室）
E: This month's financial reimbursement reminder notice: Researchers, please summarize the reimbursement materials for this month on a single reimbursement form. (Please contact the corresponding section if you have any expedited documents)

C: 啊，有时候就是这样的，在沉浸于虚拟的快乐当中的时候，画面突然一黑，倒映出自己的容貌。
E: Sometimes this is the way it is. Just as you are immersed in virtual bliss, the screen suddenly turns black and reflects your face back at you.

C: 不知道这么凌乱的桌面应该如何快速打开有用的信息。
E: I have no idea how to quickly find useful information on such a cluttered desktop.

C: 你怎么突然面露微笑？是想到了什么开心的事情吗？
E: Why are you suddenly smiling? Did you think of something that makes you happy?

C: 「它总能说出我想不到的幽默段子，可谓是居家旅行必备良品。建议压力大的科员都来听听。」
E: "It can always come up with a joke that's outside my wheelhouse. I think it's a must-have for a family road trip. I'd recommend it to any researcher that's under a lot of stress."

C: 真没想到这么高端的空间站，奇物的陈列柜就是普通的玻璃，如此易碎。
E: Who would ever expect a display cabinet used for displaying Curios in such a high-tech space station to be made out of ordinary, fragile glass?

C: 人体工学桌椅，可自适配对象包括人类、机械人偶、诺布莱斯虫、狐人、智械、呜呜伯、富翁、海因斯人、心灵感应蜘蛛、巴维鲁人、石头、狗、猫（普通）、猫（布偶）……
E: Ergonomic desks and benches that can be self-adjusted to cater to humans, robots, Noblesse Worms, foxians, Intellitrons, Wubbaboos, millionaires, Hynes, telepathic spiders, Bavirus, stones, dogs, cats (normal), cats (ragdoll breed)...

C: 军团在太空站疯狗似地乱窜，返程的路也不安全，还是带点防身武器为好。
E: The Legion are rampaging through the space station like a pack of wolves — this trip won't be a walk in the park. It's better if you have something to protect yourself.

C: …好像队伍里一下子冒出来两个丹恒。
E: ...Oh, looks like we have two Dan Hengs on our team now.

C: 黑塔女士是个天才，不过如何管理各抒己见的科员，如何直接又不失礼貌地代表空间站回复博识学会的种种刁难，这些超出了她的能力范围，但恰好我能处理这一块儿。
E: Madam Herta is a genius, but managing disparate staff, tactfully representing the space station before the Intelligentsia Guild... these are all things beyond her abilities. But as it turns out they are my forte.

C: 嘿嘿，学者们可比家里那些蜩螗沸羹的老家伙好对付多啦。
E: Hehe, scholars are a lot easier to deal with than those vociferous old geezers back at home.

C: 谢谢，帮大忙了。伤口如果还在渗血，就不能放心抱佩佩了。
E: Thank you, I appreciate it. I wouldn't be able to hold Peppy properly if these wounds kept bleeding.

C: 摇杆向上打开频谱仪，再向右控制衰耗器，最后是向下输出到滤波器。
E: Push the control stick up to activate the spectrometer, then right for the attenuator, and finally down for the filter.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着艾丝妲：「<unbreak>29</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Asta: "<unbreak>29</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 我才走了几个月啊？嗯？空间站就搞成了这个德性？
E: I've only been gone, what? A few months? And the space station is already in this state?

C: 那谢谢你记得我喔。
E: Oh! Well, thanks for remembering my name then.

C: 那你真该见见天才俱乐部的其他几位，有的卖了你你还得说声谢谢。而我至少想什么就说什么。
E: You should meet the others of the Genius Society. Some of them will trick you into thanking them after they milk you dry. At least I have my honesty going for me.

C: 我？谈论自己是最无意义的行为。
E: Me? Hmm, well, Talking about oneself is as pointless as it gets.

C: 感慨来得太突然了吧！
E: Getting nostalgic already?

C: 看来年轻人的口味，就是要相似些。
E: Seems like you young people have similar tastes.

C: 现在感觉怎么样？是不是轻松多了？
E: What does it feel like? Like all your worries have been swept away?

C: 列车正沿着「开拓」曾经的旅线行驶。部分站点的名称因记忆体的损坏而丢失了，但首站和末站的名字都是「裴迦纳」——阿基维利的故乡。
E: The Express is traveling on a route that the Trailblaze once embarked on. The names of some destinations have been lost, but the first and final stops were both at Pegana — Akivili's home world.

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 列车组的大家吗？好啊，你想问谁？
E: About everyone on the Express? Who would you like to know about?

C: 她是那种…极具热情的人；她的热情就像一颗剧烈燃烧的太阳。多数时候，她很神秘；但偶尔，你会觉得她在燃烧自己，朝着梦想飞驰而去。
E: She's... extremely passionate, like a burning sun. However, she remains mysterious most of the time. Once in a while, you feel that she's burning herself out trying to accomplish her dream.

C: 丹恒是个孤独的孩子。他看着冷冰冰的，但内心不坏，可能是长期的逃亡生活把他塑造成现在这个模样，有时他会让我想起自己年轻的时候……
E: Dan Heng is a lonely child. He may appear distant and cold, but his heart is kind. Perhaps, he's the way he is today because he spent so much time on the run. Sometimes, he reminds me of myself when I was young...

C: 它就像是癌细胞一样疯狂扩散，所以星际和平公司也称之为「万界之癌」。
E: It promulgated rapidly like cancer cells, so the Interastral Peace Corporation named it the Cancer of All Worlds.

C: 三月七的桌子，比她的床看上去要整洁。
E: March 7th's desk looks neater than her bed does.

C: 不绕圈子了，{NICKNAME}——我和几个同事正在搞个大项目，如果成功了，就能一举攻克困扰我们几千琥珀纪的终极难题：「星神」的奥秘。
E: Enough chit-chat, {NICKNAME} — I am working on a big project with a few colleagues. If we succeed, it will answer the ultimate question that's been puzzling us for thousands of Amber Eras: The truth about Aeons.

C: 从虚拟「星神」那儿弄到的所有情报都是你的——这还不够吗？你知道有人为了被星神瞥一眼都出卖过什么？而你甚至能和祂们面对面说话！
E: You can keep all the information you get from the simulated Aeons. Isn't that enough? Some people would sell their firstborn just to see an Aeon! And you will get to speak with THEM face to face!

C: 不怀疑我们的身份吗？
E: So you don't doubt our identity?

C: 你好啊。我叫希露瓦，是这家机械屋的主人。
E: Hi there. The name's Serval, I'm the owner of this workshop.

C: …居然自己冲进了裂界，也不知道是过度自信还是自取灭亡。看来母亲的判断是正确的……
E: ...Escaping into a Fragmentum. I don't know if they're overconfident or just eager for death. It would seem that mother's judgment was correct...

C: 好耶！
E: *yawn* You too!

C: 再出去走走。
E: Let's have another stroll.

C: 别说了，守护者严禁讨论下层区的事……
E: That's enough, the guardian has strictly forbidden discussion of Underworld affairs...

C: 喂！谁在那儿？
E: Hey! Who goes there?

C: 谁呀？今天不营业，明天再来吧！
E: Who is it? Shop's closed today, you'll have to come back tomorrow!

C: 我猜又是那什么…《雪国冒险奇谭》粉丝们搞的二次创作吧，小说和连环画都有，就是写点小说人物之间的，呃…爱恨情仇。
E: I am guessing it's fan fiction of that... Tale of the Winterlands. They have both novels and comics. They write about the... relationship... between the characters from the original novels.

C: 所以你们跑到这里是来做什么的？不要和我说是来买书的，我不信。
E: So what are you guys doing here? Don't tell me you're here to buy books 'cuz I won't believe it.

C: 我想拜读佩拉小姐的大作…
E: I wanna read Miss Pela's masterpiece...

C: 原来如此！感觉这位前辈真是不得了，而且还怪喜欢折腾人的…天才的脑回路都是这么神奇吗？
E: So I see. This guy was really incredible, and it's also strange that he liked messing with people... Are all geniuses so eccentric?

C: …好多铁卫，好帅气！
E: ...So many handsome Silvermane Guards!

C: 不可思议…上次带你参观宾馆就好像是昨天发生的事。我年纪大了，很多事都记不清了…但只有这件事的画面一天比一天清晰。
E: Unbelievable... feels like it was just yesterday that I was showing you around the hotel all those years ago. I'm too old to remember a lot of things... but that day I remember clearly as ever.

C: 但布洛妮娅大人很看重你的才能，她觉得你能为贝洛伯格的复兴贡献许多力量…所以我来找你聊这件事。
E: But Lady Bronya values your talent, and she sees how much you could contribute to the rejuvenation of Belobog... so I came to talk to you about it.

C: 她们不是早就绝交了？
E: I thought they became enemies a long time ago?

C: 你又来了……
E: Here we go again...

C: 我就知道你是最可靠的徒弟，{NICKNAME}！
E: I knew you were a reliable apprentice, {NICKNAME}!

C: 你来了，{NICKNAME}。辛苦你跑这一趟。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here. Thanks again for agreeing to this.

C: 你站在电话亭旁，想起自己曾经看过的幻想剧——你不禁好奇在电话亭里撕开衬衫是什么感觉。
E: You stand next to the booth and start thinking about the fantasy shows you used to watch. You can't help wondering how ripping your shirt off in a phone booth would feel.

C: 看见电话亭，你觉得自己好像能变身为超级英雄。
E: Looking at this phone booth, you feel like you could transform into a superhero.

C: 据说在某些世界，某些星球，你可以随意拿走别人的财产而不受任何惩罚——但在这里不行。
E: Apparently, in some of the worlds and some planets, you can freely take other people's property with no penalty — but certainly not here.

C: 你一头雾水。
E: You are confused.

C: 哇，要是有人送我这个，我一定气死。
E: Wow, I'd be so mad if someone gave me this.

C: 恭迎他们的并非死亡…他们会被裹入新世界的襁褓。
E: It is not death which greets them... They will be swept into the infancy of a new world.

C: 我全身头疼。
E: I've got migraines all over my body.

C: 人们为什么生活在地下？
E: Why do people live down here?

C: 一次精心设计的「偶遇」…吧。桑博总能制造戏剧性的相逢，让人对他印象深刻。
E: A meticulously choreographed "chance meeting..." Sampo is pretty good at orchestrating unexpected encounters, and he always leaves a lasting impression.

C: 到啦，就是这里！
E: We're here! This is it.

C: 听说俱乐部来了一个黑头发的小哥，打遍天下无敌手，到底什么来历？
E: I heard a new fighter showed up at the club — young guy, dark hair. They say he's invincible! Where did he come from?

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 哈哈，我觉得这几位都是心地善良的人哦。
E: Haha, I believe we're dealing with kind-hearted people here, Seele.

C: 不可提及搏击俱乐部……
E: ...You don't talk about it...

C: 怎么能叫骗呢，我是看大伙初来乍到的，身上又没有地下的货币，多少有点窘迫，专门给你们介绍工作啊！
E: Set him up? Yeah, with a job! You guys are new here, and let me tell you — you're gonna need some cash.

C: 可别小看这帮家伙啊！「高手在民间」，听过这句话吧？「地火」可是高手云集，你们见了就知道了。
E: Still, don't underestimate them! "We walk in the presence of giants" — have you heard that saying before? Well, Wildfire has giants in its midst. You'll see.

C: 肯定不是矿队的人…单是操作一台矿机就够累的了。同时操控这么多？不可能的。
E: Hehe, there's no way anyone in the mining team is behind this... Operating a single unit is tiring enough, but a whole group? Hehe, Impossible.

C: 嗯，你是不是见过地上那家气派的歌德宾馆呀？
E: Yep, you've probably seen that stylish Goethe Hotel above ground, right?

C: 倒是很像你。
E: A lot like you, actually.

C: 如果当初能有人站出来，跟可可利亚大人讲清楚那样做的后果…算了，马后炮没有意义。
E: If someone had made a stand in the outset... and explained the consequences to Madam Cocolia... Forget it. It's meaningless to talk about it now.

C: 正是，她突然改变了态度，背后一定有更深层的原因。
E: Exactly. There must be a reason for this sudden change in her attitude.

C: 我在想，或许这些片段并非无序的空想，其中会不会有某种规律？…只有你一直反复做这样的梦，原因是……
E: I'm wondering if these dreams aren't just random, if there is some meaning behind them... Maybe you're having them because...

C: 哈！口气还挺大。
E: Ha! You've got some nerve.

C: 怎么样，敢不敢来一场？
E: What do you think? Bold enough to fight a round?

C: 备受瞩目的新秀出现了——
E: Coming up— a much anticipated high profile rookie!

C: 别废话了，我奖金呢？
E: Cut to the chase. Where's my money?

C: 你还有想亲自指导的拳手吗？没有的话也可以在拳馆里到处转转，别见外！老板嘱咐过了，无任欢迎！
E: Is there any other boxer you'd like to challenge? If not, feel free to look around! Boss said you are always welcomed here.

C: 污染？别逗了，盔甲能有什么污染，我看那家伙健壮得离谱，徒手就能把机器人给拆干净。
E: Contamination? Don't be ridiculous, what kind of contamination can the armor have? I think that guy is ridiculously strong. He can smash the robot with his bare hands.

C: 就是有这么巧，你先听我说完。
E: Well, it's my lucky day. Now listen to me.

C: 你可真是一个大恶人。
E: You are so cruel.

C: 很遗憾，没有。他们也许已经……
E: Unfortunately, no. They might already be...

C: 具体规则是什么？
E: What are the rules?

C: 老板说了，您来打比赛那相当于免费给拳手们指导业务，我们巴不得您多来喂喂招儿呢。
E: Boss said you coming to the challenges is like free tutorials for the boxers. We wish you were here more often!

C: 你们两个还真是面不改色呀…难道这是拥有神秘过去的人必备的素养吗？
E: "Sacrificed herself," huh... Sure. Yeah. That's the whole story...

C: 对于我和奥列格，还有其他成年人来说，封锁结束意味着找回记忆中的生活方式，重新回到「寻常」中去，不必再为最基本的生存担忧……
E: For Oleg and I, not to mention the other adults, reopening the passageway means rediscovering old ways of living — a return to "normality..." Survival is no longer the top of the agenda...

C: 前代大守护者的武断策略导致上下层区产生了隔阂，本该一心同体的贝洛伯格人陷入了相互的猜疑和记恨……
E: The barrier between the surface and the underground was the product of the former supreme guardian's misjudgment and the policies that resulted from it. The people of Belobog should have stood together, but instead we were made to blame and hate one another...

C: 爸爸妈妈，很久以前就离开了。他们去了很远的地方，还没回来！
E: Mom and Dad went somewhere far away a long time ago — haven't come back yet!

C: 当然。而且这绝对不是一时的感悟，而是我一直以来的想法。
E: Of course I did. And it wasn't some last-minute speech I cobbled together. It's how I've always felt.

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}要是再求求我，我说不定可以再考虑一下。
E: If you ask me again nicely, I might think about it.

C: 后记不知道到哪里去找。
E: I don't know where to find the postscript.

C: 正常人谁会看后记啊。
E: Who reads the postscript anyway?

C: 我小时候还是挺喜欢看《冒险鼹鼠队》的，特别是里面描写的什么「热带雨林」、「沙漠」…就好像这些地貌是真实存在的。
E: I loved reading The Adventurous Moles when I was a kid, especially the bits about the rainforest and the desert... As if those things really existed.

C: 或许未来的某一天，铁栅栏会从这个世界消失，敞开前方的道路。
E: Maybe some day in the future, the metal barriers will disappear from this world, opening doors toward a future possibility.

C: <unbreak>19</unbreak>个。
E: <unbreak>19</unbreak>.

C: <unbreak>21</unbreak>个。
E: <unbreak>21</unbreak>.

C: 已知多个派系收到了盛会之星「匹诺康尼」的邀请函。据悉，这是匹诺康尼的「家族」首次公开向银河各派系发出正式邀约。
E: Meanwhile, many factions have received an invitation to Penacony, the Planet of Festivities. This is the first time that The Family in Penacony has openly sent formal invitations to all galactic factions.

C: 博识学会武装考古学派在海尔雷星发现一微缩星系，相关工程正在持续进行中。
E: The Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild have discovered a miniature galaxy on Hellem. Further investigation is being conducted.

C: 但既然你们知道星核，又言明要帮助「罗浮」。那么于情于理，我都要给各位一个面对面的机会……
E: ...but since you know about the Stellaron and have stated that you want to help the Luofu, I thought I should at least meet you in person...

C: 将军，这是罗浮的内部事务……
E: General, this is an internal affair for the Luofu...

C: 如此，一来洗清各位被星核猎手泼上的污水，二来也好得知这猎手潜入仙舟的目的，又与爆发的星核有何关联。列车团的诸位，意下如何？
E: Doing so would clear the misunderstanding between us, reveal the true intentions of the Stellaron Hunters, and help us understand their connection to the Stellaron burst. What say you, my Astral guests?

C: 为何让「我们」搜捕卡芙卡？
E: Why did he ask us to go after Kafka?

C: 可惜我们过不去…
E: A pity we can't get through...

C: 哟，你会写诗啦？
E: Wow, when did you become a poet?

C: 就刚刚那个话题吗？我认为没错。但，{NICKNAME}…谁又不是呢？
E: For the sake of this discussion? Yes, I think so. But, {NICKNAME}... who isn't?

C: 听说持明族的龙女也来了，不知道她的医术能不能镇住场子……
E: I heard the Vidyadhara dragon lady is here. Maybe she can help stem the tide...

C: 听说太卜司的洞天也遭了灾？青雀，你怎么还有心思玩牌戏啊？
E: I heard there was a disaster in the Divination Commission's delve? I'm surprised you're in the mood to play right now, Qingque.

C: 好啊。
E: Sure!

C: 我从天舶司的朋友那儿听说将军请来了几位客人，似乎专为解决罗浮之上的麻烦而来。看来就是你们几位了。
E: A friend in the Sky-Faring Commission told me the general commissioned guests to deal with the troubles on the Luofu. You must be the guests.

C: 杨叔，这位小神医看起来和周遭的人似乎完全不是一个画风啊。
E: Our little miracle worker here seems very different from everyone else around — don't you think Mr. Yang?

C: 到了星槎海会怎么样？
E: What will happen at Starskiff Haven?

C: 那就是说咱们没帮手，没支援，得对付一群怪物，还得抓个公司悬赏天文数字的星核猎手…行吧，也不是第一次了。
E: So... we've got a bunch of monsters to deal with, an IPC most-wanted Stellaron Hunter to catch, and we have to do all that on our own without reinforcements... Fair enough, this isn't our first rodeo.

C: 符合她的一贯作风…
E: That would be suitably Kafkaesque...

C: 不必，本座这儿有将军文告，请看。诸位捕获星核猎手之后，即由太卜司接手审问事宜。
E: Inessential. I hold a proclamation from the general here, if you care to see. Upon detaining the Stellaron Hunter, questioning and all further arrangements are to be undertaken by the Divination Commission.

C: 你是哪边的啊！我看倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
E: Hey, whose side are you on!? I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!

C: 看看，跟太卜待久了，咱们几个都沾上了未卜先知的毛病了。
E: *sigh* I knew we'd spent too long around the master diviner — now we're predicting the future...

C: 只差一点…只差一点啊……
E: It was so close... so close...!

C: 不用算。本座除术数占卜外，直觉也很准！
E: No need. Aside from divinations and calculations, my instincts are accurate too!

C: 等等，咱们还没有关闭这些丹炉呢？！
E: Wait, we still haven't doused the burners!

C: 用不着看景元的脸色！「药王秘传」可以给你们想要的！
E: You don't have to appease Jing Yuan! The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus can provide all that you desire!

C: 你们有更重要的职责。云骑军听令！
E: You have a more important duty. Cloud Knights, attention!

C: 可以了吧，将军。
E: That should do, general.

C: 此处的封印…早在建木重生前已然摇摇欲坠了。
E: ...This seal was already on the verge of breaking before the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection.

C: 饮月，你软弱了。
E: Haha, your strength has waned.

C: 剩下的礼物，该送去哪儿呢……？
E: But what about the rest...?

C: 许多人因为我们的到来而得救，仙舟免去了一场灾祸。既然命中注定这件好事要发生，管它是由谁促成的呢，高兴一点，{NICKNAME}！
E: Since showing up, we've saved a lot of people and averted disaster for the whole Xianzhou. Who cares whether someone or something was directing it? Be happy, {NICKNAME}!

C: 咱脸皮薄嘛！这种私人小事怎么好在大庭广众下谈啊。
E: I was shy! Talking about personal stuff like that in front of everyone... it'd be too embarrassing!

C: 抱歉…我明白…我明白的。我只是一时无法接受……
E: I'm sorry... I understand... It's just hard for me to accept...

C: 好啦，开个玩笑，活跃下气氛。
E: Alright, just kidding. Just trying to liven things up around here.

C: 我听说停云也为其他人准备了礼物？她还是我记忆中的那个停云…
E: I heard Tingyun prepared gifts for others, too? That's just like her...

C: 岩明先生，你准备了什么？
E: Yanming, what is it that you've prepared?

C: 不如下回就让瓦尔特留守列车，我带着你们几个一起开拓新世界。
E: Next time, I think I should be the one trailblazing with you guys — Welt can stay on the Express.

C: 一路顺风。
E: Safe travels.

C: 人生处处是别离，只不过，老夫经历得比你们多得多而已。
E: Life is full of farewells, and I've seen more than most.

C: 帕姆玩偶…不错欸！四舍五入也是带着列车长一起玩啦。啊，但是那个玩偶有点大，估计塞不下……
E: My Pom-Pom toy... not a bad idea! That's kinda like bringing the conductor on vacay with me. Ah, but I think it's too big to stuff in the case...

C: 好纠结啊，再带点什么好呢……
E: Oooh this is hard! What else should I take...

C: 我不记得邀请函中有这么一段…你是说，其中还有密文？
E: I don't remember that part of the invite... You mean, there was a hidden message?

C: 在这里工作的体验怎么样？
E: How is it working here?

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 好熟悉的对话…
E: Woah, déjà vu...

C: 我不是。
E: No.

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
E: Could there be anyone worse than me?

C: 你注意到她垂下睫毛，环顾四周，尤其注意哄闹的人群，仿佛有什么东西正藏身其中。但很快，她又收敛情绪，将视线放回到你身上。
E: You notice her lowering her lashes and looking around, paying close attention to the crowd, as if something is hiding in it. But she quickly collects herself and returns her eyes to you.

C: 关于钟表匠的出身，人们众说纷纭：有人说他是来自天外的行商，有人说他是监狱星的囚犯，还有人说钟表匠只是一个符号，其实根本不存在这号人物……
E: There are different stories out there about the Watchmaker's origin. Some said he was a traveling merchant from beyond the sky, some claimed that he was exiled to Penacony as a prisoner... Some speculate that he wasn't even a real person, just a symbol...

C: 倒也谈不上悲伤。只是…这梦境太过博爱，太过宽容了。
E: I'm not sad. It's just that... this dream is so loving and forgiving.

C: 这样啊，我明白了……
E: I see...

C: 「天哪，你们真高！」——你很想对二人这么说，但不知怎地，你现在变成了某位…卡通人物。
E: "Goodness me, you guys are so tall" — You desperately want to say this, but somehow, you've transformed into a certain... cartoon character.

C: 那个…桑博先生……
E: Well... Mr. Sampo...

C: 滴答！求你了，灰色的朋友！帮帮米沙吧！
E: Tick-tock! I'm begging you, my gray friend, begging you! Please help Misha!

C: 但身为美梦小镇的守护者，钟表小子不能坐视不管——只要使用<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表把戏」</color>，让流淌在梦境的好情绪重新回到人们心里，大家一定能和好如初！
E: As the guardian of Dreamville, I can't just sit back and do nothing. By using the power of <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color>, I can direct the flow of positive emotions in the Dreamscape back into people's hearts — that way, everyone can patch up their differences and get along again!

C: {M#你小子}{F#小丫头}滚一边去，别碍事！我要让那个女人明白自己惹错人了！
E: Mind your own business, {M#lad}{F#lass}! I have to let that lady there know she's messed with the wrong person!

C: 我刚才…不会是想要和那位小姐打一架吧？我疯了吗？
E: Was I... about to get into a fight with that lady? Was I crazy?

C: 每天求我的人可多了，我难道都要通融一下？
E: People ask for favors every day. Am I supposed to just say yes to all of them?

C: 仗着自己年轻有活力，天不怕地不怕，每天游手好闲、惹是生非，自私自利，一点都不知道为社会贡献价值！
E: You fear for nothing just because you're young and energetic. You idle away your time every day, going around stirring up trouble! You contribute nothing to society!

C: 你看起来很困扰…
E: You seem distressed...

C: 罢了罢了，不想了。还是琢磨下班后吃点什么好吧，好歹让那点破苜蓿币有机会发光发热。
E: Fine, I'm going to stop dwelling on it. I should probably be thinking about something productive, like what to eat after work. At least that will put my lousy Alfalfa coins to some use.

C: 嗯…好。
E: Well... Okay.

C: 它会保护你不受伤害。
E: It will protect you from harm.

C: 这不公平，我救了你！
E: This is not fair! I saved you!

C: 没错，所以我会给予你最后的慈悲，选择自己死法的权利。
E: Correct. I will now offer you a final mercy. You get to choose how you wish to die.

C: 这是传说中的金垃圾，权力与地位的象征。只有最具资格的桶才能占有它。我们都觉得自己才是那个桶，因此争吵不休。
E: This is the legendary golden trash, a symbol of power and status. Only the most qualified trashcan may lay claim to it. All of us feel that we are that trashcan, and so we keep fighting for it.

C: 于是我们决定让一位眼光独到，且态度公正的旁观者代为评判，决定金垃圾的归属，为长久的争吵画上一个句号。
E: So, we have decided that an observer possessing unique and just insight should be the judge for this matter and decide to whom the reward will belong, and bring a conclusive end to this long dispute.

C: 匹诺康尼…本身？
E: Penacony... itself?

C: 匹诺康尼的美梦正在*沉没*，变回它原本的样子…坠入{RUBY_B#忆域}深海{RUBY_E#}。
E: Penacony's dream is *sinking* right now, turning back to its original form... and falling into the {RUBY_B#Memory Zone}deep sea{RUBY_E#}.

C: 这是一个身负累累血债之人能给你的唯一忠告。
E: This is the only advice I have for you, from someone burdened with a blood debt.

C: 在匹诺康尼，所有人都可能说谎，当然…也包括我，这点我无可辩驳，也不会奢求原谅。
E: In Penacony, everyone may be lying, and yes... that includes me. I can't deny this, nor do I seek forgiveness.

C: 他或许有这个打算，但我不会。
E: Perhaps he plans on doing so, but I won't.

C: 你说得对，不能离开。
E: You're right. I can't leave.

C: 输入银狼的代码
E: Enter Silver Wolf's code.

C: ——我知道那冰冷的铠甲里是谁。
E: ...I know who is inside that cold armor.

C: 所以，我很羡慕你。
E: So, I really envy you.

C: 因为…这不是在梦里吗？美梦乐园怎么会有人死掉呢，不应该只有好事发生…才对吗？
E: Because... aren't we supposed to be inside a dream? How could someone die in a beautiful dreamscape like this... Shouldn't only good things happen here?

C: 那就说说引导吧。
E: Then tell me about the tour.

C: 说说引导吧！
E: Tell me about the tour!

C: 不用大喊大叫，我听得见。<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>模型肯定和拱门一样放在大厅某个地方。等着，我马上回来。
E: There's no need to yell, I can hear you. The <color=#dbc291ff>pinball machine</color> must be hidden somewhere in the hall, like the arch. Wait here, and I'll be back in a minute.

C: 看来你的确不理解「真诚」。
E: Looks like "sincerity" isn't in your dictionary.

C: 我需要砂金先生的全盘计划。
E: I need Mr. Aventurine's comprehensive plan.

C: 而星核猎手的骇客小姑娘用非常手段解开了梦境酒店的封锁，且根据{NICKNAME}看到的现场，流萤小姐一案背后是他们在推动。
E: The hacker girl from the Stellaron Hunters used extraordinary means to unlock the dreamscape Hotel's seal. According to the scene witnessed by {NICKNAME}, it is likely that they are behind Miss Firefly's case.

C: ——晚点我拉个会议，好好复盘下事故报告该怎么写！
E: ...I'll organize a meeting later to properly go over how this incident report should be written!

C: 我不是你认识的那个人，我的故乡也未能像你们的世界那样幸运。
E: I am not who you think I am, nor will my home be as fortunate as your world.

C: 她根本不是「巡猎」的命途行者，你才是，对么？告诉我，黄泉究竟是什么来头。
E: She's clearly not a Pathstrider of The Hunt. But you are, aren't you? Tell me, what's Acheron's deal?

C: {RUBY_B#星际和平公司}寰宇企业{RUBY_E#}的最爱…你很有野心。
E: The IPC's favorite... Ambitious, aren't you?

C: …十三岁。
E: ...I'm thirteen.

C: 有趣。
E: Interesting.

C: 有何不可？
E: Why not?

C: 那位一丝不苟的{RUBY_B#星期日}橡木家主{RUBY_E#}有着近乎偏执的控制欲，你必须让他掌握足够多的信息，又不能让他察觉到破绽……
E: Sunday didn't become head of the Oak Family by acting sloppy. He's obsessed with control. You have to give him enough detail to satisfy his meticulous nature, but not so much that he gets suspicious.

C: …那我就如你所愿。*它们*一直待在最适合的地方，从未离开……
E: ...As you wish then. They never went anywhere. They're right where they belong...

C: 快去试试吧，先生！
E: Go give it a try, Mister!

C: 所以你也一定不会忘记，她生命最后一刻是如何凄惨，你身后的声声尖笑又是如何钻心…你就那样头也不回地逃走了，照她说的做了。
E: So you surely won't forget how tragic her last moments of life were, how the piercing laughter behind you felt like it was drilling into your heart... You ran away without looking back, just as she told you to.

C: 我们都累了，所以打算留在这里，我…还有他。
E: We all are, which is why we chose to stay here. Me... and him.

C: 你当然能。你的好运一定会在恰到好处的时候帮你，一枚<color=#dbc291ff>星核</color>和一位<color=#dbc291ff>令使</color>…就这么简单，对吗？
E: Of course you can. Your luck will help you at the right time — a <color=#dbc291ff>Stellaron</color> and an <color=#dbc291ff>Emanator</color>... It's that simple, no?

C: 那走吧，我送你去大舞台那里。
E: Let's go then. I'll take you to the stage.

C: 他只会去往一个地方——无论是过去、现在，还是将来！
E: There's only one place he can be going, whether it's in the past, present or future!

C: 你好，我叫三月七！{NICKNAME}就不介绍了，你肯定认识。
E: Hello, I'm March 7th! I'm sure {NICKNAME} needs no introduction, as you definitely know {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 即便…这非我所愿？
E: Even if... that's not what I want?

C: 都跟你说了！有什么事情可以好好商量！
E: I already told you! We can talk things out!

C: 但结果…一直都是不可。
E: The result has invariably been that they "can't."

C: 嗯？对啊，怎么了…知、知更鸟小姐？！我没看错吧？
E: Hmm? Yeah, what about it... M—Miss Robin!? Am I seeing things right?

C: 其实事发前不久我就在现场…公司的使节来者不善，这件事是真的吧？还有那位巡海游侠，轻而易举就斩断了天空……
E: Actually, I was there shortly after it happened... Is it true that the IPC's ambassadors came with ill intent? And that Galaxy Ranger who easily cut through the sky...

C: 当然，家族没有同意。交涉破裂的结果…就如你们所见。
E: Of course, The Family did not agree. The result of the failed negotiations... is as you see it now.

C: 可就算知更鸟小姐这么说…也很难相信啊……
E: Even if you say so, Miss Robin... It's hard to believe...

C: 咦，我刚刚是在做什么来着？小姐你又是……
E: Huh, what was I just doing? And who might you be, miss...?

C: 喏，就在那边……
E: Look, over there...

C: …现实里的日子一定很辛苦吧？
E: ...Life must be quite difficult for them in reality, I imagine.

C: 就是她了。
E: There she is.

C: 好呀，它歌唱的声音肯定很动听。不过，它要住在哪里呢？
E: Okay! A bird like that must have a beautiful singing voice. But where will it live?

C: 一切的转折点发生在铁尔南牺牲后。两位无名客同伴先后离世，令「钟表匠」不得不奔赴拓荒一线。而这次远行，让他的对手抓住了机会。
E: The turning point came after Tiernan's death. With two of the Nameless gone, the Watchmaker had to go to the front lines. It was at that moment his rivals saw an opportunity.

C: 我可是信奉「神秘」命途的家伙，人生哲学就是不相信任何东西。
E: Well, I'm a follower of the Enigmata. My philosophy forbids me to have faith in anything.
*sigh*

C: 尽管结局令人遗憾，但我仍然坚信这个选择没错。鸟儿不是为了在笼子里度过一生才破壳而出的…就算它们无力飞翔，天空也是它们的归宿。
E: Despite that unfortunate outcome, I still believe it was the right decision. Birds aren't meant to spend their lives in cages... They belong in the sky, even if they can't fly.

C: 「同谐」的志向固然远大，可即便在这无忧无虑的美梦中，也是强者恒强，弱者愈弱…人性如此，它固然存在伟大的一面，却也有无论如何都不可消弭的弱小。
E: While the Harmony holds noble aspirations, the strong will always be strong, and the weak will always be weak, even in this carefree dream... Human nature contains greatness, but it also harbors inherent weaknesses that can't be eradicated.

C: 如果能成为调弦师，我想要召唤…「齐响诗班」多米尼克斯！我想要和大家一起歌唱，把我们的愿望传递出去，让大家都能感受到幸福和喜悦。
E: If I could become a Chordmaster, I'd like to summon... Dominicus the Harmonious Choir! I want to sing with everyone and spread our wishes so that all can feel happiness and joy.

C: 各位，我还有个问题希望得到解答。
E: ...I have another question I hope to have answered.

C: 为我等伟业着想，星期日，请二位稍作歇息吧。
E: For the sake of our grand cause, Sunday, please afford these two an opportunity to rest.

C: 这也不行，强制唤醒有严格的使用条例，是切不能随意操作的。
E: I'm sorry, but there are strict rules regarding forced awakening — it cannot be done without the proper clearance.

C: 纶音，宣其纶音。
E: Talking. Do all the talking.

C: 是这样的，我听说谐乐大典开始前，会开放给盛典预热的选秀会场，叫什么…「苏乐达™盛会海选」，就在「热砂的时刻」。
E: So, I heard that before the Charmony Festival begins, there will be a pageant to kick off the festival. It's called the... SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions or something, and it's going to be held in the Moment of Scorchsand.

C: 这题我会！哼。
E: Aha, I know the answer for this one! "Hmph."

C: 你是从哪冒出来的？
E: Where did you come from?

C: 且慢！{M#英俊的先生，俏美的小姐}{F#两位俏美的小姐}——
E: Please wait! {M#Handsome gentleman, beautiful miss}{F#My beautiful ladies}...

C: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
E: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

C: 求求你了，我说的都是真的！
E: I'm begging you, all I speak is the truth!

C: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们……
E: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim...

C: 可是…我们现在还是没有趁手的武器……
E: But... we still don't have any weapons in hand...

C: 我愿意将「秩序」行者的志向如实告知各位，以便你们做出对星穹列车，匹诺康尼，和这片宇宙更好的判断。语言苍白无力，难以描绘出那理想的面貌……
E: I'm willing to divulge the unembellished truth as to the intentions of the Order's Pathstriders, so that you will make better judgment for the Astral Express, for Penacony, and for this stretch of the universe. Words can hardly do justice to the beauty of that ideal...

C: 那之后，我和知更鸟度过了一段相对无忧无虑的时光。某一天的晚餐后，我和妹妹在歌斐木先生的庭院里意外发现了一只孤单的小谐乐鸽。
E: Later on, Robin and I lived a time with nary a care in the world. One day, after dinner, while my younger sister and I were lounging about in Mr. Gopher Wood's yard, we spotted a fledgling Charmony Dove all on its own.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>要说服猎犬家系停止搜查，以便那位逐梦客能够生存下去，实现他的愿望吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Will you try to convince the Bloodhound Family to stop their pursuit, so that the Dreamchaser may live peacefully and realize his wishes?</color>

C: 由此，每个人都能在乐园中回归自己原本的位置。有人瞻仰银河，全神贯注地计算孤绝世界{RUBY_B#银轨的起点}「裴伽纳」{RUBY_E#}离我们的距离，有人在角落彼此相拥，不必承担多余的职责……
E: And thus, every person can return to their base selves in this utopia. Some gaze in reverence at the stars, pouring their whole beings into calculating the distance between us and the isolated world of {RUBY_B#Silver Rail's starting point}Pegana{RUBY_E#}. Meanwhile, some seek refuge in quiet corners, holding one another, unencumbered by the chains of unwelcome obligations...

C: 那…这一切的代价是什么？
E: But... what is the price to attain all this?

C: 所以，他是在和谁说话？小米沙，你知道什么吗？
E: So, who is he talking to? Do you know anything about it, Misha?

C: 也许…也许再往前走，我还能想起更多……
E: Perhaps... I'll remember more things if we go further...

C: 你听到的鸣笛声，就是列车抵达匹诺康尼的声音？
E: And the whistle you heard was the sound of the Express arriving at Penacony?

C: 总得有人奔赴星际拓荒前线，现在匹诺康尼就剩一个「前无名客」了，为什么不能是我？
E: Someone has to be at the forefront of the interstellar frontier, and I'm the only former Nameless in Penacony. So, why can't it be me?

C: 你要是死了，那星核的秘密…就再也没有重现天日的时候了。
E: If you die too, the secret of the Stellaron... will go to the grave with you.

C: 将昏迷中的{NICKNAME}带进这里的，想必也是他吧。如此看来，我们岂不是在最开始就和「『钟表匠』的遗产」擦肩而过了？
E: The one who brought our unconscious {NICKNAME} here must have been Misha. If that's the case, we encountered the Watchmaker's Legacy from the beginning, didn't we?

C: 容我致歉，星核确有其事，但米哈伊尔的财富不过是街谈巷议的传言罢了。
E: If I may apologize, the Stellaron part is real. As for my wealth, however, it's nothing more than a baseless rumor.

C: 我能嗅到，虚假的美梦就要结束了。那群无名客虽然年轻，但确实有能力做到这件事…就像你们当年那样。
E: I can sense that this false sweet dream is coming to an end. The Nameless may be young, but they had the ability to achieve this goal... just like you did in your time.

C: 「因为我不止想要诸位欣赏这出剧目，还希望你们…帮助我完成它。」
E: "For I desire not only your enjoyment but also your... assistance in its completion."

C: 「可送别君王后，谁来做新的君王呢？」
E: "But after the king's departure, who shall become the new king?"

C: 大家也都从梦境里回来了，姬子他们正在大堂和将军谈事呢。既然你醒了，咱们就跟列车组的大伙报个平安吧，跟我来～
E: Everyone else has also returned from the Dreamscape. Himeko and the rest are at the lobby discussing matters with the general. Now that you're awake, we should tell the Crew that you're all right. Come with me!

C: 放心吧，杨叔，这家伙精神得很，一路上都快把{M#他}{F#她}这辈子能开的玩笑全开完了。
E: Don't worry, Mr. Yang. There's nothing wrong with {M#him}{F#her}, {M#he}{F#she} practically burned through a lifetime's worth of jokes on the way here.

C: 怎么会，当然欢迎！他们表示各位是公司在匹诺康尼的可靠盟友，没有不欢迎的理由。
E: Why of course you're welcome! They've mentioned that your team is a trusted ally of the IPC in Penacony, so there's no reason not to welcome you.

C: 「基于对星际和平的长久考虑，经由庇尔波因特总部授权，战略投资部将代表公司永久放弃对匹诺康尼主权之宣称，并无条件支援家族对匹诺康尼的重建工作。」
