E: "In light of long-term considerations for interastral peace, and by authority of Pier Point HQ, the Strategic Investment Department — on behalf of the Interastral Peace Corporation — will permanently relinquish its claim on Penacony sovereignty, and offer unconditional support of The Family's rebuilding efforts on Penacony."

C: 嘿嘿，过奖了。
E: Hee-hee, stop flattering me.

C: 你可一定要好好地记在心里哦？
E: You'll remember these words dearly, won't you?

C: 现在，是时候为你讲一个<color=#dbc291ff>小小的睡前故事</color>了。
E: It's time to tell you <color=#dbc291ff>a little bedtime story</color>.

C: 「死亡」是「沉眠」的伪装…
E: "Death" is the disguise of "Dormancy"...

C: 即便没有它，我不也走到今天了吗？
E: Even if it's a meaningless task, I've come this far, haven't I?

C: 这些光在星星死后，依然会走过好几百万光年的旅程，跨越好几百万年的时间，照亮另一个世界的夜空。
E: Even after the stars perish, their light will travel millions of light-years, spanning countless years, to illuminate the night sky of another world.

C: 千万要区分现实和想象的界限…好吗，小灰毛？
E: Always distinguish between reality and imagination... alright, Gray?

C: 安心啦。剧本只是写着，盛会之星会赐予我三次「死亡」。但它同样提到，我会在这里得到「难忘的收获」。
E: Don't worry. The script says that I'll experience three "deaths" but also receive an "unforgettable reward" on the Planet of Festivities.

C: 咳、咳咳！安全起见，您最好还是离那些东西远点。
E: A—Ahem! For your safety, please stay away from those objects.

C: 橡木家系倒台后，老奥帝一方就是匹诺康尼最大的势力了。即便只以继位顺序推算，他也是现今所有家主中在任最久，资历最深的人。
E: After the downfall of the Oak Family, Old Oti's faction became the dominant force in Penacony. Even if we consider only the succession order, he's the longest-serving and most senior among all the family heads.

C: 到头来，不就是为了给公司创造一个契机，让你们有理由重新接手阿斯德纳这块肥肉吗？嚯嗬嗬嗬……
E: Wasn't it eventually to create an opportunity for you IPC to regain control of the precious Asdana? Ohohoho...

C: 从今天开始，银河中的任何有志之士都可以成为梦想之地的股东！这便是老奥帝将要贯彻的「同谐」之道，嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！
E: Starting today, anyone in the Cosmos can become a shareholder of the Land of the Dreams! This is the path of Harmony I'll choose! Ohohohoho!

C: 好像…聊得有些跑题了，翡翠女士。我们是不是该讨论下后续的策略？
E: Looks like... we've strayed off-topic, Miss Jade. Should we discuss our next steps?

C: 奥帝先生，为您引荐一下——这位就是匹诺康尼未来的股东之一，星穹列车的姬子女士！
E: Please allow me to introduce her to you, Mr. Alfalfa. This is Miss Himeko from the Astral Express, one of the future shareholders of Penacony!

C: 当然，肯定没问题。也请「钻石」放心吧。
E: Of course, there won't be any problems. And please, give Diamond my assurance.

C: 安心吧，「钻石」一直很信任我们。我会替你美言两句的，升回P<unbreak>45</unbreak>不是问题。
E: Don't worry. Diamond has always trusted us. I'll put in a good word for you, and you'll have your P<unbreak>45</unbreak> position back in no time.

C: （这里就是「晖长石号」…真豪华啊。）
E: (So, this is the Radiant Feldspar... so luxurious.)

C: 你回来了，萨缪尔小姐。
E: So, you're back, Miss Samuel.

C: 好熟悉的对话…
E: Woah, this conversation is such déjà vu...

C: 会有黑眼圈的。
E: You'll have dark circles under your eyes.

C: …别忘了，我随时都可以一枪爱死你。
E: ...Remember, I can take you out with just one shot whenever I choose.

C: 算了，明人不说暗话，我直说了吧：我和一个叫{RUBY_B#「市场开拓部」主管}奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德{RUBY_E#}的高管有仇，而这个花枝招展的家伙能帮我找到他。
E: Forget it. I'm not one to beat around the bush. I've got a score to settle with a high-ranking executive fella named {RUBY_B#Head of Marketing Development}Oswaldo Schneider{RUBY_E#}. And this flamboyant fella here can help me find him.

C: 你看这船上多热闹啊，真不错。等哪天不忙了，我也要在生态舰上举办个大派对，到时一定会邀请你们。
E: Look at how bustling this ship is, not bad! Someday when I'm less tied up, I plan to host a grand party on my eco-ship, and you'll all be on the guest list.

C: 这都什么跟什么…不过，倒也确实和这有关就是了。
E: What does that have to do with anything... But, I suppose it does have something to do with that.
Five...

C: 垃圾桶。
E: A trashcan.

C: 持续进行一个盯。
E: Keep staring at it.

C: 不过在离开前，你们应该也有不少话想对过去的无名客说吧？
E: But before leaving, I'm sure you all have plenty to say to the Nameless of the past?

C: 提前思考永远不是坏事。总有一天，我们都要面对离别。
E: It's never a bad thing to reflect. One day, we'll all have to face our own farewells.

C: …很久以前，我也和你一样，拥有无可替代的同伴。我们也曾踏上旅途，在每一个正确的时候，尽己所能，做出最正确的选择。
E: ...Long ago, I, too, was like you, with irreplaceable companions. We also embarked on journeys, making the best choices we could whenever we could.

C: 你安慰人的方法还真古朴。
E: Wow, your method of consolation is truly unsophisticated.

C: ——呜呜呜哇！
E: ...Bwaahhh!

C: 等等！怎么感觉这个桥段似曾相识？！
E: Hang on! Why am I getting a sense of deja vu?

C: 时逢开学季，折纸大学正在筹办「彩梦校庆」，既是献给新生的开学礼物，也是在校生一年一度的狂欢庆典。
E: Well, it happens to be the start of the academic term, and Paperfold University is preparing for its Dreamlight Anniversary. These annual festivities serve as both a welcoming gift for new students, and a chance to celebrate for those already enrolled.

C: 听闻各位股东重回匹诺康尼，酒店也早早腾出了六间铂金客房，随时可以入住。
E: Upon hearing the news that you were returning to Penacony, the hotel prepared six Platinum Guest Rooms for your stay. They are ready for you anytime.

C: 太棒了，你真是一个天生的*蕉声*歌手！
E: Fantastic! You're a born Banagibberish singer!

C: 我？我是你漫长旅途中疲惫不堪的灵魂，是你想要一场休憩的渴望。
E: Me? I'm the weary soul on your arduous journey, the longing for a moment of rest.

C: 球棒•忍者，在下再多嘴奉劝一句，为了安全，阁下和伙伴们最好尽快远离梦土。
E: Forgive me for speaking out of turn, Baseball Bat Ninja. But for your safety, you and your companions should leave this land of dreams as soon as possible.

C: ——所以，你要自己决定。
E: So, the decision is yours to make.

C: 芮克先生也会「钟表把戏」？
E: Could Mr. Reca be using Clockwork?

C: 第一场第一镜 ，ACTION！
E: Scene 1 Take 1, ACTION!

C: 识人是导演的基本功，演员的一言一行都在体现他的个性——比如你刚刚的台词表现出了「好奇」，而好奇是求知的动力。
E: Knowing how to read people is a basic skill for a director. The way a performer speaks and behaves reflects their personality. For example, you expressed curiosity just now, which is a driving force for learning.

C: 接下来是第三个问题，就让「她」来问吧。
E: Now, for the third question. I'll let her do the honors.

C: 呵，你把她给逗乐了，真是位「幽默」的演员。
E: Hah, you amused her. A humorous performer indeed.

C: 谢、谢谢…我、我是社长恰丽卡……
E: Th—Thank you... I—I'm the club president Chaletka...

C: 我有个狐人朋友说话和你很像。
E: A foxian friend of mine talks just like you.

C: 希望不认识
E: I wish I didn't.

C: 你自称是我们的同伴，理应表明身份来意。
E: You claim to be our companion, so it's only reasonable to ask that you state your identity and purpose.

C: 听起来又是群友。
E: Another one from the group chat?

C: 很敏锐，看来阁下也拥有忍者的超•听力。但同行只是一场巧合，在下前来，只为在校园中布设缭乱•忍符，破除邪忍阵法。
E: Very astute. It appears you have ninja super hearing too. However, following you was mere coincidence. My purpose for coming here is to set up Dazzling Ninja Seals across the campus in order to dispel the Evil Ninja's matrix.

C: 今天它非得放在这儿不——
E: I'm going to put this here today or—

C: 等会儿，刚才那什么玩意儿？
E: Wait a sec. The fudge was that?

C: 也对，或许还是让她称呼「先生」更合适？
E: Um... Maybe I should've just kept it at "Mister." Would that have been better?

C: 莫奈拉，你怎么又……
E: Monella, why are you...

C: 啊…我找你好半天了。
E: Ahh... I've been looking for you all day!

C: 你可能也会觉得…有些难以置信。我竟然会认同那种方法，真是疯了。
E: You're likely to find it... a little unbelievable. I still can't wrap my head around how I actually agreed to this. I must be crazy.

C: 原来如此蕉。
E: I see, bana.

C: …那是在下的忍法，难以传给外人。
E: ...That's my ninjutsu. It's hard to teach it to others.

C: 我自己的忍法…唉，感觉完全没有头绪，还是学学怎么画小猴吧蕉……
E: My own way of the ninja...? I don't even know what that is. Maybe I should just practice monkey weaving, bana...

C: 交给你了。
E: I'll leave it to you.

C: 没关系，给这位积极的演员最后一次机会吧，恰巧勇者小猴也是个积极的角色。
E: It's fine. Let's give this proactive actor one more shot. Brave Monkey is known for its can-do attitude too.

C: 对于剧组，开机就要承担风险，真正的导演哪怕让字幕里的名字加上示亡号，也绝不会让摄影机停下来。
E: Every film crew knows full well the risks they run the moment filming begins. And in turn, a dedicated director would never stop rolling the cameras, even if it meant having to insert an obelus next to a crew or cast member's name in the credits!

C: 我可不聋啊。你们聊那么大声的时候，就没想过我分得清善恶？
E: I ain't deaf, alright? While you were yappin' so loud, did it ever cross your mind I could tell good from evil?

C: 那就是对着坏人开枪。
E: Taking a shot at bad guys.

C: 死亡是最公平的爱护，尤其是对你这种会越变越坏的小可爱。
E: Death is the fairest form of grace, especially for muddle-fudgers like you who'll only become worse forms of evil with time.

C: 就在两人的注视下，两道思绪瞬间消失，不留一丝痕迹……
E: Under the gaze of both, the two streams of thought vanishes instantly, leaving no trace behind...

C: 申请开舱——权限不足，请输入密码。
E: Hatch-unlock requested... Insufficient clearance. Please enter password.

C: 谢谢大师。弟子…不胜荣幸。
E: Thank you, Master. This is... my greatest honor.

C: 在下…在下看见了！忍界竟有如此宏伟的都城！
E: I... I see it now! To think, there's such a majestic capital in the Ninja World!

C: 苦茶大师，在下已将缭乱•忍符布置在忍之都各处。
E: Master Kucha, I have placed the Dazzling Ninja Seal all over the Ninja Capital.

C: 忍侠？看来在下的试炼已然终了。
E: Ninja Hero? Huh. It seems my trial has finally come to an end.

C: 过气？你昨天还在流梦礁……
E: Last year? Just yesterday at Dreamflux Reef, you were...

C: 看来那个忆者*蕉*给了你们一些不该学的东西。既然如此……
E: Hmph, looks like that Memokeeper gave you guys some banatips that good students shouldn't know about. In that case...

C: 睡蕉小猴的数量越来越少了，病毒的强度一定也会有所削减。
E: The number of Slumbernana Monkeys seems to be declining. The virus must have also been weakened somewhat.

C: ——邪祟就在此地。
E: ...for the fiendlings to be here.

C: 原来这边以前是可以走的啊……
E: This place used to be passable, huh...

C: 「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖……」
E: "At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips..."

C: 杂乱的声音…挥之不去……
E: We can't get rid of... all the noise...

C: …想来也别无其他可能性。
E: ...In all likelihood.

C: 静观其变，等待试炼。
E: Watch on and wait for the trial.

C: 等等。他的气息不同，十分沉静。
E: Wait. He seems calm and composed, unlike the rest.

C: 这…也罢，那我就依成本价，送遐蝶小姐一个顺水人情吧。希望以后，多多支持我的小店哈。
E: I... Fine. I'll sell it to you at cost as a sign of goodwill, Miss Castorice. Just promise to support my business in the future!

C: 当然，我不会拒绝。也请二位相信，这份礼物的背后并无过多深意——结盟一事，我们可以择日再议。
E: Of course you may. Esteemed guests of Okhema, please believe me when I say that this gift carries no hidden agendas. As for the matter of the alliance, you need not give me an answer here and now.

C: 此物名为<color=#dbc291ff>「引纬」</color>，是我家族世代相传的纺衣器具，如今象征意义已远大于实用性。见到此物便等于见过我本人，倘若树庭有为难的意思，出示之便可。
E: This tool, called the <color=#dbc291ff>Weft</color>, is used to spin thread and has been passed down in my family through generations. Though it doesn't see much practical use nowadays, it's become a symbol of great significance. In this respect, it is the perfect token to represent my will. If you encounter trouble at the Grove, just take this out and show it to them.

C: 此外，遐蝶知道，在树庭的地界上，它引出的金丝能为各位勾勒周遭一切已形或未形之物，如同…我之所见。
E: While you're in the Grove, the golden thread of the Weft can also render all things around you visible, regardless of whether they're corporeal or not, allowing you to see things as I would. Castorice knows this, too.

C: 和我讲讲那位泰坦，塞纳托斯。
E: Tell me about the Titan known as Thanatos.

C: 真期待呀…不知道人家又会产生怎样的变化？
E: How exciting... I wonder what changes I'll experience next?

C: 算了，不管是什么，人家说话算话！既然小缇安打起精神了，那我们出发吧？
E: Ah, well... It doesn't matter, because I'll be sticking to my word anyway. Now that Trianne has cheered up, shall we get going?

C: 还记得吗？阿格莱雅大人说过：「在树庭的地界上，它引出的金丝也能为各位勾勒周遭一切已形或未形之物」……
E: Do you remember? Lady Aglaea said this: "While you're in the Grove, the golden thread of the Weft can also render all things around you visible, regardless of whether they're corporeal or not."

C: 这是…仙女木？
E: Is that... a White Dryad?

C: 嗯？好伙伴，你也遇到过什么麻烦吗？
E: Hm? Were you in a similar situation before, friend?

C: 确实。也多亏这几位尊神先前没有受到黑潮影响，陷入疯狂……
E: That is true. It's also fortunate that these gods weren't corrupted by the black tide and did not descend into madness...

C: 唔，*我们*记得的。缇安只是想帮大家……
E: Ah... Okay, we will keep that in mind. Trianne was just trying to help...

C: 让人家来看看……
E: Let me see...

C: 吓人家一跳！你…是记忆的回声？
E: You scared me! Are you... the echoes of a memory?

C: 没事，有好几个星神给我撑腰。
E: Don't worry. There are several Aeons that have my back.

C: …缇安大人，金线对她有反应么？
E: ...Lady Trianne, how does the golden thread react to her?

C: 前方就是启蒙王座……
E: Ahead lies the Luminary Throne...

C: 缇安，找到了——大家可以飞到对面去！
E: Trianne found it! Everybody, fly across to the other side!

C: 这花看起来软蓬蓬的…嘿，我跳！
E: This flower looks so soft and fluffy... Heh, watch this!

C: 我曾经是。而这，缇里西庇俄丝女士……
E: I once was. But Lady Tribios...

C: 呀，是王子！王子也是来泡澡吗？
E: Hey, it's the crown prince! Are you also here for a bath?

C: 你们出生在圣城，生活与奥赫玛人无异，对一族的了解也只来自旁人口述。
E: You were all born in the holy city and are living lives no different from the Okhemans. Everything you know about our people comes only from the tales of others.

C: 别让我说第二遍。
E: Don't make me repeat myself.

C: 在列位公民见证下，此子将沉入冥海：以飨{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}，并与天地间众英灵。
E: With all present as witnesses, this child shall descend into the Sea of Souls, where he will nourish the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} and join the fallen heroes.

C: 啊呀，是的。我那俩女儿又在学校闯了什么祸——
E: Ah, yes. Did my daughters cause trouble at school again...?
...What?

C: 时间太短，还没奏效？
E: Maybe it just hasn't taken effect yet?

C: 我不在的时候，你在做什么？
E: What were you doing while I was gone?

C: 而风堇的先祖…似乎就是信仰{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天空祭司。要找到返回星穹列车的办法，也许她能提供更多线索。
E: It seems Hyacine's ancestors were the Sky Priests who worshipped {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}. Perhaps she can give us more clues to find a way back to the Astral Express.

C: 妈妈…发生什么了…？
E: Mama, what's going on...?

C: 继续，就用你我的厮杀飨宴{RUBY_B#尼卡多利}死去的尊神{RUBY_E#}！
E: Now, we honor the {RUBY_B#Nikador}fallen gods{RUBY_E#} with this fight to the death!

C: 猜测：{F#她}{M#他}要说些胡话。
E: I guess... {F#She}{M#He} will say something nonsensical.

C: 总是这么一针见血呢，万敌阁下。请放心吧，假如命运真的指定了我，我会做好准备的。
E: You've always been so perceptive, Lord Mydei. Rest assured. If fate has truly selected me, I will be ready.

C: 放心，交给我吧。
E: Do not worry. Leave it to me.

C: 又见面了，王子。
E: We meet again, Your Highness.

C: …在神殿外的山壑下。可惜，是个坏消息。
E: ...She was at the bottom of the valley outside the temple. But... that's where the good news ends.

C: 如果那样的世界真的存在……
E: If a world like that truly exists...

C: 可如今最大的问题…<color=#dbc291ff>是我们还没找到能背负</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>岁月之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>神职的黄金裔</color>。
E: But the most pressing issue at hand... <color=#dbc291ff>is that we haven't found the Chrysos Heir capable of bearing</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Time Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>'s divinity</color>.

C: 把我投射到这世上、让我拥有了这幅身体的，不就是那个{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦，欧洛尼斯}比孩子都任性的泰坦宝宝{RUBY_E#}嘛！
E: Isn't the one who projected me into this world and granted me this body... that {RUBY_B#Time Titan, Oronyx}baby Titan even more capricious than a child{RUBY_E#}?

C: 缇宝老师，如果不介意……
E: If you don't mind, Tribbie...

C: 嚯，这书架可真够壮观的，堪比树庭的友爱之馆了。
E: Look at that! This bookshelf is quite a sight, almost on par with the Library of Philia back at the Grove.

C: 在神殿偷窃是死罪，可那女孩年纪还小，无依无靠，只是想填饱肚子。妈妈就把她抱出了神殿，还悄悄塞给她一些好吃的。
E: Stealing from the temple was punishable by death, but that poor girl had no family and just wanted something to eat. So, Mother took her outside and even gave her some food.

C: 列队，架起长枪！夺回火种！
E: Take your positions and ready your arms! We're taking back the Coreflame!

C: 终于…这道山门背后，就是广袤的天地。
E: Finally... beyond this gate awaits a boundless world.

C: 没有回应呢。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}…祝你做个好梦。
E: No response after all. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... may you have a good dream.
Ugh...

C: 奥帝先生，我们这样提前召唤出「从者」，会不会有点…违反规则？
E: Mr. Oti, summoning a Servant this early... Isn't that a little against the rules?

C: 橡木家系真是后继有人啊，御主。不过，我觉得你的联手计划过于理想了。每位参战的主从都有自己想实现的愿望。
E: You're a worthy successor of the Oak Family, Master. But I think your plan for alliances is a bit idealistic. Each participant and their Servant have their own desires.

C: 而这个浸泡在梦中的星球上，人们因为知晓圣杯的仪式、见证英灵的召唤，相信了圣杯奇迹的存在。
E: Then, the people on this dream-soaked planet will come to believe in the miracle of the Holy Grail through learning its rituals and witnessing the summoning of Heroic Spirits.

C: 而我们这出节目的主角们就要来了，你负责将他们拖住，直到仪式的最后一步完成。届时，我会履行约定的。
E: And the real stars of this show are about to make their entrance. Your job is to hold them off until the last step of the ritual is complete. Once that is done, I will honor my end of the deal.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！别妄自菲薄，和葛瑞迪不同，你可是真正的艺术家！在舞台上以一人演绎万千角色悲喜人生的才能，你正是这些「英雄」的克星。
E: Ohohoho! Don't be so modest. Unlike Grady, you're a true artist! You had the talent to bring thousands of characters to life all on your own. You are the perfect counter to these "heroes."

C: 她不过是个平凡无奇的女孩。扮演国王已经够痛苦了，为什么还要强迫她继续在英灵的幻觉中强撑下去呢？
E: She was nothing more than an ordinary girl. Playing the part of a king was already painful enough. Why should we force her to continue in the delusion known as Heroic Spirits?

C: 我在仙舟击退了幻胧！
E: I defeated Phantylia on the Xianzhou!

C: 我还成了那里的股东呢！
E: I even became a shareholder there!

C: 我偶尔也会后悔自己十四岁那年没去进修「量子历史」而选择了「寰宇地概」，我当时觉得…数学太难了。我常常问自己，如果我做了别的选择，还会是今天这幅衰样吗？
E: Yeah, sometimes I regret picking the Geography of the Universe course when I was fourteen and walking away from Quantum History... I felt math was just too tough for me back then. But now, I ask myself... Would I still be stuck in this dead-end job if I made a different choice?

C: 想让我解除宝具？那就用令咒命令我吧！御主，像那些人用合同与法律夺走我的名字、事业一样，来吧！
E: If you want to stop my Noble Phantasm, you'll have to force me with a Command Spell! Come, Master! Take away my free will, just like how they took away my name and career with their contracts and laws!

C: 还记得你现在要做什么吗？收集各级科员的课题申请，对现在的你来说，这简直是闭上眼都能完成的工作。
E: Do you still remember what you need to do now? Compiling project proposals from all levels of researchers. By now, it's second nature — something you could do with your eyes closed.

C: 和活着时一样，我失败了。身为背叛者，这倒是个…恰如其分的结局。
E: I failed, just like how I failed in life. This is... a fitting end for a traitor.

C: 抬起头来，鸢尾花之母！<color=#dbc291ff>我以第二划令咒下令，归还你身为英灵的证明。</color>
E: Hold your head high, Mother of Iris! <color=#dbc291ff>With the second Command Spell, I return to you the testament of your existence as a Heroic Spirit.</color>

C: 他宝贝的，戒赌…还真是富有教育意义。
E: Darn right. Quit gambling... that's quite the educational dream you had there.

C: 算了，我怎么可能记得无名小卒的名字。
E: Hmm. Never mind. There's no way I'd ever remember the name of some nobody.

C: 我从你讲第一句的时候就想问了，为什么要针对公司员工？
E: I've wanted to ask this since your first line. Why target the IPC Workers?

C: 这个房间就会原地爆炸！而身为住客们的你们也将在烈焰中粉身碎骨。
E: BOOM! The room explodes. You, the guests, will also go up in flames.

C: 你们不会理解，当名字都不属于你自己，价值被压榨干净的绝望。
E: You'll never understand the despair when even your name is taken away, and you've been wrung dry of all worth.

C: 不，这种程度的小喽啰，还用不着劳烦御主你出手。
E: No need to trouble yourself with small fry like this, Master.

C: 就能合体成巨大机器人！
E: You combine into a giant robot!

C: 或许是心理作用，你从他的表情里看出来三分凉薄和七分讥讽。带着一肚子火气，你狠狠地踢了斯科特一脚。
E: Maybe it's just your imagination, but his expression seems... <unbreak>30%</unbreak> smug, <unbreak>70%</unbreak> mocking. You lash out, kicking Skott in frustration.

C: 哼，看来用不着我出手了。
E: Hmph, looks like I won't have to step in after all.

C: 所谓「正义」，不过是名字的一部分。怎样？这可是现在才公布的冲击性事实呱！
E: That "justice" is a part of the name. It doesn't mean anything! What do you think? How would you rate this shocking reveal. *ribbit*

C: 滴答，这是曾君临匹诺康尼的魔王，钟表匠发明的钟表把戏。再强大的心灵，在它的面前，都只是一张随意涂改的白纸。
E: Tick-tock, behold the Clockwork — invented by the Watchmaker, the Devil who once ruled Penacony. In its presence, even the strongest minds become nothing but blank pages, easily rewritten at will.

C: 御主，你是个过于善良的姑娘，对圣杯毫无欲求。所以，我必须自己踏上道路。
E: Master, you're far too kind-hearted, with no interest in the Holy Grail. That's why I must pursue this path myself.

C: 这烂片还有完没完了？
E: This bargain-bin flick still isn't over?

C: Archer……
E: Archer...

C: 走吧，你自由了，妄图超越本分的神选者。把自己的羽翼折断，到人间去，走在大地上，看看这人世真正的模样。
E: Go now. You are free — O chosen one, who dared to exceed his bounds. Sever your wings, descend to the mortal realm, and walk their lands. See what this world is truly like.

C: 我知我罪，不应由他人为我的错误善后。
E: I might have gone astray, but others shouldn't have to clean up after my mistakes.

C: 容我拒绝。
E: No, thank you.

C: 「无妨。我相信对『生命』的渴望，本就诞生于一无所有中。」
E: "That doesn't matter. I believe the desire to live was born from nothing to begin with."

C: 实在抱歉，小女子本以为躲进梦里便不会波及他人，不曾想意外是一桩接着一桩。
E: I'm so sorry. I thought no one would be affected if I hid inside a dream. I didn't expect so many mishaps to happen.

C: 停云小姐的事就拜托你们了。
E: I'll leave Miss Tingyun in your hands.

C: 苏乐达糖浆。
E: SoulGlad syrup.

C: 不过停云还有一事心愿未了。既然已是最后一站，可否借一步说话，找个僻静的角落和二位谈些私事？
E: But there's one more thing I wish to do. Since this is our last stop, could I have a word with you two in private? Perhaps somewhere more secluded. I'd like to discuss a personal matter.

C: 虽然嘴上说着「敢请教二位尊姓大名」，可心里总忍不住想，这「初次见面」的景象，对于各位恐怕是「久别重逢」。
E: When I asked for your names, I couldn't help but think that this "first encounter" was actually a "long-awaited reunion" for you.

C: 请跟我来，想必就在这附近。
E: Please follow me. She should be around here somewhere.

C: 好好打上几个喷嚏啦。
E: Sneeze a few times!

C: 唯一称得上遗憾的，只是有些话没来得及说出口。
E: My only real regret is that I left some things unsaid.

C: 无论结果如何，会有人替你见证。
E: Regardless of the outcome, you will have a witness.

C: 那也无可奈何，说明我和过去一样……
E: Well, that's out of my hands. It will just prove that I'm still the same person...

C: 在这盛会之星，无论我有过怎样的身份，它们都已不再重要。
E: On the Planet of Festivities, whatever identities I once had, they no longer matter.

C: 既然大家都准备好了，我先列下几个选项：首先是<color=#dbc291ff>「海洋星球」露莎卡</color>。
E: Since everyone's here, Pom-Pom will start presenting our options. First up is <color=#dbc291ff>the oceanic planet of Lushaka</color>.

C: 也把这个「好消息」带给黑天鹅小姐吧。
E: Don't forget to share the good news with Miss Black Swan.

C: 呵呵，{NICKNAME}，这是你第一次探索星图外的世界吧？
E: Ah, {NICKNAME}. This is your first time exploring beyond the astral charts, isn't it?

C: 信用点是不是没用了？
E: Are credits going to be useless there?

C: 或许是外部环境的影响？
E: Perhaps it's the effect of some external stimulus?

C: 翁法罗斯之外，银河中某个熟悉的角落……
E: Outside Amphoreus, in a familiar corner of the Cosmos...

C: …原来你只是在对着个投影念台词啊？！
E: ...You mean to say you've just been reciting your lines before a hologram!?

C: 她靠着潜意识就轻易化解了「同调」…不愧是令使。
E: She easily dispelled the Resonance with her subconscious mind... as expected of an Emanator.

C: 好吧，好吧…怎么说我也是个讲道理的人，这件事是怪不到你们身上。
E: Alright, fine... I am a person of reason, after all. You're not to blame for this.

C: 人工呼吸？
E: Mouth-to-mouth resuscitation?

C: 维尔图斯，谁要你通知黄金裔来带我们去什么圣城了？我们是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的祭司，生来便如无足之鸟，如何能忍受困居一处？
E: Virtus! You acted on your own to ask the Chrysos Heirs for help!? To bring us into their so-called holy city, no less! We are priests of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, born as footless birds — how could we possibly endure being confined to one place?

C: 在他看来，更需要提防的是让其他人发现你我对这个世界一无所知。他想隐瞒「天外来客」的事。
E: I believe he thinks it's worse for others to find out we know nothing about this world. He wants to hide the fact that we're visitors from beyond the sky.

C: 诺杜斯，*我们*不愿强迫你。但你也要为部族的同胞们多考虑。
E: Noldus, we do not wish to force you, but please think of the people in your tribe.

C: 求求你们，救救奥赫玛吧，疯王{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}回来了，看哪，混乱、纷争，到处都是……
E: Please, I beg of you! Save Okhema! The mad king {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has returned! Look! There's strife and conflict everywhere...

C: 当务之急，先和白厄汇合。
E: Our priority now is to find Phainon.

C: 我不怀疑两位的身手，只是……
E: I don't doubt your skills but...

C: 白厄……
E: Phainon...

C: 缇安老师尾随那些逃亡的士兵去了，这也是计划的一部分吗？
E: When Trianne followed those escaped soldiers, was that part of the plan too?

C: 无荣耀之死，不可……
E: A death without glory is no...

C: 无妨。两位请随意。
E: No problem, go ahead.

C: 请放心，如有必要…我会移开视线。
E: If it'll make you feel better... I can avert my gaze.

C: 这听起来不难。
E: Sounds doable.

C: 什么意思？
E: I don't think I understand your question.

C: 挺会编啊，丹恒。
E: That was a good story, Dan Heng.

C: 毕竟「塔拉萨波利斯」只是我临场编造的，如果他真是探险家，又对翁法罗斯的地理了如指掌，恐怕我们早就被看穿了。
E: After all, Thalassopolis was something I came up with on the fly. If he's truly an explorer familiar with the geography of Amphoreus, I'm afraid that he'll have already seen through our lies.

C: 神谕又是谁颁布的？
E: And who was it exactly that issued the prophecy?

C: 这人办事太不地道！
E: How sneaky of him!

C: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}承诺的智慧理应平等地属于每一个人。
E: The wisdom of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} should be shared equally by all.

C: 有机会你也可以试试，但不是现在，先去找真言狮口吧。
E: You can try it out when you get the chance, but now is not the time. Let's go look for Verax Leo first.

C: 都有「神」了，还在意这个？
E: Is that even surprising, considering that there are also gods in this world?

C: 尽说无妨。
E: Do speak your mind.

C: 遐蝶搭上了她的第二根手指…然后是第三根，直到她的半只手掌轻柔地握住了你的左腕。
E: Castorice adds a second finger... then a third, until half her palm gently envelops your left wrist.

C: 喔…给三月拍照。差点就忘了，幸好你还记得这事。
E: Oh... We need to take a photo for March. Good thing you still remembered that.

C: 想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。请好好休息。
E: To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin. Rest well, you two.

C: 你今天说的话…
E: Today, you talked...

C: …为了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，必须做到这种程度吗？
E: ...Do you have to go to such lengths for the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

C: 真想沐浴一刻啊…你会陪我同去吗？
E: Unwinding in a bath sounds appealing now... Would you care to join me?

C: 神意使然，你终究还是站在了奥赫玛这边。
E: It is by the will of the gods that you stood on Okhema's side in the end.

C: 很难想象这里曾有人生活…
E: It's hard to imagine people used to live here...

C: 哦，这番景象可不多见，值得用留影石机记录下来。请随意。
E: Well, it's not every day you see a view like this. Go ahead and capture it with the photostone.

C: 无妨，你我很快就要给这场疯狂画上句点了。
E: No matter. You and I will soon bring this madness to a close.

C: 这一关过得真险…幸好我俩平衡感都还不错。
E: Whew... That was a close one. Thankfully we both have a remarkable sense of balance.

C: 他们回来了。
E: They're back.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 从近处看，那座大门属实宏伟。
E: This gate looks just as magnificent up close.

C: 但你说的没错，无需以武力衡量缇宝老师的强大，她是翁法罗斯最值得被歌颂的英雄之一。
E: But you're not wrong, strength is no measure for how powerful Tribbie is. She's one of Amphoreus' most revered heroes.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 它似乎有些反复无常，就像是一位…孩童。
E: They seem somewhat fickle, much like... a child.

C: 「随我来…请随我来。我看着你…她也想看着你。我们想看见你的全部。」
E: "Follow me... Please follow me. I see you... She also misses you. We want to see everything about you."

C: 你可在看着？
E: Are you watching?

C: 你…温暖。温暖，喜欢。
E: You... warm. Me like, warmth.

C: 流萤…
E: Firefly...

C: 再次见面时的情景…我还记得。
E: The scene of us meeting again... I still remember it.

C: 迷迷会教我们该怎么做。
E: Mem will tell us what we have to do.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 「离开…离开。」
E: "Leave... leave."

C: 现在只剩我们了…该去哪寻找消失的记忆呢？
E: We're the only ones left... Where should we go to find the lost memories?

C: 阿格莱雅大人十分仁慈。她只是让我立下誓言，然后就放我回家了。
E: Lady Aglaea is quite lenient. She let me go after I made a vow.

C: 不用通知圣城守卫吗？
E: Do you need to inform the city guards?

C: （你只需要帮我一个小忙…转过身去，在心里默念到三十，好吗？）
E: (Just do me a little favor, okay? I want you to turn around and count to thirty.)

C: 呃…您可能对我们这行有点误解？我和那位大人的确是同行，但这也不代表咱们是一伙的呀！
E: Uh... There seems to be a misunderstanding, Lady Aglaea. Even though she and I work in the same trade, it doesn't make us allies!

C: 等等…依我的推测，你藏身于污秽中莫不是为了藏匿赃物？
E: Wait... if my suspicion is correct, are you skulking about in the filth to keep something hidden?

C: 啧啧，不愧是半神。连我这干了大半辈子「清洗」的刺客也逃不过你的感官啊。
E: Well, well, a demigod never ceases to impress. Not even a top assassin with a lifetime of "purging" experiences can slip past you.

C: 生意好像不怎么样啊？
E: Not getting much business, huh?

C: 那里应该就是报名点。
E: That should be the place to sign up.

C: 呵…呵呵，我大概明白了。
E: Pfft... I see what this is.

C: 赌注有点大…
E: The stakes are high...

C: 那你的目的是什么？
E: So, what is your motive?

C: 「神王啊…你将自己的<color=#dbc291ff>理智</color>丢弃到了何处？」
E: "Oh god-king... Where did you lose your <color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>?"

C: 格奈乌斯阁下…你打算怎么做？
E: Lord Gnaeus... What do you intend to do?

C: 在诗人的笔下，你仍会是疯狂和堕落的化身，燃尽了荣光的战神。但此时此刻…我愿意送你前往开满花朵的温柔乡。
E: Poets will still describe you as an embodiment of madness and corruption, the god of war who incinerated all of their glory. Yet, at this moment... I am willing to send you into the gentle embrace of death, to a sweet land full of blossoming flowers.

C: 回到梦境
E: Return to dream

C: 遐蝶小姐，你觉得…这是不是代表我和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}相当契合？
E: Miss Castorice... Does this mean I'm a good match for {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

C: 的确，真是愚蠢的侥幸心理。
E: You're right. How foolish of me to think I got away with it.

C: 它说：「归还火种吧」。
E: Restore the Coreflames, it declared.

C: …但白厄不同。他是没有缺陷的黄金裔，完美的神性容器。
E: But not Phainon. He is a Chrysos Heir without flaw, a perfect vessel for divinity.

C: 呼…呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 这下没吃上热乎的。
E: Oops, missed the party...

C: （如果接受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼，预言是否也会在我身上应验？）
E: (If I take on {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} trial, will the prophecy come to pass for me as well?)

C: 阿格莱雅也无法笼络所有人心，即便她拥有横跨千年的视野和智慧。
E: Despite her vision and wisdom that spans across thousands of years, even she cannot win over the hearts of everyone.

C: {NICKNAME}，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的图腾虚位以待。
E: {NICKNAME}, the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s vacant totem awaits.

C: 好可爱的声音！一定是因为收集了许多记忆，人家的成长远超预期！
E: I have such a cute voice! It must be because of all the memories that I collected. They allowed me to grow beyond expectations!

C: 但是…你所缺少…之物……
E: But... you lack... something...

C: 在那之前，就请好好……
E: But before that, just...

C: ——正如我明白，此刻阿格莱雅女士正在远方探听这场私人会谈。如果您需要，阁下，我可以掐断金线，捍卫您的基本权利。
E: ...Just as I am conscious that Lady Aglaea is secretly listening in on our private meeting from afar. If necessary, Lord Anaxagoras, I can sever the golden thread to protect your fundamental rights.

C: 欢迎来到「黎明云崖」。相较云石天宫的喧嚣凡俗，这里的一切都更为庄重，非受邀者不可往来。
E: Welcome to Dawncloud. The atmosphere here carries a greater sense of solemnity than the mundane clamor of the Marmoreal Palace, with entry permitted only to the invited.

C: 不过，这个故事与汝所盘算的不能说瓜葛相连…只能说毫无干系哪？
E: However, this story doesn't seem to be connected to your plan... In fact, I'd say that they aren't related at all?

C: 看您刚刚在自言自语，是正在进行让自我陷入迷狂的思考吧？抱歉打断您，但时间紧迫……
E: I saw you muttering to yourself and was wondering whether you were caught in a delirium of reflective thought? I'm sorry to interrupt you, but time is of the essence...

C: 哼，我反而觉得它和城中的神殿没有区别，虚有其表……
E: Hmph. Well, I don't see how this place is different from those temples in the city. All they have are magnificent facades...

C: 我不想…留下遗憾。
E: I... don't want to have any regrets.

C: 除了阿雅，大家都不知道你过去经历过什么，你也很少提起。但我们清楚，那一定是段沉重的往事，就像每一位黄金裔注定要背负的命运。
E: Cas... You hardly ever talked of your past. None of us knows what you went through apart from Agy. But we know it must have been filled with pain and hardships, as it is the fate every Chrysos Heir is destined to live out.

C: 精神意志已回归宇宙，再见…
E: My will has become one with the universe. Goodbye.

C: 真是个老腐朽。陷入疯狂的泰坦，早该让位于半神。我们走着瞧！
E: Oh, please. The time when these deranged Titans should have vacated their spot to the demigods is long overdue! You'll see soon enough, you old fogey!

C: 呵呵，所以…我果然没看错你。
E: Haha... I knew I was right about you.

C: 我最后一次服从她的指示，轻轻触碰了眼前的老人。
E: This was the last time I followed her command. I gently touched the elderly woman before me.

C: 她似乎在说：「啊哈哈，赛飞儿不知道哦。」
E: She seems to be saying, "Ah hahah, Cipher does not know."

C: 哈哈，瞧你那嫌弃样！干嘛啦，我就是表演一下——千年以前没准还有人喜欢这口癖，现在早就不流行了。
E: Whoa! That upset? Calm down. I'm just putting on a show with the meowing. Some people might have been into that a millennium ago, but it's long since gone out of style.

C: 哎哎，别这么剑拔弩张。放轻松，放轻松……
E: Oh, come now! Don't be so upset. Relax! Relax...

C: 来，孩子，百夫长叫什么名字？…不，忘了我刚才的话吧。
E: Come, child, what is the name of that centurion again? Actually... Never mind, forget I said that.

C: 呃…暂时还和你「阴阳两隔」着呢！
E: Umm... I still belong to the land of the living as of now, thank you very much!

C: 前所未见的灾厄？莫非是…「死亡」？
E: An unprecedented calamity? Could it be... "Death"?

C: 请问…回来的那位斥候，他在哪里？
E: May I ask... where is the scout who managed to came back?

C: ——啊，你们的模样…莫非是女王提到的异邦勇士？
E: — Ah, by the looks of it... you must be the foreign warriors that the queen had mentioned, right?

C: 圣女？从未听过…时间紧迫，请别耽误太久。
E: Maiden of War? I've never heard of this... There's little time to waste. Please don't take too long.

C: 你们似乎听到了一声满足的叹息，仿佛出自某种庞然巨物之口。
E: You seem to hear a sigh of contentment, as if it comes from the mouth of some colossal being.

C: 该使用欧洛尼斯的奇迹了！
E: It's time to use Oronyx's miracle!

C: 我…并未找到和解。
E: I... have not made peace with death.

C: 诸位，我晓得自己已无力回天。拿去这个，求你们代我实现那至高的伟业……
E: I know that I am no longer capable of carrying out that task. Take this, all of you, and please, fulfill that great undertaking on my behalf...

C: 斯缇科西亚女王为我接生…你将我纳入哀地里亚…阿格莱雅邀我加入逐火之旅…假如世间没有死亡，这一切故事皆不会发生。
E: If the world was bereft of death, then the Queen of Styxia wouldn't have played midwife in delivering me into this world... You wouldn't have welcomed me into Aidonia... And Aglaea would never have invited me to join the Flame-Chase Journey. None of these stories would ever have happened.

C: 玻吕茜亚…究竟做了什么？
E: What did you do, Polyxia?

C: 汝声称：「翁法罗斯历史乃是『轮回』」——
E: You were saying that Amphoreus' history is cyclical...

C: 你说得对，吾师。我孤独的求索路即将迎来新的起点，我得出发了——
E: You are right, Empedocles. My lonely pursuit is about to welcome a new chapter. I must be on my way now...

C: 妈妈，我终于杀青了！
E: Mom, I made it! My character arc is finally done!

C: …看来，这不是眼下就能解开的谜团。
E: ...It seems that this is a riddle which cannot be solved anytime soon.

C: 遐蝶…不，应该是泰坦……
E: Castorice... No, the Titan...

C: 准备工作已完成，祝您路途平安。
E: The preparations are complete. I wish you a pleasant journey ahead.

C: 啊呀！那壁画上的大树…莫非是吾？
E: Oh my! Could it be that the Great Tree painted in this mural... is actually depicting me?

C: …很有他的风格，然后呢？
E: ...An uncanny impersonation. What happened after?

C: 因为那根本不是你，而是「卡吕普索」，来自树庭的七贤人之一。
E: Because that wasn't you. That was Calypso, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove.

C: 昨晚，你们听见雷声了么？
E: Did you hear thunderclaps last night?

C: 黄金世！黄金世！
E: Era Chrysea, Era Chrysea!

C: 若我们消除了死亡，便不必畏惧那盗火者，不是么？
E: If we eliminate death, then there's no need for us to fear that Flame Reaver, right?

C: 感谢阿格莱雅阁下还有余力为这座城市担忧。但是，公民们啊，请听万幸中的万幸——
E: Thank you, Lady Aglaea, for still caring about this city. However, dear citizens, we are truly fortunate and blessed...

C: 该叩响冥府的门关了。我会在那路的尽头摆上长桌，恭候各位前来……
E: It's time for me to knock on death's door. I will set up a long table at the end of the road and humbly await your arrival...

C: 毕竟，我们是天生的双子嘛。
E: We're twins after all.

C: 直面历史，然后挑战神明吧！
E: Confront history and rise to challenge the gods!

C: 这很简单，塞涅俄丝大人……
E: It's simple, Lady Seliose...

C: 与黑潮抗争的岁月里…我们一直俯瞰着大地，观察着逐火之旅的进程。我们看到了英雄们为救世踏上没有归路的征程。
E: During our resistance against the black tide... we watched over the earth, observing the progress of the Flame-Chase Journey. We saw heroes embarking on a mission of deliverance from which they could not return.

C: 我们在，雅辛忒丝。
E: We are here, Hyacinthia.

C: 塞涅俄丝将凡人定罪，令他们坠入黄金池。最后，她的结局也……
E: Seliose condemned humanity, casting them into the pool of gold. In the end, she too was...

C: {NICKNAME}——帮我们一把！
E: {NICKNAME} — give us a hand!

C: …唉，可惜你们现在既不能鼓掌，也发表不了评论了。
E: ...Unfortunately, you can't clap or comment right now.

C: *不过，我这个人的特点，就是公平、公平、还是*多洛斯粗话*的公平！你想要火种？那就来拿吧！前提是，你得先堂堂正正地战胜我！*
E: But hey, fairness is my thing — fairness, fairness, and *Dolos profanity* fairness! You want the Coreflame? Come and get it! But only if you beat me fair and square!

C: 蠢狗就是蠢狗，居然能被同一个套路骗上两回……
E: Stupid mutt. Fooled by the same trick twice...

C: （那家伙肯定没那么容易善罢甘休，既然如此……）
E: (They're not going to back off anytime soon... Well then...)

C: 「刻法勒的火种不在这里…它现在…很安全啊。」
E: "Kephale's Coreflame is not here... It's safe... It's safe now..."

C: 记忆的数量太多、份量太大，哪怕隔着堡垒厚厚的墙壁…人家还是能听得一清二楚……
E: There are so many, so heavy... Even through the fortress walls, I can still hear them clearly...

C: 恐怕不行呢。「入口亦为出口」…这是一道单向门。你们还要返回圣城，归还刻法勒的火种。
E: That might not be possible. "The entrance serves as the exit"... It's a one-way passage. You need to return to the holy city and deliver Kephale's Coreflame.

C: 其时，命运三相殿中，岁月的化身将迷迷托付于你；其时，活泼的红发少女完成了使命，与众人先一步道别。
E: Back then, the Incarnation of Time entrusted Mem to you at the Temple of the Three Fates. Back then, the lively girl with red hair fulfilled her mission, and bid the first farewell.

C: 哈，回想他最近的状态，也许你猜得没错。
E: Ha, thinking about how he's been recently... maybe you're right.

C: 啊！{NICKNAME}？嗯…真是巧呢！竟然又见面了，原来我们这么有缘分吗？
E: Ah! {NICKNAME}? Hmm... What a coincidence! We meet again. Guess we're fated to be together, huh?

C: 在聊什么好东西呢？这是…《翁法罗斯占卜全书》？
E: What're you guys chatting about? Is this... the Amphoreus Divination Compendium?

C: 你想得还真深。
E: You've really thought about this, haven't you?

C: 毕竟《占卜全书》第一章讲的就是「占卜的意义」，我只是稍微进行了一点延展思考！
E: After all, the first chapter of the "Divination Compendium" discusses "the significance of divination." I'm just expanding on that a bit!
Ah...

C: …哎呀，我怎么能把这事忘了？
E: ...Oh, how could I have forgotten about this?

C: 我都说了，你别乱动！
E: I told you, don't move!

C: 啊呀，可惜。我还以为那山羊头底下会藏着什么好宝贝呢。
E: Ah, what a shame. I thought there'd be some real treasure under that goat's head.

C: 我不止一次强调过，白厄阁下…我们不为争端而来。
E: I've said it more than once, Lord Phainon... we're not here to start a fight.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You are the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.</color>

C: 我明白了，把它交给我保管吧。这样一来…我身上就又多了一件形影不离之物。
E: I understand. Let me keep it. With this... I'll have another constant companion by my side.

C: 距离翁法罗斯的新生还有一段长路。但我们不会在前进时遗忘过去，因为翁法罗斯的记忆总能造福后人。
E: There's still a long way to go before Amphoreus is reborn. But we will not forget the past as we move forward, for the memories of Amphoreus will always benefit future generations.

C: 哈哈哈…岁月催人老，这谁都没办法。但善意…是你们帮我滋养了它。
E: Hahaha... Time spares no one, so there's nothing we can do. But kindness... you helped nurture it in me.

C: 啊…原来还有这一层意思。抱歉，我忘记换位思考了。
E: Ah... I hadn't thought of it that way. Sorry, I forgot to consider your perspective.

C: 哈…小子，说话还是这么招人待见哪。你之前在大浴场的宣讲，还不赖。我承认，自己有那么一丢丢被触动到。
E: Hmph. Still as charming with your words as ever, boy. Your speech at the public baths wasn't half bad, I'll admit. It managed to touch my heart just a smidge.

C: 呃，我可没说……
E: Uh, I didn't say...

C: 看吧！这就是我不想参考那册陈腐讲义的原因，因为我得到的尽是些无趣的答案。
E: See? This is why I don't want to follow those outdated protocols. All I get are boring answers.

C: 每一位天空后裔都听着她的故事长大。对于我们，塞涅俄丝的伟大毋庸质疑，但也因此…她伟岸的身影吞没了那个年代。
E: Her story is told to every child descended from the Skyfolk. We have no doubts about Seliose's greatness, yet... her towering figure overshadowed every record from that entire era.

C: 那倒不是。只是之前和一位元老院议员的交流，让我有些怀疑这一切的真实性。
E: That's not it, but... I'm starting to question how real everything is after a conversation with a member of the Council of Elders.

C: 与先祖交谈。
E: Speak with the ancestor.

C: …但你的信念打动了我。如果天空的神性注定要被取代…我希望它能接过你的乐观和温柔。
E: But your resolve has touched me. If Sky's divinity is fated to pass on... I hope it incorporates your optimism and kindness.

C: 怎么啦，丹宝？
E: What's wrong, Dannie?

C: 那可就麻烦了啊…说什么都得在「再创世」之前把你们送回家去。
E: That would be a problem... We'll need to get you home before Era Nova.

C: 她的遗愿，你了解多少？
E: How much do you know about her dying wish?

C: 泰坦…有反应了？
E: Is that a reaction... from the Titan?

C: ——因为有光的地方就有希望。可怜的人，我在你们身上已经看不到希望…连藏在背光处的影子也比你们更具尊严！
E: ...He taught me wherever there is light, there is hope. Wretched people, I see no hope left in any of you... Even a shadow has more dignity than you lot!

C: 嘟…嘟，嘟！
E: Doot... Doot, doot!

C: 塞涅俄丝的确太天真了。
E: Seliose was indeed naive.

C: 天空的神明，我们来了…你的怨愤和惶恐很快就会结束。
E: God of the Sky, we are here... Your resentment and terror will soon end.

C: ——你的好朋友，缇宋。
E: — Your good friend, Trissha

C: 塞涅俄丝，你在回信里说到，你爱着自己的族人，而且想要为他们打败残酷的神明……
E: Seliose, you wrote of your love for your people and your desire to defeat the cruel gods for them...

C: 继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
E: Let's keep going and find the tablet on the other side.

C: 有反应了，看来我的猜测没错。
E: It's reacting. Looks like my guess was right.

C: 看那儿！刻法勒的火种就被保存在议会的中央。
E: Over there! Kephale's Coreflame is being kept in the center of the Council.

C: 假如末日真的迫在眉睫，我们就没时间再探究「奇迹」的真相了——相信那刻夏老师的假说是唯一的选择。
E: If the end is indeed upon us, we no longer have time to investigate the truth behind the miracle — we'll have to trust that Professor Anaxa's hypothesis is the only option.

C: 呵…你们以为…我彻底疯了？
E: Heh... You all thought... I completely lost my mind?

C: 解决了。走吧，我们——
E: It's done. Let's go, we...

C: 请你们不要踏出这道屏障半步——这是成为半神的风堇留下的神迹…请相信她的信念。
E: Please do not step out of this barrier. This is a miracle left by the demigod Hyacine... Please trust her conviction.

C: 前方不知是否还有盗火行者的分身…{NICKNAME}，护在白厄身边吧，以保不备。
E: We don't know if the Flame Reaver has any clones up ahead... {NICKNAME}, stay close to Phainon and keep him safe.

C: 总要有人争取时间。
E: Someone has to buy time.

C: 你要说到做到，丹恒……
E: You better keep your word, Dan Heng...
Destruction...
...What?

C: 随着剧目徐徐展开，相信阁下的困惑一定能迎刃而解。
E: Your questions will find answers as the story unfolds.

C: 不过，占卜的次数多了，反倒会对命运产生迷茫。说着对神谕笃信不疑，但真要离开哀丽秘榭的话……
E: But here's the thing. The more divinations I do, the more doubt creeps in. I want to believe the prophecies, but actually leaving Aedes Elysiae...

C: 翻开「织者」。
E: Reveal the "Weaver."

C: 看看别的牌。
E: Check the other cards.

C: 是啊……
E: I'm afraid so...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「黑潮」，这就是灾厄的真面目。它将吞噬世间万物，惟有迷路迷境能够幸免。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The "black tide." That's what this calamity truly is. It consumes all in its path, sparing none but the Membrance Maze.</color>

C: 没错。所以，请你们不要冒险离开这片遭诸神忘却的遗落之境——你们是最初发现我们存在的人，也是唯二能够进入迷境的人……
E: Yes. So please, don't leave this forgotten realm the gods abandoned — you are the first to uncover our presence, and the only two who can enter the Maze...

C: 日后你们也会成为战友。
E: Someday, he too will be your comrade.

C: 未来…是什么意思？
E: The future...? What do you mean?

C: 我会如约呈上「岁月」的火种……
E: As agreed, I shall present the Coreflame of Time...

C: 让那可悲的刽子手…血债血偿。
E: Time for that wretched executioner... to pay what they owe.

C: 既然阁下心意已决，那便让我们共同见证吧。
E: Very well. As you have made up your mind, let us bear witness together.

C: …我知道了！大家跟上我。
E: ...That's it! This way, everyone.

C: 就像你说的，翁法罗斯只是一场实验，我们是局中人，只能沿着既定的轨迹，走向被星星注视的结局……
E: Like you said, Amphoreus is just an experiment, and we're the participants. We can only walk along the predetermined path toward the ending under the watchful eyes of the stars...

C: 你说「白厄」吗？这种名字怎么可能是本名……
E: You mean Phainon? Such a name could never be your true one...

C: 白发的剑士，如果你所说不假，那你一定对世界的命运了若指掌——
E: White-haired swordmaster, if what you say is true, then you must know the fate of the world...

C: 眼前这枚「理性」的火种是赝品，一目了然。
E: This "Reason" Coreflame before us is a fake, obvious as day.

C: 我已经不想再辩解什么了。不管付出多少口舌，结局都不会改变。
E: I don't want to argue anymore. No matter what I say, the outcome won't change.

C: 如果踏上轮回的是那刻夏老师，或是阿格莱雅…或许他们能找到更聪明的方法。
E: If it were Professor Anaxa or Aglaea in my place, maybe they'd come up with something smarter.

C: 空洞的火焰，无法拯救任何人……
E: An empty flame saves no one...

C: 以此焚灭——你不死的诅咒！
E: Let this burn... your curse of immortality!

C: 我有做什么惊天动地的大事吗？最近除了逼着帕姆换了几套衣服，偷偷借用了几次杨叔的肩颈按摩仪……
E: Have I done something crazy without remembering? Unless forcing Pom-Pom into new outfits and borrowing Mr. Yang's shoulder massager counts...

C: 不要相信…那女孩……
E: The girl... cannot be trusted...

C: 列车组现状如何？
E: How's the Express Crew doing?

C: 那么眼前这番景致，阁下确实需要分外珍惜——
E: Then, you should indeed treasure the view before you...

C: >>>HapLotes<unbreak>405</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：门径，命途：██<<<
E: >>>HapLotes<unbreak>405</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: █████████, Titan Authority: Passage, Path: ███████<<<

C: 「她也是一名黄金裔。金色的神血淌入大地，熄灭了她足下的战火。」
E: "A Chrysos Heir she stood. Divine blood soaked into the earth, quelling the flames beneath her feet."

C: 看，人家没说错吧。这么大的阵仗，都是为了欢迎你呢。
E: Told you. You're the headline act. All this spectacle is for you.

C: 住口！你疯了？凯撒有令，那位大人的行踪务必严格保密！
E: Silence! The Imperator ordered us to keep that Lord's whereabouts a secret!

C: 令法吉娜的火种，归于圣城！
E: And return Phagousa's Coreflame to the holy city!

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 嗐，正常…
E: Hah, as expected...

C: 塞涅卡，这话我可不能当作没听见。要么把它收回去，要么就和我一决高下！
E: Hey. I can't pretend I didn't hear that, Seneca. Either retract your statement or duel me!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「智识」的毁灭。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...the total destruction of the Erudition.</color>

C: （三月？她怎么会在这里？！）
E: (March? What's she doing here!?)

C: 从未见过的奇异生命…于它剔透的身躯间，你似乎看到了许多熟悉的光影……
E: A strange being unlike anything you've seen before... Through its translucent body, you seem to catch many familiar fleeting shadows...

C: 可是，留在奥赫玛等死，和去斯缇科西亚等死有什么区别？
E: But between staying in Okhema and going to Styxia... What difference does it make when it's death either way!

C: 到底是哀地里亚的督战圣女，比我想象中有魄力多了。
E: Guess I underestimated Aidonia's Maiden of War. She's got way more steel than I thought.

C: 这便是，我能给予你们最后的恩惠。
E: This is the last gift I can give you.

C: 但是，骑士，你要献上你的心。
E: But, knight, you must offer me your heart.

C: 呵呵…阁下说笑了。早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
E: Heh... you jest. I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...

C: 翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们生来便是果壳中的囚徒。如那返回洞穴，向囚徒们宣扬日光的狂人。我的悲哀在于，我引领同胞们踏上了一条迈向深渊的绝路……
E: Amphoreus is a miniature of the cosmos, where all are born prisoners inside the nutshell called the universe. Like the madman who returned to the cave and preached about the daylight to his fellow prisoners, my greatest sorrow is that I led my peers down a road that plunges into the abyss, from which there is no return...

C: 逻辑：其灵感回路能同时处理世界内外不同的时间流速。
E: Logic: His Inspiration Circuit can simultaneously process the different time flows in and out of that world.

C: 这次又是「粉色小虫」吗？人家的形象也太多变啦……
E: Now I'm a pink bug? My looks are seriously changing all the time...

C: 我相信那天一定会到来，哪怕我无法亲眼目睹。
E: Even if I may not live to see it, I believe such a day will surely come.

C: 预言如海蛇首尾相衔，多么优美，好似欢歌……
E: Our prophecies aligned as flawlessly as a sea snake circling upon itself... an elegant loop, like a joyful hymn.

C: 喔，这不是沉默，而是回答。
E: Ohh. So this isn't just silence. It's the answer.

C: 「若无必要，勿增实体」——我不介意为诸位亲身示范。
E: "Entities must not be multiplied beyond necessity." I do not mind demonstrating this to you personally.

C: 不是哦。它的名字是…是…对了，地质改造工程单元！
E: No. It's called... Uhm... Right! The Geological Reconstruction Unit!

C: 可以。我喜欢直奔主题，就来谈谈你最该知道的一件事……
E: Good. I like people who don't beat around the bush, so let's talk about the one thing you should know...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你的同伴「三月七」，已经不复存在了。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Your friend "March 7th" is no more.</color>

C: 我说过，她已不复存在。但你还有机会弥补。
E: I already told you. She no longer exists. But you still have a chance to fix everything.

C: 窃忆者的迷因，真是无处不在。
E: The Memokeepers' memetic entities are truly everywhere.

C: 「拥有你列出的所有品质。」
E: "Has all of the qualities you mentioned."

C: {NICKNAME}和三月七，真的平安无事么？
E: Are {NICKNAME} and March 7th really safe and sound?

C: 眼下，我们和{NICKNAME}失去了联系，只能依靠两位天才的耳目了解世界内部。
E: At present, we've lost contact with {NICKNAME}. Our only choice now is to rely on the eyes and ears of those two geniuses to understand the situation within Amphoreus.

C: …窥视别人的内心，可算不上优雅的行为。
E: ...It's not very elegant to spy on someone's thoughts, you know.

C: 是啊。没人能看见三月七，她不存在于翁法罗斯的「记忆」，就像个透明的影子，只能旁观这个世界。
E: Yes. No one could see March 7th. She didn't belong to Amphoreus's "memories." She could only watch this world from the sidelines like a transparent shadow.

C: 准备好，应对攻击——
E: Get ready. Incoming—

C: （好像有种既视感……）
E: (I'm getting a feeling of déjà vu...)

C: 如此庞大的存储阵列，简直能与「电子圣狱」因奴庇斯相媲美……
E: So many countless storage arrays... This would even rival the Cyber Prison of Inupeis...

C: 看，多么壮观呀。
E: Look. What a magnificent sight.

C: 可忆庭对她一无所知？
E: But the Garden knew nothing about her.

C: 只要这个过程一直在继续，浮黎的庇佑就不会消失。
E: Fuli's blessing will not disappear as long as this process keeps going.

C: 又一次，史诗迎来了尾声。一切静悄悄的，就像此时此刻。
E: Once again, the saga comes to an end. Everything is deathly silent, just like this very moment.

C: 回去吧。用密钥开启新的道路。
E: Let's go back and use the encryption key to open a new path.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: 「岁月」的故事，你应该再熟悉不过啦。就把篇幅留给英雄们吧？
E: You must be very familiar with the story of Time now, so why don't we leave some pages for the heroes instead?

C: {RUBY_B#「探索」}和大家一起认识这个濒毁却美丽的世界，为逐火之旅夺得第一枚火种——{RUBY_E#}
E: Together with them, I {RUBY_B#Explore}got to know this beautiful yet dying world{RUBY_E#}. I claimed our first Coreflame on the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: {RUBY_B#「连结」}直到和这个世界的命运融为一体，改写注定走向悲剧的结局，和所有人一起重返真正的星空——{RUBY_E#}
E: Until my destiny {RUBY_B#Connect}becomes one with this world's{RUBY_E#}, rewriting the predestined tragic ending and returning to the true starry skies together with everyone.

C: 呃…行吧，那咱们继续……
E: Uh... alright then. Let's keep going...

C: 醒来吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Wake up, {NICKNAME}.

C: （瓦尔特先生的心态，怎么变得有些微妙…？）
E: (Something about Mr. Yang's attitude feels... a little off.)

C: （在匹诺康尼，我经历过类似的事……）
E: (I went through something like this before, back in Penacony...)
"The Harmony and the Remembrance..."

C: 迷迷…！
E: Mem...!

C: 我也是！但当务之急，先甩开这些忆灵。
E: Me too! But first things first, let's ditch these memosprites.

C: 最后一道命途是？
E: And the last Path... what is it?
...Who's there?

C: 如果没有凯撒可耻的诡计，「荒笛」之名——本该为我们共有。
E: If it weren't for the Imperator's tricks, the name "Terravox" would be shared between us anyway.

C: 唯有如此，我才能对伙伴，还有这个世界，做到「问心无愧」。
E: This is the only way I can face my friends and this world with a "clear conscience."

C: 不、不！别过来，你这头该死的野兽……
E: N-No! Stay back, you cursed beast...

C: 小蝶鱼说得没错，仍有{RUBY_B#「赞达尔」}一双眼睛{RUBY_E#}在暗中眈视——但我们不会给他从背后接近二位的机会。
E: The little butterflyfish is right. There is still {RUBY_B#Zandar}a pair of eyes{RUBY_E#} watching from the shadows, but we won't let them get anywhere near you.

C: 感谢你提供的情报。这些信息…很有价值。
E: Thank you for the information. It was... very valuable.

C: 难以置信，我竟要与投身「毁灭」的天才同行。
E: I never imagined that I'd one day walk alongside a genius who offered himself to the Destruction.

C: 这些忆灵…是她？
E: These memosprites... Is it her...?

C: 抱歉，睡了长长的一觉，先醒来的，都是些不愉快的回忆啊。
E: Sorry. I had a really long nap, and all the bad memories woke up first.

C: 玉阙有「十方光映法界」傍身，定比罗浮更明白此战的意义。
E: With the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, the Yuque must understand even more than the Luofu how significant this battle is.

C: 久等了。在螺丝星的帮助下，组建银河联军共御「铁墓」一事，推进得很顺利。
E: Sorry to keep you waiting. With Planet Screwllum's help, the formation of the cosmic alliance to counter Irontomb is progressing smoothly.

C: 若有联盟相助，对全银河都有益无害，不是么？
E: Having some assistance from the alliance would surely benefit the entire cosmos, wouldn't you agree?

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ位于「存护」壁垒外沿。虽然不会承受第一波冲击，但仍有余波威胁风险。
E: Jarilo-VI is located on the outskirts of the Preservation barricade. While it won't bear the brunt of the first wave, there's still a risk from the aftershocks.

C: 奥赫玛一切如常，证明「新世界」不久前，还在享受和平的时光。
E: Everything in Okhema seems normal. The "New World" was enjoying peaceful times not long ago.

C: 「长夜月」？怎么会，她明明已经……
E: Evernight? How is this possible!? She was already...

C: 喔，是老式核热引擎？很有品味嘛。
E: Oh? A classic nuclear heat engine? Classy choice.

C: 也对——「切勿质疑一位已死之人的决心」——死者先生现在如何了？
E: Then again, "never doubt a dead man's resolve." So, how's our dearly departed doing?

C: 小小灰，还是这么自信！
E: You're still as confident as ever, Little Gray!

E: It's as if they are mocking me, a failed sculptor, <color=#dbc291ff>whose touch can only diminish what was born to shine, until nothing remains.</color>

C: 当然。它能装下整个世界。
E: Of course. It can hold the whole world.

C: 你我似乎被隔绝在外了啊。
E: It seems like we've been shut out.

C: 当然。真是一场苦等啊，搭档。
E: Of course. It has been a bitter wait, partner.

C: ▄毁灭▄█▀新生▀▄█救世█▄净世▀█三千万转▀▄█▄
E: ▄Destruction▄█▀Rebirth▀▄█Deliverance█▄Cleansing▀█Thirty million cycles▀▄█▄

C: 「毁灭」的阴影，由「记忆」来驱散。
E: The Remembrance will dispel the Destruction's shadow.

C: █▄▄▄▄▄▄▄<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」的大灭</color>▄▄▄▄▄▄▄█

E: Must▄█Stop█▄▄Otherwise▀▄

E: I know. Thank you, my good friends.

E: Phainon... is the only one who didn't reach the new world.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，准备好成为英雄了吗？」
E: "{NICKNAME}, are you ready to become a hero?"

C: 但讲故事的人，原来……
E: But as it turns out, the narrator...

E: That's pretty forward of you, you know? Still... thank you, {NICKNAME}. That's very reassuring.

C: 「{NICKNAME}…记忆……」
E: "{NICKNAME}... memories..."

C: 如今，数以亿万计的心识，正在你我的胸膛里流淌。
E: Now, countless consciousnesses are flowing in our hearts.

C: 「没错。所以相信我们吧，{NICKNAME}。所有人一起——」
E: "That's right. So, trust us, {NICKNAME}. Everyone! Let's head out together."

C: ▄▀求解▀▄第一因▄▄新的▀▄答案
E: ▄▀Query▀▄Prime Mover▄▄New▀▄answer

C: 并无大碍。公司正在监护她，相信不久便能恢复如初。

C: 嘘！哎呀，都说了别说话！
E: Shh! Hey, I told you not to talk!
(...Nobody's here?)

C: 我的同伴呢？被你绑架了？
E: Where are my companions? Did you kidnap them?

C: 嘻…放心吧，大家都很守规矩呢。
E: Hehe. Don't worry. Everyone's following the rules here.

C: 嘻…她们的热情那么高涨，我可不好意思阻止呀。
E: Hehe... They were so enthusiastic. I didn't have the heart to stop them.

C: 哼，这列车上的宴会还真是欠缺礼数…离席吧，我准了。
E: Hmph. This banquet on the Express truly lacks manners... You may leave. I permit it.

C: 该出奇兵了。正义的伙伴，缇宁。
E: Time for a surprise attack. The Hero of Justice, Trinnon.

C: 所以，该揭晓正确答案啦。这里不是梦，也不是幻境。而是……
E: So, it's time to reveal the correct answer. This isn't a dream, nor a fantasy. It's...

C: 那就尽情言说，将它永远地留在纸页上吧，蝶。
E: Then speak your mind and let your words be immortalized on the page, Cas.

C: 可别错过了列车组的会议！我们可不会特意等你哦？
E: Don't miss the Crew meeting! We won't wait around for you, you know?

C: 但如果只是这样，树枝越长越长，叶片越来越多，树迟早有一天会不堪重负。
E: But if things continue that way, the branches grow endlessly, the leaves multiply, and one day the tree collapses under its own weight.

C: {RUBY_B#记忆}天父{RUBY_E#}…你在看吗？
E: {RUBY_B#Remembrance}Sky father{RUBY_E#}... are you watching?

C: 对哦。其实，它一直都在人家身上呢。
E: Right. It's been with me all this time.

C: 「而在{NICKNAME}的心里，我一定会得到最喜欢的，你给我的名字。」
E: "And in {NICKNAME}'s heart, I know I will always be given the name I love most, the one you gave me."

C: 记录
E: Record

C: 可它看呀看，却发现水晶花天衣无缝，兜兜转转，只看见自己的倒影。
E: But it looked, and looked... only to find the crystal flower flawless. Round and round they went, seeing only their own reflection.

C: 好呀。那以我的审美，应该会小小地修改一笔吧。
E: Okay. Then, I'll probably make a small adjustment to suit my tastes.

C: 我的一生，都在这小小的故事里。既无法抹去眼泪，也无法带来胜利。
E: My entire life spent inside this little story. I can't wipe away my tears, and I can't bring the world victory.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是这故事里，所有的「记忆」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It'll be all the "remembrances"... within this story.</color>

C: 直到我用颤抖的声音，在这小小的房间里，为你讲述所有悲伤的故事，并告诉你：我爱他们，爱这诗里的一切。
E: Not until I told you all the sad tales in a trembling voice in this tiny room. Not until I told you that I love them, that I love everything in this saga.

C: 还记得吗？启程之初，人家也烦恼过这个问题。
E: Do you remember that I was also worried about this when we first set out?

C: 我同情你，赞达尔。
E: I pity you, Zandar.

C: 好笑，太好笑了！你这个疯子，简直是在波尔卡刚洗好的白床单上跳踢踏舞！
E: That's funny! That's real funny! You madwoman! That's like watching you tap-dance on Polka's spotless white sheets right after she's washed them!

C: …这个情报，你还告诉了谁？
E: ...Who else knows about that?

C: 这一战，仙舟的将士们置身危局，却半步未退，他们的牺牲与贡献理应得到回报。
E: The soldiers of the Xianzhou stood firm in this battle amidst overwhelming odds. Their courage and sacrifice deserve recognition.

C: 黑塔女士▀▄战场中心▀出现▀▄█强烈脉冲▀▄█▀▀▄█▄▀▄

C: 遐蝶
E: Castorice

C: 这空间站的主人是黑塔吧？那个「天才俱乐部」第<unbreak>83</unbreak>席。她的防御系统好对付么？
E: So the owner of this space station is Herta, No. <unbreak>83</unbreak> of the Genius Society, right? Is her security system easy to crack?

C: 如今，证据终于出现，是时候做个了断了。我建议，现在由{NICKNAME}主持公道。
E: Now that the evidence is all clear, it's time to end this. I suggest {NICKNAME} make the call.

C: 即使是呆在收容舱内，我也可以指挥好奇物再收容工作。
E: Even if I get locked up in the containment chamber, I can still lead the Curio retrieval efforts.

C: 世齐千里镜？
E: Shiqi Megascope?

C: 你就原谅他吧。
E: Just forgive him already.

C: 打从小时候，我就不喜欢学术研究和应物科那档子破事儿。
E: Ever since I was young, I have never liked academic research and dealing with the Department of Implement Arts.

C: 但这么多年空间站人来人往，唯独何塞•拉萨罗是个例外。
E: But so many people have come and gone through this space station over the years, with the exception of Hosea.

C: 经由特殊显影法处理的藏宝图呈现出黑白的暗色调，唯独用红圈标示出了目标房间位置。
E: The treasure map revealed by a special autoradiograph is in black and white. Only the location of the target room is marked with a red circle.

C: （这种捕风捉影的事情，还是不要让当事人知道比较好。）
E: (Still, it all sounds like hearsay to me. Better keep them in the dark for now.)

C: 这个朋友是不是你自己？
E: Talking about yourself?

C: 就是你小子造谣艾丝妲？
E: Are you the one who started the rumor about Asta?

C: 没、没乱花出去的就不算乱花！…{NICKNAME}，你有事找我？
E: I—If the money wasn't spent, then it doesn't count! Anyway, {NICKNAME}, are you here for something?

C: 别理我师父，这些诗完全抒发了我的内心所想。你一看就跟空间站里死气沉沉的普通科员不同，肯定能够理解我的风情。
E: Don't mind my master. These poems speak my mind. You don't look like those dull researchers around the space station. I'm sure you'd understand how I feel.

C: 从黑塔离开…
E: You were as light as a swallow when leaving the station...

C: 侦测到——超镍零件缺失。
E: Detected — Ultra Nickel Parts Missing.

C: ~电~波~已~下~线~
E: AIRWAVE IS OFFLINE.

C: 本来，破坏纪录，取走零件，推在怪物身上，可以让洛奇永远寄希望于中继器被修好的那一天。
E: At first I thought if I damage the record, take away the parts, and blame everything on the monsters, I could keep Rocky in the hope that, one day the repeater will be repaired.

C: 可我明明已经很努力了啊…她问的每个问题，我都有问必答。她讲的每个笑话，我都有捧场……
E: I tried so hard... I answered all the questions she asked. I laughed at every joke she made...

C: 以前在障碍判别终端，它们不过是远方的虚影，我的眼里只有蔑视。

C: 杀杀这坏风气！

C: 你因为不当的信息接触操作晕倒了。可以告诉我，你都接触了什么信息吗？
E: You fainted because of contact with improper information. Can you tell me what information you have been exposed to?

C: 喂喂喂！我说你，对对对，就是你，你想干嘛啊？你这什么眼神啊还瞪我…你、你别过来啊！
E: Hey, hey, hey! I'm talking to you, you! What are you doing? Why are you staring at me like that... Stay away from me!

C: 真的太感谢了！
E: Thank you so much!

C: 好的，按照空间站数据中心的流程，您的查询权限会在您离开机房后关闭，感谢您的配合。
E: Okay. According to the space station data center's regulations, your query access will be terminated as soon as you leave the terminal room. Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 我知道终端机那边会打印出纸质记录，那几张纸页你自己收好，不要在空间站中外泄出去，这事你要答应我，否则报酬我可要收回去啦。
E: I know paper records will be printed out at the terminal. Keep those records to yourself. Don't let the information leak out in the space station. Promise me, or I'll take back the reward.

C: 任务完成！后续的调查就交给我们吧。
E: Mission complete! We'll take care of the follow-up investigation.

C: 其实我当时也很恐惧，也很害怕！但是我的心中仍有一束微光，引导着我向前迈步！

C: （总感觉他那戏剧化的停顿和大喊都是精心设计的……）

C: 你，你竟然说得出这种话！

C: 破碎的天花板。
E: The broken ceiling tile.

C: 大哥你这是何苦呢，要是像上次一样有个三长两短……
E: Why take on this all by yourself, Arlan? If anything happens like last time...

C: 呜，呜呜！
E: Woo, woo-whoo!

C: 总共找到了三件东西。
E: We found three items.

C: 什么样的…呜呜伯将「聚集于冷僻无人的房间」？
E: What kind of Wubbaboo would... "gather in an empty room"?

E: It's not only impressive — how should I put it... She can edit "reality" as freely as she could edit a program.

C: 总不会主控室也被入侵了吧？
E: Could it be that the main control room was hacked as well?

C: 这家伙真是游刃有余啊，竟然在看奇物收藏目录？
E: She makes it seem easy... Is she really looking at the curio collection index?

C: 没错！
E: Right!

C: 最初，我们为模拟宇宙加以定义，希望创造一个能够窥探星神行迹的微缩世界。可现在，它正在离这个目标越来越远。
E: In the beginning, we defined the Simulated Universe as a miniature world that could be used to discover the traces of the Aeons. But now, it's become something far removed from its original purpose.

C: 你在担心她的精神状态吗？
E: Are you worried about her mental state?

C: 我在外部，确保系统映射不会崩溃，伦纳德先生也在这里。放心，我们会保障你的安全。
E: I'll be staying on the outside — I need to make sure the system projections remain stable. Mr. Leonard is here as well. There's no need to worry. We will guarantee your safety.

C: 但在我看来，最重要的——是执着与真诚。毫无疑问，伦纳德先生的一举一动完全吸引了对方。
E: However, the way I see it, the most important elements were dedication and sincerity — the actions of Mr. Leonard drew the target right in.

C: 由衷感谢，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，对于这场胜利，你和伦纳德先生的贡献不可或缺。
E: Thank you, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}. Your and Mr. Leonard's contributions were a necessity to our victory.

C: 测试人选的要求很高，需要胆大心细、思维缜密，既要熟悉空间站，又要了解银狼和星核猎手，最好还能有一颗助人为乐的心……
E: The requirements for test candidates will be very high. They will need to be bold, careful, and thoughtful. They must not only be familiar with the space station, but also understand Silver Wolf and the Stellaron Hunter. It would be helpful if they also have an altruistic heart...

C: 恕我突兀，出于习惯，我想同样询问二位：同为宇宙中的生命，你们是否知晓「纯美」的女神伊德莉拉？
E: Pardon my abruptness, but I have a habit of asking questions. As fellow beings of this universe, are you acquainted with Idrila the Beauty?

C: 看来你真的是来交朋友的…
E: Looks like you're really here to make friends...

C: 我想下车后，就联系市场开拓部，找个合适的业务，让他成为公司的商品代言人！我就能摇身一变，成为经纪人了！你觉得这小子适合走偶像派还是实力派？
E: I'm planning to contact the Marketing Development Department as soon as I'm off the Express — he'll make a great IPC product spokesperson! And I can be his agent! Now, the question remains — will this guy shine brighter as an image-focused idol, or should we showcase his formidable talents and mold him into a powerful star?

C: 别打歪脑筋了，快来帮忙。
E: That's enough of your weird ideas. Come help us.

C: 求求你了，来帮忙吧。
E: Come help us... Pretty please?

C: 呃…之前银枝在山洞里找到我的时候，我正被一堆这种虫子追着狂蛰……
E: Ugh... There was a whole bunch of those bugs chasing me when Argenti found me in the cave.

C: 但你发现有的家伙真的可能吃掉它们时，你的正义感还是出手消灭了敌人。
E: But the moment you discovered there was a real chance of them being eaten, your sense of justice prompted you to take down the enemy.

C: 不像。他的样子，似乎是在跟陌生人见面。
E: I don't think so. I think he may be perceiving an unfamiliar presence.

C: 说不定公司令我对幻觉免疫……
E: ...Come to think of it, maybe the IPC made me immune to hallucinations...

C: 好沉默…你们倒是说句话呀？
E: It's so quiet... Someone say something.

C: 请勿担心，我会高喊「纯美的女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！」
E: Do not worry. You will hear my shout: "Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!"

C: 嗯嗯，好的好的，您有事儿说事。
E: Mm-hmm, sure. Can I help you with something?

C: 感觉你在焦虑。
E: You seem a little anxious?

C: 呜呜伯…好像哪里不太对。
E: A Wubbaboo... That doesn't sound right.

C: （回忆一下埃美丽当时说了些什么吧。）
E: (What did Emily say...?)

C: ——和同样被意外卷入，却开始扮演审问者的你没什么不同。
E: You and I are no different — we both stumbled into this, but you decided to assume the role of interrogator.

C: 他、他最近很奇怪，老在研究什么人体自燃、灵异现象……
E: H—He's been acting really weird recently — always researching stuff like spontaneous combustion, supernatural activities...

C: 只看明面上的资料，这些消失的科员并无共通性。
E: A mere glance at their background would indicate they share no commonalities.

C: 而身居幕后，掌控全局——则是向天才寄出的挑战。
E: ...and pulling the strings from behind the curtain is akin to laying down the gauntlet to a genius.

C: 所以，这糕点里加了 <color=#dbc291ff>「反吐真剂」</color>。它对你的身体无害，只是会让你在回答与我相关的问题时，无法说出真实的想法。
E: Therefore, I added <color=#dbc291ff>Anti-Truth Serum</color> to this dessert. It will not harm you. However, you will be unable to say what you truly think when answering questions related to me.

C: 不愧是你，看上去就像会说相声的。
E: As expected. You look like you belong in a comedy skit yourself.

C: 阮•梅喜欢听新式的评书。
E: Ruan Mei likes to listen to new-style storytelling.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: （我又开始说胡话了……）
E: (I'm speaking nonsense again...)

C: （是楼上传来的声音！）
E: (That sound's coming from above!)

C: 它不会立即生效，而是一个缓慢、朦胧的过程——就像荷叶、梅花、糯米，还有糖霜的清香。
E: It won't take effect immediately. It is a slow, intangible process — like the sweet fragrance of lotus leaves, plum blossom, sticky rice, and frosting sugar.

C: 你知道这些就够了——一共两句话，非常高效的沟通。
E: That's all you need to know. Just two paragraphs. Very effective communication.

C: 走，快去吃饭，饿死了。
E: Come on, time to eat, I'm starving.

C: 要是遇到什么困难，可以随时回来找我们。
E: If you run into any trouble, you can come back and find us any time.

C: 至于试唱嘛，嘿嘿，比我想象得还要顺利。公司已经同意和我签约了，我很快就会以新人爵士歌手的身份出道。
E: As for the audition, hehe, it went even better than I imagined. The IPC has already agreed to sign me up! I am going to be debuting as a new jazz singer very soon.

C: 又想让我试茶？
E: You want me to sample your tea again?

C: 其实我还忘了点东西…
E: Actually, I think I forgot something...

C: 原来如此！我一眼就看出你们不是本地人，但想不到居然正巧碰上两位「无名客」！真是妙不可言的缘分~
E: No kidding! I could tell you weren't locals from a mile away, but I didn't expect to run into two Nameless here! Fate is such a curious thing⁓

C: 那个，托帕小姐，到底该怎么做才能让公司对贝洛伯格手下留情呢？
E: So, Miss Topaz, what exactly will it take for the IPC to go easier on Belobog?

C: …不行，我不能让开！组长说了，要是漏了人进去，就要扣我半年的绩效！
E: I can't let you pass! My team leader said that if anyone gets through, I'll lose six months of performance bonuses!

C: 签下这份合同，就意味着我们不必再为「活着」发愁了。对于这里的大部分居民，尤其是下层区人来说，单单这一点就足够说服他们了。
E: Signing this contract would mean we no longer have to worry about "surviving." For most of the residents here, especially those in the Underworld, that would be more than enough to persuade them.

C: {NICKNAME}，我早听你和三月夸奖过这位大守护者姑娘。但亲眼看到她的行动力和手段，还是让我感到惊讶。
E: Y'know, {NICKNAME}, I'd heard you and March speak highly of the Supreme Guardian before, but seeing her methods firsthand left me in awe.

C: 继续走吧，我想给各位看的东西就在前方。
E: Let's keep moving forward. What I want to show you is just ahead.

C: 队这么长啊…
E: The line's so long...

C: 噢！想起来了，你小叔是那位诺伊尔大臣吧？交通部的领导？
E: Ahh, I remember! Your uncle is Minister Noel — he heads up the Department of Transportation, no?

C: 唔，这个…呃，我不好说……
E: Well, I... don't really know about that...

C: 希望「潜爆机兵」的攻击能对它奏效。{NICKNAME}，准备好了就告诉我吧。
E: Hopefully, the Automaton Stealth Bomb will still be effective. {NICKNAME}, let me know when you're ready.

C: （这个患者，因为经济拮据的原因没有去复诊……）
E: (Avoiding a follow-up visit due to money issues...)

C: （老人是因为自己老伴的原因没有去复诊……）
E: (Avoiding a follow-up visit due to her husband...)

C: 就是那位病人了，{NICKNAME}。
E: That's the patient, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我有责任保障患者们的生命安全。换句话说…我必须铲除威胁到他们的危险因素。
E: I have a responsibility to protect the well-being of my patients... or to put it another way: I must eradicate any and all threats to them.

C: 哼，什么合理、科学…我看你就是嫉妒自己的病人被抢走了吧？
E: Hmph, rational and scientific, huh...? The way I see it, you're just jealous you lost your patients.

C: 显然，有人想把这封信私下递给我，所以我也不敢贸然询问应物科的人。
E: Obviously, someone wanted to hand me this letter in private, so I didn't dare to ask the staff in the Department of Implement Arts.

C: 得天独厚的帅气长相、老天爷赏饭吃的研究才华、轻易被人喜欢的飒爽风度…一个人从来都这样如意，要求所有人都围着自己转，也是很自然的事吧。
E: With his unusually handsome appearance, his great talent for research, and his lovable outgoing nature... Everything has always worked out well for him. So it's normal for him to think the world revolves around him.

C: 嗯！我也这么觉得。所以这「铁鞋踏破不世」，指的就是需要经过由「不世之材」修建的道路吧。
E: Um! I think so, too. Therefore, this "iron shoes worn out unearthly" refers to passing through the road built by Unearthly Marvel.

C: 咕噜噜，还真是，你怎么跟拉明娜一样不争气？！那么我来解释解释。
E: *gurgle* For crying out loud. Are you two serious!? Do I have to spell it out for you?

C: 水魈抓回来了…
E: I got the Xenohydro back...

C: 毕竟，咱们可有一段时光是「不分你我」哪，怎么能亏了你？
E: After all, we used to be inseparable. How can I not look after you?

C: 欸…？你在说什么……
E: Huh...? What are you talking about...

C: 我们就从这里开始搜索茉莉小姐的东西吧，没必要沿着阶梯再向上了。那里只有茫茫无际的战场遗址，不属于旧城塞的范围。
E: Let's start searching for Miss Molly's things from here. We don't need to go up the stairs. That place is not part of the old city fortress and has nothing but ancient battlefields.

C: 「踩我」…这是要我们踩这块地砖的意思吗？
E: "Stomp on me"... Does that mean we should step on this floor tile?

C: 她一直都是这样，从没改变。
E: She's always been there for me.

C: 暖阳花……
E: Sunshines...

C: 流星碎片…真美呀……
E: The Meteor Fragment... It's so majestic...

C: 你好呀，{NICKNAME}。综合馆最近接待了不少游客，贝洛伯格人心中对历史和艺术的向往又被唤醒了——这都多亏了你经营有方！
E: Good to see you, {NICKNAME}. The General Hall has been receiving a lot of visitors lately. The yearning for history and art has reawakened in the hearts of Belobogians — thanks to your superb management!

C: 出了问题的小机器人会到处乱窜，闯进人们的帐篷里，弄坏大家的财物…很多叔叔阿姨这次都被波及到了，非常头疼。
E: They started roaming around, breaking into people's tents, destroying their belongings... It was a real headache for the people living here.

C: 啊…当然可以。
E: Oh, of course.

C: 一起去看看吧，{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。
E: Let's go look over there, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: 嗯，零件我们也收集到了一些——虽然不多，但也算是个好开头。
E: We also got some parts of the sculpture back. It's not a lot, but it's a start.

C: 唔…进展比想象中的还慢啊。这样下去，怕不是得在这里耗上一整天……
E: *sigh* ...This is taking longer than I imagined. At this pace, it'll take us the entire day to fix all these robots...

C: 的确。这么一想，感觉还有点泄气……
E: Yep, we were outdone by a couple of kids. Kind of embarrassing when you think about it...

C: 照现在的势头继续下去，只要历史展区也能顺利恢复开放…博物馆完全复兴的一天，指日可待！
E: If the momentum continues, and if the History-Culture Hall can reopen on schedule... the museum's complete revival is surely just around the corner!

C: 唔…又是半天过去了，结果还是一无所获……
E: *sigh* Another half day gone, and nothing to show for it...

C: 两位忙着调查流动人群的时候，我也收到了几条线报。有消息源说，最近目击到可疑人员偷偷出入裂界侵蚀的街区，而且居然没有被铁卫拦下。
E: While the two of you were busy questioning people in the city, I received some tip-offs. One source said that suspicious people were recently seen sneaking around the Fragmentum corrosion zone, and that the Silvermane Guards didn't prevent them from entering.

C: 过去的十几年里，下层区有整整一代人成长了起来，但他们却从来没有机会接触到这些珍贵的艺术品和历史真迹…你的所作所为帮他们填补上了巨大的空洞。
E: A whole generation has grown up in the Underworld in the last decade or so, and they never had the privilege of seeing these precious works of art and historical treasures... what you've done has helped bridge a huge gap for them.

C: 咦？哦对，口令，口令…「不烤面包烤红肠」，是这个吧？
E: What? Oh right, the password... Roast the sausage, not the bread. That's the password, right?

C: 唔…你们…这…不对，你们没有证据！我们只是在这里……
E: I... You... Th—This isn't right — you have no evidence of wrongdoing! We're just here to—

C: 噢…好像拆成了<unbreak>20</unbreak>个。
E: Uhh... around <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

C: 那我先花些时间来填写，就请你稍作等候了。
E: I'll go ahead and fill this out then. Just give me one moment...

C: 算了，还是别改了。
E: Forget it. Let's keep it as is.

C: 嘿，既然连你都这么说，那我就放心了。
E: Hee-hee, glad to hear that, your words give me confidence.

C: 我准备带着矿队去找娜塔莎医生了，你们自己保重吧。
E: I'm about to take the mining team over to Dr. Natasha. Take care of yourselves.

C: 嗯…确实是故障了，一点反应都没有。
E: Mm... so there is a fault. It's not responding at all.

C: 这辆好像还挺新的？
E: This one looks pretty new.

C: 可、可是…我的「矿脉探测器」被偷走了。要是不赶紧去找，恐怕就再也找不到了……
E: B—But... the vein detector that rapscallion was after— somebody already stole it from me. I need to keep searching, otherwise I might never see it again...

C: …你这样可是会把小孩子惯坏的。
E: ...You are gonna spoil that kid.

C: 当然不是叔叔我了！
E: Of course it's not me!

C: 老爹靠着探测器找到了很多矿脉，也帮矿队省掉了不少开支。从这个角度看，它确实称得上是个好东西。
E: The detector helped me find lots of Geomarrow veins, and it saved the mining team a lot of money. In that respect, it was a very good thing.

C: 我想想，一共丢了三件矿具…找起来是麻烦了点，不过你要是能帮我找回三件装备，我就给你一张绝密的藏宝图——怎么样，是不是很诱人啊？
E: Let me see, I lost three mining tools... It's a little hard to find them, but if you can help me find those three pieces of equipment, I'll give you a secret treasure map — how about that? A very attractive deal for you, wouldn't you say?

C: 看，安东尼娜！那些矿工又和流浪者在一起。
E: Look, it's Antonia! The miners and vagrants are all in the same spot.

C: 简直难以置信！这…我这不会是在做梦吧？！这种好事真的会发生在我们身上吗？
E: Are you serious!? This has... gotta be a dream. Good things... don't happen to us!

C: 如果少了你，恐怕我们还要和那幻影纠缠一阵…姐姐，你还好吗？感觉如何？
E: It would've taken us much longer to fight off the shadow without you. Serval... how are you feeling?

C: 这就别夸啦…毕竟是我疏忽了。
E: You're too kind... My oversight.

C: 不是什么高深的技巧啦，我只是先前跟着希露瓦学了两手而已。
E: No magic here. Just a trick or two I learned from Serval.

C: 啊…没什么。只是，偶尔…挺羡慕姐姐的，毕竟她什么都会……
E: Ah... nothing. Just... sometimes I'm a bit jealous of Serval, you know? She knows everything...

C: 但是——我觉得这次露营还是很开心的！毕竟终于能试着做自己想做的事了……
E: It's just, I was really getting into the camping! I felt like I finally got around to doing the things I always wanted to...

C: …他们总是这样。做那两个人的妹妹，想拥有点私人空间真的很难。
E: They're always like this. It's impossible to get some private time as their younger sister.

C: 原来你小时候是这个样子啊？
E: You were like this when you were little?

C: 玲可来得好早。
E: You're here early, Lynx.

C: （给他们一点私人空间吧……）
E: (I should give them some time together...)

C: …不多，但我身上没带着钱包。
E: ...Not much, but I didn't bring my coin purse.

C: 才、才不是，这回不一样！我需要钱，因为老爹他……
E: No! ...Not this time. I really need money... my daddy...

C: 这些箱子已经放在这儿好多年了吧？确定里面还有能用的物资吗……
E: These crates have been sitting here for many years, right? Even if they have materials in them, are you sure they are still usable...?

C: 这下周围应该就清净了，我们接着到里面找找吧。
E: Should be all clear now. Let's poke around.

C: 干嘛？自我感动几句，以为我会同情你吗？你可以躲在宫殿里胡思乱想，上前线也不用拿自己的命去赌，可下层区的人呢？有上顿没下顿，能活着就算不错了！
E: What? You thought I should feel sorry for you after your little speech? You can hide in your palace while you fuss over your Overworld problems, and on the front line it's not even you who's putting their life in danger. But in the Underworld, what do we worry about? If we'll have food for our next meal or survive to the next week!

C: …身为贝洛伯格未来的守护者，我必须随时审视自己的行为和思想。
E: ...As the successor to the guardian of Belobog, I must always be vigilant of my behavior and thoughts.

C: …你为什么要帮流浪者找药？他们不是本事很大吗，怎么好意思让一个小姑娘跑东跑西？
E: ...Why are you helping the vagrants look for medicine? If they're so great, how could they make a little girl go around running errands for them?

C: 要走了吗？这旧镇太危险了，我们送你一段吧。
E: Are you leaving? This old town is too dangerous. We'll accompany you part of the way.

C: 他的宝贝应该不会太难找吧！那边，我们去翻翻看！
E: ...It shouldn't be too hard to locate his treasure! Let's start by looking over there!

C: 那几个孩子，不会是趁着场面混乱，跑到什么地方冒险去了吧？
E: Those kids better not have taken advantage of the chaos to go on an expedition.

C: …不好，它要向帕斯卡发起攻击了！必须阻止它才行！
E: No, it's going to attack Pascal! We have to stop it!

C: 总之，这颗核心，克拉拉先带回去，之后再检查一下。我们先把帕斯卡的核心移植到大家伙的外壳里吧。
E: Anyway, I'll take this core back and examine it. Now, let's insert Pascal's core into the big fella's shell.

C: 看来，这里就是帕斯卡存放零件的秘密基地吧？
E: Ahh. This appears to be the secret base where Pascal keeps the parts.

C: …呃，我没担心你。要说的话，我也是担心布洛妮娅呀。
E: ...Uh, I wasn't worried about you. If you must know, I was wondering if Bronya was okay.

C: 交给我吧，头儿。
E: Mm, I'm on it, boss.

C: 我正想说呢，三月小妹妹就来了这么一段。
E: I was just about to get into those, before Miss March's colorful attempt.

C: 战、战斗模组？是不是哪里出了问题……
E: Combat module? This thing's faulty, right...?

C: 贝洛伯格的夜，谎言藏不住恨怨
E: Another Belobog night, the hate the lies just can't hide, yeah

C: …我说各位，不懂就别强行装懂啊，又没人会笑话你们！
E: ...Uh, y'know friends, if you don't know the answer, you don't have to pretend you do. No one's gonna laugh at you.

C: 逻辑控制中枢
E: Logic control hub.

C: 芝～麻～开～门～！
E: Opennnn sesame~!

C: 是「家人」吧…你是真记错了还是故意的？
E: She's his "family..." Did you really forget?

C: 我们得再想想办法……
E: We will have to think of another way...

C: 史瓦罗先生…有关前往上层区的事情，他们想和你谈谈。
E: Mr. Svarog... they want to talk to you about going to the surface.

C: …评估结果更新：将决定权移交外来者，并允许访问「星核」相关的信息。
E: ...Updated assessment result: Transference of decision-making authority to outsiders. Outsiders are granted access to Stellaron intelligence.

C: …除非你们能找到彻底摧毁「星核」的方法。
E: ...Unless you have found a way to completely destroy the Stellaron.

C: 你谁啊？
E: Who are you?

C: …是这么回事，但我兴冲冲地从隔壁镇跑来以后，才发现自己居然忘带钱包了！
E: ...Correct. I rushed over here from a neighboring town and forgot my darn wallet!

C: 哎呀，不想那么多啦！我们走吧，荣誉队员！
E: *sigh* Anyway, we should get going. Come on, honorary member!

C: 两、两百冬城盾？！真的可以吗？
E: That's <unbreak>200</unbreak> shield! R—Really?

C: 那我们就欣然收下了——
E: Then we'll happily accept it...

C: 七百二十！
E: <unbreak>720</unbreak>! *coughing*

C: 可、可是我们只有六百五十冬城盾呀……
E: B—But we only have <unbreak>650</unbreak> shield...

C: 七百五十冬城盾两次！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going twice!

C: 该回去了，虎克。
E: Let's head back, Hook.

C: 唔…有什么办法嘛，只剩这么多了。你就好好接受虎克大人的口头感谢吧！
E: Uhh... there's only this much left, sorry. You'll just have to accept Hook's heartfelt gratitude!

C: 可惜，现在再想找到一枚地髓探针可太不容易了…这笔生意真是越想越亏，哎……
E: Shame, it's becoming increasingly difficult to find a Geomarrow Probe... The more I think about it, the more I realize that this deal was a big mistake... *sigh*

C: 啊，是外来者{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}……！
E: Oh, it's you!

C: 呜…我都快被吓死了，太可怕了！
E: Goodness, I was so scared! It was dreadful!

C: 呜…好，慢慢说……
E: Goodness... Okay. I'll explain slowly...

C: 说起来，我们之前见到的那些痕迹，还有金属刮痕……
E: And those tracks and metal scratches we noticed earlier...

C: 「机械宠物」是什么？
E: What is a "robot pet"?

C: 我好像在哪里听说过。
E: I think I've heard the term "robot pet" before.

C: 有些流浪者还会动手改装自己的宠物，他们管那叫…「宠物升级」。
E: Some vagrants also make modifications to their pets, which they call... pet upgrades.

C: …没关系，克拉拉也很有力气！我要再把核心塞紧一点，免得掉出来……
E: It's okay, I'm strong too! I'll tuck the core in a little tighter so it doesn't fall out...

C: 三台符合关键词描述的机体分别位于熔锤镇、铆钉镇及锻炉镇——以上三座矿镇均已废弃，目前没有任何自动机兵在矿镇中形成聚落。
E: The three automatons that match the keyword descriptions are located in Moltammerville, Rivet Town, and Forge Town. All three of these mining towns have been abandoned, and no automatons have been discovered in these three sites recently.

C: 可以尝试，但有风险——该方法无法根除持续产生的信息噪音。同时，新写入的程序有被噪音污染的风险。
E: This procedure is theoretically viable, but there are risks. It will not eliminate the muddled information. Additionally, the newly installed programs may be later contaminated by it.

C: 谢谢，你！好久，不见！喜欢，{NICKNAME}，克拉拉！
E: Thank, you! Long time, no see! {NICKNAME} friend, Clara friend!

C: 我知道你们中有些混子，觉得后备队每天就是游手好闲，混吃等死。告诉你们，这种想法大错特错！
E: I'm aware that there are those among you who see the reserve units as a vacation. Well let me set one thing straight: You are gravely mistaken!

C: 都这时候了，你可不许给我打退堂鼓啊！
E: Look how far we've come! Don't chicken out on us now.

C: 布洛妮娅说的是真的…银鬃铁卫确实为了保护贝洛伯格拼上了性命。
E: Bronya was right... The Silvermane Guards really are risking their lives to protect Belobog.

C: 你们就是来做紧急检修的工程师？我看你们在附近晃悠有一阵了，查出问题了吗？
E: Are you the emergency engineers? I saw you guys hanging around. Did you find the problem?

C: 介绍一下，这几位是我的助手，帮我分担机械屋的工作。
E: Allow me to introduce my assistants to you. They help me take care of business at the workshop.

C: 不愧是「杰帕德的姐姐」……
E: You're Gepard's sister alright...

C: 我不帮把手的话…下一场战斗不知道会怎么样呢。
E: If I'm not here to help... I don't know what might happen in the next wave.

C: 所以呢？你们把那批有问题的机器人丢在哪儿了？
E: So? What did you do with those defective robots?

C: …我只是觉得，这件事毕竟因我而起，所以也应该由我……
E: I was thinking about how all this only happened because of me, so... I thought I should...

C: 但斯捷潘先生说过，这也是我应尽的责任。只有照他说的做，我才能赢得大家的尊重，过上好的生活。
E: But Mr. Stefan said that this is my responsibility too. If I just do as he says, I'll earn everyone's respect and be able to live a good life.

C: 我…不知道。
E: I... don't know.

C: …有什么变化吗？
E: ...Has anything changed?

C: 你不再需要我的帮助了吗？
E: Do you no longer need my help?

C: （希莉儿让我忘记发生的事，还说不希望我受到伤害……）
E: (Cyrille wants me to forget everything, and says she doesn't want me to get hurt...)

C: 被裂界侵蚀的物件可能不稳定。换做是我，不会去碰那个装置。
E: Objects that have been exposed to Fragmentum corrosion might not be stable. I wouldn't touch that device if I were you.

C: 「星核」知道我们来了…
E: The Stellaron knows we're here...

C: 咦？那岂不是说明我们已经很接近了？
E: ...That means we must be really close, right?

C: 用不属于这个世界的技术打造出来的东西——旧时代的「公司」和筑城者妄图用来收容星核的抑制器。
E: Something created using otherworldly technology... An inhibitor that a corporation from the Old World and the Architects attempted to use to house the Stellaron.

C: 我知道你有很多疑问，女儿。耐心些…很快你就能得到所有答案。
E: ...I know you have many questions, my daughter. Be patient... soon you will have all the answers.

C: 反正只是裂界造出来的幻象而已，{NICKNAME}，咱们接近点看看。
E: It's only a Fragmentum illusion. {NICKNAME}, let's get a closer look.

C: 呜哇啊啊啊啊——
E: ...Aghhhhhhhh...!

C: 这样的巨物，我们该怎么摧毁它？
E: How can we bring a giant like this down?

C: 不自量力…那就让你绝望吧！
E: Fools... You will know the taste of despair!

C: 哇，这一次的开拓…真不容易。丹恒、{NICKNAME}——我们成功啦！呃，不过「星核」该怎么办？以前都是杨叔处理的……
E: Wow... that was a tough trailblazing expedition. Dan Heng, {NICKNAME} — we made it! But, uh, what are we gonna do with the Stellaron? It's usually Mr. Yang who handles it...

C: 接下来有什么打算？
E: What do you want to do now?

C: 让民众知道母亲的真实目的…告诉他们这个维系了七百年的谎言……
E: Tell everyone about Mother's true motives... about a lie perpetrated for <unbreak>700</unbreak> years...
