C: 这是我第二次为你牺牲，三月…
E: That's the second time I've sacrificed myself for you, March...

C: 我命休矣…
E: I'm a goner...

C: …罢了。我不想再深究…太多过问永远只会给我带来痛苦。始终如此……
E: ...Never mind. I don't want to get into it any further... too much questioning will only lead to more pain. It's always been the case...

C: 不…这也是我最后的心愿。斯捷潘先生会答应的。
E: No... This is my final wish. Mr. Stefan will agree.

C: （这里似乎没有类似信号源的装置……）
E: (Seems like there isn't any device here that looks like a signal source...)

C: 辛苦你了。来，这是我与姬子小姐为你准备的奖励。
E: Keep up the good work. Come, this is the reward that Himeko and I have prepared for you.

C: 星槎良好的安全避险设计令人称赞，被撞星槎甚至看不出痕迹。
E: The excellent safety features of the starskiff is commendable, and there aren't even any marks on the starskiff that was hit.

C: 所以，麻烦您给我讲下大致的情况可以吗？
E: So... can you tell me what happened here?

C: 我想帮梅姐把肇事赔偿处理完，再和她好好谈一谈，真希望那个时候，我还有今天的决心。对了，您见多识广，有没有什么好的建议呢？
E: I want to handle Mei's compensation for her before having a talk with her. Hopefully, by that point, I'll still have the same resolve as I do today. Oh, right. You seem like someone who's knowledgeable about many things. Do you have any good suggestions on how to handle this?

C: 梅姐记忆不清，我也问过她几次，她只说星槎可能是<color=#dbc291ff>蓝色</color>的，又可能是<color=#dbc291ff>黄色</color>的，也许两者都不是。
E: Mei's memory is not very good. I asked her several times. She said the color of that starskiff looks like <color=#dbc291ff>blue</color>, but it could also be <color=#dbc291ff>yellow</color>, or maybe neither.

C: 出什么问题了，我曾经也在天舶司处理过一段时间交通事故，我来帮你们看看吧。
E: What seems to be the problem? I used to solve traffic accident problems at the Sky-Faring Commission. Let me help you.

C: 因为您可能涉及违规驾驶、非法星槎改造等情况，我们将依法扣押这艘星槎，登记并妥善保管，调查完毕后及时发还…
E: You are suspected of being involved in a traffic violation and illegal starskiff modifications. By law, we will confiscate this starskiff and return it after the investigation ends.

C: 该拿的赔偿一分都不能少。
E: Take every bit of compensation you deserve.

C: 没事儿，我也得记着好好感谢{F#她}{M#他}呀。
E: I also have to thank {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 《要药分剂》？我记得我前天刚拿来查过某个方子……
E: Compendium of Remedies? I remember looking up a prescription in it two days ago...

C: 在你若有所思的同时，一册书从树上掉落。
E: As you ponder about this, a book falls from the tree.

C: 唔，从书上看来，她给的药方确有其物，但其中的药材又是怎么回事？
E: Hmm, it looks like the prescription she gave does exist in the book, but what about the ingredients in it?

C: 我有点头绪了。
E: It's all coming together now.

C: 我想好了。
E: I've decided.

C: 我被启动才过了两个月又十二天零八个系统时，实在没法和他们相提并论，只能先把自称改了，好揣摩一下诗人的心境。
E: I've only been running for two months, twelve days, and eight system hours, and I'm no match for them — so I've changed my personal pronoun to try and fathom the minds of such poets.

C: 什么是离别的诗？
E: What do you mean by "poem of departures"?

C: …噢，对了，你在这里拍什么呢？
E: ...Oh, by the way, what were you taking pictures of?

C: 我虽然是个卜者，但我不喜欢八卦别人的。
E: Although I'm a diviner, I don't gossip about others.

C: 亲亲说的是「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」对吧，好嘞，这就帮亲亲准备好。
E: Darling, do you mean the Auspicious XV? I'll get one for you right away.

C: 说真的，有时候我怀疑地衡司根本没有社会地位，什么脏活累活都要做。
E: Seriously, sometimes I have a feeling that the Realm-Keeping Commission doesn't have a respectable social status at all. It is responsible for all the dirtiest, most tedious work.

C: 怎么，还没有找齐玉兆吗？
E: Haven't you finished collecting the inspo jade abaci yet?

C: 温符瑞让我去寄礼物…
E: Wen Furui asked me to deliver the gift...

C: 是我呀！你连我都忘记了？
E: It's me! Did you forget about me already?

C: 姐姐我也经常爱上帅气的化外民小哥。
E: I have, many times, fallen for cute Outworlder boys.

C: 阿青，你别躲在里面不出声，我知道你在里面。
E: Qingster, don't just hide and be quiet, I know you're in there.

C: …你怎么会这样想呢？
E: ...Why would you think that?

C: 得饶人处且饶人，就这个吧，我们别再吓着他了。
E: Let's cut the guy some slack and just leave it at this. No need to keep intimidating people.

C: 今天可真晦气。来吧，这样就能证明我是她的经纪人了吧。
E: What a rotten day this has been. Here, this will also prove that I'm really her manager.

C: …你无法亲临实地调查？
E: ...Can't you do the investigation yourself on-site?

C: 这个「拓片」描绘的是丰饶之主为仙舟赐下建木的瞬间。
E: This rubbing depicts the moment when the Abundance bestowed the Ambrosial Arbor upon Xianzhou.

C: 所以你明白了什么？
E: So, what do you understand?

C: 是这样的，持明族的龙女，白露大人，又从丹鼎司逃出来了。之所以说「又」，是因为这位龙女性子跳脱，她出逃一事，地衡司早就司空见惯。
E: Here's the situation: Lady Bailu, the Vidyadhara Dragon Lady, has escaped from the Alchemy Commission again. I say "again" because the Realm-Keeping Commission has seen more than a few of her bad-tempered escapes.

C: （钱包）
E: (Wallet)

C: 这里没有人。
E: Nobody home.

C: 白露大人……
E: Lady Bailu...

C: …是你啊。
E: ...It's you.

C: 别自说自话到处乱跑行吧？
E: Just stop talking to yourself and running off, okay?

C: 小小的孩子孤零零地坐在海边。
E: The little boy sits alone beside the sea.

C: 孩子望向海水，口中哼哼着谁也听不懂的童谣。
E: The child gazes back at the sea, humming a nursery rhyme that nobody can understand.

C: 半夏，你的魔阴身征兆越发明显了。我葫芦里还有些安神药，要不要喝一点再走？
E: Banxia, your symptoms are getting worse... I have some soothing tonic in my gourd. Would you like some before we set off?

C: 要是你们抵挡不了，就把我交给他们…
E: If you can't fend them off... Just let me go with them...

C: 十王圣断。
E: Karmic atonement.

C: 可是，我竟然还记得他，记得你们……
E: But I still remember him... and I remember both of you...

C: 我记得。
E: I remember.

C: 什么？！你说那只浑身全副武装的怪物就是半夏？别骗人了。
E: What!? That monster armed to the teeth? That was Banxia? You're lying.

C: 也就是说她换掉了衣服，那这具魔阴身怪物身上什么也搜不出来了。
E: She changed out of her original clothes, right? *sigh* There's no point in searching the body, then.

C: 先去地衡司蹭蹭饭吧。
E: Let's get some food in the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 再等等。
E: Wait.

C: 这些蜃影是过去留下的回响，<color=#dbc291ff>只要将它们收集起来，并驱使回响扩散，回响就能帮我们探查到隐藏在「水面之下」的刺客。</color>
E: These Mirage Echoes, on the other hand, are vestiges of the past. <color=#dbc291ff>If we can center and transmit the echoes, we should be able to detect any assassins hidden beneath the surface of the water.</color>

C: 知、知道了。
E: O—Okay.

C: 没想到持明里也有信奉寿瘟祸祖的人……
E: I never knew the Vidyadhara had believers in the Plagues Author among their ranks...

C: 各位久等了，这就是在建木生发前日，在将军和太卜指定的位置出现过的几位化外…异邦人。
E: Thanks for waiting. These are the outworld— ...uh — travelers who were sighted in the location specified by the general and the master diviner. This was two days before the Ambrosial Arbor came back to life.

C: 没关系帕。这件货物格外危险，他会谨慎，也是理所当然的帕。
E: Easy now. The item in question is extremely dangerous. It's understandable that our friend here wants to take extra precautions...

C: 那个大坑直通臭水沟，我们俩一身污泥，让您几位看了笑话，还以为是「黑衣人」呢。
E: Unfortunately, the ditch was connected to a sewer outlet — we were covered head to toe in... Anyway, I assume that's why you thought we had dark clothing on. A dignified story, I'm sure you'll agree.

C: 拿这个药方去抓药吧。
E: There you go.

C: 交给我吧！
E: Roger that!

C: 哎哎哎，不许打退堂鼓！交给你了！
E: Hey, I said over to you! You can't back out now!

C: 这个药听起来能治疗魔阴身…
E: A drug like that sounds like it would help people stricken with mara...

C: 然后我就发现了那个空地…不过我一看，那里面有两个黑衣人和一个金发化外民，觉得实在不是看书的地方，就走了。那两个黑衣人正好跟着我，也离开了。
E: I found that empty area — it seems like a good reading spot at first... but then I noticed two people dressed in dark clothing and a blonde outworlder hanging around. Something didn't feel right, so I left. Those two people left the same way I did.

C: 哎，那线索岂不是断掉了？
E: So... is this a dead end?

C: （为什么怪物会说话？）
E: (Why is the monster talking now?)

C: （没有什么明显的破绽。）
E: (I don't see any major plot holes.)

C: （嗯…看来这招行不通啊。）
E: (Hmm... Seems bribing isn't an option.)

C: 也不必提前到吧…
E: We don't have to get there early, right...?

C: 真对不起…
E: Yes, apologies...

C: 妈妈创造过无数奇迹…她曾在步离人密集的防空火力中，如同箭矢穿过暴雨般畅行无阻，一连击坠三艘兽舰。她还是天舶司竞速纪录，击坠数纪录的保持者。
E: Later, she achieved miracles... One time, she destroyed three beast ships in a hail of borisin anti-aircraft fire — like an arrow tearing through a thunderstorm... She also holds the Sky-Faring Commission records for speed and enemy vessels destroyed.

C: 正是如此。
E: Indeed.

C: 你们手里拿的是什么？我看看…驭空大人的…日记？！好大的胆子啊！
E: What do you have in your hands? Let me see... *gasp* Madam Yukong's diary!? The nerve!

C: 对于飞行士来说，载回同伴，是起飞前最重要的誓言。
E: For a pilot, the most important oath before departure is the promise to bring your comrade back.

C: 不过…虽然我们都很希望能帮到你，但在与令堂交涉时，于情于理，我和{NICKNAME}都是不能直接插手的。
E: ...We're here to help, but {NICKNAME} and I really shouldn't interject when you're conversing with your mother.

C: 我担心你走向我的道路，更担心你走向采翼的道路。但既然这是你的选择…我便愿意全力支持你，直到你后悔为止。
E: I was afraid of you following in my footsteps, and more afraid of you taking after Caiyi. But if this is your choice... then I'm willing to support you, even if you live to regret it.

C: 接下来我要做什么？
E: What do we do now?

C: 幼不幼稚…
E: Sounds childish...

C: 换句话说，我和你就是彼此的命运。
E: In other words, you and I are each other's destiny.

C: （也许关闭这扇大门，这条路就无人能通行了？）
E: (Maybe if this door is closed, this path would be closed as well?)

C: 胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: Nonsense. Everyone, take them down!

C: 这么大一颗星星挂在天上，你的关注点居然是云？
E: There's a huge star in the sky and you're only interested in the clouds?

C: 你伤得很重，别说话。
E: You're hurt, son. Try not to talk.

C: 仙舟的意外我们也略知一二。停云小姐，我们此行，正是为帮助仙舟封印「星核」而来。
E: We caught wind of the incident you mention. That's why we're here Miss Tingyun — to help the Xianzhou seal the Stellaron.

C: …我记忆中的罗浮，除去黑暗，就只有这里了。
E: ...apart from darkness, this place is all that I remember of the Luofu.

C: 咱们一起推开它？
E: Let's push them aside together?

C: 咱们谁有…驾照吗？
E: Anyone... got a license for this thing?

C: 帕！帕！…嗯？{NICKNAME}乘客，有事吗？
E: Heave-ho! Heave-ho! ...Huh? Trailblazer, do you need help with something?

C: 去吧，丹恒先生。她点名要你上前问话呢。
E: Master Dan Heng, she's asking for you specifically.

C: 不过关于星槎制造，我确是一窍不通，只知道这儿能造出星槎。
E: As for procuring a starskiff, I know they can be manufactured here... but I know nothing of the process.

C: 有意思。轻忽性命，顽固不化，倒是让我想起一位眼高于顶的故人。他要是目睹工造司这片狼藉，怕是会大笑仙舟人无能。
E: Interesting. Stubborn beyond valuing his own life... That reminds me of an extremely arrogant acquaintance. If he were to see the chaos of the Artisanship Commission today, he would burst into laughter at the Xianzhou's incompetence.

C: 你只是想借我的手把这儿打扫打扫吧？一个自首的犯人真的可以提这么多要求吗？
E: You just want me to do all the work. You think I'm gonna grant endless requests for a criminal?

C: 可惜，多留几日，我兴许有眉目能医好她。
E: What a shame. If she could stay for a few days, I might be able to figure out how to cure her.

C: 喔？你很明白自己的症结所在啊。心病的事情，我也帮不上忙。不过医经上说，熄心则安身。如果能忘掉过去的事情，这病症还有挽回的余地。
E: I see — so, you've learned to live with your illness. I can't help much with issues of the spirit, but the medical records do mention that calming the mind is a way to heal the body. If you're able to forget about the past, there might be a chance for your symptoms to regress.

C: 我能握住的只剩下手中的剑和往日遗恨。如果连这些都放弃的话，我恐怕…会彻底堕入虚无。
E: All I have left are the sword in my hand and my hatred of the past. If I am without either of them... I would fall into an empty void.

C: 前生的经历，对我就像破碎的镜片，拾起哪一枚都只能看见困惑的光景……
E: The memories of my past life are like shattered glass... I can't piece together the reality from the individual shards...

C: 此事由不得我。事关倾覆联盟的重罪，依照法度，你当被押入虚陵仙舟，接受十王司和七天将的联席审判，并施以永罚。
E: That is beyond my control. Attempting to undermine the Alliance is a grave crime. According to protocol, you are to be held on the Xianzhou Xuling for a joint trial before the Ten-Lords Commission and the Seven Arbiter-Generals.

C: 你好像对这个老朋友毫无同情的意思啊。
E: For an old friend, you don't seem to have that much pity...

C: 在追捕卡芙卡的时候，第一次见到这小家伙，我就觉得咱们之间一定有某种奇妙的缘分。它随便叫唤几声，我就能听出它有几个意思。
E: The first time we met Diting was during the Kafka hunt. I could tell there was a mysterious connection between us — whenever he barked, I understood what he wanted to say.

C: 看他的模样，也就八九岁。这么点儿大的人已经当上了将军的侍卫，仙舟上的孩子还真了不得。
E: He looks about eight or nine years old! And he's already the general's retainer? The Xianzhou really does have some child prodigies, huh.

C: 呃…{NICKNAME}只是不小心点进去——
E: Uh...{NICKNAME} accidentally pressed a button...

C: 关于刃的追查记录，线索中断在星槎海。
E: Blade tracking entry: Traces run cold at Starskiff Haven.

C: 要是我赢了……？
E: And if I win...?

C: 她的周遭，无数光点明灭闪烁，呼吸着、律动着，仿佛置身于银河。定睛细看，那些光源被封存在一个个半透明的舱罐中，好似数不清的神龛供奉在四壁上。
E: Countless spots of light encircled her, like stars breathing and dancing in the cosmos. If you look closer, you may find that the light spots are sealed in a translucent jar, like shrines immured on walls.

C: 你可得好好努力了。
E: You'll need to work harder.

C: 您本事高强，受将军委托一路搜索星核，一定会与魔阴身交手……
E: You're a capable person, and since the general entrusted you with locating the Stellaron, it's only a matter of time before you run into mara-struck...

C: 没想到这样一个早已消亡的组织，如今竟然又死灰复燃，开始作乱人间了。神策府必须在事态变得不可挽回之前彻查这个组织当前的状况。
E: It's hard to believe a group that was wiped out so long ago would suddenly rear its head and create chaos once more. The Seat of Divine Foresight needs to learn all it can about this organization's status before the situation reaches a point of no return.

C: 那…那…接招吧！
E: Well... then... take this!

C: （从这份「紧急指示」上来看，药王秘传似乎注意到了神策府近期的渗透行动…怪不得绿芙蓉这么急着截获它。）
E: (Judging from these "Urgent Instructions," the Disciples are aware of a Seat of Divine Foresight operation to infiltrate their ranks... No wonder Green Hibiscus was so eager to intercept this.)

C: 药王秘传的组织结构奉行扁平化原则，每个地区的负责人都直接向魁首负责。其他地区的情况，我是一概不知的。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus has a flat organizational structure — the head of each area reports directly to the master. I know nothing about what goes on elsewhere.

C: 「执信」？
E: Zhixin?

C: 丹枢大人现在在若木亭，去找她吧。
E: You can find her at Synwood Pavilion.

C: 说谁小狗呢？
E: Hey! Do I sound like a dog to you?

C: 哎，师姐，你说如果将金人的材质替换成里头那个疯长的植物，是不是不用担心机巧部件损坏了？
E: Hey, Yunche... If we switched the material for the aurumatons with whatever that crazy plant's made of, would that eliminate maintenance?

C: 走？这可是个没见过的工程材料啊…这么走了以后哪有机会能再研究研究？
E: How could I leave? This is a novel engineering material... If I leave now I may never get another chance to conduct research on it.

C: 保安已至，加强防御。
E: Security is in position. Defense increased.

C: 为了防止干扰你的判断…本座暂时先撤去投影。你能听到我的声音，就代表我在看护着你。
E: My projection will disappear for the moment so as not to cloud your judgment... If you can hear my voice, then it means I'm watching over you.

C: 景元！！！
E: Jing Yuan!!!

C: 我的妈呀，可烫死我了！说好的现实中没发生过的事就不会烫到我呢！
E: What the actual — that thing was flaming hot! You said things that never happened to me in reality couldn't happen here!

C: 有时候人为了逃避痛苦，会刻意忘却某些极端的记忆……
E: Sometimes people forget extreme memories to protect themselves from suffering...

C: 这些晶体在不同条件下，呈现出了至少六种晶相结构…「六相之冰」，银河真是一道深不可测的谜题。
E: The crystals show at least six structures under differing conditions... "Six-Phased Ice." The galaxy really is an enigma.

C: 好久不见，大眼仔。
E: Long time no see, ol' big eye.

C: 那里的机巧守卫严密得很，希望小姑娘人没事。
E: The security there is tight. I hope that little girl is okay.

C: 后来，含光在异邦旅人劝诱鼓动下不断铸剑。旅人编撰了各种需要神兵利器的理由——什么凭宝剑光复故国，什么凭仙人之剑斩妖诛邪……
E: Later, outworlders got wind of what he was doing and encouraged him to keep forging cursed swords. They came up with all sorts of reasons, from taking back their kingdoms to slaying demons...

C: 赠剑仪式结束之后，由纯美骑士银枝携带剑匣，与使团一道，在云骑军护送下前往工造司，由工造司工正确认宝剑入库。
E: After the ceremony, Argenti carried the sword case, and together with the delegation, they were escorted by the Cloud Knights to the Artisanship Commission. The artisan there confirmed that the sword was safely stored.

C: 那是岁阳的声音？
E: Was that actually the voice of the heliobus?

C: {NICKNAME}，我们走！在那把剑完全夺取银枝心智前，要尽快找到他！
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}! We've got to find Argenti before that sword completely takes over his mind!

C: 你不打算使用孤云与我一决胜负？
E: You're not going to use Guyun to fight for victory?

C: 你记得吗？你在剑士的石碑前孤高的伫立，人们望向你，是因为你承载着对英雄的追忆。于是，那时的你就不再是一柄剑了，而是一块纪念碑！
E: Do you remember when you stood alone in front of the Swordmaster's stone monument? People admired you because you carried the memories of the hero. You were no longer a sword. You were a memorial.

C: 你好像漏掉了什么关键证据。
E: Looks like you're missing some crucial evidence.

C: 怎么不能呀？那三个小剧场，可是每个都出现了「花火大人的尸体」哦。
E: Why not? "Miss Sparkle's body" appeared in all three of those skits just then.

C: 姐，您饶了我吧，她说的这些我真不知道——都给你查过脑子了。
E: Madam, forgive me. I had no idea about anything she said — As you saw, I went through a brain scan and everything.

C: 等找到他，怕不是半个匹诺康尼都要被花火送回现实了……
E: I'm afraid by the time we find him, half of Penacony will have been sent back to reality by Sparkle...

C: 喂！亲爱的忆者？你要去哪儿？不会是想逃吧？不会是怕了吧？流光忆庭就这？就这？就这？
E: Hey! My dear Memokeeper? Where do you think you're going! Don't think you can escape, hmm? Are you afraid? Is that it for the Garden of Recollection? Is that it? Is that all?

C: 哦，乐子神在上，多和你说一句话，都玷污了我高贵圣洁的魂灵！
E: Oh, for The Laughter — if I talk any more with you, it'll make my pure soul filthy!

C: 不用谢，二位想知道什么尽管开口。
E: You're welcome. If there's anything you'd like to know, please ask away.

C: 喂喂，食堂再难吃，也不能请客人吃闭门羹吧！
E: Hey! I know the food here sucks but that's no reason to shut the gate on our guests!

C: …你们惊讶吗？我是一点都不惊讶。
E: *sigh* Anyone here surprised? Anyone?

C: 没有万一！…因为意外是不存在的。
E: There is no "what if"! ...Because nothing remains unforeseen.

C: 这就去。真是比闹钟还催命。
E: Say no more. Seriously, please don't say anything else.

C: 卡芙卡干了什么？
E: What did you do?

C: 符太卜之所以惊讶如此，是因为她发现了三个事实：第一、星核猎手不是仙舟的敌人，这你已经知道了，虽然你始终不信。
E: Diviner Fu was surprised because she discovered three truths: One, the Stellaron Hunters are not enemies of the Xianzhou. You know this now, though you refused to believe it.

C: 如何，{NICKNAME}，这些故事很新奇吧？
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}? Fascinating stories, no?

C: 杨叔的意思是…是星核导致了「建木」生长？
E: Mr. Yang, do you mean... the Stellaron is making the Ambrosial Arbor grow?

C: 星核猎手不是幕后之人，这，我在看见那家伙的时候就明白了。但他为何而来，又为何引来星穹列车？…这块拼图，我却始终找不到。
E: The Stellaron Hunters aren't the ones behind the curtain... No, as soon as I set eyes on Blade, it was clear to me. But why is he here, and why did he draw the Astral Express? ...That piece of the puzzle still eludes me.

C: 听起来可是个厉害的宝贝啊！
E: Sounds like an amazing treasure!

C: 恩公真是会开玩笑。和您一齐行动遇上的麻烦，比我随商团出航十年加起来的还多呢。
E: You have quite the sense of humor, benefactors... I've encountered more trouble with you than I have with the merchant fleet in ten years.

C: …将军三请四邀？你们？别逗了，有罗浮的云骑军在，将军怎么可能派外人来啊。
E: ...You mean the general invited you? Is that a joke? The Luofu has the Cloud Knights — why would he send outsiders?

C: 我有个办法帮你们，但相对的，你们也得帮帮我。来，这边厢有请～
E: Means I know of may yet serve your fight, pray you in repayment aid my plight. Come! Come on, through here~

C: 在下这次驻留长乐天，本是来为一些同胞看诊送药…但临时接下了神策府研析药方的活儿，耽搁了时间。
E: My stay in Exalting Sanctum was supposed to be focused on treating people and delivering medicine, but the Seat of Divine Foresight tasked me with analyzing the prescription... I've been severely delayed.

C: 蠢货，你怎么还提这茬！
E: You idiot! Enough about yelling and crying!

C: 不是吧？我看着就是老大一拳没打动人家啊？
E: You sure about that, boss? They didn't even flinch.

C: 没错！要是你没用内力暗算我，我肯定一拳就给你打得满嘴血！
E: That's right! If you hadn't cheated, I would've knocked your lights out!

C: 无妨，拿去读吧。如果你对天缺者问题感兴趣的话…收下这个吧。
E: No need to apologize — feel free to read it. If you're interested in the Incomplete Ones... you can take it.

C: 魁首大人，请您退后，我来处理这家伙。
E: Master, stand back. Let me handle this.

C: 那究竟是什么药？
E: What kind of medicine is it, exactly?

C: 非常感谢！
E: Thank you so much!

C: 虽然以您的身手，不需要我担心，但还是请您注意安全。
E: Please be careful, though I know you can probably deal with any danger with your combat skills.

C: （脚印…这脚印似乎是兽类留下的，看起来还不止一组。跟着脚印找找看吧，也许会有线索。）
E: (Footprints... They seem to belong to an animal, and I think there is more than one pair. Let's follow the footprints for clues.)

C: 再多三、四个人也打不过我。
E: Even with three or four helpers, you still aren't my match.

C: 有座末日孤城叫贝洛伯格！
E: There's an isolated doomsday city called Belobog!

C: 真抱歉，是我们的提议…
E: I'm sorry. It was our suggestion...

C: 放放放我们离开——
E: Let us go. Let us go!

C: 怕什么？老子没了，你不就能过上你想要的生活了吗？
E: But what? Aren't you gonna be living the life you've always wanted once I'm gone?

C: 理由？需要理由吗？非要理由的话——
E: Why? You need a reason? How about this one...

C: 在看视频前，我想问家人你一个问题，你相信幽灵鬼怪的存在吗？
E: But before you watch it, I gotta ask you a question... do you believe in ghosts?

C: 新名词出现了！「恚炎」？
E: What did you just say? Who's "Furynox?"

C: {NICKNAME}你肯定能找到出去的路吧！请务必带上我一起走……
E: {NICKNAME}, you can find the way out, right? Please take me with you...

C: 浮烟，你这畜生…
E: Cirrus, you beast...

C: {NICKNAME}，是你！可、可算是见到活人了！
E: {NICKNAME}, it's you! I—I finally found another living soul!

C: 不过，凡事总有例外。我本以为尾巴大爷你逃出生天，逍遥自在去了…却没想到，你竟然被这个小小的狐狸姑娘给制伏了，真是笑死人了。
E: ...but there's an exception to everything. "Mr. Tail," I thought you'd escaped to freedom... Who could've guessed you'd be sealed in this tiny foxian girl? Humiliating...

C: 如果你想要冠冕堂皇的——仙舟将岁阳之祖囚禁在牢笼中，为仙舟提供动力，这理由够不够？想要简单直白的——咱们就是想斗一斗将军，看看仙舟人的斤两。
E: The official answer is that the Xianzhou is sealing heliobi in a cage and forcing them to supply energy to the ship... In reality, however, we just want to fight the general... and see what the Xianzhou is truly made of!

C: 各位都知道大岁阳「燎原」激战将军的故事，它是众多岁阳融聚一体的结果。
E: You've heard the story of Ignamar and the great heliobus's glorious fight against the general. They were an entity born of many heliobi fusing together...

C: 也就是说，咱们接下来岂不是要和同袍战斗？
E: ...Does that mean we'll be fighting our friends...?

C: 偃偶也保留着同情心吗？看起来各位是不想打败恚炎喽？在岁阳看来，这事儿简单地就像一笔买卖。管它是同族，还是同僚，只要能赢得胜利，有什么不能下手的？
E: Oh, do puppets feel empathy? Or do you not wish to defeat Furynox anymore? We heliobi think of such matters as business transactions. As long as something can bring us victory, we will destroy everything — even allies and kin.

C: 岁阳是在故意戏弄我们。
E: The heliobus is trying to trick us.

C: …作为勾摄重犯的判官，胆小怯懦是失职。汝等离开幻境之后，吾会严加指责。
E: ...As a judge responsible for capturing criminals, her cowardice is a dereliction of duty. I will reprimand her severely once you leave the illusion.

C: 真是没有意义…真是没有价值……
E: So meaningless... So worthless...

C: 能听见我讲话吗？
E: Can you hear me?

C: 柯柯娜的转变太突兀了。
E: Cocona's change is too abrupt.

C: 娜娜，眼看快要毕业了，你想好未来要做什么了吗？
E: Cocona, you're about to graduate soon. Have you decided on what you want to do in the future?

C: 你是不是又被那个声乐老师给忽悠了，所以才会冒出这些奇怪的想法？他就是看你单纯好骗，想靠话术再多捞点学费！
E: Have you been misled by that music teacher again? Is that why you're having such strange thoughts? He just thinks you're naive and easy to fool, and is trying to scam you into paying more tuition!

C: …好好选，千万别让我们失望。
E: ...Choose carefully. Do not disappoint us.

C: 你也不懂理财，放在我们这里更好。
E: You don't know the first thing about managing your expenses. It's better that you safekeep your wages with us.

C: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
E: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

C: （一群莱斯利的影迷设法众筹买下了他的记忆，然后结伴来到了匹诺康尼。）
E: (A group of Lesley's fans had found a way to pool their funds and purchase his memories, taking it with them into Penacony.)

C: 有很多人为了体验「梦境乐园」不惜付出一切代价，哪怕闹得倾家荡产也要来到匹诺康尼……
E: Many people are willing to pay any price to experience the "Dreamscape." They go as far as to spend every penny to their name just to be in Penacony...

C: 您的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 不值得，一点都不。
E: It is not, not at all.

C: 我本想表现得更热情些，但不知为何…从刚才起我便感到一阵眩晕恶心，打不起十分的精神。希望您能理解……
E: I was hoping that I could muster more of a friendly attitude, but I don't know why... I have been feeling dazed and nauseous since what happened before. I just cannot seem to muster any energy. I hope you can understand...

C: 我们的行为越是奏效，构成这具躯体的根基就越是脆弱。到时候，我应该能感受到它带来的影响……
E: The greater the effect of our results, the weaker the foundation of this body should become. When the time comes, I should be able to feel the effects our actions have brought...

C: 我猜只有一个办法可以验证。
E: I think there is only one way.

C: 戳破幻想。
E: Destroy the fantasy.

C: 但我明白一件事：那些流窜在外的诋毁之声早就不再是针对我个人的攻击。它逐渐演变成了一种势不两立的恶意循环，一种…注定不会有赢家的战争。
E: But I did come to understand one thing: Those slanderous voices outside had not been a personal attack on me for a long time. They gradually evolved into a vicious cycle of perpetual opposition... A battle that was destined to never have a victor.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。要抓紧些，我不确定这幅身体还能坚持多久……
E: Let's go, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. We must be quick. I don't know how much longer this body can hold on...

C: 傻瓜，莱斯利…你这傻瓜……
E: Lesley, you idiot... You really are...

C: 谢谢您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。少了您的帮助，只凭我一个人做不到任何这些。
E: Thank you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. Without your help, I would never have been able to do any of this alone.

C: 船长，空艇的启动事项业已准备完毕，现在我得回到我的工作岗位准备航行事项了，我就在门外随时待命，如有需要，请随意差遣。
E: Captain, preparation procedures for the airship's launch are complete. I have to return to my station to get ready for the upcoming journey. I'll be awaiting orders outside the door, so don't hesitate to dispatch me if you have any needs.

C: 第一件事是，我准备了一套管理准则，我希望能在空艇上一一践行，希望能允许我这么做。
E: The first being, I have prepared a set of management guidelines which I hope will be adhered to while aboard the airship. Please grant my request.

C: 我还有最后一件事想向您汇报，有位船员在对船长室进行日常清洁时，发现了一个问题——请您跟我到现场看看吧。
E: There's just one last thing to report: A crew member discovered an issue during routine cleaning of the captain's cabin. Please follow me to take a look.

C: 我现在就要当大堂经理。
E: I'm going to be the lobby manager right now.

C: 真的吗？只是拔掉电源就完了？这真的足够「开拓」吗？
E: Really? You're just going to remove its power supply? You sure this is "trailblazing" enough?

C: 不废话了！现在这地方归你管，是吧？那就赶紧帮个忙，给我续个房间——
E: Enough bull-shooting! You're in charge here now, right? Then do me a favor, and give me a forking extension for my room fast...

C: 所以，我决定暂时与他同行，并为他尚未完成的高尚事业贡献一臂之力。
E: So, I decided to team up with him for now and put my efforts toward realizing his unaccomplished noble pursuit.

C: 我得看下你的有效证件。
E: Let me see some ID, please.

C: 十分感、感谢您！
E: Thank you... thank you very much!

C: 我、我感谢天命……
E: I... I'm grateful for my fate...

C: …游侠机器，小子！
E: ...I'm a muddle-fudging cyborg Ranger, kid!

C: 哈哈，我胡了！
E: Hu! Haha! I've won!

C: 公司的专机应该就快到了。那么就此别过吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Our private jet should be arriving soon. So let's say so long for now, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 拍张合照再走吧！机巧鸟已经准备好了！
E: Let's take a group picture! I've got a cycrane ready!

C: 你真是太体贴了。不过，我也没有本事帮你看门。
E: You're so sweet. But I'm simply not qualified to help you watch the door.

C: 铖杰，我们还是换个地方吧。
E: Chengjie, let's go elsewhere.

C: 等等…师傅也许没有骗你，我们在翻手稿的时候，也找到了一封星际和平公司设计师入职邀请函！
E: Hang on... He may not have been joking around with you. We've found an IPC Designer Invite!

C: 当时的我也处于走人改行的艰难挣扎中。我修学星槎制造，但实在没什么天分，很多老师傅都劝我不必苦熬，甚至不必留在工造司里。
E: At the time, I was also struggling with my dwindling career. I studied starskiff manufacturing but didn't have any knack for it. Lots of masters told me to stop and that there was no point in staying at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 没错，顾名思义，它就是「能够长成星槎的种子」。不过它并非是什么植物上长出来的「种子」，而是融合了可塑金属、生物材料、玉兆等等的构造体。
E: Yup, as the name suggests, it's a seed that can grow into a starskiff. But it's not a seed that grows into a plant-like structure. It incorporates moldable metals, biological materials, jade abaci, and more.

C: 老师就不会犯错了吗？太卜大人她就…她好像…确实不犯错。
E: Sometimes, masters make mistakes too. Like master diviner, she... she... I think she's never blundered.

C: 我现在去借一台金人，为了将这套系统连接进金人，我需要一些能够外接玉兆的零件，这件事情就拜托你们了。
E: I'll go and borrow an aurumaton now. To link the system to the aurumaton, I need some parts that can be connected to the jade abacus. I'm counting on you guys for this.

C: 成了，穷观阵会以这些人为线索，追查勾连，这些叛徒谁也逃不了。
E: That's it. The Matrix of Prescience will use these people as clues to hunt down the others. None of these traitors can escape.

C: 所以接下来，该是判官大人兑现承诺的时候了？
E: Now, is it time for you to realize your promise, Judge Xueyi?

C: 与那时一样，本座会在这「穷观阵」的中心引导阵法。你们要做的，是将那座三座阵基重启。去吧，可别让判官久等了。
E: Like the previous time, I'll stay in the middle of this Matrix of Prescience to control it. What you need to do now is reactivate the three base terminals. Go on now. Don't make the judge wait too long.

C: 我们以后有缘再见吧。
E: Let's hope we'll cross paths again in the future.

C: 和我有关吗？
E: Anything to do with me?

C: ——他说那话的时候全身缠满绷带，血肉模糊的…但那是他第一次冲我露出笑脸，那表情我现在闭上眼还能瞧见。
E: He had bandages all over his body — most of his wounds hadn't healed yet... But, it was the first time he'd ever smiled at me. I still remember that expression.

C: 故障了？
E: Maybe it stopped working?

C: 确实符合逻辑。
E: It does make sense...

C: <size=36>「无敌的磐岩冠军——」</size>
E: <size=36>"...the peerless Boulder champion..."</size>

C: 我特地和他说，希望能把这个问题交给我处理。你看，这第二步试炼的内容不就有了吗？
E: I asked him to leave this case to me. Perfect for the second step of the training, right?

C: 答应他吧，希儿。
E: Let him do it, Seele.

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 我…还不能……
E: I... can't...

C: 还差一点！那家伙要撑不住了。
E: Nearly there! It's not gonna last much longer.

C: …哇！！荣誉队员，希儿姐——
E: ...Wow! Honorary member, Miss See—

C: 「咚！哐！嘭！」那场面真是激烈！最后我们打成了平手，谁都没法战胜对方。
E: "Bam! Crack! Boom!" It's gonna be such an epic fight! And then we'll reach a draw. Neither of us will be able to win.

C: 说什么呢！
E: Hey, what's that supposed to mean!?

C: 我们收到命令，在查清袭击事件前因后果之前，必须暂时扣押贵方的货物进行检查。
E: Sorry, but we've been ordered to detain you and your cargo for inspection until we figure out the source of the attack.

C: 怀炎将军此言差矣，敝上一早就到了。只是两位想必也有所耳闻，她的性情向来不受拘束。
E: That's not true, General Huaiyan. She's been here a while, but I'm sure you've heard of her unbridled nature.

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 丹枢的叛乱、幻胧的计划…在联盟其他天将眼中只是一面之词。只有一样铁证被留了下来，遗患无穷。
E: Dan Shu's rebellion and Phantylia's scheming are merely one side of the story to the other Arbiter-Generals of the Alliance. Only a single piece of incontrovertible evidence remains, creating an endless source of potential complications.

C: 且不谈知识产权保密，光是这些博识学会制造的测试原型机的造价就高到你们无法想象！要是有什么闪失，用尽你们漫长余生打工也赔不起！
E: Even if we set aside the secrecy of intellectual property, these prototypes built by the Intelligentsia Guild are incredibly valuable, beyond your wildest imagination! If anything goes wrong, you won't be able to pay for it even with your lives!

C: 看来斯科特先生很有信心，自己的职业和人生都能支撑到见证这场胜利的时刻。
E: Sure thing, Mr. Skott. You seem pretty confident that your career and life will last long enough to witness this victory unfold.

C: 岗哨神圣，不可侵犯！有什么事下了班再说！
E: Please do not hinder me from carrying out my sacred duty! We can discuss whatever you want after my shift!

C: 很快就好，多多担待。
E: Don't worry. Your turn will come soon. Please bear with me.

C: …曜青仙舟的天击将军？
E: ...The Merlin's Claw of the Xianzhou Yaoqing?

C: 论剑法，我可不会输你。
E: I won't lose to you when it comes to swordplay.

C: 上决——浮云——
E: Cleave through clouds...

C: 丫头，你倒是自信。可我看你却未必能赢过彦卿呀。
E: You've got confidence, my girl, but I don't think you can best Yanqing.

C: 啊…怀炎将军走了。我怎么觉得刚才的话题有些不对劲啊！
E: Ah... General Huaiyan's gone. Wait, why does something feel off about what we talked about!?

C: 继续「检查」吧…
E: Keep looking...

C: 让你见识见识，这就是罗浮人授徒传艺的周到礼数！哪怕是弟子，我也会将她亲自接来。
E: I'm just showing you what Luofu etiquette is all about. She might be my apprentice, but it's customary for the master to personally escort their apprentice to the place of learning.

C: 在两位师父的严厉督导下，三月七苦练不辍，几乎患上了网球肘。
E: Under the strict supervision of her two masters, March 7th trains tirelessly, almost developing tennis elbow.

C: 等等…
E: Hold on...

C: 我带你们离开迴星港吧。
E: Alright, I'll take you out of the Stargazer Navalia.

C: 好窄…
E: Ugh, it's so cramped in here...

C: <size=36>别疑神疑鬼了！时间紧迫，快过来。</size>
E: <size=36>Don't be so paranoid! We're running out of time. Get over here!</size>

C: 将军但问无妨。只是我们能回答的，也只是我们所知的；而您所问的…或许内心也早有答案。
E: Please go ahead, General. But keep in mind we can only answer based on what we know. And perhaps... you already have the answers to your questions in your heart.

C: 一切与星核有关
E: It all comes down to the Stellaron.

C: 数千年前，我族受步离人长久奴役，无力反抗。不是因为狐人天然低他们一等，原因就在这个。判官大人的药可是为咱们俩的心理健康着想呢。
E: Thousands of years ago, we foxians were enslaved by the borisin, not because we were naturally weaker, but because of their Lupitoxin. This pill is for our own mental well-being.

C: 而送来这些「货物」的人，显然希望仙舟严格的审核流程能将它的危险暴露在天舶司和云骑的眼前。他们想确保的是它一定会被送入幽囚狱。
E: And whoever delivered these "goods" clearly wanted them to go through the Xianzhou's strict inspection process, to show the Sky-Faring Commission and Cloud Knights how dangerous they were. They wanted these mechs to end up right here in The Shackling Prison.

C: 在这扇门后的洞天里，关押的便是狐人的大敌，呼雷。
E: Inside the delve behind this door is the greatest enemy of the foxians, Hoolay.
Who's there!?

C: 四下找找，应该会有眉目的。
E: Let's look around. Maybe we'll find some clues.

C: 如此…如此熟悉的回忆！那些追逐、啃噬、撕扯的回忆…回来了，都回来了！它们统统都回来了！
E: This brings back such... familiar memories! Memories of chasing, gnawing, and tearing... They're back, they're back! They've all come back!

C: 放心吧，只要买了票，地衡司会提前把登舰通知发给咱们的。我看邸报上说，在典礼召开前，竞锋舰会鸣礼炮示意呢！
E: Relax, the Realm-Keeping Commission will send boarding notices to all ticket holders. The gazette said the Skysplitter will fire a salute before the ceremony starts!

C: 你不是为此准备了很久吗？
E: But haven't you been preparing for it for so long?

C: 演武仪典召开前三个时辰\n\n幽囚狱中
E: Three dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nIn The Shackling Prison

C: 他气绝之前曾被人咬开动脉，吸走大量的血。真是粗暴残忍的手法……
E: Someone bit open his arteries and drained almost all of his blood while he was still alive. Such a cruel and ruthless act...

C: 步离人不可一世的时代早就过去了。在给你回家的希望之前，他们有没有把这些可悲的事实告诉你，呼雷大人？
E: The borisin's era has long passed. Did they ever tell you these harsh facts before giving you hope for returning home, Lord Hoolay?

C: 客人，坐霸王船可不行啊。要不您先去取个钱，我随时可以走。
E: Hey, you can't take my starskiff for free. Maybe you should withdraw some money first? I'll be ready whenever you are.

C: 看起来，他们并不希望将我的逃离公之于众。这不意外，恐惧比爪牙更致命…尤其是在「演武仪典」这样的节庆时刻。
E: They don't want to publicize my escape. I understand. It's no surprise, for fear is more deadly than claws and fangs... especially during a festive time like the Wardance.
Agh...

C: …载我们逃离罗浮的星槎。我在迴星港发现的步离人正是在为他们准备逃跑的船只。
E: ...A starskiff to get us out of the Luofu. The borisin we discovered at Stargazer Navalia were actually preparing a vessel for their escape.

C: （结束问话）
E: (End the questioning)

C: 是竞锋舰。举行演武仪典的星船要起航了。该死，到时候天舶司会清空航路！我们的星槎要是想逃走，一定会被发现的。
E: It's the Skysplitter. The ship that the Wardance will be held on is about to set off! The Sky-Faring Commission will clear the air routes! And if our starskiffs try to escape, we'll be spotted.

C: 想去看看赛场的样子！
E: I want to see what the ring looks like!

C: 看起来是问完了……
E: Looks like she's done with her questions...

C: 我得暂时离开，去舰上各处好好检查检查，这也是爷爷交代的使命呢。
E: I have to leave for a moment and do some inspections around the ship. This was also part of grandpa's orders.

C: 演武仪典就要开始了…
E: The Wardance is about to begin...

C: 宣战。
E: A declaration of war.

C: 朱明的水土养人啊…
E: Zhuming's got a climate that makes people healthy...

C: 例行检查！请登舰乘客立刻接受检查。
E: Routine inspection! All passengers please prepare for an inspection.

C: *呼应战首的狼啸声*
E: *echoing the howl of the Warhead*

C: 啊啊啊……
E: Ah...

C: 你…就是椒丘医士？
E: Are you... the healer, Jiaoqiu?

C: 就像你们这些医士拼命救死扶伤，但这世上依旧会有疾病和死亡一样。我们也会一直战斗下去的。
E: You healers work yourselves to the bone to save people, even though there will always be sickness and death. So we will also keep fighting.

C: 尽情痛饮我的鲜血吧…呼雷。只可惜，我不是一个没有秘密的人啊。我还藏着一个微不足道的秘密……
E: Enjoy the taste of my fresh blood... Hoolay. Unfortunately, I am not a man without secrets. I still have one little secret hidden up my sleeve...

C: 不能让她离开这儿！
E: We can't let her get away!

C: 战首万岁！飞霄大人将赐我们未来！
E: Long live the Warhead! Lord Feixiao will grant us our future!

C: …答案不用我多说吧。
E: ...I'm sure my answer doesn't need much explanation.

C: 你想在我内心种下恐惧……
E: You aim to instill terror within me...

C: 所以丹鼎司中出现药王秘传与绝灭大君，祸乱丹鼎司，引入星核，令建木重生也和持明脱不了干系？
E: So the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus joining forces with the Lord Ravager to stir up trouble in the Alchemy Commission, the introduction of the Stellaron, and the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection — all have something to do with the Vidyadhara?

C: 打过了，打不通啊！可能是把手机关了，也可能是弄丢了，这家伙都干得出来。
E: I did! I couldn't get through! His phone might be off, or he lost it... That moron is capable of anything.

C: 你是否见到过一个耍酒疯的人？
E: Have you seen a really drunken person?

C: 确实能让他们卖朕个面子。但也不能总靠王权压制规矩…唉，没办法，这次情况紧急，特事特办吧。
E: I'm sure I can have them acquiesce to this request, but I can't simply flout rules by abusing my authority... *sigh* No choice then — I'll have to make an exception for this urgent matter.

C: 啊…是有这么回事。此人在街上耍酒疯，被猎犬踢出了梦境。当下他正在接受家族公关人员盘问。
E: Ah... Yes, we did. That man was drunk on the streets, and the Bloodhounds kicked him out of the Dreamscape. The Family's public relations officer is currently interrogating him.

C: 羡慕吧？
E: Jealous?

C: 此后数个月，朕以税务官灭门案为借口，彻底清除了朝野的皇太后派。
E: Over the next few months, I used the tax collector extermination as an excuse to eradicate the Empress Dowager's clansmen within and without the imperial chambers.

C: 如果你愿意弃暗投明，我们愿意接纳一位强大的战士。但若你执意要继续做暴君的爪牙…我们不惧死亡。
E: If you wish to abandon that villain, we would welcome a mighty warrior who fights for righteousness. But if you insist on being a tyrant's fangs... We do not fear death either.

C: 再见了，灰骑士。
E: Goodbye, Gray Knight.

C: 你一生为朕尽忠…最后一次，我保证这是最后一次了。
E: You pledged your life in servitude to me... Last time, I promise this is the last time.

C: 好的～如果遇到什么烦心事，记得随时来找朕！为臣民排忧解难，是最幸福的事～
E: Sure! If you encounter any troubles, remember to come to me anytime! It gives me untold happiness to dispel any troubles for my subjects!

C: 要和气，不要打架！暴力不能解决问题！
E: Violence isn't always the best solution!

C: 不如我们先躲起来，等到家族的人离开了再去帮帮他吧——又轮到「钟表把戏」大显神威咯！
E: How about we hide and wait for The Family people to leave so that we can help him? It's time for my Clockwork to do its trick!

C: 终于又见面了，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: You're finally here again, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗯…连带损伤在可接受范围内。起爆计划照常。
E: Hmm... the amount of collateral damage is acceptable. The detonation plan can proceed as scheduled.

C: 扶起查德威克博士。
E: Help Dr. Chadwick to his feet.

C: 关闭维生装置。
E: Deactivate the life-sustaining system.

C: 请你…靠近……
E: Please... come closer...

C: 从虚数流溢到虚数坍缩…从理论到应用…从一纸论文到「虚数脉冲」的问世……
E: From Imaginary overflow to Imaginary implosion... from theory to application... from a mere paper to the birth of the Imaginary Pulse...

C: 他们…他们真的打算使用「脉冲」吗？！
E: They... Are they really going to use the Pulse!?

C: 比起在这跟我兜圈子，你更该去找找那位「钟表匠」留下的东西。
E: Instead of going around in circles with me, you should look for the stuff that the Watchmaker left behind.

C: 鸟，折纸小鸟，或者「湛蓝爵士」。只要别给我添乱，想怎么叫都行。
E: Bird, origami bird, or Dr. Blues. You can call me anything you want as long as you don't give me any trouble.

C: …有何贵干？
E: ...How may I help?

C: 哟，忆质重构、模因合成、光锥材料…这些忆庭的玩意儿居然真让他给搭出来了。可以啊，这小子从哪学的筑梦技巧？
E: Woah, memoria refactoring, memetic synthesis, Light Cone materials... He actually constructed all these concepts that existed only in the Garden of Recollection. Not too shabby. Where'd this kid learn his dreamweaving techniques?

C: 逮捕你，当然是为了梦境的安全……
E: Arresting you is for the sake of the Dreamscape's safety, of course...

C: 你还有未来。
E: You still have a future.

C: 呵呵，我们不是约好了在上面见吗？太久等不到人，就决定直接下来咯。
E: Haha, didn't we agree to meet up there? I waited so long and didn't see anyone, so I decided to come straight down.

C: 小鸟的身体正被梦境吞噬。如果想把奥尔拉带回去…这就是最后的机会了。
E: The bird's body is being devoured by the Dreamscape. If you want to bring Orla back... this would be your last chance.

C: 下次吧。托某位无名客的福，本鸟刚做了一场大梦，得先缓缓。
E: Maybe next time. Thanks to a certain Nameless, I've just had a huge dream. I'll have to take a break.

C: 啾啾，原来从下往上看的天空也很漂亮呢～
E: Tweet tweet, so the sky seen from below is beautiful too.

C: 湛蓝爵士也很想你们啾。
E: Dr. Blues misses you all too, tweet.

C: （按下快门）
E: (Press the shutter)

C: 关于米哈伊尔…
E: About Mikhail...

C: …啥意思，格拉克斯老爷也教那臭小子学筑梦了?
E: ...What'd you mean? Mr. Glaux also taught the kid to weave dreams?

C: 这大概是那孩子自己摸索着做出来的东西。真有趣…我还没见过这种建构方式呢……
E: This is probably something the child figured out himself. Interesting... I've never seen such a construction method before...

C: 我心爱的大壮之所以会性情大变、连着几天不愿意接客，全是因为这个外邦人做了手脚。
E: That my beloved Bossman would exhibit such major mood swings, refusing to receive guests for days on end, it is the trickery of this outlander.

C: 哈哈，看来你已经把善举当成了习惯。我认为我们有深入交流的必要。
E: Haha, it looks like you're a habitual altruist. I believe it necessary for us to have a deeper conversation.

C: 有这么划算的伙计，现在基本没几个摊主愿意雇佣像我这样的本地人了——我可受不了不要工钱的活！
E: No business owner in their right mind would want to hire any locals with such affordable staff! I can't work for no pay!

C: 等下轮抽签结束后，他怕不是还要折腾好一阵，到时可就又有乐子看了。
E: When the next drawing of lots ends, he'll probably still be struggling for a while — that'll be a funny sight to see then.

C: 很遗憾，快要饿死的人往往没什么财产…除了他们自己。
E: Alas, famished refugees would have a dearth of valuables on them... apart from their own lives.

C: 谁知道呢？这一切恐怕只有{RUBY_B#时间的流逝}欧洛尼斯的神迹{RUBY_E#}才能给出答案吧。
E: Who knows? I fear only {RUBY_B#Passing of Time}Oronyx's Miracle{RUBY_E#} may be able to give an answer.

C: 吾师，这些人…他们的状态很不好，在我们来之前就已经有人受伤了。
E: Master, these people... they're not doing well. Some were already injured before we got here.

C: 我知道，我会想办法的…至少能确保他们活着。
E: I know. I will think of a way... at least to guarantee their survival.

C: 你扛着货箱，一路回到了重渊。
E: You lug the crate back to the abyss.

C: 谢绝了老店长的帮助，你带着篮子一路回到了重渊。
E: After politely declining the shopkeeper's offer to help, you bring the baskets back to the abyss.

C: 总感觉有古怪…算了，那不是我该关心的事。但你千万记得，要躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐……
E: Something feels off... No matter, it has nothing to do with me. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...

C: 至于我的罪名，完全不值得多费口舌。我可以接受惩罚，只希望各位能抓住这个机会、把当下的问题聊清楚——
E: As for my crime, precious time need not be spent on it. I can accept the punishment, but I only hope that everyone will take this chance to discuss the current question with clarity...

C: 应该严判重判。
E: The sentencing should be imposed more harshly.

C: 就算他捐出全部家当，也不过是他个人的自由。但他不该拿我们全体公民的东西，奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用！
E: Even if he donated his entire fortune, that would be his personal freedom to do so. But he should not have taken property that belongs to the people. Okhema's property is only for the people of Okhema!

C: 那阿格莱雅小姐知道他现在身在何处吗？
E: Do you know where they are right now, Miss Aglaea?

C: 伊阿宋带着物资回来了，但却不愿进城，说什么在等人——搞不好这小子把您的事情搞砸了，劳烦您亲自到场看看吧。
E: Iason has returned with supplies but refuses to enter the city. He says that he is waiting for someone... There is a chance that he failed in the task that you gave to him. Could I trouble you to come and see him yourself?

C: 我想从你身上知道一些事情。
E: I need some information from you.

C: 是吧，君子论迹不论心，你的果断与自信值得崇高道德…在这里或许是塔兰顿的奖赏！
E: Right? It's about the means above the ends. Your decisiveness and confidence are worthy of high moral praise... Perhaps this is a reward from Talanton themself!

C: …不能。
E: ...I cannot.

C: 记忆的味道似乎越来越奇怪了，我们还得再去更接近现在的往世看看……
E: The memory's scent is growing more and more unusual... We will need to go into the more recent past to see...

C: 哈哈，恩人，你就别在这种场合跟我开玩笑了。
E: Haha, my savior, this is not the time to be joking with me.

C: 在记忆的更深处，传来伴随愁绪的哀叹……
E: From the depths of the memory arises a sorrow lament...

C: 没人知晓她的过去，她从雅努萨波利斯的废墟里出现，带领逃难的人们穿过黑潮。
E: None knows of her past. She emerged from the ruins of Janusopolis, leading refugees across the black tide.

C: 别心急，只要跟随命运的指引，您一定能见到帕西提亚女士的。
E: Don't be anxious. As long as you follow the guidance of destiny, you will surely encounter Lady Pasithea.

C: 在他的情绪彻底失控前，还是赶紧离开，去找抓走帕西提亚的圣城卫士问问情况好了。
E: You'd better leave before he gets hysterical. Better go look for the city guards who detained Pasithea and ask about the situation.

C: 「一切都是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}对我的惩罚——我背叛了它，罪有应得。」
E: "Everything that's happening is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} punishment for me — I betrayed them, and I deserved this."

C: 听听它对你们说了什么？它说，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}拒绝降下神谕，泰坦从未爱着它的子民。
E: Listen to what it has said to you. It said that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} refused to bestow a prophecy, and that the Titans never loved their subjects.

C: 大人，难道说？
E: My lord, you mean...?

C: 上前去吧，天平已明晰你灵魂的重量，只待被赋予与之相称的命运。
E: Go forth. The scale has ascertained the weight of your soul. Only a fate worthy of it waits.

C: 可如果成为圣女，你们都能活下来。
E: But if you become the Holy Maiden, you all will be able to survive.

C: 不可违抗的天命。
E: An irresistible command from heaven.

C: 我这本是下卷。
E: This is Volume 2.

C: 《如我所书》一事，我会尽力去办，绝不让英雄事迹被星空埋没。
E: Regarding As I've Written, I will do my utmost, and won't let these heroic deeds be buried by the stars.

C: 老式电话机盯着你，偶尔转动眼珠，像一只猫头鹰。
E: The vintage dial phone stares at you, occasionally rolling its eyeballs like an owl.

C: 作为逐火的一员，你也投身于翁法罗斯伟大的征程。你与英雄们邂逅、结缘，共创伟业。作为旅行者，你留下的足迹已足够遥远。
E: As a member of the Flame-Chasers, you've joined Amphoreus's grand journey. You've encountered heroes, forged bonds, and achieved greatness together. As a traveler, your footprints have already reached far and wide.

C: （但星星会记得，每一篇史诗的名字。）
E: (But the stars will remember the name of every epic.)

C: 啊对了，既然今天的课程结束了，古恩先生说过，等老师教导完毕后记得提醒老师你去找他聊聊，那么老师，请吧？
E: Oh, by the way, Mr. Gunn said that after today's lesson, he'd like you to go back to him and have a chat. Perhaps you should go now?

C: 哦，知道了。
E: Okay.

C: 好，好，好。
E: Okay. Okay. Okay.

C: 她说话从不咄咄逼人，为人诚恳，遇到不懂的事情，她会很坦诚地说「这个我都不知道诶，哇，为什么呀？」
E: She doesn't speak aggressively, is always sincere, and when she doesn't understand something, she'll say with complete frankness, "I never knew that. Wow, why?"

C: 出什么事了？
E: What's happening here?

C: 固件识别失败，无法远程连接。
E: Unable to recognize firmware. Remote connection cannot be established.

C: 启动中…当前定位装置信号正常，正在识别当前定位…识别成功！
E: Initiating... Normal signal strength for positioning device. Identifying current location... Location found!

C: 看来是我误会你了。
E: It appears I've misjudged you.

C: （这家伙在自己吓自己，完全没办法沟通啊，还是赶紧找到那名亲历者吧。）
E: (This person is just scaring themselves. I can't communicate with them at all. Better hurry and find the witness.)

C: 我…不对，我有一个朋友，前一阵子因为失眠整天打瞌睡，但神智绝对清晰。
E: I... No, I have a friend who's sleepy all day because of insomnia, but he's definitely conscious and sane.

C: 嗯嗯，我也这么觉得！
E: Yes, yes, I think so too!

C: 啊？你是谁啊，吓死我了。
E: Huh? Who are you? You scared me!

C: （以斯帖要的照片都拍好了，带过去给她看看吧。）
E: (I'm done with Esther's photos. Time to take these back to her.)

C: 将就而已？嗯…问题倒也不大。
E: That will do.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 前几天，我像往常一样来到这里，却发现垃圾桶里躺着一张漂亮的明信片——没想到竟然是寄给我的，署名是「垃圾大王」。
E: A few days ago, I came here like I always do, and I found a beautiful postcard lying in the trashcan. Surprisingly, it was addressed to me, it was from "Garbage King."

C: 我记得你不再鉴定古代遗物了。
E: I thought you weren't in the appraisal business anymore.

C: 唔…奥列格头儿之前说，今天的任务是给在矿区作业的矿队运送生活物资，但可没提过是要送两大箱东西啊……
E: Hmm... Boss Oleg said earlier that today's mission is to deliver daily necessities to the mining team, but he didn't mention it was two giant crates...

C: 你要是有过什么难忘的作战经历，就给我讲讲吧……
E: If you have any unforgettable combat experiences, tell me about them...

C: 杰、杰帕德？！就是那个年纪轻轻就当上戍卫官的……
E: Ge—Gepard!? The young Captain...?

C: 等等…这的确是他的笔迹，肯定不会错。
E: Hold on... This is his handwriting, alright. I'm sure of it.

C: 我想买一束花当作礼物…
E: I'd like to buy some flowers as a present.

C: 说起来，我已经很久没在贝洛伯格见过动物了…您要送花的对象如此喜欢动物，看来是位相当善良体贴的人呢。
E: Speaking of animals, I haven't seen any in Belobog in a long time... The person you are sending flowers to must be a very kind person.

C: 事到如今你都上了贼船了，还在腼腆什么？况且和我这样的大科学家一起同…那个词叫同什么来着？
E: No need to be shy about it. We now sink or swim together. Besides, with a great scientific mind such as mine, shouldn't you feel honored that we are now together in the same b—... b—... What is the word? Ugh, it's just on the tip of my tongue.

C: 这些都是基本流程，也是为了避免无意义的资源浪费。请您多多包涵。
E: This is just standard procedure to avoid pointless waste of resources. Please bear with me a moment.

C: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。
E: You're so smart. With a little training, you'll definitely be able to answer these questions and then turn in that paper to me.

C: 能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。什么时候您又想活动活动脑筋了，欢迎再来找我。
E: It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. When you want to exercise your brain, please come again.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 所以小女子一直注视着舞台上闪闪发光的塔米拉小姐，像一个画家临摹名画一样，试着去临摹塔米拉小姐的一切……
E: So I've been watching Tamila's sparkling on-stage performances, like a painter copying a famous painting, trying to copy everything Tamila does...

C: 她的话，每次都会买同样的花…让我确认一下……「七彩虹」。塔米拉小姐每次买的花是七彩虹。
E: She always buys the same flowers every time... Let me see... "Rainbows." Every time Tamila comes, she buys Rainbow flowers.

C: 但这本小说，小女子还没有读过。你的情报非常有用，谢谢你~
E: But I've never read this particular one. Your intel is highly useful. Thank you~

C: 说说看吧。
E: Go on.

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 谢谢你~这是给你的谢礼~
E: Thank you. Here's a token of my appreciation!

C: 你为小女子带来的情报虽然都很重要，但毕竟还是二手信息…等传到小女子耳朵里，那都成了三手信息啦~
E: All this intel you've brought me is fantastic, but it's still second-hand info... and by the time it reaches me, it's already third-hand...

C: 谢谢你~这是给你的谢礼~
E: Thank you. Here's a token of my appreciation!

C: 哎，无论如何你救了我一命，多谢啦！等拿到书我就去找老歌德碰头——不过你要是先见到他的话，还得请你拜托帮忙传话了。
E: Anyways, thank you for saving me! I'll be heading to Old Goethe's once I get the book — But if you see him first, please let him know.

C: 我认识的医生在下层区…
E: This doctor friend of mine is in the Underworld...

C: 好啊好啊，谢谢你帮忙！这是我的一点心意……
E: Yes, thank you for your help! This is a small token of thanks...

C: 我平时都是独居…独自一人来行政区打拼…当时我就瞅准了城郊那片雪地，觉得一定大有可为……
E: I live alone... I came to the Administrative District on my own to make a name for myself... I set my eyes on that snowy area in the suburbs and thought it would be very profitable...

C: 哦？这条街上居然会有人，真稀奇啊。
E: Oh? It's rare to see someone walking down this street.

C: 你转身离开，又正欲回头再看一眼老人时，却发现那人早已杳无踪迹。
E: As you turn to leave, you try to get one last look at the old man, but he is already nowhere to be found.

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 我…我会马上去找爸爸妈妈…！谢谢你…！
E: I—I'll go find Mom and Dad! Thank you!

C: 意识到问题了吗？
E: Do you see the problem now?

C: 想挣钱就找份正经工作。
E: If you want money, go find a proper job.

C: 愿贝洛伯格长存！愿大守护者长存…！
E: May Belobog stand forever! May the Supreme Guardian live forever!

C: 「本店提供试阅服务，但请爱护石板和卷轴。」
E: "We provide sample books for reading, but please be careful with our tablets and scrolls."

C: 曾有人对铁匠如此调侃：「若是哪天『黎明机器」』熄灭了，你们店里的锻造炉怕不就成了整个奥赫玛最亮的东西」。铁匠只是笑笑，并未作答。
E: Someone once mocked the blacksmith: "If there comes a day the Dawn Device goes dark, your forge's furnace would be the brightest thing in all of Okhema." The blacksmith only smiled in silent response.

C: 架子上贴心地准备了蓬松柔软的枕头与毛巾，上面绣着精美的法吉娜圣徽——看来在崇敬泰坦的人们眼中，小憩片刻时也应该在内心与神对话。
E: Fluffy, supple pillows and towels have been thoughtfully prepared on the shelves, Phagousa's sacred emblem embroidered on all of them — it appears that to Titan-worshiping devouts, even moments of brief respite should be used to engage in inner dialogue with their gods.

C: 你挥舞着球棒，还未有任何进攻性动作，对方见你这架势，气焰就弱了七分。
E: You give your baseball bat a few test swings, but before you've even made any aggressive moves, he sees your stance and his demeanor instantly turns to mush.

C: 一夜之间，居民装配的植入体全部溶蚀，星港失去运作能力，对运输工作产生了恶劣影响。
E: Overnight, the implants of all residents suffered deep corrosion, and the starport is now no longer functional. This has had a severe impact on transportation work.

C: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
E: This is the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

C: 莫嫌人类又委屈了他物，若有巨兽的味蕾，泥土才是世间的极味。
E: Say not humanity wronged these beasts, for the taste buds of the dromas find soil to be the most wonderful flavor in the world.

C: 征伐行道
E: Path of Conquest

C: 战斗了那么久，我从未见到你有疲惫之色…你是如何锻炼的，教教我如何？
E: We have battled for all this time, yet I have never seen you fatigued... How do you train? Would you consider teaching me?

C: 实在熬不住，您就开溜！翁法罗斯这么大…唉，您瞧我，又开始说这回事儿了。
E: If it becomes too much for you to bear, you must escape! Amphoreus is so vast... Ah, there I go talking about these things again.

C: 你记住了「曾在餐厅品尝过美食」
E: You remembered "Tasting Delicacies in the Restaurant."

C: 树庭学者并没有那么脆弱。比起生命，研究才是更值得守护的东西。
E: We Grove scholars are not so fragile. To us, research is worth far more than life itself.

C: …呵，愿{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}捍卫你的思想。
E: ...Hah, may the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} protect your mind.

C: 他们跪拜着、祈祷着、吟唱着…仿佛在为神山的众多奇迹再添上一层神圣的意味。
E: They kneel, pray, and chant... as if they're adding sacred glory to the many wonders of the holy mountain.

C: 这就是全知全能的刻法勒，在这么近的距离观看它的奥体，也算是难得的机会。
E: This is Kephale, the omniscient and omnipotent Titan. To observe their form this closely is a rare opportunity.

C: 还是算了。
E: Forget it.

C: 你感到一阵晕眩。
E: You feel a rush of dizziness.

C: 或许深知自己的触碰终将归于虚无，她一直执着于留下存在的证明：诗篇、玩偶、花朵…宛如为一场注定失去所有的远行，精心收拾着记忆的行囊。
E: Perhaps knowing that her touch would one day return to Nihility, she clung to leaving proof of her existence: Poems, dolls, flowers... as if packing memories into a satchel for a journey that was destined to lose it all.

C: 等等，你是不是说反了？
E: Wait, did you just get that wrong?

C: 我找到了许多若虫。
E: I have found many nymphs.

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「和你们通通豹了！」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "I'm gonna sealf-destruct!" )∋

C: 你小子也被收买了？
E: Oh no! Viral marketing got to you too!

C: 那小海豹还挺可爱的…
E: Baby seals are pretty cute...

C: 我们用香油涂抹脸颊…
E: We rub our cheeks with essential oil...

C: 激活圣烛。
E: Activate the holy candle.

C: 这座圣烛安置在偏殿拱门旁，金色的光芒为四周的壁画镀上一层柔和的光晕。
E: This holy candle is placed next to the side hall archway. The golden glow casts a soft halo over the surrounding murals.

C: 不对，那个，呃，你就当是这样吧，哈哈…来，我送你回家，路上我给你讲讲……
E: No, wait, uh, let's just leave it at that, haha... Come, let me walk you home, and I'll explain on the way...

C: 如果是现在的话，或许真能触及天外之界也说不定！
E: Maybe I can actually reach the world beyond the sky now!

C: 记住：你现在只是一枚信封，可不许出声吓唬她们哪。
E: Remember: you're merely a letter now, don't make any noise to scare them.

C: （拿出记忆残晶）
E: (Take out the Memory Crystal Shard)

C: 去吧，记得多准备些「记忆」！
E: Go ahead. Just don't forget to bring more memories!

C: 装上一大桶，带回浴场大家用！
E: Scoop up a whole bucket and bring it back to the baths for everyone to try!

C: 我们早已告别过，海瑟音。数百年前，「金织」便已身殒奥赫玛。
E: We have already bid farewell, Hysilens. The Goldweaver has already met her demise in Okhema a few hundred years ago.

C: 我曾与应星约定，各自持有其中一只，这是作为战友的信任与默契。但在你的记忆里，星核猎手刃…也就是「后来的应星」，一直在纠缠着你。
E: Yingxing and I made a promise to each keep one of them, a testament to our trust and camaraderie as comrades. But in your memories, that Stellaron Hunter Blade... or I should say "what became of Yingxing," has been haunting you.

C: 没办法，我扮演的是不太讨喜的角色。若是不打个招呼就离开，可不得被你一直记恨着？所以，最后的最后，我得唤醒一些你的「美好回忆」……
E: That can't be helped, the role I'm playing isn't exactly likeable. If I left without saying goodbye, wouldn't you hold a grudge against me forever? So, for one final time, I decided to stir up a few of your "pleasant memories"...

C: 「长夜月」的记忆残影彻底消退，仿佛从未在这里出现过，眼前只有哀丽秘榭的温柔海风和无尽夕阳。
E: The memory shard of "Evernight" fades away completely, as if it had never appeared here. All that remains is the gentle sea breeze of Aedes Elysiae and the endless sunset.

C: 为什么这片区域到处都是水？就不怕淹没电子元件吗？
E: Why is there water everywhere here? Shouldn't we be worried about frying the electronics?

C: 不要不要，机械虫变成光，那是爆炸了喀！
E: No, no, no, a mechanical insect turning into light... that means it's exploded! Crrk!

C: ——这个王座，已经是我的了！
E: This throne is mine now!

C: 看啊，多么伟岸的一把巨剑！它已经与这古树融为一体，定是个开门的宝贝！
E: Look! What a majestic giant sword! It has become one with this ancient tree. It must be the key to opening this!

C: 没事，我好得很。
E: It's nothing, I feel fine.

C: 我想问你点事…
E: I wish to ask you...

C: 我本来都不指望了——毕竟你之前已经帮了我们那么多，再提要求就有点蛮不讲理的意思了。
E: I didn't expect you would come. After all, you have offered us a lot of help. I'll be imposing on you if I ask anything more from you.

C: 这、这边走！
E: Th—This way, please!

C: 又、又见面了，贝洛伯格的英雄，{NICKNAME}！
E: {NICKNAME}! We m—meet again, Hero of Belobog.

C: 如、如果您有这个意思，我可以立刻带您上前线！
E: I—If you're keen, I can take you to the front lines immediately!

C: （狗狗有什么不好吗？）
E: (What's wrong with being a dog?)

C: 你们…别走…我有个朋友被困在这里了嘤…它不敢出来…你们能帮帮忙吗？
E: Don't... Don't go... A friend of mine is stuck inside here... It dares not come out... Eeep, can you help?

C: 关于管家，你还知道什么？
E: What do you know about the butler?

C: 小机器人发出嘎吱声，像是害怕，它在空中抖动了片刻，这才开口应答。
E: The little robot creaks as if afraid. It vibrates for an instant in midair before acquiescing.

C: 发生了什么？人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
E: What in the world? I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...

C: 下次你来试试。
E: Why don't you try telling one next time?

C: 人家有秘诀——时不时就在脑袋里重现一遍。而且……
E: I've got a secret — every now and then, I replay it all in my head. Besides...

C: 在所难免。
E: That mood's inevitable.

C: （一声恼火的*哼*）
E: (Let out a furious grunt)

C: 那就来吧！
E: Let's do it!

C: 今天占算的对象是什么呢？
E: What's the divination target for today?

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 这次占算对象是什么呢？
E: What's the divination target this time?

C: 不过作为卜者，咱们接受的第一堂课就告诉我们：时间旅行是不可能成立的。
E: But as a diviner, the first lesson we ever learn tells us that time travel is impossible.

C: 是啊，可眼前有灾殃不拿来算算，于心不安嘛。
E: Yeah, but I've got this disastrous situation at the moment and I'll go mad if I don't get some data on it.

C: 大师我贵人多忘事，不认识你也是正常的。
E: Busy people have short memories. It shouldn't come as a surprise that I can't seem to recall who you are.

C: 少得意忘形了，解出这个棋局的人可是寥寥无几！
E: Stop gloating. Very few people can solve this chess puzzle!

C: 我败了…我彻彻底底地败了。我的人生…哦不，我的岁阳生活已经失去了意义。
E: I've been defeated... I've been completely and utterly defeated. My life... No, my existence as a heliobus has lost all meaning.

C: 就是您啊！勇往直前的开拓者、做好事不留名的无名客、名震银河的球棒侠、城市卫生的清道夫！
E: It's you! The fearless Trailblazer, the fame-forgoing altruistic Nameless, the batter who shakes the cosmos, and the custodian of urban cleanliness!

C: 那我要是赢了呢？
E: What if I win?

C: 哎，是你啊，尊敬的客人。你来得正好，我和我的几位同僚交流了一下——
E: Ah, it's you, our honored guest. You came at the right time. I've been speaking with my colleagues an—

C: 别吵了，能不能说重点…
E: Enough chatter. Can we get to the point?

C: 麻烦阁下了！
E: Thank you so much!

C: 还我一个干净的竞锋舰。
E: I'd rather have a clean Skysplitter.

C: 进入心境空间。
E: Enter the Emoscape.

C: 我还是要进入心境空间。
E: I still want to enter the Emoscape.

C: 嗯…有位织者喜欢乘坐雅努斯秘径。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一座秘径装置旁边</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is captivated by Janus's Hidden Passage. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>beside a concealed path device</color>. Go there to seek them.
Five flames.

C: 不会和你同流合污！
E: I would never associate with the likes of you!

C: 「对不住了，老人家~」
E: "Sorry, old man~"

C: 下回出门最好记得锁门！不然，有你好看！
E: Next time you leave the house, remember to lock the door! Otherwise, you'll just see what happens!

C: 先住手——今天我得说说您。我巴特鲁斯的行窃生涯里，还是头回见您这样的人。
E: Stop for a moment... I have to tell you something about you. In all of my years of thievery, I have never met someone like you.

C: 唔…原来您是抱着这样的信念在收集破烂吗？
E: Uh... So that's the conviction that keeps you collecting trash?

C: 这就相信了？
E: You believed me that easily?

C: 原来您只是在讲玩笑话吗！真是吓了我一跳。
E: You were just kidding? You gave me such a fright.

C: 「不要放过朝圣者，他们的兜里总能掏出东西！」
E: "Never let pilgrims off the hook, they've always got something in their pockets!"

C: 所以——还是得靠咱们来当那万绿丛中一点红，你说是吧。桀桀。
E: So... we've got to be that pop of red in the sea of green, wouldn't you say? Hehehe.

C: …我是不是被刚才那个虫子精神污染了？你知道的，人如果太嘴硬，非要说自己什么都知道，就容易闹出笑话。总之我不是巴特鲁斯，我是那家伙的分身。
E: Did that bug's nonsense affect my mind? You know how it goes — insist you know everything and you'll end up looking foolish. Anyway, I'm not Bartholos — I'm its projection.

C: 要坚持最初的直觉。
E: Gotta trust your gut and stick with the first choice.

C: 好了！这下你满意了吧！
E: There! Happy now?
As well?

C: ——也就是说，我们必须换一种方式，用心灵去阅读「黄金替罪羊」的遗存，这样才能真正理解它当中蕴含着的深意。具体来说，就是……
E: ...In other words, we must read the legacy of the Golden Scapegoat with our soul to truly understand its significance. And that is...

C: 来，百闻不如一试，去迷津前就位吧。我用简单的问询作为样例，让你先熟悉下。
E: Now, let's give it a try. Stand in front of the Maze. I'll use a simple question as an example to get you familiar.

C: 世界各地…
E: Scattered across the world...

C: 哗啦！怎么这么多东西啊！
E: *whoosh* Why is there so much stuff here!?

C: 感谢您坦诚相待。因此，即便只有一线生机，我也希望能尽力抓住。
E: I appreciate your honesty. That's why even if there's only the slimmest chance... I want to hold onto it.

C: 时间不多了，请您尽快将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
E: There's no time. Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

C: 我、我这是双拳难敌四手呀！拜托啦，事成后，我给你俩颁发「见义勇为」奖！
E: I—I've only got two hands! Please — I'll wangle you a prize for your bravery or something when it's all over!

C: 你动了什么手脚？
E: What did you edit?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「…祂来了！」</color>你的耳边传来黑塔不可置信的说话，<color=#dbc291ff>「不，不是祂…是另一个*星神*！是——」</color>她的声音突然被拉远了，变成长长的一条音带。你有种奇怪的感觉，仿佛黑塔的话语凝固了，整个「模拟宇宙」也变得不那么真实。寒气突兀地出现，往你的毛孔深处钻去，一层烟雾飘上你的眼睛——
E: "THEY... came!" You hear Herta's stunned words."No, not THEM... It's another Aeon! It's —" Her voice suddenly drifts off, turning into a stretched sound wave. You have a strange feeling about this, as if Herta's words solidified and the whole Simulated Universe became somehow unreal. A cold draft suddenly blows past, drilling deep into the pores of your skin as a layer of smoke flutters before your eyes —

C: Ⅸ？
E: IX?

C: 我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
E: I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.

C: 唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。
E: Well, because you're special... You have a Stellaron in your body. You're living the life of a Trailblazer while also receiving a glance from Nanook. So, the Aeons may be more willing to accept you.

C: 你说不会再干涉系统——
E: You said you wouldn't interfere anymore —

C: 琥珀色天空传来低鸣。你抬头，这是黄昏。无数铜矿、琥珀与蛋白石从你的面前掉下来。这是一场举世瞩目的矿物质雨。在蒸腾的熔化中，庞大之物从地幔中伸展脊椎，祂宽阔的手掌紧握一柄巨锤。——你睁大双眼，发觉这竟是<color=#dbc291ff>「存护」星神克里珀</color>！
E: There is a murmur in the amber sky. It's dusk. You look up and find countless copper ore, amber and opal falling from the sky. This is a wondrous mineral rain. In the steam, the colossal thing stretched THEIR spine from the mantle with a sledgehammer gripped in THEIR broad palm. You opened your eyes and realized that this is actually <color=#dbc291ff>Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation</color>!

C: 接着祂抽身远去，刹那间消失。你终于松了口气。
E: Then THEY draw away and disappear in an instant. You feel relieved.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「是啊，是啊，就当是新手福利吧。等你熟悉了『模拟宇宙』，我就不会再频繁打扰你啦，还有那么多事情要干呢，你就自己玩吧。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yup, sure am. Just treat it as the perk of being a rookie. Once you're familiar with the Simulated Universe, I won't bother you too much. There's so much to get done, so just play around by yourself."</color>

C: 「模拟宇宙」里的星神相当于一个终端，祂的神格和智慧都来自于真实存在的星神。要不然，我们拿到的情报还有什么价值呢？
E: Aeons in the Simulated Universe are the equivalent of a terminal, and THEIR divinity and wisdom come from the real Aeon. Otherwise, what would be the value in any information we get?

C: 祂不会来了！这句话侵入你的脑海，被你反复咀嚼。祂不会来了！它来回闪烁…你感到自己像吞下镇静药剂一般知觉失调。接着！黑塔的声音渐渐被拉远，胡作非为的意象在你的脑中乱窜……
E: "Lan won't be coming..." You ruminate over this as the words invade your mind. The thought flashes all over, throwing your senses off-balance as though you have just downed a bottle of sedative. Next, Herta's voice gradually fades away while chaotic and delusional images wreak havoc in your brain...

C: 「真是无聊。」黑塔百无聊赖地出现了，「要不聊点八卦怎么样？斯蒂芬•劳艾德是个怪人，你要是在模拟宇宙里遇到他，可能会看到个奇怪的中年人形象。」
E: "How boring." Herta shows up, looking bored. "How about we talk about gossip? Stephen Lloyd is a weirdo. If you run into him in the Simulated Universe, you might see him appear as a middle-aged guy."

C: 这只「血罪灵」甚是奇怪，它反复用不同的异星语言祈求你不要回头看它，因为它正不停搓着双手…最终，变换的语言停了下来，它祈求你再帮它洗一次手。
E: This Sin Thirster is quite peculiar. It repeatedly uses various languages from outer space to beg you not to look back at it because it is constantly rubbing its hands... Finally, the changing of languages come to a halt, and it pleads with you to wash its hands again.

C: 「很抱歉。」螺丝咕姆对你道歉，「程序出现了一些奇怪的问题。结论：我会立即修补。」
E: "I'm sorry," Screwllum apologizes. "There seem to be some issues with the programs. Conclusion: They will be fixed immediately."

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 是『肚子饿了就要吃』。
E: It is "to eat when one is hungry."

C: 「别在乎那些虚伪的仪式。不过，确实得有个结尾。」黑塔突然把头上的花扯了一瓣下来，「<color=#dbc291ff>最后，也是最重要的疑点。</color>如果塔伊兹育罗斯已证据确凿地陨落，<color=#dbc291ff>为何宇宙中仍有虫群子嗣流窜，络绎不绝？</color>繁育命途的本质究竟是什么…如果弄明白这点，相信一切都会迎刃而解。但距离这个问题的答案，我们还有很长的路要走。」
E: "Pay no mind to those pretentious rituals. However, it is true that an end must come." Herta suddenly pulls a petal off the flower on her head," <color=#dbc291ff>And the last, as well as the most important point of suspicion.</color> If Tayzzyronth did indeed fall according to all observations and evidence,<color=#dbc291ff> why are there still endless Swarm offsprings roaming around the universe?</color> What exactly is the root of the Path of Propagation... If we can figure this out, I'm sure everything will make sense. But we have a long way to go to find the answer to this question."

C: 我产生了新的困惑…
E: I have some new points of confusion...

C: 漂浮在宇宙中的「博识尊」，体表闪烁着电路和指示灯的华彩。祂的红光闪烁一下，宇宙间便响起无数枪鸣！哀嚎在泣血与痛楚中沉默。你呢？你……
E: Nous, floating across the cosmos, THEIR body is lined with circuits and indicator lights in scintillating splendor. THEIR red light blinks once, and the cosmos rings out in countless gunshots! Wailing mourns are silenced among bloodied sobs and pained dreams. What about you? You...

C: 反有机战争•其二
E: Anti-Organic War (II)

C: 在*铸铁的王座*易主之后，「均衡」发生了一丝倾斜。*黄金*、*泥砖*、*血液*、*能源*、*科学*、*启蒙*、*愚昧*，皆化作涓涓细流，在这倾斜中流溢——一些人因此失去存在；一些人因此拥抱虚无。
E: After the *cast iron throne* changed hands, the Equilibrium tilted slightly. *Gold*, *bricks*, *blood*, *energy*, *science*, *enlightenment*, and *ignorance* flowed in trickling streams from the Equilibrium. As a result, some lost their existences, and some embraced the Nihility.

C: 有任何避免的机会吗？
E: Is it possible to stop it from happening?

C: 「仪器已记住了你的选择。」星际和平公司特聘专员向你鞠了一躬，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
E: "Your choice has been recorded in the device." The IPC recruiter bows at you. "I look forward to seeing the development of your Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

C: 特劳拉•法恩莎与柯拉帕乌在此后共同控制、周转众多星系的资源。这场空前绝后的大垄断，也成了「边星贸易战争」的开端。
E: Telora Farnsha and Korapao have since jointly controlled and managed the resources of many galaxies. This unprecedented monopoly marks the beginning of the Borderstar Trade War.

C: 判定无机：「流动的金黄」•其一
E: Judged as Inorganic: Liquid Gold (I)

C: 德•维恩向铸铁的王座伸出手，「记忆」开始涌入他的脑海，低语同一个名字：世间唯一的「财富」之王。
E: As De Wayne reached for the cast iron throne, memories started flooding his mind and whispered a name: The only king of wealth in the world.

C: 「有一个伙伴会为你而死，而你会被一个人杀死。」…一些奇怪的念头钻进你的脑袋，你不知它从何而来。
E: "There is one who will die for you and one to whom you will perish." A strange thought creeps into your mind out of nowhere.

C: 倘若没有药师，谁来拯救望海星云的顽疾？要不了两个世代，他们就会在病痛的折磨里消失，留下空无一人的星域和恶臭难闻的鬼城。
E: If there was no Yaoshi, who would save the Seaview Nebula from its stubborn disease? Within two generations, they would have disappeared in the torture of illness, leaving behind only an empty segmentum and a stinky old ghost town.

C: 委员长对你的回应并不感到意外，他又问了第二个问题。「你是否坚持在授课时，使用联觉信标？」
E: Unsurprised by your response, the committee leader continues with their second question: "Do you intend on continuing with the use of the Synesthesia Beacon during your teaching?"

C: 说完这句话，所有委员都皱起了眉头，你已经知道了自己的结局。
E: Hearing your words, the committee members begin to furrow their brows. You know the end that awaits you.

C: <unbreak>0120</unbreak>-空间的置换机制。
E: <unbreak>0120</unbreak>: Spatial replacement mechanism.

C: 你听到「权杖」的呢喃，一如有机细胞的蠕动，无机回路中的电子流淌。借用有机生命的形容：那些封闭内心的声音。
E: You hear the Scepters murmuring, like the writhing of organic cells or the flow of electrons in inorganic circuits. To borrow an analogy from organic life: Those are voices confined within the heart.

C: 「联觉信标控制我们听到的一切，博识学会全都是一群骗子！」他们不再相信任何人。
E: "The Synesthesia Beacon controls all that we hear. The Intelligentsia Guild members are all liars!" They have lost trust in everyone.

C: 拒绝传单。
E: Decline the flier.

C: 在孤波的源头，<color=#dbc291ff>「权杖」系统的核心</color>，便是这颗星星本身。
E: The star itself, at the origin of the solitary wave, is the <color=#dbc291ff>Scepter system core.</color>

C: 「那个…额，我重新构建了一套演算模型，从寂静领主那儿抢回了部分权限。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德生硬地转移话题。
E: "Err... I reconstructed an extrapolation model and wrested back partial permissions from the Lord of Silence." Stephen Lloyd stiffly changes the subject.

C: 她笑了起来。「哼…哈哈……哼哼哈哈哈哈？」这到底有什么可笑的？她的笑声中尽是疑惑，让你也摸不着头脑。
E: She starts laughing. "Hoo... Haha... Hoohoohahaha?" What's so funny about this? There is doubt in her laughter, confusing you as well.

C: 「我们会有很多共同语言，不是吗？」黑塔笑了，「波尔卡，要不要加入我们？」
E: "We'll have a lot in common to talk about, no?" Herta smiles. "Polka, would you like to join us?"

C: 「……不愧是天才们的杀手。只是一次现身，就几乎让整个项目瘫痪报废。」
E: "...A real killer of geniuses indeed. With just one appearance, she nearly brought the entire project to a grinding halt."

C: 过去多久了？
E: How long has passed?

C: 我认为前者的可能性是存在的。公司会与「鲁珀特一世」抗争到底。
E: I think the first version has a possibility to be true. The IPC would fight Rubert I to the death.

C: 「一盒过期的甜甜圈。热夜之都已经进入第IV纪年，食物的保质期已经接近于永恒。公民们都很好奇，过期的食物究竟是什么味道。」
E: "A box of expired doughnuts. As the Capital of Passion has entered its 4th era, food can almost be preserved forever. Thus, the citizens are curious about how expired food tastes."

C: 「天使型谢债发行机，定期把口袋里的金币喂给它。它会记录你的投资。周期结束，它会给你数十倍的回馈。」
E: "This is the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. You need to feed Gold Coins into it regularly, and it will keep a record of your investment. At the end of the investment term, it will pay you an amount ten times your principal."

C: 你一无所获。
E: You gain nothing.

C: 「不错的回答。你无需紧张，生命的定义中从未有过『完美作品』，我只考验你的衷心倾向哪边。」阮•梅起身走回自己的试验台，她的鞋跟踩在地上发出清脆的响声，「没有标准答案的问题被设立，本就是为了令人寻找得不到的答案。」
E: "Great choice. Don't sweat over it. There's no such thing as a perfect masterpiece in life. I was just testing the inclination of your heart." Ruan Mei returns to the bench. Her heels give off a crisp clacking sound when she walks. "Questions without a standard answer are created to search for the unattainable answers."

C: 「潮流扭蛋人」随着「抓夹」上升...
E: The trendy gachapon figure rises with the claw...

C: 「你想想，二世不就是有机体？他能成为智械，咱当然也行。」
E: "Just think about it. Rubert II was an organic being too, right? If he can become an Intellitron, naturally we can, too!"

C: 你走在一片光秃秃的废墟上，粒子湮灭虫在星际能源战争中将这里啃得一干二净，连土壤和岩石都不剩下的苍白地表，只有一台孤零零的自动售货机。
E: You stroll through the stark and bare ruins, where particle obliterator worms devoured everything on this land during the Interstellar Energy War. Not even soil or rocks remain on its lifeless pallid surface. All that remains is a lonely vending machine.

C: 售货机沉默不语，你第一次知道，原来机器也会欺软怕硬。
E: The vending machine falls silent. For the first time in your life, you realize that machines have a habit of bullying the weak and fearing the strong, too.

C: 冉比希三世振臂高呼，他要求权力，能够自由获取厨余垃圾和可回收垃圾的权力。他将带着垃圾桶大军横扫寰宇，成为诸界的主人。
E: Rumbas the Third raises his arm and shouts. He demands power, power to freely access organic and recyclable waste. He vows to lead an army of trashcans to dominate the universe and become the master of all realms.

C: 扪心自问，这真不是假面愚者的陷阱？
E: Just ask yourself: Is this really not some Masked Fool's traps?

C: 「未来，无数人想要窥探它的样貌，却又在得到后追悔莫及。」她轻呼出斑斓的气息，像一条深海蠕虫，将你缠绕在其中。
E: "The future... Many long to behold it, but often rue the sight." Her breath is soft yet captivating, coiling around you like a deep-sea worm.

C: 据说，传奇骇客「零号」在离开前，将一串足以改变世界的代码留在了这片海洋的深处。但从未有人找到过它的踪迹。
E: Legend has it that the fabled hacker known as Zero left behind a code string potent enough to shake the world, hidden in the depths of this ocean, yet no one has been able to uncover any traces of it.

C: 眼前的金人大喊着什么金人少年不会受伤，金人也要恋爱之类的胡话。总之，先制服它再说吧。
E: The aurumaton before you is shouting some nonsense about unbreakable aurumatons and how they can fall in love too. Either way, it's best to subdue it first.

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 等你清醒过来时，阳光已落在海面，破碎的船身里，不知何时多出了些许宝藏。作为大海对勇者的赞赏。
E: When you awaken, the sun is already pouring its light over the ocean. The shattered boat is inexplicably laden with treasures — a tribute from the sea to braves.

C: 这是你第一次离开故乡奥赫玛，轻盈的铠甲让你身心振奋。你扛着工匠淘汰的次品长矛，脑海里反复闪过吟游诗人们浅唱的那些英雄史诗。
E: This is your first time leaving your homeland of Okhema. The light weight of your armor lifts your spirits. You shoulder a shoddily-crafted spear discarded by its smith, and heroic poems hummed by traveling bards play over and over in your mind.

C: 伤痕不断地出现在两位泰坦的神体，然后又痊愈，直至千年，胜负也未曾锚定。悬锋之下的尼卡多利终丧失理性，圣城之巅的刻法勒已长眠不醒。
E: Scars etch themselves again and again into the divine bodies of the two Titans, only to heal and reappear, with no victor after a thousand years. Beneath Kremnos, Nikador has descended into madness, while atop the holy city, Kephale remains in eternal slumber.

C: 它的诡计足以颠覆王国。
E: Their schemes could topple empires.

C: 扎格列斯的宝藏。
E: Zagreus' treasure.

C: 它看见孩童手牵手奔跑，少年相约出海远行，恰似它与教导者。
E: They see children running hand in hand, and young men vowing to sail far across the seas, just as they once did with their mentor.

C: 所以谁赢了？
E: So who won?

C: 至此，门径得以延伸。
E: Thus, pathways extend.

C: 生命自此有无限的可能。
E: From here on, life possesses limitless possibilities.

C: 更有视死如归的眷属，为即将陨落的城邦解开命运的绳索，使道路崩解，迷雾四起，就连灾厄也在其中迷失方向。
E: The devoted kin who decided to give up their lives severed the ties of fate from the city-states about to fall, causing paths to crumble. As the mist ascends, even calamity finds itself adrift and directionless.

C: 身为云游四海的冒险家，你当然见过那些雅努斯祭祀利用「门径」穿越天堑，但是门一旦打开，则再也无回头的可能。
E: As an adventurer who has roamed the farthest reaches of the world, you've seen the Janus priests use their mystical "passages" to bypass insurmountable barriers. But once a gate is opened, there's no going back.

C: 欧洛尼斯高歌一段关于黄金的预言，这预言为初生的世界镀上繁荣。
E: Oronyx sang a prophecy about gold, a prophecy that gilded the newborn world with prosperity.

C: 我能理解这种公平。
E: I understand this kind of impartiality.

C: 是谁于天平将倾时，催动制约泰坦的咒语，令平衡回归大地。
E: Who, as the scales began to tilt, invoked the spells that bound the Titans, restoring balance to the earth?

C: 感谢塔兰顿吧，它为诡计的泰坦锻造永远不可解除的枷锁，震慑了每个鸡鸣狗盗之徒。
E: Thank Talanton. They forged an unbreakable shackle for the Trickery Titan, and terrified every deceitful thief.

C: 「但是，但是……若将淤泥与枯枝尽皆倾覆于那冥河，终有一天河流将堵塞不堪，不再流动。如此一来，其余的生灵便无法迎来命定的终结。」
E: "However... if all the silt and withered branches are cast into the River of Souls, the rivers would eventually become clogged and cease to flow. Should this happen, other living beings would be unable to meet their fated end."

C: 这样的苦旅不知持续了多久，最终，祭祀终于耗尽了力气，精神和肉体都已破败不堪。他坐在了一棵枯木前，感知到自己即将殒灭。
E: This painful journey continued for an unknown amount of time. Finally, the devotee exhausted his strength, his spirit and body utterly broken. He sat before a withered tree, sensing his imminent demise.

C: 就是字面意思，一场特殊的科员聘用测试。
E: In the most literal sense, it's a special test for hiring researchers.

C: 正在进行身份识别程序，程序！识别成功，确认为空间站科员！科员！
E: Verification protocol in progress. Verification Protocol! Verification successful, verified as space station researcher! Researcher!

C: 错误！密保卡易溶于水！警惕，警惕！
E: Wrong! The security card is easily soluble in water! Must be careful, careful!

C: 你大步走上前，开始了极致的临场演说
E: You stride forward, and begin delivering the ultimate impromptu speech.

C: 流光忆庭？
E: The Garden of Recollection?

C: …可这里哪有什么碑铭？茫茫雪甸中，不过一尊蜷曲的冰封躯体罢了！冰中之人装备齐整，因酷寒凝固的面庞，一对惊惧的眸子自旷古向你投来绝望的哀嚎……
E: ...But there is no stele. Instead, only a frozen curled-up body can be seen on the vast snowy landscape! The person is well-equipped, and their face is frozen due to the cold temperature. Their eyes, filled with fear, cast their howls of despair at you across millennia of time...

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 你在许多电离气体聚集的星际云团中穿梭。长时间的旅行令你的消化循环腔感到不适——你真的好想用什么东西填满它…什么都可以！
E: You move through a nebula made of numerous ionized gases. Your long journey has made your digestive cavity feel upset. You desperately want to fill it with something... Anything!

C: 呼~好了，这下就是完整的穿墙了嗡。
E: Phew~ Alright, we're through the wall now.

C: 英雄们，从这里往前的路会很危险嗡。即便如此，你们依旧要启程吗？
E: Heroes, the road ahead is going to be dangerous~ Are you sure you still want to go?

C: 阿格莱雅为若虫打造的聚居地。分散各地的眷属们在此合宿，必要时也能出来遛弯。
E: A haven created by Aglaea for the nymphs. The scattered Titankin reside here, coming out for a stroll when need be.

C: 一个有些吓人的猜测从你脑海中浮现：有没有可能，这些若虫只在被你观测到时才会出现在这里。
E: A frightening speculation floats to the front of your mind: Is there a possibility, that these nymphs only appear when they are observed by you?

C: 喔、喔！谢谢……
E: Oh, ooh! Thank goodness...

C: 该死，那玩意到底是打哪儿来的……
E: Bah, where on earth did those things come from...

C: 没有反应…
E: No reaction...

C: 哦…我大概明白了。我猜猜，你把矿镐弄坏了，是吧？
E: Oh... I think I understand. Let me guess, you broke the pickax, right?

C: 吃第二口。
E: Take the second bite.

C: 之前说好的免费小食…
E: Those free snacks that you've mentioned before...

C: 你将颤抖的手伸入一片漆黑中，抓住了那个——不对，是那一堆——坚硬的、发光的东西。
E: Your hands tremble as you reach into the pitch-black darkness. You take hold of a single — no, a pile of rigid, shining objects.

C: 驾驶浮空的士的飞行员全程没有和你搭话，甚至连最基本的打招呼也被略过了。但在你打开车门、准备下车之前，他突然开口了——
E: The pilot of the hover-taxi doesn't chat with you for the whole ride, not offering even the most cursory of greetings. But as you open the door to climb out, he suddenly says —

C: 一般
E: Neutral

C: 好吧，我这就离开。
E: Alright. I'll get going.

C: 「你醒醒，那只是个梦！」女性似乎带着哭腔，「你看看你，都把孩子吓成什么样了！」随后，两人的争吵便被幼儿尖锐的哭声彻底淹没。
E: "Wake up. It's just a dream!" The woman seems like she's sobbing. "Look how you scared our child!" The child's piercing cries drown out their arguing.

C: ——来，拿着！这是姐姐我前些天画好的蓝图……
E: Here. Take this! It's a blueprint I made a few days ago.

C: …大概吧！总之拜托你了！
E: ...Probably! Please handle this for me!

C: 不过…没有关系！我依旧可以这样近距离关注她，貌美如花的希露瓦大人……
E: But... that's OK! I can keep seeing her up close like this. Lady Serval, she's as beautiful as a flower...

C: 比起指意明确的画面，一面白墙往往反倒更具魅力！艺术的精髓就在于留白喀！
E: A blank wall often proves more fascinating than images with clear meanings! The essence of art lies in leaving an emptiness behind!

C: 这座塑像旁边插着一柄短矛，矛尖之锋利远胜寻常礼器。或许在某个时刻，它的主人曾确实使用过它。
E: A short spear is stabbed into the ground beside this statue, its edge far sharper than any ordinary ceremonial weapon. Perhaps during a certain time, its owner actually used it before.

C: 哦？你终于醒啦，小瞌睡虫。
E: Oh? You're finally awake, sleepyhead.

C: 你们怎么都不说话？
E: Why aren't any of you saying anything?

C: 要是对不起有用，还要洞洞机做什么？
E: If sorry does anything, why would I need Diggertron?

C: 这桌子作为掩体还是差点意思——其实，有它没它根本没有任何区别。往来矿民都用疑惑的眼神看着你，这位一动不动愣在原地的木头人。
E: This table doesn't provide much in the way of cover. Actually, having the table won't even make much of a difference. The miners look at you with suspecting eyes as you stand frozen in place.

C: …虎克已经无语了！
E: ...I'm too shocked to talk!

C: ——赞美琥珀王！你从来没干过类似的活，但这一击的力度简直完美如梦境…也许你天生就是干这行的料。
E: Praise the Amber Lord! You have never done anything like this, but you used the absolutely perfect amount of strength... Maybe you have found your life calling.

C: 究竟是哪个没素质的家伙看完卷轴不好好放回原位喀！最好别被我逮到喀！
E: Which uncivilized fool left this scroll out of place? They'd better hope I don't catch them! Crrk!

C: 我赶时间。
E: I'm in a hurry.

C: 啾！
E: Chirp!

C: 叮叮当~
E: Ding-a-ling~

C: 你知道的，蝴蝶都是我兄弟，我和它们很早就认识了，这些家伙强得不可思议嘤……
E: You know, all butterflies are my brothers. I've known them for a long time, and they're incredibly strong, eep...

C: 嘤，据说亡灵的堆积会变成冥河，听起来好可怕
E: Eep, it's said that the accumulation of the dead will turn into River of Souls... How terrifying is that!

C: {M#他}{F#她}们什么时候回来…
E: When will they return...

C: 我看到许多人往前去了嗡！持剑的卫兵，运送军备的公民…他们神色匆匆，有的身上还带着伤痕……
E: I saw so many people heading forward! Sword-wielding guards, civilians hauling supplies... They were in a rush and some of them were even wounded...

C: 嗡嗡…天怎么阴沉下来了嗡，那些会偷偷闲聊，会互相蹭脸颊的大地兽们都去哪儿了嗡？
E: Grumph... Why's the sky turning gloomy? And where'd all the dromas go — the ones who used to rub each other's faces?

C: 我到底错过了多少集！
E: Just how many episodes did I miss!?

C: 我又飞上来了。
E: And then I fly back up here.
