C: 跟你聊了几句，我觉得豁然开朗。算了，我也不打算自毁了，就这样挺好。
E: After speaking with you, I feel as if I have been enlightened. Never mind. I no longer wish to end my existence. This life is good.

C: 不过为了保险起见，我还是再查一遍。
E: I'll look into it, just to be on the safe side.

C: 你说呢，这小机巧鸟能把持得住吗？
E: You tell me. Can this little cycrane hold on?

C: 你们俩之间打赌，就别牵连上我了吧…再说了，你都不知道我们之间赌约是什么。
E: Don't get me mixed up in your gambling, alright... Besides, you don't even know what our bet is all about.

C: 很好，你做出了明智的抉择。你明白遥远的响动不会惊醒恶龙的酣眠，你并不贪婪，你只在乎确切能够到手的机会。
E: Excellent, you have chosen wisely. You know that distant noises won't awaken the dragon from its slumber. You're not greedy, you just care about a realistic chance at triumph.

C: 捉迷藏？确实，这就是捉迷藏。
E: Hide-and-Seek? Yes, this is Hide-and-Seek.

C: 我的天呐，你好棒棒！
E: Wow, you're amazing!

C: 感觉这舞台好大，这舞台好空，就算竭尽全力，大家也看不见我……
E: This stage feels so big... so empty... No matter how hard I try, no one can see me...

C: 会不会有点太真情实感了？
E: Are you getting too into character?

C: 没，我只是随便看看。
E: No thanks. I'm just watching.

C: 怎么样，你要署名吗？
E: Well then, are you going to sign it?

C: 我就不信还有人能追到这里喀……
E: I don't believe that anyone could track me down here...

C: 嘘！我在给黑潮怪物们讲解历史。有教无类，是吾主留下的教导之一喀！
E: Shh! I'm in the middle of giving the black tide monsters a history lesson. Teaching without discrimination — that's one of my master's sacred teachings, crrk!

C: 我叫森森，他叫雷力，你是青镞大人找来的金人测试者吗？
E: I'm Sensen, and this is Leili. Are you the aurumaton tester that Madam Qingzu sent over?

C: 不成不成！我每次接上那家伙，就感觉自己被装进了一个铁棺材里，感受到的东西也远超自己平时看到听到的极限，要不了一刻钟，脑袋就烫成一锅粥了。
E: This won't work! Every time I connect to that thing, it felt like I was put inside a steel coffin, and I can perceive stimuli far beyond my usual limits. I think my brain will melt into a pot of gruel within minutes.

C: 我知道啊，这也不是什么秘密。
E: I know that. It's not a secret.

C: （好家伙…都把我炸飞到这里来了？！）
E: (Dang... I was blown all the way here!?)

C: 你要看热闹，就找他们本人去吧，一个在我家<unbreak>49783</unbreak>号星槎上，一个在我家<unbreak>49784</unbreak>号星槎上，你要去看就自己去吧！
E: If you want to watch the show, go find them yourself. One is on starskiff <unbreak>49783</unbreak> and the other is on starskiff <unbreak>49784</unbreak>, both of which I rented. If you want to watch, go by yourself!

C: （将卜者的下落告诉他）
E: (Tell him the location of the diviner)

C: 乐园正在筹备中的大型项目，内置了高楼追逐、街角枪战等数个场景，足以让游客们完整体验哈努兄弟大战坏人的全过程。
E: There's a huge project still under construction featuring high-rise chase scenes and urban gunfights that'll give tourists the complete experience of Hanu taking down the bad guys.

C: 呱，想必它就是无敌的七井盖之一，同谐之井盖！
E: Ah, this must be one of the incomparable Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Harmony!

C: 所有的电视机都已老去，只剩下一台，还在循环数年前播出的《钟表小子》。
E: All of these televisions have broken from age, except one that is still playing an episode of Clockie that was aired years ago on repeat.

C: 我们也没好到哪儿去。
E: We're not much better.

C: 说到底，箱子被堆成了这个形状，不让人爬上去，简直天理难容。
E: To be fair, these boxes have already been piled up. It'd be a disservice not to climb on atop them.

C: 你闭上双眼，颔首致意。敬不再沉默的历史、热烈而勇敢的奔赴、通往群星的旅途，匹诺康尼的过去、现在、未来，和稚子至死不渝的梦。
E: You close your eyes and nod in silent reverence — to a history that stays silent no longer, to the fervent and brave journey ahead, toward a voyage among the stars, to Penacony's past, present, and future, and to the child's dream that does not wane unto death.

C: 这种无聊的行为无法激起你的挑战欲，你发出一声很酷的*哼*，彰显你的大人物身份。
E: Something this boring is no challenge to you. You let out a cool grunt to show just how much of a big shot you are.

C: 你大步流星地迈入了三月七的房间，以一种大人物巡逻般的姿态。
E: You stride into March 7th's room like a big shot on patrol.

C: 船长辛苦了！
E: Keep up the great work, captain!

C: 我们这儿驮兽拼团差一位…
E: Our pack beast bulk sale group is short of one person...

C: 欢迎，远道而来的客人。
E: Welcome, travelers from afar.

C: 我的未来…我的前路…
E: What lies ahead... where I must go...

C: 黎明云崖要是不习惯…
E: If you're not used to Dawncloud...

C: 必须找人去仓楼取。
E: Someone must head to the warehouse.

C: 都被黑潮吞没了！
E: They were all swallowed by the black tide!

C: 你还是把我抓起来吧…
E: You might as well lock me in...

C: 嗯哼～听丹恒乘客说，你们在「罗浮」的事务都处理完了帕？
E: Uh-huh~ I heard Dan Heng say that you got everything taken care of on the Luofu, right?

C: 至于材料的话，平时在外面你可以多收集一些，有备无患！
E: As for those materials, you can find those all over the place. Be prepared, just in case!

C: …唔…可、可能…不对，的确没有帕。
E: ...Well... B—But... No, there aren't any.

C: 不过…哎，算了，帕姆会勤加打扫的。{NICKNAME}乘客，这件事你就当没发生过帕……
E: But... well, forget it. Pom-Pom's going to be doing a lot more cleaning. {NICKNAME}, please pretend this never happened...

C: 我给你讲个睡前故事？
E: Shall I tell you a bedtime story?

C: （转述小说中的故事）
E: (Paraphrasing a story from a novel)

C: 伴随着你讲故事的声音，帕姆不知不觉睡着了。
E: Thanks to your storytelling voice, Pom-Pom gradually drifts off to sleep.

C: （还是再想想别的方法吧）
E: (Think of another way)

C: 那个…我…哎，算了，你还是过来吧，帮我个忙。
E: Well... I... Fine, you might as well come over. I need your help.

C: 地板光可鉴人，你压根看不到一丝「脚印」的痕迹。
E: Shiny as a mirror indeed, without a single footprint.

C: 谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客的喜欢！帕姆也觉得还不错，嘿嘿。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}! I think so, too! Hee-hee.

C: 我喜欢晕晕五彩斑斓配色。
E: I like the dizzying and vibrant colorway.

C: 尤其是现在…车厢里的湿度这么低，空气这么干燥，如果不多加打扫的话，乘客也是很容易生病的。
E: Now that the humidity in the coaches is low and the air is dry, cleaning is especially important, or the passengers will fall sick easily.

C: 禁止乘客上列车…不对！列车上没有乘客了，那还叫什么列车！
E: No passengers on the Express... No passengers on the train!? Then what kind of train is that!

C: 请尽快回到伴随状态。
E: Please return to escort mode ASAP.

C: 鹤运物流，仙舟生活最好的朋友。
E: Heron Express: Your Xianzhou lifestyle's best friend.

C: 哔——啵。干得漂亮，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Beep — boop. Well done, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 哔——啵。
E: Beep — boop.

C: （去看看吧。）
E: (Go check it out.)

C: 应该不会，不如说它模拟了「云吟术」。
E: I don't think so. It would be better to say they've somehow learned to imitate cloudhymn magic.

C: 出布！
E: Paper!

C: 姐姐啊…您到底去了哪里…？
E: Big Sis... where on earth have you gone...?

C: 欢迎……
E: Welcome...

C: 你打开了这个箱子……
E: You open this suitcase...

C: 衣柜里似乎没那么暗了，勇气的光芒照亮了你周围的空间。哇哦。
E: It doesn't seem to be that dark in the closet. The light of valor illuminates your surroundings. Wow.

C: 时机到了，恶魔——迎接正义的审判吧！
E: Now, devil, meet your judgment!

C: 只是有人在走廊里走动而已。
E: It's just someone walking in the corridor.

C: 把视线带回贝洛伯格。
E: Now back to Belobog.

C: 西北方…慢着，这是……
E: Northwest... Wait a minute, this is...

C: 现在，考试时间到——
E: Now, it's time for an exam.

C: 这…不挺丰富的吗？
E: Haven't those been an abundant variety of experiences?

C: 看什么看，没见过机器人啊？
E: What are you looking at? Have you never seen a robot before?

C: 看什么看？█ █ ██错误，错误█ ██ █你好，请多关照！
E: What are you looking at? █ █ ██ Error, error █ ██ █ Hello, nice to meet you!

C: 尝试打开密码锁。
E: Try to figure out the combination.

C: 你曾击碎过无数像这样无辜的罐子，可这一个却明显不同。它非但没有如预期般四分五裂，甚至立在原地，纹丝不动。
E: You've smashed countless innocent vases like this before, but this one is markedly different. Instead of shattering to pieces as expected, it somehow stays in place, motionless.

C: 盒子里面是什么？
E: What's in the box?

C: 实在是不好意思，那么就拜托您了……
E: I'm really sorry to trouble you with this...

C: 只要您准备好了，随时可以让机巧鸟起航。
E: Whenever you're ready, you can send the cycrane off.

C: 那些地方地形复杂，且不太安全…途中可能会遇到一些危险。
E: Those places are complicated in topography and not very safe... You might encounter some dangers along the way.

C: 等你有所收获了之后，您再来找我，我再和您讲讲这枚小零件的价值。
E: If you manage to get something, come back to me and I'll tell you about the true value of this small component.

C: 以前有本化外民的小说叫《铁盒》，就在右转第二排的架子上，可惜现在已经卖掉了……
E: We used to stock a novel by an Outworlder called "Iron Box." It used to be there, second shelf on the right — but it's a real shame, we've already sold out...

C: 关于这「鲛人泪」的事儿…
E: About these Draconic Tears...

C: 明白明白，往而不来，非礼也；来而不往，亦非礼也。
E: Ah, got it. "Do unto others as you would have them do unto you."

C: 这大概说明你是真的见多识广……
E: This probably demonstrates that you're well-traveled and experienced...

C: 你，我…你居然人身攻击！
E: You, I... that's a personal attack!

C: 但必须承认，之前我一看到别人开心的样子就不冷静，好像浑身上下有虚卒在爬——这是不正常的。
E: But, I have to admit I used to lose my cool whenever I saw someone looking happy, as though voidrangers were crawling all over me — and that is not normal behavior.

C: 不过必须承认，之前我一看到别人开心的样子就不冷静，好像浑身上下有虚卒在爬——这是不正常的。
E: But I do have to admit I used to lose my cool whenever I saw someone looking happy, as though voidrangers were crawling all over me — and that is not normal behavior.

C: 在梦里就该开心一点——我也该学着享受生活了。
E: It's a dream, so why not be happy — I should learn how to enjoy life a little more.

C: 遇到麻烦了？
E: Are you having trouble with something?

C: 啊，很抱歉自顾自说了这么多，希望没有教您感到厌烦。
E: Ah, I'm really sorry for blabbing on so much. Hope I didn't bore you.

C: 她往常一般都在钟表小子广场附近转悠。换做平时我肯定亲自去找她，但是现在情况稍微有点…呃…*微妙*。
E: She's usually hanging out near Clockie Plaza. If things were normal, I'd definitely go over myself, but as it stands, things are a little... "delicate" right now.

C: 我以为所谓的「梦想之城」能够令人梦想成真，以为在梦里肯定有人能包容我的缺陷，可结果……
E: I thought the so-called "City of Dreams" could make people's dreams come true, and that there'd be someone in a dream who could put up with all my flaws. But alas...

C: 所以…有谁能拒绝呢？谁能拒绝这种难以言喻的…快乐呢？
E: So... who can say no to this? Who can resist this inexplicable... joy?

C: 工资照发吗？
E: Are you on paid leave?

C: 如果真的想知道我的感受，那就回现实和她聊聊吧。这样你就知道她究竟有多虚伪了。
E: If you really want to know how I feel, then go back out to reality and talk to her. That way you'll know for yourself what a hypocrite she is.

C: 我想要听听你的经历。
E: I'd like to hear about your experiences.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Keep silent)

C: 最能打的韦兰死了，其他人自然作鸟兽散。不过公司和游侠还是让他们得到了应有的惩罚。
E: Wyland was the best fighter and died. The rest of them naturally scattered to the solar winds. But IPC and Rangers still meted out to them the punishment they deserved.

C: 靠着引擎的超负荷运转，我暂时保持了受力平衡；但等到引擎燃料耗尽后，飞船还是会不可避免地坠入深渊。
E: Overloading the engine, I maintained a temporary force balance. However, once my fuel burned up, the spaceship would inevitably tumble straight into the abyss.

C: 可惜联觉信标不能解读文字，漫长的无规则运动也早已破坏了这些小行星的顺序，不然我一定要读一读，看看究竟是什么内容能让他们在死亡面前保持团结。
E: It's a shame that the Synesthesia Beacon could not decrypt text, and long years of irregular movements have long since destroyed the sequence these asteroids were supposed to be read in. Otherwise, I would have read it — to see what it was that kept them going as a team on the brink of death.

C: 当然，一根头发都没伤到…不过必须承认，他们的突然袭击确实吓了我一跳。
E: Of course, not a hair on my head was harmed... but I have to admit, their sudden attack really caught me by surprise.

C: 听起来功利心太重了…
E: Sounds way too focused on material gains...

C: 啊嘿！我的同僚，这次有什么打算吗？
E: Oh, my friend, what's the plan this time?

C: 恐惧和愤怒开始蔓延。有人说，我们不能一辈子都关在笼子里；也有人说，中心区的权贵应当多分出些资源来……
E: Fear and anger began to spread. Some protested, not wanting to spend their lives in a cage, while others said that the rich and powerful ones in the center should distribute more resources...

C: 不是只有亲临者才能讲故事，否则世界上就没几个人写书了。
E: No one says that only survivors can narrate their stories. Otherwise, there won't be many storytellers left.

C: 是，不过上面没有我的画像——多亏我干活时从来不露脸。
E: Yes, but there's no image of me on them, all because I never show my face when I work.

C: 无法接受…我真的不能接受！
E: This is outrageous... I can't accept it!

C: 哦…是你啊，伙计。
E: Oh, it's you, buddy.

C: 班尼两眼放光，神态让你想起自己和他初识时的样子。
E: Benny's eyes are gleaming. His demeanor reminds you of how he looked when you first met him.

C: 过来人的建议：要是哪天你脑子里突然冒出来个好想法，别急着告诉别人…提前想想它潜在的商业价值，别让那些脑袋空空、只会耍心眼的混蛋把你的果子摘走。
E: A word to the wise: If you have a great idea that pops into your head one day, don't be in a hurry to tell anyone about it... Think about its potential business value, so those empty-headed scoundrels won't take it away from you.

C: 「肠胃通」的长篇大论结束了——你眼睁睁地看着面前的豪华飞车变成了一坨无法启动的废铁。
E: The long speech of the "I-POO" is finally over, and you watch a fancy luxury car in front of you turning into a useless pile of scrap metal.

C: 咻咻…车主您好。您驾驶的「斯坦威游隼」豪华飞车，其使用的配件存在专利侵权风险。
E: *Beep*... Greetings, vehicle owner. The accessories in your "Steinway Falcon" luxury speedster might be infringing on some patents.

C: 咻咻…为保障全体匹诺康尼宾客的合理权益，现在将对「匹诺康尼观景望远镜」施行强制锁定操作。锁定将在现存的风险彻底清除后自动解除！
E: *Beep*... To protect the rights of all guests in Penacony, a mandatory lock will now be put on the viewing telescope. The lock will be automatically unlocked once the infringement risk is resolved!

C: 罢了，不重要…这些钱给你，从我眼前滚开吧！必须让你知道…我，伟大的艾默里奇，才不是什么守财奴…给我记住！
E: Fine, it doesn't matter anymore... Here, take the money, and get out of my sight! Just remember that I, the great Emmrich... I'm no miser... Keep that in mind!

C: 我的要求明明不高…我只希望能得到尊重！当然，最好还能多赚点钱……
E: I'm not asking for much... All I want is a bit of respect! And, of course, some money, if possible...

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 芙尔拉女士？哼，我跟她没什么好说的！
E: Madam Forla? Hmph, I've got nothing to say to her!

C: 这还真不好说……
E: That's hard to say...

C: 真、真的吗？那真是太好了！
E: R—Really? That's great!

C: 你猜怎么着？蠢蛋观众全都信了这份鬼话，开始把这帮流浪汉当成艺术家追捧！
E: Guess what? The idiotic audience all bought the story and started idolizing these wanderers as artists!

C: 好啊，我也很想让听众多了解我与我的音乐。
E: Sure thing. I am delighted to provide my audience with more information about myself and my music.

C: 果然如此…看来我还是太天真了，经纪人说的果然没错，风格如此特别的音乐没办法轻易让大家认可。
E: That's understandable... I suppose I was too naive. My manager was right: Music with such a unique style is unlikely to be appreciated by everyone.

C: 唉，这也是没办法的事情，对于这些欣赏流行红歌与高雅正乐的宾客来说，门达希亚的音乐无疑是主流审美的叛徒。
E: Unfortunately, it can't be helped. For those who appreciate popular songs, Mendasian music is undoubtedly a departure from the conventional aesthetic.

C: 我想她一定不会吧，她应该是家族中的明珠，从小就在学习高雅的谐乐，她的喜好就是家族的喜好，她的审美就是世人的审美。
E: I am certain she has not. She is the pride of her family, immersed in the study of elegant harmonies since childhood. Her tastes align with her family's, and her aesthetics align with the world's.

C: 在一次救援行动中，我射击嫌疑人的车辆，却意外击中了被劫持的人质——一个可怜的小女孩。
E: In a rescue operation, I accidentally hit the hostage, a poor girl, when I was firing at the suspect's vehicle.

C: 妖孽，还不快现出原形！
E: Show yourself now, demon!

C: 烦死了、烦死了！
E: Agh! Enough! I'm tired of this!

C: 在猎犬的帮助下，我学会了和惊扰我的那些东西「共生」。你刚才…应该也遇到「她」了吧？
E: With their help, I learned how to co-exist with that which scared me. Just now... Did you see her as well?

C: 罗斯玛丽，可以麻烦你帮忙带{F#她}{M#他}出去吗？拜托啦……
E: Rosemary, could I trouble you to lead {F#her}{M#him} outside? Thank you...

C: 先不了，我还有事。
E: It's fine. I've got something else on.

C: （这个家伙…好像一直在念叨着麦考先生的名字……）
E: (This guy... sounds like he's mumbling McCoy's name over and over...)

C: 但你永远都不会忘记。
E: But you could never forget.

C: 你做的很好，孩子，保持这份善意。
E: You're doing great, kid. Keep on being kind.

C: 没错，只要心怀善意，我们能做到的事，就连星神也无法企及。
E: Sure. So long as we have kind intentions, we can do things that not even the Aeons could dream of doing.

C: 再者说，也不是我煽动的战争，他们先有的需求，我再点的火。我只是遵守了作为商人的基本素养，给客户提供他们所需的商品而已。
E: And besides, I was never the instigator. They came to me with their request, and I just helped them light the fuse. All I'm doing is following basic business etiquette by giving customers the products they need.

C: 这么说来或许有些冒昧，但在见到您之前，我其实一直无法理解他们的狂热，无法理解那些人为何会为了祂奋不顾身……
E: It may be a little rude to say this, but before meeting you, I could not understand their fervor. Why they would throw themselves in harm's way for THEM...

C: 你想问我就一定要答？算了吧，我和你没什么可说的。
E: What, and I have to answer? Forget it. We have nothing to say to each other.
Phew...

C: 好！
E: Sure!

C: 这样的学习氛围，又怎么好潜下心来学知识呢？
E: With such a learning environment, how can anyone calm themselves and properly focus on learning?

C: 它的主人为什么把它放在这里？真相早已无从查证。现在你就是它的主人。
E: Why would someone hide a bottle of soda here? The truth no longer matters now. What matters is that it is now yours.

C: 好啊，我要吃酸汤夕红鱼。
E: Alright, I want redsunset salmon in sour soup!

C: 你在这干吗？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我的要求很简单，我想让你帮我把「王座」搬过来！放在这个顶上！
E: What I want is very simple: I'd like you to help me move the "throne" over! Up here, on top of this!

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 所以我打算直接让造物引擎飞起来——别说不可能实现，「公司」肯定有这种技术！只要他们提供帮助，一切问题都可以解决。
E: So, I plan to let the Engine of Creation take to the sky! Don't tell me it cannot be done, the IPC definitely has this technology! As long as they are willing to help, any problem can be solved!

C: 终有一日，贝洛伯格将不再是一座孤独之城。
E: One day, Belobog will no longer be a lonely city.

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 之后我会把它转交给托帕总监，今天的讨论多谢你主持大局了。
E: I will hand these over to Director Topaz. Thank you for overseeing the discussion today.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 带来了。
E: I did.

C: 啾！原来现在美梦小镇流行这种风格啾！
E: Tweet! So it turns out this style is popular in Dreamville, tweet!

C: 哈努兄弟，你能打败石头老板吗？
E: Brother Hanu, can you defeat Boss Stone?

C: 发出一声表示拒绝的*哼*。
E: Let out a *hmph* of rejection.

C: 啾？宝箱、宝箱消失了啾！
E: Tweet? The chest! The chest is gone, tweet!

C: 不服啾！再来一次啾！
E: That doesn't count, tweet! One more time, tweet!

C: 还是回去找黄金公子讨点果子吧啾~
E: Let's go back to Young Master Gold and ask for some fruit, tweet!

C: 不知道黄金公子有没有替代的零件，人家这就去问问啾……
E: I wonder if Young Master Gold has replacement parts. I'll go ask now, tweet...

C: 之后我就要去苏乐达池子里游泳了，得提前找好围观的小伙伴才行啾……
E: I'm gonna head to the SoulGlad pool to swim later. Gotta find peeps to watch me swim, tweet...

C: 啾？干嘛啦，难得找到个不用挥翅膀就能飞起来的方法啾。
E: Tweet? What're you doing? It took me so long to find a way to fly without flapping my wings, tweet.

C: 来，这是人家给客官准备的礼物，都送给你啾~
E: Here, this is a gift I've prepared for you. It's all yours, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个总爱纠结的孩子正苦恼自己的「艺术」陷入瓶颈，它或许还在<color=#dbc291ff>自己的作品旁</color>纠结呢啾？
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's a perennially hesitant child who's vexed about its artist's block. It may still be there <color=#dbc291ff>beside its own work</color>, tweet?

C: 凉飕飕的啾…
E: It's giving me chills, tweet...

C: 哦~我知道您想问什么：「多么漂亮的小镇啾，或许我面前的这位公子就是它的创造者吗？」
E: Ooh, I know what you want to ask: "Such a beautiful town, tweet! Perhaps this dashing fellow in front of me is its creator?"

C: 没错！猫头鹰老师带着折纸小鸟们一起建造了美梦小镇——它教我们如何辨别宝石、挑选枝叶，并将它们搭成巢穴啾！
E: That's right! Professor Owl brought the origami birds here to build Dreamville together — It taught us how to identify gems, choose branches and leaves, and build nests with them, tweet!

C: 快来快来，这里出大事了啾！
E: Come, come, we have an emergency, tweet!

C: 如此美妙又简洁的图案，无需过多赘述，这就是折纸小鸟的标杆啾！
E: Such a beautiful yet simple pattern. There is not much to say. This is clearly the standard of an origami bird, tweet!

C: 正确的道路不在这边，在那个方向呢！
E: This is not the right route. The right route is that way!

C: 喜欢！
E: I love him!

C: 啾？没见过的客人呢…这里是孵化小鸟的地方，客人最好不要进来啾。
E: Tweet? A guest I have not met before... This place is for hatching young birdies, it is best for guests not to enter, tweet...

C: 啾唔…真是不好意思啾……
E: Tweet... Sorry about that, tweet...

C: 您可以称呼我为「黄金公子」，是美梦小镇中仅次于猫头鹰老师，第二伟大的筑巢艺术家啾~
E: I go by Young Master Gold, and I'm the second-greatest nest architect in Dreamville after Professor Owl, tweet!

C: 哼哼…哼哼哼！你也知道伟大的猫头鹰教授吗？教授是全小镇最智慧、最强大的鸟哦！也是我们折纸小鸟的领导者啾。
E: Hmm... Hmmmm! You know the great Professor Owl, too? The Professor is the smartest and strongest bird in the whole village! They are also the leader of us origami birds, tweet.

C: 哼哼…没错，有个特别好心的小帮手，有空就会为在迷失在钟表公园中的客人指路啾~说不定它现在也守在<color=#dbc291ff>最容易迷路的小叉口</color>呢？
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one very kind assistant that uses their spare time to give directions to guests who are lost in Clock Garden, tweet~ Maybe they're still watching over the <color=#dbc291ff>crossroads where most people get lost</color>?

C: 小鸟很生气，小鸟要飞走了，再也不理你了啾。
E: I'm so upset! I'm going to ignore you and fly away now, tweet.

C: 恭喜你，已经学会抢答了啾。
E: Congrats, you know how to buzz for the answer first, tweet.

C: ...姐姐经常说，不许舔栏杆，不许舔栏杆…我倒是想问，哪个正常人会去舔啊？
E: ...My sister often says: "Don't lick fence posts. Don't lick fence posts..." I'm more curious about why would anyone want to do that.

C: {NICKNAME}？你这是在做什么？
E: {NICKNAME}? What are you doing?

C: 我都过去好几回了。
E: I've already been there a couple times.

C: 看到那个老爷爷了吗？总感觉他的身上有股熟悉的味道啾。
E: See that old man over there? There's some familiar smell about him, tweet.

C: 好漂亮的风景…
E: What a beautiful view...

C: 要做一辈子的好姐妹啾！
E: Bond in sisterhood for life, tweet!

C: 往前走，下楼梯，绕过广场往右走，上楼梯，再上楼梯，就能找到我们调研团队啾。
E: Go forward, down the stairs, turn right after the plaza, go up another two flights of stairs, and you'll find our research team there, tweet!

C: 嗷呜嗷呜，轻点，轻点啾！
E: Woah woah woah, gently, gently, tweet!

C: 要去盯盘咯，不知道小鸟币又翻几倍了啾啾。
E: Time to keep an eye on the market. I wonder how many times the bird coins have increased, tweet tweet.

C: 你...拥有这样强大的力量...为什么要用它来破坏秩序？为什么不去为公益事业做些贡献？
E: You have such a great power... Why would you use it to destroy order? Why would you not make a contribution to a good cause?

C: 以前我没得选，是他们威胁我，我才不得已加入了云骑军。可现在，「药王秘传」的事已经败露，我倒是想做个好人……
E: I didn't have a choice before. They threatened me, so I had to join the Cloud Knights as an undercover agent. But now, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been exposed, so I want to take this chance to do the right thing...

C: （上去制止建明）
E: (Stop Jian Ming.)

C: 你当我傻吗？
E: You think I'm a fool?

C: 《无言之卷》？
E: The Manuscript of Silence?

C: 那…那你说你变聪明了，你变得有多聪明了呢？要不，{NICKNAME}你出个题吧？
E: B—But how smart have you become? Maybe you could ask it a question, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我必须回收《无言之卷》。
E: I've got to retrieve the Manuscript of Silence.

C: 怎么会这样…难道那些关于《瘈狂之卷》传说都是真的吗？
E: How could this happen... Could it be that all those rumors about the Manuscript of Delirium are true?

C: （为她演示一遍墓碑上的拳法）
E: (Demonstrate for her some of the boxing described on the tombstone)

C: 老实点——
E: Be honest, now...

C: 我以为只有寻短见的人才会来这里听我演奏。
E: I thought only people wanting to end their own lives would ever want to come and listen to me.

C: 据我所知，大约几百年前，罗浮仙舟上确实有位技艺高超的乐师善于弹奏古琴。这位琴师遇到了他一生的短生种知音，却在知音逝世前也没能完成那首名曲。
E: As far as I know, several hundred years ago, there used to be a maestro guqin player aboard the Xianzhou Luofu. He met his musical soul mate, a short-life species — before whose untimely death they were unable to complete this guqin song.

C: …你把所有的气球射下来，然后我再冒出来？
E: ...and when you shoot down all the balloons, I pop out?

C: 原来你不是玩偶？
E: So, you're not a doll?

C: 你摆的位置太奇怪了。
E: You chose a strange place to hide.

C: 小佩，你是不是有什么心事？别憋在心里，想说什么就跟爸爸说吧。
E: Pennie, is there something on your mind? You mustn't keep it to yourself. I am your father, and you can tell me.

C: 还记得我们刚在一起的那会儿吗，韦？那时我们很穷，但很快乐——我每天都沉浸在成为艺术家的幻想里，而你对我拥有的那份天真如痴如醉。
E: Do you remember when we were first together, Wes? We were so poor, but so happy. Every day, I would immerse myself in my fantasies of becoming an artist, and you were mesmerized by my naivety.

C: 但你还是没回答那个问题，为什么要留在匹诺康尼呢？你的家乡难道没有什么就业机会吗？
E: But you haven't answered my question: Why have you chosen to stay in Penacony? Are there no job opportunities where you come from?

C: …妈妈！
E: ...Mother!

C: 你们都看到了，最后那局结束后，我再没碰过这台机器。现在我把它交给这位朋友，要是得到的结果一切正常，就说明我没有作弊，赢钱全凭技术。
E: You all saw, after that last game ended, I didn't touch the machine again. Now I will let my friend here play. If everything is normal when my friend plays, clearly I didn't cheat and I won all this cash with pure skill.

C: 这里的机器都赢遍了，接下来该去哪呢……
E: I've cleared out all the machines 'round here, where to next...

C: 好了。最后的赌局就在那台扭蛋机前，一定来看啊。我等你。
E: Alright, the last gamble is over there on that random-item machine, you must come and watch. I'll be waiting.

C: 嗨，谁知道呢。
E: Well, who knows?

C: 请允许我先行离开去与同伴作别。稍后与您在此会面。
E: Please allow me to first say farewell to my companions. I shall meet you here again shortly.

C: 但您应该也大致猜到了吧，否则…小女子又何必恳求您呢。
E: But you must have had an idea, right? Otherwise... why would I have begged you?

C: 当然是…您花费重金点选的「帝皇荣光服务专享卡（多人豪华版）」。
E: For the Imperial Glory Exclusive Service Card (Multi-Party Luxury Version) that you paid a large sum of money for, of course!

C: 缘何起…
E: Where does destiny begin...

C: 什么？我原料是废品，那它们的原料就是不可回收垃圾。
E: What? I am made from scrap ingredients? Then their ingredients are trash that could not even be recycled!

C: 朋友，在我见过的人里，你绝对是品味最好的一个。
E: My friend, your taste is the finest of everyone I have ever met.

C: 每天上班也不干活，就一条磁带转着放歌，老板实在忍不了才把他给踢出去的。
E: He never did any work. He'd just spin his tape 'n' play songs all day. The boss couldn't take it, so he gave him the boot!

C: 你如实把听到的对话转述给侦探。
E: You repeat the conversation to the detective exactly as you heard it.

C: 你添油加醋地描绘了汽水先生的愤怒之情。
E: You embellish Mr. Soda's rage regarding the victim.

C: 让我整理整理思路吧，朋友，我看您也累了，不如我们暂且别过。如果后续有消息，我也会通知您的。
E: Let me gather my thoughts, my friend. I see you are tired, too. Perhaps we should leave it here for now. If there is any further information, I will let you know.

C: 电话里传来「您呼叫的用户不在服务区」的声音。不知道这位天才女士是不是又找到了一处适合研究的世外桃源。
E: "The number you have called is currently out of the service area." I wonder if this genius lady has stumbled across another off-world research paradise...

C: ——茄子！
E: ...Cheese!

C: 哼哼，很有特色吧？我设计的时候花了小半天呢。
E: Heh, pretty unique, right? Took me half a day to come up with that!

C: 呃…一定是你的错觉，我们的测试可是很难的。
E: Ughh... Ya must be mistaken. Our test is real hard.

C: 我喜欢孜然味苏乐达。
E: I like cumin-flavored SoulGlad.

C: 果然，对于我们这种出身平凡的苏乐达来说，想要成为这个地窖的一员，还是太异想天开了。
E: I guess I was right. It's just a wild fantasy for a SoulGlad of ordinary origins like myself to become a member of this cellar.

C: 在那之前，你得保护好自己。
E: But first, you have to protect yourself.

C: 围在这里的人群，都是知更鸟小姐的粉丝。哼，我没抢到新专辑，怎么想都是这群人的错。
E: All these people here are fans of Miss Robin. Hmph, seeing as I couldn't get my hands on the new album, it must be all these people's fault.

C: 唉。
E: *sigh*

C: 现在，考验你的时候终于到了。你可以偷偷带走属于你的那张专辑，假装什么都没有发生过，也可以将捡来的物品交还到它本应在的地方。
E: Now, it's time to test your mettle. You can sneak off with your album and pretend that nothing happened — or, you can return the missing item back where it belongs.

C: 咦，她的声音，好棒啊……
E: Ohh, her voice, it's beautiful...

C: 她开始轻声哼唱……
E: She starts humming a song without music...

C: 我就先不打扰您了，有什么问题请随时联系我。
E: I'll leave you to it now. Call for me if you need anything!

C: 您确定要独自使用吗？一般来说，这个房间是「家庭放映厅」，沙发也是为五人以上的团体使用所准备的。
E: Are you sure you want to use it alone? This is normally the family screening room. Even the sofa is made to fit more than five people.

C: 届时将有专人带他们登陆空艇。期间若是有什么服务问题的话，请向空艇上任一工作人员反馈。
E: Someone will then bring them aboard the airship. If you encounter any problems in the course of our service, you may approach any of our staff on board for help.

C: …我还是很在意，黄泉小姐的实力。
E: ...I am still very curious about Miss Acheron's power.

C: 请你对自己有些自信。
E: Please be more confident in yourself.

C: 现在想来，肯定是在为离开幽囚狱做准备。万幸当时见到你，才间接识破了它的诡计。一旦这家伙跑出去，贻害无穷。十王司在此谢过了。
E: Now that I think about it, it seems Doot-Doot was scheming an escape from The Shackling Prison. Thankfully, your timely arrival helped foil its ploy. The thought of Doot-Doot escaping is alarming indeed. On behalf of the Ten-Lords Commission, I extend my gratitude to you.

C: 我就是因为性格认真才被选拔成为十王司狱卒的。在我看来，这本书应该就是犯了错，然后被抓起来了。
E: I was hired as a Jailer in the Ten-Lords Commission because my personality is always serious. In my opinion, this book must have done something wrong and been arrested.

C: 人皆有魔阴，或各有不同，我的情况殊为特别。
E: We are all mara-stricken in different ways, but my situation is unusual.

C: 先做个自我介绍吧，你可以称呼我为「白鸟」。
E: First, let me introduce myself. You can call me Shiratori.

C: 所以，你觉得我是「认路的」？
E: So, you think I'm a pathfinder?

C: 这位{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，老夫一眼就看出你骨骼惊奇，气宇不凡。如同天上的救星，人间的太岁，必是位响当当的人物。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I can see with a sidelong glance that you wield great power, and your aura is like no other. Like a savior from the heavens or a legend among men. I am certain that you must be a figure of great renown!

C: 我早就想开炮了！
E: I've always wanted to fire those cannons!

C: 只要你装出一幅自己是来上班的样子，控制室里的人都会选择性无视你。
E: As long as you pretend you're working, the people in the control room will selectively ignore you.

C: 如果还有人要来拦你，你就告诉他们，你是来修空调的。
E: If anyone tries to stop you, just tell them that you're there to fix the air conditioning.

C: 已经好久都没见老白来闹腾了，他不会真的安静了吧？
E: It's been a long time since Old Bai has come stirring up trouble. You don't think he's really given up, do you?

C: 还想再放几炮。
E: I want to set off the cannons again.

C: 让阁下见笑了，这鬼地方的信号实在是不好…等这件事结束，我一定会参那个黑心承建商一本。
E: Though I'm ashamed to admit it, the signal in this place is no good... When this is all over, I will go and file a complaint against that no-good contractor.

C: 要不我和你一起上？
E: You want me to go with you?

C: 抱歉，我兄弟二人合作无间，容不下第三者插手。
E: Sorry, our combination is seamless, and there is no room for a third to interfere.

C: 你流水别把爷爷也给冲走…
E: Don't flush your grandpa away...

C: 我这里不仅可以代人签到，还出售每节课的课堂笔记，甚至承接作业代写、学院代表签字服务，至于其它的嘛…只要价钱到位，也都好商量。
E: I don't only take attendance for others, I also sell lecture notes for each class. I even help do assignments, signature services for the academy's rep, and much more... Everything can be negotiated for the right price.

C: 说呗，反正决定权在我。
E: Tell me, I'm the one deciding anyway.

C: 啊呀，你就是那个{NICKNAME}吧？很高兴能见到本人，希望你喜欢我的课哦~
E: Ah, you're that {NICKNAME}, right? Glad to meet you in person, and I hope you enjoy my class!

C: 你抬头四顾，然而偌大教室中除了你和那位讲师，竟没有一个正常的…「人」。
E: You look around, but apart from you and that lecturer, no one else around the classroom is a normal... person.

C: 接下来，就请通过海选的演员入场——
E: Next, we'll have the actors who passed the screen test enter...

C: 阿红。我想知道，你为什么要进入演艺圈？
E: Reddie, I'd like to know why you joined show business.

C: 我可以摸摸你的宝箱吗？
E: Can I touch your treasure chest?

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 那雾气氤氲，你本想走到浴池边，却觉得呼吸不畅——
E: The mists grow thick. You wish to approach the pool, but find yourself struggling to breathe...

C: 你连忙检查钱袋，钱袋上有古怪的痕迹，细看似乎是某位泰坦的标识。
E: You hurriedly check your pouch, and find that it has a strange marking on it. It seems to be a Titan's symbol.

C: 咳咳，这就是…瑟希斯的伟力吗？我的思路瞬间被打开了……
E: Oh. Is this Cerces' power...? It's like my mind suddenly opened up...

C: 心理测试都是骗人的玩意儿。
E: The psychological assessment is just a lie.

C: 抱歉，亲爱的无名客，看来「脑波扫描」果然还是个不大稳定的技术。
E: Dear Nameless, I'm sorry, but it seems that Brainwave Scan is still an unstable technology.

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: 不知为何，你对白厄的数学水平有着莫名的自信，或许因为他看起来像是那种会认真听课的类型？
E: For some reason, you are inexplicably confident in Phainon's math ability. Or maybe it's because he looks like someone who listens intently in class?

C: 哼哼，虽然推论的过程没有毛病，但这个答案真是令本狮笑不出来。你，讲话太直白了吼！
E: Heh-heh, your logic is sound, but this answer does not make me laugh. Your words are too candid!

C: 哈——欠，真是无懈可击的回答，完全符合正直的逻辑。可惜可惜，这个回答太过板正，幽默感有些不足呐！
E: Yaaawn. A flawless answer, completely fitting of sound logic. Alas, this answer is too middling. It lacks humor!

C: 没错，是元老院。
E: That's right, it's the Council of Elders.

C: 至于答案，我要说「墨涅塔的赐福」。不是常有这样的说法吗，灾厄是艺术的源泉，生活太过顺遂的人，往往都缺少对美的感受。
E: As for the answer, I will say "Mnestia's benediction." Isn't there that common saying: Calamity is the wellspring of all art? People whose lives are too charmed typically lack an emotional connection to beauty.

C: 好痛！痛到你想掏出你的球棒，但在此之前，还是听听这狮子会怎么解释吧。
E: Owwwww! It's so painful that you want to whip out your bat. But right now, let's hear what the lion has to say.

C: 至于那个狮口，过后我会找它算账。
E: As for that lion's maw, I'll come by and teach it a lesson later on.

C: 这些文档有点干巴，需要一些想象力，但也聊胜于无吧。
E: These files are a little tasteless and require some imagination, but still better than nothing.

C: 在这最后的时光里，我想重温一下那段恬静美好的童年岁月…能陪我打一局《超级开拓小子》吗？
E: In the final moments, I would like to relive the peaceful and enjoyable years of my "childhood"... Could you play Super Trailblaze Kid with me?

C: 我曾随{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}四处奔走，在沙砾间留下足迹，在沃土中播种无数，筑起高耸的山崖，掘出深邃的沟壑。
E: I once traveled everywhere with {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. I left my footprints among the gravel, I sowed countless seeds in fertile soil, I built majestic cliffs, and I dug bottomless ravines.

C: 足以撼动整个学科！
E: This will shake the entire field!

C: 看来，这是一个深陷虚无的桶。万事万物在它看来都是垃圾，而垃圾对它来说更是不足挂齿。它已经超然于常桶。
E: This trashcan appears to have transcended the ordinary, with a deep sense of detachment from the world of garbage.

C: 这根本不是暗号！好哇，没想到你居然伪造身份欺骗我的感情！
E: That's not the passphrase at all! How dare you fake your identity and take me for a ride!

C: 我只是路过的。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: 那么，我们现在就来制定新世界的法令吧——每当休息日过去，人们重新开始工作，疲惫与焦虑就会找上来，从而使他们陷入混乱。
E: Now then, let us lay down a new world order — when days of rest conclude and the people commence work again, fatigue and depression will encroach, causing them to be plunged into confusion.

C: 怎么说话的！在垃圾桶王国，只有最高贵的桶才有资格吃垃圾！你这是歧视，我要代表王国上下狠狠惩罚你！
E: Preposterous! Only the most noble of trashcans are allowed to eat trash in the Trashcan Kingdom! How dare you discriminate against trashcans... On behalf of my kingdom, I shall punish you most severely!

C: 「晖长石号」？你确定吗？这只是一艘空艇的名字，但我可以叫「晖长石号」，你也可以叫「晖长石号」，「晖长石号」也可以改名……
E: The Radiant Feldspar? Are you certain? The Radiant Feldspar is just the name of an airship. I could be called the Radiant Feldspar, you could also be called the Radiant Feldspar. In fact, the Radiant Feldspar itself could have already been renamed...

C: 你拿一个不定期改名的旧名敷衍我？！
E: How dare you try to fool me with a name that changes every so often!?

C: 我为你感到骄傲，新生。记住，找工作并不是桶生的目的！学习才是！
E: I'm proud of you, freshman. Remember, finding a job is not the main goal of your life as a trashcan! Learning is!

C: 以严密的逻辑论证。
E: Prove with flawless logic.

C: 叫它「黄豆粉糍粑」。
E: Let's just call it Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake.

C: 一头庞然巨兽出现在视野中。
E: A hulking beast appears on the horizon.

C: 用机器脑袋打败机器脑袋。
E: Beating machine brain with machine brain.

C: 没关系哦，试着拍拍看吧。在哀丽秘榭，偶尔也会有奇迹发生。
E: It's okay. Give it a little tap. Sometimes small miracles happen in Aedes Elysiae.

C: 嗯，像这样把心里话全部说出来，就不会觉得有负担啦。
E: Mm. Letting it all out makes your heart feel a little lighter, doesn't it?

C: 真的谈不上熟悉哦？不如说…有些缺乏实感呢。
E: Not exactly... Rather... it feels disconnected from reality.

C: 是…鳞渊境。
E: It's... Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 远眺美景的人们都很贪心，总觉得视野还不够宽阔。
E: Those who gaze upon beautiful sights are immensely greedy. They are plagued by a feeling that their horizons aren't wide enough.

C: 故乡是很让人怀念，可更重要的，是迈出向前的脚步，对吧？
E: People always miss their home, but what's more important is to take the next step forward, right?

C: （胡乱敲打木壁）
E: (Randomly slam against the wooden wall)

C: 我该走了。愿我们在遥远的道路尽头相见。
E: I must go now. May our paths cross again at the journey's end.

C: 我不会把你一个人留在这里。
E: I'm not leaving you alone here.

C: 你醒啦？再创世都完成了。
E: You woke up? The Era Nova is already done.

C: 噢哦噢哦噢！
E: Ohh... Ooooooh!

C: 混浊如雾的眼睛给出了答案。
E: Eyes, clouded like mist, gave the answer.

C: 小宝贝儿…带秘酿来了吗？快、快！想喝新鲜的了……
E: My dear... Did you bring me ambrosia? Hurry! I want a fresh drink...

C: 可惜我这样的人，注定无法感受你们的平凡与快乐，我要背负的是这满屋子的孤独。
E: Unfortunately, people like me are destined never to understand the mediocrity and joy of lives like yours. I bear the burden of loneliness for this whole room.

C: 不对，你是谁？我好像没有见过你。
E: Hold on, who are you? I don't think I've seen you before.

C: 物资调配尽可能快速，不要浪费一丝人力或者物力。
E: To not waste any personnel or resources, let's allocate our supplies as quickly as possible.

C: 这场灾难，对你有影响吗？
E: Does this disaster affect you?

C: 如果你对愚人戏有兴趣的话，就最好不过——我可知道不少有趣的戏呢！
E: If you are interested in Fool's Play, then you've come to the right person. I know many interesting ones!

C: 倒也不打扰。来个人和我说说话，换换心思也好。
E: You didn't bother me. It's good to have someone talk to me and distract me.

C: 「公司」？我再说一遍，我是应物科的II级科员！II级！懂不懂II级科员的含金量？我现在只是兼顾着空间站员工内购系统的事务。
E: IPC? Let me remind you, I'm a Lv. 2 researcher at the Department of Implement Arts, okay? Level 2! Can you even comprehend how much a Lv. 2 researcher is worth? I'm just handling the internal purchase system for space station staff.

C: 没办法，能者多劳嘛，我在应物科出了名的人缘好，所以大家就把和「公司」对接的重任交给了我！
E: Can't help it. No rest for the capable. I'm notoriously popular around the Department of Implement Arts, so everyone leaves the important job of liaising with the IPC over to me!

C: 这年轻人，爱问问题是好事。我老温没啥本事，学术这方面还得看你自个儿造化。但别的事情嘛……我可有的说道咯！
E: Youngster, it's a good thing to ask questions. I'm not much to write home about. You can only count on yourself in terms of academics, but I have a lot to tell you about other things!

C: 那就压根儿是不可能的事儿！
E: It's just something impossible!

C: 这…小姐在这里，我自然也就在这里。
E: I... I follow Lady Asta's steps.

C: 不过我还是有点担心，反物质军团的入侵会给大家留下心理阴影…但这种心理问题，只能私下多加留意了。
E: However, I'm still worried that people may be traumatized by the invasion of the Antimatter Legion... I'll have to monitor people's mental health more closely.

C: 其实是他们之前围绕着某个奇物在做实验，但实验出了一些偏差，在场所有人的头发都遭了殃……
E: Truth is, a group of researchers was experimenting on a Curio when all of a sudden things started to explode, and their hair all get messed up from that incident...

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone.

C: 呜呜伯看起来不太聪明的样子…正因如此，才会被约瑟夫那个装腔作势的家伙利用，可惜我说的它又听不进去，哎……
E: Wubbaboo seems a bit slow... That's why it's being manipulated by that pretentious Joseph guy. I pointed that out to Wubbaboo, but my advice fell on deaf ears...

C: 没关系！让阮•梅女士感受到无微不至的服务就已经足够了！我相信时间一定会让她感动。
E: It doesn't matter! I'm happy as long as Miss Ruan Mei can enjoy my meticulous service! I believe she'll be touched over time.

C: 你是说阮•梅、阮•梅在想我？呜…就算她想到我了，也只会奇怪为什么会创造出这么失败的生命吧…
E: Do you mean Ruan Mei— Ruan Mei is thinking about me now? I guess, even if she is, she must be wondering what has gone wrong in creating me...

C: 呜呜伯怎么就成你的「模特」了？
E: How did Wubbaboo end up becoming your "model"?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 嚯嚯！在我的威名之下，它们都不敢直视我，我都不用亲自出手就能把它们吓唬走！
E: Bahaha! They're intimidated by my reputation and dare not even look me in the eye! I can get rid of them without lifting a finger!

C: 接驳车呜…呜呜在彻底…卡在缝里了，疼死了呜。
E: Shuttle, woo... I got stuck in a gap under the shuttle. It hurt a lot, woo.

C: 向阮•梅发送通话邀请。
E: Send a call request to Ruan Mei.

C: 那你们就错了：这不是普通的盾牌；这是用{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的指甲打造的盾牌！
E: That's where you're wrong! These are no ordinary shields. They're shields forged from {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios'{RUBY_E#} nails!

C: 托您的福，我们发现奥赫玛竟然还有位论精明不逊于自己的奇才！所以我们一拍即合，决定要合伙做点买卖。
E: With your blessing, we discovered that there was an equally shrewd talent in Okhema! We hit it off instantly, and decided to do business together.

C: 要诚信经营啊！
E: Only honest trade, of course!

C: 哎，辩论才是获取真理的方式。不经由讨论便得到的知识，与盲信有什么区别？
E: Ah, but debate is the only method to obtain the truth. Is there any difference between knowledge that has not undergone discussion and blind faith?

C: 数学是阐述必然性的知识，哪怕悬锋城的战士全部改信墨涅塔，圆依旧是圆，不会变成方形。但「阿卡索斯」的存在，必须依赖现实历史。
E: Mathematics explains absolute and certain truth. If all the warriors of Castrum Kremnos were to suddenly follow Mnestia, a circle would still be a circle. It would not change shape. However, the existence of "Icatus" absolutely relies on real history.

C: 行了，别再揪着这点事不放了——你这种天天待在花园搞研究的，根本不明白现在生活的压力有多大，就不能多体谅我一点吗？
E: Okay, okay, stop going on about that one thing already — it's people like you who just sit around in the Garden researching all day who have no idea how stressful everyday life has become. Can't you think about me once in a while?

C: 你将方才目睹的情景讲给赫卡忒。只见她唇角抿起，脸色稍显苍白；不经意间，你发现她握着传信石版的手竟微微有些颤抖。
E: You fill Hekate in on what you just saw. Her lips tighten, and the color drains from her face. You notice her hand holding the teleslate starts quivering.

C: 啊——对、对！一定是这样！一定是这样…我的波瑟芬妮还活着……
E: Ah... y—yeah! That's it! That's definitely it... My Possephone is still alive...

C: 也谢谢你，这位勇士{F#小姐}{M#先生}，谢谢你保护我的厄琉斯。
E: Thank you so much too, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Warrior, for protecting my Aelius.

C: 他以为你把他的项链卖了。
E: He thought you pawned his necklace.

C: 先去问问铁匠铺的哈托努斯吧，兴许宁芙向他提起过什么。
E: Go and ask Chartonus at the blacksmith shop. Maybe Nympha mentioned something to him before.

C: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟克帖西芬姐姐学习认字。
E: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to read with Miss Ctesiphona.

C: 等这边的事情处理完毕，我们会将他一同带回去。
E: Once this is handled, we'll bring him back with us.

C: 咱们说话也有点那个。
E: Even us talking is too... y'know.

C: 师傅，师傅！您快看，跑出来的结果好奇怪啊！这要怎么办啊？
E: Master, master! Look here, the result is totally weird! What are we gonna do?

C: 哎哟别急，让我先看看…唔，好像没什么…等等，这是……
E: Okay, take it easy. Let me have a look... Well, looks fine to m—hang on. This is...

C: 能让他帮我清洗浴池吗？
E: Can they help me clean the bathhouse?

C: 加油！异邦的客人，要带着虔诚的心来认真喂食才行啊！
E: You can do it, outlander! You must feed it with a sincere heart!

C: 那又如何？殿下是交代过我们要和奥赫玛人友善相处，可这难道意味着我们要步步退让，苟且偷生，丢掉悬锋人的尊严和荣耀吗？！
E: And what of it? His Highness instructed us to treat the Okhemans amicably, but does that mean we must retreat with every step, live dishonorably, and abandon the dignity and glory of the Kremnoans!?

C: 确实。古语说道，孤独是足以致死的疾病，想必科可波阁下也是念主心切，外加不适应城内的安逸环境，才会做出这等狂放的行径吧。
E: Indeed. The old saying goes, "Loneliness is a fatal ailment." It seems Kokopo, too, longs deeply for its master. Struggling to adapt to the tranquil life within the city walls has only exacerbated its restlessness.

C: 哼，还是悬锋城的土质尝起来更美味，对吧？
E: Hmph, but Kremnos' soil must taste better, right?

C: 伊俄那家伙大嚷着「我要弑神」就冲出去了…不会出事吧？
E: Eio stormed off yelling, "I want to slay the gods!"... This won't end well, right?

C: 市集的大家都在谈论这件事。虽然大家很信任阿格莱雅大人，但也有不好的传言。我感到害怕……
E: Everyone in the market is talking about it. Though they trust Lady Aglaea, there are also ominous rumors. It scares me...

C: 不过我活这么大，早就学会了如何平复心情。现在的我已经完全振作起来了！
E: But I've been around long enough to know how to calm myself. I'm totally fine now!

C: 你在嘟囔什么呢？
E: What are you mumbling about?

C: …感觉好些了。
E: ...Feeling a bit better now.

C: 其中有一些武器，可以武装灾民，还有一些防具，可以堆成街垒……
E: There are some weapons among them that we can use to arm the refugees, and some armor that can be stacked to make barricades...

C: 你可以询问克利克，可克利克已经不在你身边了。
E: You could ask Kilik, but Kilik is no longer by your side.

C: 不忍卒看的残酷战斗结束了，柯库翁一瘸一拐地回到你身边。
E: The brutal battle, too hard to watch, finally ended, and Glykon hobbled back to your side, limping.

C: 呵呵……
E: Hehe...

C: 怎么还想着卖货呢？
E: Why are you still thinking about selling your goods?

C: 没问题，我帮你问问守卫。
E: Sure. I'll ask the guard for you.

C: 斐第斯，还在摆弄你那个扩声器吗？我记得那是你父亲的遗物？
E: Phedes, still fiddling with that amplifier? I remember that was something that belonged to your father.

C: 「——人子啊，黎明机器的确沉重，饶是我的肩头也感到负累，但放心，在你们看不到的地方，我还有一只手在稳稳地托着它——」
E: "—Children of humanity, the Dawn Device indeed weighs heavy, even my shoulders. But worry not, for where you cannot see, I still have a hand steadily bearing its weight—"

C: 原来，你已经知道这么多了。
E: So, you already know this much.

C: 谢谢大家，谢谢你们，谢谢……
E: Thank you everyone, thank you all, thank you...

C: 找到阿波罗尼了？这怎么可能……
E: Apollonius is found? That's impossible...

C: 阁下……你认为，现在的「心酿」，仍与往日一致吗？
E: Tell me, Great Deliverer... is the "soul brew" we make today still faithful to what it once was?

C: 唔…那个沙发真的很可疑……
E: Huh... there's something strange about that sofa.

C: 你说，如果哥哥能活到今天，像我一样站在这里，欣赏与贝洛伯格全然不同的风景…他又会作何感想呢？
E: This view is nothing like the views in Belobog... If my brother were still alive and standing here on the Express, I wonder what he'd make of all this.

C: 只是…如果真有一天，下层区的人们不再需要我这个医生了，大家都能够无忧无虑地健康生活下去……
E: Of course, if there is a day when the Underworld doesn't need a doctor like me anymore and everyone lives happily ever after...

C: 呣呣呣…虎克还得再抓几个人来才行！列车这么大，不玩捉迷藏的话…不是浪费了嘛！
E: Hmm... Hook needs to find more people! The Express is huge, it's a waste of space to not play!

C: 你当我是什么人啊……
E: Who do you take me for...

C: 对对对，就是这个！我跟你说啊……
E: Exactly! You won't believe this, but...

C: 结果瓦尔特先生噌地一下就来精神了，把我吓了一跳！他拼命向我打听「造物引擎」技术规格参数如何，有没有乘坐过之类的…可惜我也没见过那台大机器人。
E: As soon as I started talking about it, he jumped out of his seat in excitement — scared me half to death. He wanted to know everything there was to know about its technical specs and whether I'd ever had the chance to ride in it... Sadly, I had to tell him I never saw the robot myself.

C: 可以预警潜在的威胁。
E: You'd be able to detect potential threats.

C: 我记得艾丝妲小姐之前有定制过一些设备，或许可以问问她……
E: I remember Lady Asta commissioned some security equipment a while back. Maybe she still has some spares...

C: 我不像小姐那么博学多识……我能做的，就只有在防卫这件事上发挥一些作用了吧？
E: I'm not as knowledgeable as Lady Asta... The only way I can contribute is to help the station improve its defenses, don't you think?

C: 啊…抱歉{NICKNAME}，我是在说这辆列车的列车长——帕姆大人。但{NICKNAME}你也是很厉害的。
E: Uh... Sorry, {NICKNAME}, I was talking about Pom-Pom, the conductor. But hey, you're super good at what you do, too!

C: 谢谢你让我想起这一点，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thanks for reminding me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 收下吧。它们虽不算昂贵，但也有点用处。
E: Please, take them. They're not exactly valuable, but they have their uses.

C: 怎么了？别人都能上这车，我也能来。
E: What do you mean what am I doing? Everyone else is here, can't I be too?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 可惜你不在，让我一人独享了这难得的美景。
E: It's a shame you weren't here to see them — I prefer to witness such rare sights with others.

C: 这么一想，列车真是个不错的秘密基地。
E: Now that I think of it, the Express really would make a good secret base.

C: 我还有些事情需要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 可以说是因祸得福吧？曾经的那些卡波特粉丝后援会成员，有许多都是手里有独立研究项目的资深科员。
E: Maybe a bit of good luck actually came from this. Lots of the previous Capote Fan Club members are senior researchers with independent projects under their care.

C: 老师不常用剑，可能还不熟悉剑客的气息吧？但我可一眼就能看出来，这位帕姆老师绝非等闲之辈，剑术很可能在我之上。
E: You don't use a sword, so I guess you wouldn't feel the presence of a swordsman in front of you... but after one look at Pom-Pom, I knew they weren't someone to be trifled with. I think they may be more masterful than myself.

C: 嗯嗯，你说得对，我怎么没想到呢？真是太棒了。
E: Mm, you're right. How come I didn't think of this? This is awesome.

C: 嗯嗯，好的好的，嗯嗯。
E: Mmm, sure sure.

C: 听说你之前一直没休息过？
E: I heard you didn't rest for a long time?

C: 这怎么好意思…
E: I really shouldn't...

C: 少量多餐是健康的吃法。
E: It's healthier to eat more meals in smaller amounts.

C: 唔，这么讲究？
E: Um, that's a thing?

C: 有点意思！能一下想出这么有趣的题目，看来你也不是等闲之辈嘛？
E: This is fun! I'm impressed by your ability to come up with such interesting questions on the spot!

C: 得感谢强大的供暖系统。
E: It's all thanks to the powerful heating system.

C: 我不是收藏家，不知这些石头的成色你可满意？
E: I'm not much of a collector. I hope you find the quality of these stones satisfactory.

C: 列车可真是个好地方，以后我再来这里做客时，请记得不要从背面和我打招呼。
E: The Express is such a lovely place... Umm, next time I visit, please... remember not to sneak up on me from behind.

C: 噫。
E: Bah!

C: 有一种坏坏的感觉。
E: There's something mischievous about him.

C: 想得太多！
E: I'm an overthinker!

C: 「开拓」的故事，总是这么令人动容……
E: The "Trailblazing" stories are just so moving...

C: 不算什么新词，就是特别厉害，特别爱你的意思。
E: It's not a new term. It just means "very peak." It means "very fudging awesome."

C: 不过「检修身体」，也算是一个改造人的必修课了。
E: But body maintenance is a required class for cyborgs.

C: 她同我说你在「忘却之庭」打捞记忆的表现十分出色，是难得的天赋型选手。
E: She told me that you salvaged the Forgotten Hall's memories with great skill, that you are a rare talent.

C: 第二组，蓝色。
E: The second set, the blue deck.

C: 智库中的记录涉及诸多星球。各类信息纷繁复杂，却能被整理的井井有条，这实在令我感到钦佩。
E: The data bank's records touch upon myriad planets. Each category of information is confusingly complex, but they have all been so well-organized — 'tis an admirable feat indeed.

C: 正是！
E: Yes!

C: 让我不禁想起了…长乐天。不知恩公吃过鸣藕糕吗？只要咬下一口，它似乎便会对你出声发笑。
E: It reminds me of... the Exalting Sanctum. Have you ever had a songlotus cake, benefactor? As soon as you take a bite, it seems like it's laughing at you.

C: 我听那个呜呜叫的家伙说，科员们都有一个姓氏，所以你想好自己要叫温什么了嘛？
E: I heard that Wubbie saying that every one of the researchers shares the same surname. So have you decided what Wen to call yourself?

C: 空间站的终端网络修好后，越来越多的科员选择远程办公，在某些终端前大排长龙的场面业已消失。
E: Since the terminal network of the space station was fixed, more and more researchers have chosen to work from home. The long queues in front of some terminals can no longer be seen.

C: 如果你能帮我交到朋友，我一定给你丰厚的酬劳。朋友越多越好。
E: If you can help me acquire a friend, I'll reward you handsomely. The more friends the better.

C: 我这边可不这么想呀……
E: Well, I highly doubt that...

C: 不过…车厢里这么安静，反而让人有点不习惯呢？
E: Hm... the coach is quiet. Maybe a little too quiet?

C: 你很喜欢玩？
E: You're into ancient relics?

C: 说实话，我也不想闭着眼睛搞这些虚头巴脑的东西了……
E: Honestly, I don't want to include all that garish garbage in my writing anyway...

C: 我倒是想呐…但想前往下层区得去市政厅申请许可，像我这种游客性质的出行需求可没那么容易获得批准。
E: I certainly would love to... But you need to apply for permission from the Town Hall to go to the Underworld. Travel requests of a tourism nature like mine aren't as likely to receive approval.

C: 可知…这时空隧道的基点就在矿道里啊！你说是不是有理有据？
E: We know that... The central point of this time tunnel is in the mine! It's a logical conclusion backed by evidence. Wouldn't you say?

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢你。多亏了你，我的人生才能有这样一个崭新的开始……
E: Hehe. Thank you. I've started a whole new chapter of my life thanks to you...

C: 是啊，我没和你们说过吗？我小时候是在磐岩镇出生的，爸妈也都是土生土长的下层区人。
E: Yes. Have I not told you that? I was born in Boulder Town, and both my parents are native Underworlders.

C: 第一次撞见那家伙的时候，他问我需不需要「平行世界打印机」。
E: The first time I met that guy, he asked if I wanted a "parallel universe printer."

C: 你被骗了多少钱？
E: How much did you pay?

C: 哦？你可真抬举我。这么重要的工程，当然是大守护者亲自负责。
E: Oh? You flatter me. Such an important project is naturally overseen by the Supreme Guardian.

C: 能啊，必须能。
E: Of course, it has to be.

C: 之前的事我也听说了， 这是你们和大守护者共同争取来的机会，我们当然要把握住。
E: I've heard about what happened before, that you and the Supreme Guardian fought for this opportunity together. Naturally, we want to seize it.

C: 说吧，你找我到底有什么事？
E: So, what exactly do you want to see me about?

C: 哈，看来你也是个识时务的{M#好小子}{F#好姑娘}。
E: Ha, looks like you're a {M#guy}{F#gal} who keeps themselves up on all the plays.

C: 哇哦，真是可喜可贺。
E: Wow, that's great.

C: 难得碰上这么件好事，我还想和你分享分享呢。
E: Such a good thing is hard to come by, and I really want to share it with you.

C: …你又在骗人！
E: ... Are you tricking people again!?

C: 呣…「雪地跳跳糖」又吃完了……
E: Hmm... I'm out of snow-white popping candy...

C: 虎克？…不对，应该是漆黑的虎克大人！真是没大没小！
E: Hook? I mean... Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! How dare you address her by just that name!

C: 在那之前，我想先和你聊聊…
E: Let's have a chat first...

C: 以前，我给下层区的大家添了许多麻烦…真的很对不起！那些被我偷了东西的人，说不定他们的境况也没有比我好到哪去……
E: I'm really sorry about all the trouble I've caused for everyone in the Underworld! Those I stole from could very well be in a worse situation than me...

C: 我想问你…
E: I'm wondering...

C: 不过，你似乎从来没有在联络群中提请过他人帮助…但你放心，对于这种情况，我们也有备案。
E: It seems like you've never asked for help in the group chat, though... Don't worry. We have measures in place for such cases.

C: 哈哈哈！瞧你们这话说的，把「地火」当作什么啦。
E: Hahaha! What do you think Wildfire is?

C: 我对你的鉴定方法有点兴趣。
E: I'm interested in your appraisal method.

C: 唉，今天还一条洞螈都没抓到呢…是我太着急了吗？
E: *sigh* I haven't caught any olms today... Is it because I'm not patient enough?

C: 不瞒你说，一想到我再也看不到她的面容…想大哭一场的冲动就会一个劲地涌上来。但我现在绝对不能表现出懦弱。
E: Honestly speaking, the thought of not seeing her again... always wells me up with tears. Yet, now is not the time for me to show my vulnerable side.

C: 这话怎么听着这么耳熟…啊，想起来了！我最近在读的《斯维特兰娜战术集》里有一句话，好像和你说的是一个意思。
E: Why does that phrase sound familiar... Ah, I remember! There was a quote in "Svetlana's Stratagems" that I was reading recently, I think it said the same thing.

C: 那可不！
E: That's right!

C: 佩~拉~姐~姐~
E: Miss~ Pela~

C: 很遗憾，细节部分就属于银鬃铁卫…不，应该说是贝洛伯格的最高机密了喔。
E: Unfortunately, the details are the top secret of the Silvermane Guards — or more accurately — of Belobog.

C: 其实，我平时都在尽可能躲着她…我总觉得她身上有种，嗯…压迫感。
E: In truth, I try to avoid her most of the time... I always feel that she's sort of hmm... overbearing.

C: 是呀！她不住在磐岩镇上，但偶尔会来诊所找我们玩！
E: Of course! She doesn't live in Boulder Town, but occasionally comes to the clinic to play with us!

C: 虽然我们鼹鼠党一直在保护磐岩镇的安全，但总有人在暗地里破坏我们的行动！
E: The Moles have to keep watch over the safety of Boulder Town, for evil is always thwarting our operations!

C: …啊，你来了。抱歉，温度一高我就容易犯困……
E: ...Oh, there you are. Sorry if I seem a bit drowsy, but that's what happens when it gets hot.

C: 不过，我们其实在那段时间里还会经常偷偷进入雪原私自考察……
E: But to tell you the truth, we used to go on unauthorized expeditions into the Snow Plains from time to time back then...

C: 史考特？
E: Scott?

C: 何况现在星球已经彻底开放，下层区不再需要靠争夺矿脉过活了。
E: Moreover, with this planet now fully accessible, Underworlders no longer need to fight over veins.

C: 终有一天，这孩子会离开我的保护，成为一个可靠的大人——这在以前可是不敢想的事。
E: One day, she'll have to leave my care and become a reliable adult... something I've never dared to imagine before.

C: 然后呢？
E: And then what?

C: 我之所以在这，只是为了提醒公司：这里依旧是贝洛伯格的领土。
E: The reason I'm here is to remind the IPC that this territory still belongs to Belobog.

C: 我只能说，懂的太多了不是好事……
E: All I can say is, knowing too much can be a mistake...

C: 听着有点意思…那么该怎么加入呢？
E: Sounds kinda interesting... So how does one go about signing up?

C: 真是她？不会吧。
E: Is that her? No way.

C: 爸爸……
E: Daddy...

C: 铁卫又要申请经费了……
E: The Silvermane Guards are going to apply for more funding again...

C: 民意代表发来了请愿……
E: Public reps have filed a petition...

C: 哎哟，我服了…你都干了一天了，能不能别干了啊？
E: Goodness gracious, I give up... you've been at it for a whole day. Ready to give up?

C: 哼，我就知道……
E: Hmph, I knew it...

C: 你看了他上一把比赛了吗？我就说他这赛季不行……
E: Did you see his last match? I'm telling you, he's no good this season...

C: 哎，跟你聊不来…
E: You won't understand...

C: 这是我们罗浮的「灯昼龙鱼」。
E: It's Illumination Dragonfish from the Luofu.

C: 那「灯昼龙鱼」又是什么呢？
E: So, what is an Illumination Dragonfish?

C: 博物馆是做什么的？
E: What does the museum do?

C: 接下来嘛…就走一步看一步吧。
E: What happens next? Well, we'll see.

C: 佩拉小姐派来帮忙的……
E: Miss Pela sent you to help...

C: 你随意参观，有什么需要帮助的地方就告诉我——另外，这次可千万记得不要触发警报了…哈哈哈！
E: Feel free to walk around. If you need any help, lemme know... Also, try not to trigger the alarm this time... hahaha!

C: 咱从不吃那些小鱼小虾，也不吃食草动物，更不吃被驯化的猛兽…咱只吃有资格与咱生死对决的动物。
E: I don't eat small fish and shrimp, nor herbivores, or even domesticated beasts... I only eat animals that I can fight to the death with.

C: …这只是个称呼，您爱怎么叫就怎么叫。
E: ...It's just a title. Call it whatever you want.

C: 看上去你对诗句有一些独到的见解，你说说看，别人写得情真意切，我写得也是真情实感，我到底差在哪儿了？
E: You, however, seem to have unique insights into poetry. Tell me, other people pour out their love and emotion, and I'm here writing out my true feelings too. What am I doing wrong?

C: 话是这么说，但是解决不了问题。哎……
E: That may be true, but it doesn't fix my problem. *sigh*...

C: 其实我根本不明白。
E: I don't understand the first thing about it.

C: 所以具体有什么区别…
E: So what exactly is the difference, then...

C: 松烟那小子，虽然性格懒散，但是很聪明，我很看好他今后的发展。
E: That Songyan kid may be lazy, but he's smart. I have high hopes for his future.

C: 哎呀，您来啦！这次有想好办理会员卡了嘛？
E: Ah, there you are! Are you ready to sign up for a membership yet?

C: 做我们这行当的都是自雇营生，本小利微，勉强能够吃着。每日进账没个定数，又得和地衡司斗智斗勇，还是很辛苦的。
E: We're all self-employed in this line of work, and I don't make much at all — just enough to eat. There's no fixed daily income, and we're always squabbling with the Realm-Keeping Commission for this and that. It's a tough life.

C: 就先聊到这儿吧。
E: Nice chat.

C: 哦，原来是行雪。
E: Oh, so it's Xingxue.

C: 怎么又是你在执勤？
E: How come you're on duty again?

C: 小到老夫负责的民用机巧，大到贯星斗舰和洞天，都是工造司制造的…有道是：人之巧，乃可与造化者同功乎！
E: It could be something as small as civilian ingenia, of which I am in charge, or something as large as the Sagittarius Starfighter or a Delve... We do it all. As the saying goes: Human ingenuity is as limitless as the heavens!

C: 不过现在从结果上来看，他确实赋闲了，我却更忙了……
E: But judging by the results right now, he sure is idle. And I'm busier...

C: 我将这些旅行体验如实地记录下来，付梓出版，随即引起了热烈的反响……
E: I recorded these travel experiences in truth, put them into print, and immediately aroused enthusiastic responses...

C: 那些岁月里我留下了很多承诺，并为此奋战至今…然后我大梦初醒般地发现，自己已经再也走不动了……
E: I made a lot of promises back in those days, and I've been fighting to keep them to this day... But then I woke up from a long dream only to discover that I could no longer walk...

C: 所以我决定再观望一下，让他俩再压一压价格。反正也不是第一次了，他们俩也该习惯了，嘿嘿。
E: So I've decided to wait and see. Let them push down their prices again. In any case, this isn't the first time, and they should get used to it because it won't be the last!

C: 之前建木生发，罗浮的商业活动几乎完全停摆了…这可苦了我们这些在流云渡上讨生活的人。
E: With the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth, business on the Luofu almost shut down completely before... Which is terrible for those of us trying to earn a living out here in Cloudford.

C: 好嘞，那我们下次见。不要忘记之后来我这里买一些过期货物哦～
E: Alright, see you next time. Don't forget to come by later and buy up some of these abandoned goods.

C: 我老家的贸易不发达，自从星际和平公司入驻以后，继续做本地生意也到头了，所以我和家乡的几个小伙伴一合计，凑了钱，搭了伙找找天外的机会。
E: Ours isn't a hyper-developed star system. Once the IPC settled in, that was the end of our local business economy. So, I teamed up with a few hometown friends, pooling our money to make opportunities for ourselves beyond the sky.

C: 慢走啊。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 您尽管问吧，这流云渡上下的手续我可熟啦！
E: Feel free to ask anything. I know my way around all the freight handling procedures in Cloudford!

C: 随处可见，平平无奇。
E: Everything about her is utterly ordinary.

C: 你好像很讨厌太卜司的人？
E: You seem to really hate these people at the Divination Commission, huh?

C: 您是主动调任鳞渊境的？
E: Did you volunteer to be transferred to Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 你眺目远望所看到的一切，在不可胜数的往昔，都曾是持明故土的一部分。但随着持明迁徙，我们将这故土移栽至了仙舟洞天中。
E: Everything you see before you has been part of the Vidyadhara homeworld for eons. But as we migrated, we've transplanted parts of our homeworld to some of the Xianzhou Delves.

C: 干这行虽然稳定，但也没太多收入。所以我也兼干些药材生意。毕竟，丹鼎司平日也有不少商客造访采买药物。
E: It's a steady job, but it doesn't pay much. So I also sling a little medicine on the side. You know how it is. The Alchemy Commission will usually have merchants visiting who are keen on purchasing medicines.

C: 唉…借您吉言吧。您也多保重……
E: *Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...

C: 到底什么事啊？呜呜，为什么都没人告诉我——你要是知道的话记得第一时间跟我分享分享。
E: What on earth happened? *Sob* Why has no one told me about it? If you find anything, please share it with me as well.

C: 我也不知道啊，我本来在外面出差呢，医术研讨会还没开完，就突然收到消息说我升职了。
E: I have no clue. I was participating in a medical conference outside the Luofu when I was suddenly notified of the promotion via a message.

C: 收手吧，外面全是金人武卒。
E: Just give up. The place is surrounded by aurumaton soldiers.

C: 你要是觉得我是故意的，那我恐怕让你失望了。就算是太卜大人亲临，我也是这样，不会有什么改变。
E: I'm afraid you'll be disappointed if you think I'm doing this on purpose. I'd act the same way even if you were the master diviner.

C: 其实也没么什么秘诀，最关键的就是坚持。有些犯人尝试个一两次就放弃了，而我能为破解一道锁研究好几年。
E: Honestly, I don't have any tricks or anything like that. The key is perseverance. Some convicts give up after just one or two attempts, but I can spend years researching how to break just a single lock.

C: 你先忙，我要走了。
E: I've got to go. I won't disturb you.

C: 抱歉，刚才在想别的事情，没有注意到您…哎，今日我不适合占算，就此作罢好了。
E: Sorry, my mind was elsewhere just now, and I didn't notice your presence... Well, today is not a good day for divination. Let's do it some other time.

C: 现在就想跟您咨询一下。
E: I'd like to ask something.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 纪念品…我建议你买点「苏打豆汁儿」吧，带回去给亲友派发一下，让他们尝尝，一定要让他们亲口尝尝——
E: Souvenirs... Well, my suggestion would be "mung bean soda." Take it back to your friends and relatives, and make sure they try it...

C: 你不会是想害我吧？
E: You're not planning to hurt me, are you?

C: 于是在化外民眼中，有着几百年历史的「古董」就这样随便丢给了「收破烂」的，确实挺令人惊讶的。
E: That's why it raises eyebrows whenever Outworlders see an antique from centuries ago get discarded without a thought, and being taken in by us as "trash."

C: 游客来回折腾一趟，累得气喘吁吁的，不得不找个地方坐下喝两口茶饮，买些小吃，休息休息…交流着一天的收获。
E: All the tourists who went there would be so exhausted that they had to buy some drinks and snacks... while taking a break and exchanging their stories.

C: 你想听标准的回答，或者是「别的版本」？
E: Would you like to hear my "official" answer, or "another version"?

C: 当然可以，不过我不像会长那样有什么见解，如果不嫌弃的话……
E: Sure, but I'm not as erudite as the president, and if you don't mind...

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: …我也是这样认为的。要是能坚持路演下去，我的水平肯定能提升吧。
E: ...That's what I thought, too. So, if I continue to perform in public like this, I will be able to improve my skills.

C: 哈哈！在下怎么会不认识您呢？呼雷越狱时，若是没有您的帮助，我恐怕也未必能活到今天啊。
E: Haha, how could I not? When Hoolay escaped from his cell, were it not for your help, I might not be standing here today — or anywhere else, for that matter.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 生意顺不顺遂，我倒是没什么所谓。不过托你的福，这金人巷越来越人声鼎沸，也算替我打开了广交朋友的大门啊。
E: I don't really care about the business. Still, the Aurum Alley has become busier and busier because of you, and this has helped me tremendously in expanding my connections.

C: 有些事想问你。
E: I have a few questions I wish to ask you...

C: 哎呀呀～我刚好像说了些不该说的话…就麻烦你当做没听见吧，谢啦！
E: Oops, I might have said a bit too much. Can we pretend we never had this conversation? Hehe, thanks!

C: 此象得主明知不可为而为之，身陷囹吾而不自知。对于你所问之事——这或许会是一次惨烈的打击，你注定要承受这突如其来的灾难。世事无常，做好心理准备。
E: The bearer of this sign is unaware of their predicament and is attempting something that is doomed to fail. As for the question in your mind — this could be a devastating blow for you, and you are destined to suffer this unexpected disaster. Be prepared for the terrible end that fate will throw at you.

C: 不过你要是喜欢听人说书，那可巧了，咱们算是同好！你想聊什么都行！
E: But if you happen to enjoy live storytelling performances just like I do, then we're in the same boat and I will chat with you about whatever you like!

C: 还有藿藿，感觉胆子越来越大了～而且她最近对判官的工作也越来越「有刀鱿鱼」了…其实一直不太理解这个成语，「刀鱿鱼」到底是个什么生物？
E: And Huohuo's really getting gutsy these days. She's also becoming more skilled at the judge's work, like "shooting fish in a barrow." Honestly, I've never quite understood that phrase — what on earth is "fish in a barrow"?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone then.

C: 幸亏，那位银枝大哥，一眼就看出了我们的难处，没有放我们复活第八次，真是大好人啊！
E: Luckily, that Argenti gentleman saw our troubles right away and didn't make us go through the wringer for the eighth time. What a great guy!

C: 本小姐作为丹鼎司的「衔药龙女」，自然是忙得不行了。
E: As the Healer Lady of the Alchemy Commission, of course I've been having a full plate.

C: 若有疑问，{NICKNAME}可以提问。不过公务繁冗，我无法保证自己有余力分神回答您的问题。
E: If you have any more questions, {NICKNAME}, feel free to ask. However, due to the burden of my duties, I might not have ample time to answer all of them.

C: 你直接讲重点吧。
E: Get straight to the point.

C: 客人你有所不知，有些人是奔着做生意来的，小店管这叫顾客。有些人奔着别的目的来，小店也接待不了。
E: You may know this, but some come here to do business — I call them customers. Some come with other things in mind. Those I don't entertain.

C: 古语说「猫洗面过耳则客至」。所以，咱们开当铺的都得准备一位「招财猫尊」刮耳洗面，图的就是生意兴隆的好兆头。
E: There's an old saying that "a cat bathing itself heralds a customer's arrival." That is why we must have a Supreme Fortune Cat in our pawnshop — to herald tidings of good fortune.

C: 说起来，曾有位客人闯进我的店里，言明想要用自己的一只手，来换取三十年寿命。
E: Now that we're on the topic, there was a customer who barged into my shop and declared that he wanted to trade his own hand for thirty years of his life.

C: 在那一霎，整个校场似乎阴阳倒错、晨昏颠倒。在众人回过神时，「无罅飞光」已经收剑入鞘，失重一般的眩晕感却仍在持续。
E: In an instant, it was as if day turned into night over the parade square, and time itself had reverted. When everyone came to their senses, the Transcendent Flash had already sheathed the blade, but the dizzy feeling of vertigo persisted.

C: 下次有机会再说吧。
E: Let us talk next time.

C: 他们相信从天而降的我是仙人，叫我「神女」的时候，我觉得吃这点苦算是有回报了吧。
E: They believed I was a celestial fallen from the skies, and when they called me a "goddess," it felt like fair reward for my ordeal.

C: 他听完，气得暴跳如雷，觉得我还在嘴硬。不过，这人倒是个挺好的人，也没打我板子，只是把我关进了牢里，让我「好好想想自己是谁」。
E: When all that was done, he was steaming with anger, thinking I was being facetious. But he was a good man. He didn't dish out any physical punishment, just imprisoned me and told me to seriously think about who I was.

C: 你拔剑而起！
E: You raised the flag of rebellion!

C: 仙舟人喜好用一些手段隐藏实力，可能这就是所谓「藏锋守拙」的文化吧。
E: The Xianzhou natives like using a few tricks to mask their strength, and it's probably connected to their propensity for humility.

C: 这本笔记上记录着各种各样的推荐，每一篇都写着「一生必须经历一次」、「超级推荐」…春分每一个都不想错过。
E: There's a crop of advice inside this notebook, each one described as "a once-in-a-lifetime experience" or "super recommended"... and I don't wanna miss out on any one of them.

C: 哈哈哈，真可爱呀。
E: Hahaha, how cute.

C: 要是你没什么别的事，我就接着忙了哟。
E: If there's nothing else, I'm getting back to work.

C: 姐姐娶我。
E: Marry me, please.

C: 哦，你才认识我多久就在想这种事了，嗯？
E: Oh, already at this stage when you've only known me for minutes, hmm?

C: 说实在话，我当时看着驭空大人，心里都已经小鹿乱撞了。
E: Honestly, when I first cast my eyes on Madam Yukong, my heart skipped a beat.

C: 嗯，那我们就下次再见吧。
E: All right, till next time then.

C: 我不知道你听说过多少商会，「鸣火」商会听说过没有？
E: I don't know how many merchant guilds you've heard of. Does the Whistling Flames guild ring any bells?

C: 有不少同僚都相信她还活着，发誓一定要找到她。但我嘛…我可不是那么不现实的人。
E: Many of my colleagues believe she is still alive and pledge to find her. As for me... I'm more realistic.

C: 我击败过武装考古学派的特遣部队，手撕兽舰，脸接离子炮…我要是登上擂台，在场的人通通活不过我简单一招，那这比赛还有什么看头？比赛早就已经结束了。
E: I've defeated the Armed Archaeologists' task forces, taken down beast ships, and deflected ion cannons point-blank. One move is all I need to beat everyone here. If I step into that arena, the match would be over before it even begins, and where would be the fun in that?

C: 好，你去忙你的事吧。我还有些事情要和他们谈谈，我是不会放弃的。
E: All right. I've other issues to discuss with them, and I won't give up.

C: 之前在「黑塔」空间站的时候，我还拜托过你帮我送东西呢。
E: I asked you to deliver something back when we were at Herta Space Station.

C: 你最好能腼腆一些。
E: You should be more low-key.

C: 你或许会问，赌局有输有赢，凭什么我能保证稳赚不赔？那是因为我有独门法宝——一只能预测未来的谛听。
E: Then, you might ask, since there are no guarantees in gambling, how do I ensure that I only win and don't incur losses? Well, that's all thanks to this unique treasure that I possess — a Diting who can predict the future.

C: 云骑没把你抓起来?
E: The Cloud Knights did not lock you up?

C: 三百…不对，四百年…
E: Three hundred... No, four hundred years...

C: 这不就被我逮到了吗？
E: Didn't I catch that guy already?

C: 这相声有四门功课…
E: This crosstalk has four lessons in it...

C: 灾变再不结束…
E: If the disaster never ends...

C: 见过，不知道是不是同一个人？
E: I have, but I'm not sure if it's the same person?

C: 不是，{F#姐}{M#哥}，找网友只是一时的，要饭是一辈子的呀。
E: I mean, {F#lady}{M#sir}, internet friends are temporary, but begging for food is forever.

C: 今天就先聊到这里吧。
E: We'll catch up another time.

C: 一路保重，注意安全。
E: Take care and stay safe along the way.

C: 我们那边这样风格的建筑越来越少了
E: At where we live, we don't see many buildings erected in such a style anymore.

C: 地衡司这边也没差。
E: It's the same here in the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 《仙舟动物权益保护状况日益堪忧》
E: "Animal rights protection are an increasingly concerning issue in Xianzhou."

C: 但是吧，这个少年曾经一度被称为「天才棋手」，但是后来吧，他一生气就把我依附的棋盘给扔了…说是「跟臭棋篓子下棋越下越臭」。
E: However, this kid was soon being called a "chess prodigy." But later, when he lost his temper, he threw out the chessboard that I was inside... He said "playing chess with a real stinker is making things too stinky".

C: 聊这么多废话，不如来找我下棋，真是的。
E: All this gossip. Why, we should be playing chess.

C: 我能看到你的死亡随之降临。就像我预言了新伯利恒的太阳被焚风点燃，我看到奥古尔星环的人类像崩溃蚁群般毫无意义地死去，我还看到了……
E: I can see your impending doom. Just as I prophesied that New Bethlehem's sun would be ignited by Zephyro; just as I saw the humans of the Ogul ring die senselessly like an imploding ant colony; so too do I see...

C: 结果下一个家伙可好，是个计程星槎士，我见他从早干到晚，没见他从舵手的位置上挪开步子……
E: Little did I know the next guy turned out to be a starskiff taxi pilot. He worked from dawn to dusk, and I never saw him taking a single step away from the helm...

C: 我曾经帮助一个被父母卖往他乡的孤儿攀上公司分部主管的位置，想看看他会如何使用到手的金钱……
E: I once helped an orphan, who was sold off by his parents to a foreign land, to rise to the position of an IPC branch manager. I wanted to see how he'd use the money he had...

C: 没想到你还有这样的爱好。
E: I never thought you have such a hobby.

C: 我在那里受到大守护者的接待。
E: I was welcomed by the Supreme Guardian there.

C: 忘了自我介绍了，请叫我「包打听」——不仅包打，还包打听，很难忘记吧？
E: I forgot to introduce myself, call me Bao Dating — not just prolific at being punched, but also at acquiring intel. I'm good, no?

C: 简而言之，所有新人参加比赛都会遇到一道坎。我，沧汐，就是那道坎。
E: Simply put, all newcomers will eventually hit a wall in this contest. I, Cangxi, am that wall.

C: 不认识就不认识嘛，不用好像。
E: You can just say you don't know him.

C: 咱们罗浮仙舟就龙女大人这样的神医，和她相比，妾身治病救人的本事仍属于常人理解范畴内。不过，也正是因为如此，龙女大人的专家号可不好排队。
E: With miracle healers on the Xianzhou Luofu like the great Dragon Lady, my healing skills by comparison fall into the realm of things that the average person could come to comprehend. However, it's precisely for this reason that the queues at the Dragon Lady's clinic are ridiculous.

C: 如何选择合适的香？
E: How do you choose a suitable incense?

C: 本座曾为此与人有过一番辩诘。可惜如今，能为辩论画上句号的只有我一个了。
E: I once had a debate with someone over this issue. Unfortunately, I alone remain in the world of the living to bring the debate to a close.

C: 你们让着我一点，谢谢。
E: Let me have this, please.

C: 听说工造司戒严放假…
E: I heard the Artisanship Commission is on vacation due to martial law...

C: 我还从见过那样的建木…
E: I've never seen the Ambrosial Arbor behaving like this before...

C: 你别说了，我不玩了。
E: Thanks, but I think I'm out.

C: 货船上的货物不包装吗？
E: Don't the goods on the freight skiff need to be packed?

C: 那个胖胖的，圆圆的那个。
E: You know, the big fella?

C: 这个「奠仪」…要怎么弄？
E: How should we go about this soul-soothing ceremony?

C: 你的家人也离开了吗？
E: Has your family member passed away too?

C: 却错过了带走她的机会。
E: ...but missed out on the chance to take her away.

C: 但那颗丹本是用蜡封好的，足足有拳头大小！医嘱上写得清清楚楚——要剖开后取其中的药引吞服。我都不知道他是怎么吞下去的……
E: But that pellet, sealed in wax, was as big as someone's fist! The prescription laid it out very clearly that the patient had to cut the pellet open and consume the medicinal extract inside. I have no idea how the patient managed to swallow the pellet...

C: 原来他们也会办葬礼啊…我还以为他们真的……
E: So they also hold funerals... huh... I thought they'd be...

C: 抱歉，不是要阻拦将军的贵客，只是提醒您，前方出现了某些危险异象。为了安全起见，还请留在云骑戍守的区域里。
E: Sorry, I didn't want to stop the general's distinguished guests, but just to warn you, there have been some dangerous sightings ahead. For your own safety, please stay in the areas guarded by the Cloud Knights.

C: 几天不见，变这么小了？
E: It's only been a few days since we last saw each other. How'd you get so tiny?

C: 果真是发卡？人子，你要用炼金术做发卡？！
E: A hairpin? For real? Child of humanity, you want to use alchemy to make a hairpin!?

C: 果然，独白还是要有听众才行——不是为我谋划的幕僚，不是任我摆布的棋子，也并非什么救世主，只是一位愿意倾听的朋友。
E: Indeed, a monologue needs an audience... not a strategist plotting for me, not a pawn at my disposal, nor some Deliverer. Simply a friend who's willing to listen.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 不、不限量畅饮？这么珍贵的东西……
E: A—As much as I wish? But it's something so precious...

C: 小灰鱼，也与我共饮一杯吧？瞧——
E: Little Gray Fry, care to join me for a drink? Look...

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}阁下，你快帮帮塞涅卡！刚才她和我比赛喝、喝蜜酿，结果没几杯就要撑坏了！
E: Oh, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, please help Seneca! She was having a drinking contest with me. W—We were drinking honey brew, but she's about to hit the floor after just a few cups!

C: 如你所见，有她们在身旁，想做的事情越来越多，很难有提笔的闲暇。
E: As you can see, with them by my side, there are more and more things I want to do, and it's hard to find time to pick up the pen.

C: 小飞儿，咱们，赶紧试试！也多谢你啦，小风堇！
E: Little Ciphy, let's try it right away! And thanks to you too, Cinny!

C: 大地兽之王也爱吃红土？
E: Even the Dromas King likes redsoil too?

C: 呵。罢了，清醒的头脑固然重要，但若扫了爱臣们享受宴席的兴致，也是得不偿失。
E: Heh. Oh well. Clarity of mind is important, but to spoil my dear subjects' joy in the feast would be a greater loss still.

C: 值得铭记的东西…小灰鱼是打算把它带去天外之海吗？也好……
E: Something worth remembering... Little Gray Fry, do you plan to take it to the sea beyond the sky? That works too...

C: 很少看到格奈乌斯动怒。
E: It's rare to see Gnaeus lose his temper.

C: 巴特鲁斯，那些计策，吾等也曾想尝试，但时事变转，要全部实现着实困难。
E: Bartholos, we've considered those strategies before, but with how things have changed, implementing them all would be rather difficult.

C: 比如琼鸟剑法，形虎拳。
E: Such as Mignon Starling Swordplay and Tiger Fists.

C: 预选赛都没过的人…
E: You didn't even pass the prelims...

C: 发出「Woooh～」声音。
E: Shout "Woooh."

C: 笨重的电子显示屏。除了用于广告轮播或展示重要信息外，还能让整个洞天看起来充满科技感。
E: It is a bulky electronic display. Besides being used to display advertisements and important announcements, it can make the delve look futuristic.

C: 《更迭》
E: Substitution

C: 嘴硬的药王秘传。
E: A stubborn disciple of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 话糙理不糙，但是下次设置语音秘钥时，请注意你的语言。
E: Harsh words, but logically sound. But please watch your language the next time you set a voice password.

C: *大声地咆哮*<size=28>嘎嘎！</size>
E: *howl loudly* <size=28>Ca-caw ca-caw!</size>

C: 你误会我了伙计，我是说世界这么大，肯定有什么可以震撼心灵的东西！
E: You've got me all wrong, buddy. I'm saying, the world is so big, there must be something that'll blow your mind!

C: 仙舟的物流行业兴盛发达，如同血液中充沛的红细胞奔向这座吞天之舰的各处——而这只箱子正是其中之一。
E: The logistics industry on the Xianzhou thrives, as things are being transferred to all parts of this tremendous ship like the red blood cells in the body; this courier package is one of them.

C: 怎么还有下次？
E: There's a next time?

C: 我只是看看罢了。
E: I'm just here to take a look.

C: 被那把剑砍到可不得了…
E: Getting hit by that sword will be disastrous...

C: 波提欧真的太强了！
E: Boothill is just too strong!

C: 这朵花本因仙舟曜青进行星槎种子研究时偶然得之，现却已成为风靡银河的热销产品，为联盟吸收了大量外汇——花的一生真是不可预料。
E: This flower, which is an unexpected product from a starskiff seed research conducted in the Yaoqing, is selling like hotcakes in the cosmos. They have earned a handsome amount of foreign currencies for the alliance. The life of a flower can be full of surprises.

C: 盟友，星际和平公司
E: Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation

C: 盟友，星际和平公司•总部
E: Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation Headquarters

C: 「婚姻是爱情的坟墓，这我不确定，但它一定是爱好的坟墓。请拣到这些宝藏的好心人善待我这些年的收藏，谢谢。」
E: "Marriage is the tomb of love. I'm not sure about that, but it's the tomb of hobbies. Please, can the kindhearted soul who finds this take care of my earnest collection of treasures? Thank you."

C: 这箱子沉甸甸的，它装着一个成年人破碎的梦。还是留给真爱这些玩意儿的人吧。你默默合上了箱盖。
E: This box is heavy. It contains the broken dreams of an adult. Let's leave it to those who really love this kind of stuff. You silently close the box lid.

C: 转身离开。
E: Turn around and leave.

C: 阅读。
E: Read.

C: 你想逃，可你无处遁逃。空气骤然变冷，一道身影飘过，速度快到在空中留下匹练般的残像。
E: You think of running away, but there is nowhere to go. The temperature in the air drops all of a sudden, as a shadow drifts past at a speed so fast that it only leaves a misty trail.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: ——他们永远也不会知道你是怎么做到的了。
E: They will never know how you pulled off your magic trick.

C: 尽管有很多人聚在你身边，但大部分人还是匆匆走过，去忙他们自己的事。星槎依旧在穹顶之下川流不息，就像平常那样。
E: Although there is a crowd around you, most of the people choose to walk past you to attend to their affairs. As always, there is still an unceasing stream of starskiffs under the dome.

C: 「若是被十王司的人察觉…我…」手中之物如有千斤，你艰难喘息，才不致摔了器皿。
E: "If I get caught by the Ten-Lords Commission... I..." The vessel in your hand feels heavy. You breathe carefully to avoid dropping the vessel.

C: 「没、没什么。」纸盒竭力装作一副若无其事地样子。但剧烈的颤抖出卖了它内里的恐慌。
E: "I—I'm okay." The package tries its best to look fine, but its violent trembling reveals its anxiety.

C: 似乎只是一份没有填写的调查问卷罢了，没什么好看的。
E: It seems to be just an unfilled survey with nothing special about it.

C: 你在快递箱的信息戳上标注了寄件地址，并且预约了鹤运物流的寄件服务。
E: You marked the delivery address on the package and booked for a Heron Express delivery service.

C: <unbreak>11</unbreak>段。
E: <unbreak>11</unbreak> pieces.

C: 「我希望这个实验能彻底打消您的疑虑，相信这一理论的真实性——我们的心灵活动，可以广泛地影响到物质世界。」
E: "I hope that this experiment serves to dispel any doubt and that you will accept our theory — that the activities of our souls and minds can affect the world around us on a large scale."

C: 这箱子里肯定还有东西…
E: There must be something else in this box...

C: 为啥，不是挺安逸的吗？
E: Why, isn't this one quite peaceful?

C: 这跟是不是持明有什么关系？
E: What has that got to do with being a Vidyadhara?

C: 根据十王司冥差的说法，曾经有一个岁阳为了报答救命恩人转世持明，闯入人间。却在显出原形之后，被十王司冥差镇伏在镇妖塔中——后来塔被毁掉了。
E: According to the spiritfarers of the Ten-Lords Commission, there was a heliobus who reincarnated as a Vidyadhara and entered the human world to repay a benefactor for saving its life. However, once it revealed its true form, a Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarer captured and sealed it in a suppression tower, which was later destroyed.

C: 匹诺康尼街边的自助餐车。不知为何总有人试图闯进车厢，看看里面究竟有什么。
E: A roadside self-serve food truck in Penacony. For some reason, people keep trying to barge into the car to see what is inside.

C: 作为匹诺康尼的文化符号，苏乐达几乎可以出现在任何店铺的招牌上，而无需与商品关联——就比如这其实是一家潮玩店。
E: As a cultural symbol of Penacony, SoulGlad can show up on almost any store's sign without any association with its products. For example, this shop is actually a pop gadget store.

C: 你顿时感觉像被微风吹拂。空气中泛着咖啡的焦香，令你嘴里生涎。
E: You instantly feel like you're being blown at by a breeze. The air is tinged with a faint burnt scent of coffee, making your mouth salivate.

C: 「不可以打开盒子！」在指尖即将触碰到礼物盒的那个瞬间，一声孱弱的悲鸣在你脑海中炸响，转瞬即逝。
E: "You can't open this box!" Just as your fingers brush against the present, a frail wail explodes in your mind, and then it is gone.

C: 梯子连接的建筑顶端还没有建造完成，任何踩上去的人都会坠落——或许这就是梯子不能爬的原因。
E: The roof of the building that the ladder is attached to is incomplete. Anyone who steps on it will fall... Perhaps this is the reason why the ladder can't be scaled.

C: 他们在现实里享受着名利带来的所有好处。对于在星间挣扎求生的绝大多数而言，他们早已活在无法触及的梦中。
E: They are happily reaping the benefits of their fame in the real world. For the trillions of souls already struggling for survival in the cosmos, these individuals are already living in a dream.

C: 你看起来挺平静的。
E: You seem pretty calm?

C: 少套近乎，你谁啊
E: Stop pretending you know me. Who are you?

C: 嗯？还有这等好事？
E: Oh? That sounds pretty good.

C: 假的。没有意义。只是骗自己。有什么用……
E: It's fake. Meaningless. You're just lying to yourself. What's the point...

C: 我是你真正的朋友。
E: I am your true friend.

C: 我曾看过许多以此为题材的作品。有时候我觉得祂们和我们没什么不同，只是更加强大而已；有时候我又会觉得祂们是某种不可名状的恐怖、不可窥探的疯狂。
E: I've read many works using this theme as a template. Sometimes I think THEY are not so different from us, just more powerful. And sometimes I think THEY are some undescribable horror, and some unfathomable madness.

C: 在你校准对方情绪的一瞬间，一只呜呜伯突然出现在了眼前。
E: The moment you calibrate the target's mood, a Wubbaboo pops out of nowhere.

C: 你决定听从谛听的指引，毕竟它曾经帮过你不少忙。不巧，你是个懂得感恩的人。
E: You decide to follow the Diting's lead. After all, it has already helped you to no end. As luck would have it, you're someone who understands what gratitude means.

C: 没打算和你杠。
E: I wasn't going to.

C: 不过，如果你经常关注路边的屏幕，应该多少见过我主持的节目。
E: But if you keep an eye out on the roadside billboards, you ought to have come across a few of my shows.

C: 理论上现在是工作时间，不过我没什么活干，就偷着溜出来逛一逛…你可不许告我的状啊。
E: Technically, I'm currently clocked in, but I don't have anything to do, so I sneaked out for a stroll... Don't rat me out.

C: 这次先原谅你的冒犯，下不为例。
E: I'll look past your transgression this time, but not again.

C: 咳哼……
E: *Ahem*...

C: 可惜，你和这里的其他人一样。你们和真正美好的事物离得这么近，却主动选择视而不见，宁愿顺着自己廉价的欲望而活。
E: What a pity, you're just the same as everyone else here. You're oh-so-close to truly beautiful things, but you choose to turn a blind eye — and instead living based on your own cheap desires.

C: 「梦想」在这个时代依旧存在。
E: "Dreams" still exist in this era.

C: 为了它们的梦想，我可算得上鞠躬尽瘁——要是它们的表演不能让我满意，那真就太不识好歹了。
E: I've exhausted every fiber of my body to make their dreams come true — if they were to disappoint me in their performance, they would be ungrateful.

C: 不过不用担心，这套方法是完全符合家族规定的——反正不会动的道具连智械都算不上，根本没有物权。
E: But fret not. This method is fully compliant with The Family regulations. Anyway, immovable items aren't Intellitron, so they basically don't have any rights.

C: 妈妈…爸爸……
E: Mom... Dad...

C: 你该继续等下去。
E: You should keep waiting.

C: 如果再也没法与她见面，或者，或者她讨厌我，不接受我的感情怎么办？
E: What if I never get to see her again? What if she hates me and doesn't accept my love?

C: 你喜欢我们的演出吗——你喜欢他的音乐吗？
E: Did you enjoy our performance? Did you like his music?

C: 你又看见那些金色音符——它们此刻更加灵动张扬、愈发色泽艳丽。
E: Once again, you witness the golden notes, now more dynamic and vibrant than ever.

C: 家主真该让那些人好好认识下猎犬！
E: The head should really have those guys get acquainted with the Bloodhounds!

C: 嗯…据我所知，没有。
E: Hmm... According to what I know, no.

C: 偶尔也稍微安分一下吧，至少先跟我介绍的那个人打打交道——换朋友不要那么频繁嘛。
E: Have some patience and give the person I introduced a chance, okay? Friends aren't something you can just swap out all the time.

C: 唉，说到这个，好久没回罗浮，也不知道阿来阿往那俩小子最近又有什么新鲜段子……
E: *sigh* Speaking of which, it's been a long time since I've gone back to the Luofu. I wonder if Back'n and Forth have come up with any fresh new routines...

C: 你别说，现在没了尾巴，感觉还挺神奇的，哈哈！
E: Well, it feels wondrously strange without a tail, haha!

C: 老袁眺望着远处的天空与高楼，脸上流露出些许惬意的神色。
