E: Yuan gazes at the sky and towering buildings in the distance, a pleasant expression on her face.

C: 我听不出来…
E: I can't tell...

C: 我需要一些时间把它们…取出来。对，从我的小金库里取出来。
E: I need some time to... withdraw them. That's right. To withdraw them from my personal vault.

C: 它有符合人体工程学的流线型座位，像王座一样舒服。它表面喷涂着惰性生物瓷，永远无臭又干净。它与卫生间的墙壁融为一体，毫无卫生死角。
E: It would have an ergonomic, streamlined seat that offers the comfort of a throne. Its surface would be coated with an inert bio-porcelain that is always free of odors and dirt. It would be fused into the bathroom wall to leave no corners for bacteria to thrive.

C: 那双手保养得当、指节修长，起落间漾开黑白分明的薄浪。
E: Well-maintained and adorned with slender knuckles, they flutter and leap, creating waves of black and white.

C: 他似乎格外钟情这段旋律，总在音符起落的间隙，见缝插针地轻哼几句。
E: He seems to have a particular fondness for this melody, occasionally humming a few notes between the rise and fall of his orchestration.

C: 这是匹诺康尼特产——经典苏乐达，您请。
E: Here, a Penacony specialty — Classic SoulGlad, if you please.

C: 欢迎来到匹诺康尼，贵宾。愿您在梦境中度过一段愉快的时光。
E: Welcome to Penacony, esteemed guest. We wish you a pleasant stay in the Dreamscape.

C: 就先到这里吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 这里还有机动球比赛？
E: Wait, they even have Roboball matches here?

C: 哎…也不知道这个赛季结束以后，<unbreak>11</unbreak>号还打不打比赛。听说他的合同被卡了，不能上场不说，连转会也转不出去。没办法，算他倒霉，谁叫他签的是苏乐达队呢？
E: Well... I wonder what's up with No. <unbreak>11</unbreak> for next season. I heard his contract is all tangled up, leaving him unable to play or secure a transfer. What a shame, but it's his own fault for signing with SoulGlad.

C: 呼噜噜噜噜噜~
E: Purrrrrrr...

C: 皮皮西一般不会让别人摸球。
E: Pepeshi rarely allows others to touch their fluff ball.

C: 总而言之，如果您想靠讲故事来获取一份可观的收入，随时欢迎来给爱德华医生讲讲您经历过的梦境！
E: So, if you're interested in sharing your dreams and making a profit, feel free to come here to talk to Dr. Edward about your dreams!

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 贵客，欢迎光临。
E: Welcome, my esteemed customer.

C: 为您服务是我的荣幸。
E: It's an honor to serve you.

C: 梦里又不会感到饥饿…
E: No one gets hungry in a dream...

C: 「我的气味，掩盖不住我的美味。」
E: "I taste so much better than how I smell."

C: 会很贵吗？
E: Is it expensive?

C: 对不起！我好像忘了一件极其重要的事！
E: Sorry, I seem to have overlooked something extremely important!

C: 如需使用，请您预先进入车内，使劲蹬踩脚下的踏板以驱动发电设备，期间不可停止。经计算，当您的蹬踏速度接近快跑时，飞车即可开始正常行驶。
E: To use the system, please enter the vehicle and vigorously pedal the footboard to drive the engine. Based on our estimation, the vehicle will start moving when your pedaling speed approaches a running pace.

C: 去「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」对吧？我们现在就出发！
E: You wish to go to The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand, right? In that case, let us depart right now!

C: 只要把那些金色的——滴答，就叫它「金表钞」吧——只要把那些「金表钞」交给这尊雕像，我在美梦小镇中的声誉和影响力就会提升！
E: By handing those golden banknotes — let's call it Clock Credits — to the statue, I'll become more famous and influential in Dreamville!

C: 嘿嘿，好久没有过这样酣畅淋漓的对话了。
E: Hehe, it's been so long since I've been able to chat to my heart's content like this.

C: 当然，有什么话就说出来吧——我会全盘接受的。
E: Of course. Speak freely. I will gladly receive them all.

C: 他懊恼又自责，几乎要失去活着的勇气。可我除了不痛不痒的安慰以外，什么也给不了他……
E: He was both upset and remorseful, almost to the point where he lost the courage to live. Yet I couldn't do anything more for him, apart from empty words of comfort...

C: 发生甚么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 要不抛个硬币试试？算了，这也太过随便了……
E: How about I just toss a coin? Nah, that's not serious enough...

C: 哈，话虽这么说，其实我的工作性质和「筑梦师」更类似——作为对自身理论的实践，我帮家族设计制作了一些小玩意…比如大街上那些窥梦电话。
E: Having said that, the nature of my work is actually similar to the one of a Dreamweaver. As practical applications of my theories, I've designed some gadgets for The Family... like the Dreampeek Call on the streets.

C: 他是如此的无可替代…假如这梦境能让我永远沉浸在美好的回忆里，也好。
E: He was irreplaceable... It would be great if I could forever immerse myself in those beautiful memories.

C: 我家里基本都是收养的流浪动物。最开始只有两三只，时间一长就多起来了……
E: Most of my pets used to be stray animals. I only had a couple of them in the beginning, and they got more as time went on...

C: 不幸的是，在服务宾客的过程中难免会有情绪堆积。一些美梦剧团因此被侵蚀成了…不那么美妙的样子。
E: Unfortunately, it's inevitable to get frustrated while handling the guests. It's unfortunate that some Sweet Dreams Troupes are corroded as a result and are reduced to... something less sweet.

C: 我不喜欢在旁人面前表现情绪，那会为我的工作带来困扰。这次…是意外。我保证不会有下次了。
E: I do not like to reveal my emotions in public as it will affect my work. This time... this is an accident. It won't happen again.

C: …你看起来像个新面孔，想见识一下我的大宝贝吗？
E: ...You seem to be new in town. Would you like to take a look at this great item that I own?

C: …你先听我说完。当时正好有个钟表小子的皮套演员在和老板聊天，我一听，这不巧了——俩人一个叫沃尔普，一个叫沃尔纳。
E: Listen to the rest of my story first. At that moment, I happened to overhear a Clockie actor talking to his boss and would you believe it... Their names were Wolpe and Warner!

C: 很高兴遇见你，亲爱的朋友，滴答！
E: I'm happy to see you my dear friend, tick-tock!

C: 请记住，我的朋友！无论何时，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
E: Remember, my dear friend! Clockie is here to serve you anytime!

C: 口才真好。
E: That was a great performance.

C: 诶呀，真可惜…不过没关系，如果客人您什么时候想听了，尽管来找我就好。
E: Oh my, that's a shame... But that's okay! If you want to hear what I have to say sometime, just come and find me.

C: 桌上翠鸟身形微晃，仰头发出声清脆的啼鸣；画中红鸟则眉目低垂，音调绵长戚悲——
E: The green bird on the table sways slightly as it raises its head to let out a crisp, clear cry. The red bird in the painting has its brow furrowed as it sings in a low tone of sadness...

C: 家族的机密书架，其中记载了一些不为人知的内事，外人无权翻阅——包括你。
E: The Family's secret bookshelf records certain affairs that are not to be divulged to outsiders, outsiders are not permitted to read these materials... This includes you.

C: 对你来说，我们不过是梦境里随处可见的游荡物品罢了。
E: To you, we're just wandering objects spread all over the Dreamscape.

C: 不过…所有负面情绪都能被轻易消除的话，我这样的梦境鼓励师还有什么用呢？
E: However... if all the negative emotions could be easily erased like this, who would need a Dreamscape Motivator like me anymore?

C: 但对「美梦剧团」而言，情绪能决定它们的本性。它们的生命附属于梦境，不会生病或衰老，不受时间的控制，却会因情绪转变而发生根本变化。
E: However, for the Sweet Dreams Troupe, their emotions determine their very nature. Their lives stem from the Dreamscape, and they won't fall ill or age. However, their essence can change dramatically due to shifts in emotions.

C: 有机会再聊。
E: Let's talk again sometime.

C: 不过我会追上来的，勤奋是逐梦客成功的唯一道路，一直走下去，幸福总会到来。
E: But I'll catch up to you. Working hard is the only path to success for a Dreamchaser. Happiness will find you if you just keep going.

C: 不过在那之前…要再来一局飞行棋吗？还是来尝试一下我最近研究出来的惊梦纸牌？
E: But before that... How about another round of Aero-Chess? Or would you like to have a go at my newly-discovered Dreamjolt Cards?

C: 幻想家人？这种说法可有点冒犯了：布莱茨、施托赫森、洛莲他们只是自愿放弃了肉身而已——他们可是「托斯卡尼乐团」不可或缺的家人！
E: Imaginary family? That's offensive to Blite, Storsen, and Lorraine, who all volunteered to give up their bodies — they're all indispensable family members of the Toskani Orchestra!

C: 让他们看看新时代*交响摇滚*的厉害，让他们好好感受感受《廉价救赎》的含金量！都给我摇起来，燥起来，跟我一起唱——
E: Let's show them the power of modern orchestral rock and prove the worth of Cheap Salvation! Let's get rock and rollin' — everybody sing along with me now...

C: 看看这个世界，简直是无聊透顶——
E: Just look at this world. It's so boring, through and through...

C: 那是个堆满电子废料和快餐盒垃圾的地方，虚拟和现实的界限模糊到快要看不见，涂鸦填满了你能看见的所有墙壁——可到处都是乐趣和冒险。
E: It's a place that's filled with e-waste and used takeout packaging. The line between the real and the virtual is so blurry that it's almost invisible, and graffiti covers every wall as far as the eye can see — yet fun and adventure can be found absolutely everywhere.

C: …嘤嘤嘤？
E: ...*eep, eep*?

C: 出于个人爱好，我时不时会做些海选的攻略，都是些机制的分析和通关技巧的总结。
E: As a hobby I sometimes also help contestants out with their strategies, just mechanical analysis and tips on how to clear each stage.

C: 而评委们的反应着实出乎了我的预料——他们的表现过于真情实感，完全看不出任何黑箱操作的迹象。
E: But the judges' reactions went far beyond my wildest imagination — they were so emotional. I couldn't see any signs at all of black-box tampering.

C: 想稍微搞点节目效果，方案立马就会被家族的人给否决掉！从什么时候开始，匹诺康尼这地方连一点小小的灰色幽默都容不下了？
E: The Family will always veto anyone trying to drop a little drama into their role. And for ages, Penacony has become the kind of place where not even a little gray humor is tolerated.

C: 唉…想当年，我可是以专业第一的成绩从折纸大学的导演研修班毕业的。
E: *sigh*... I remember when I graduated as a valedictorian from the directors' program at Paperfold University.

C: 只要是在节目拍摄期间，我就是说话最好使的人！哪怕是家主亲临片场，也得等这条过了再说！
E: So long as it's during a shoot, whatever I say goes! Even if any family head wanted to drop in, they still have to wait for me!

C: 啊，心情真好…搞得我都想去黄金的时刻玩上两圈了！只可惜拍摄任务太重……
E: Ah, I'm in such a good mood... so much so that I'm down to play a couple rounds in the Golden Hour! Shame I have all these shooting tasks to get done...

C: 家族…家族…他们永远盯着你！
E: The Family... The Family... They're always watching!

C: 你…愿意相信我吗……
E: Will you... believe me?

C: 男人目光涣散，憔悴的脸庞被失了神智的狂喜涂满。
E: The man's eyes are unfocused and his pallid face is covered in the ecstasy of insanity.

C: 呃，您问我？我就是个名不见经传的小漫画家…自娱自乐，画灵异恐怖题材的那种。
E: Oh, me? I'm just a small-time manga artist... I draw horror and supernatural-themed manga for my own entertainment.

C: 你是如何来到流梦礁的？
E: How did you come to the Dreamflux Reef?

C: 说来话长。上次跟你分别之后，我又把线人的东西仔细看了看，还真琢磨出了些许玄机。
E: It's a long story. After we bid farewell the last time, I looked back over the informer's things and uncovered some secrets...

C: 那当然，我超勇的。
E: Of course, we're awesome.

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course I can do that.

C: 您是歌手吗？
E: Are you a singer?

C: 我的师兄师姐里有很多是被调剂来这个专业的，但我是真心喜欢关于「记忆」的世界，我喜欢它澄澈明净的时候，也喜欢它神秘无常、波涛汹涌的时候。
E: Many of my seniors were transferred to this specialization, but I genuinely love the world of "Remembrance." Whether they are transparent and clean or mysterious and unpredictable, I love them all equally.

C: 如今，我又被一个小偷带回到了这里。我看着这座城寨如何抽芽、如何生发，我录了那么多唱片，都是我们一起合奏过的曲子。
E: But then, I was brought back here by some thief. I saw how this city had sprouted and took shape, and I recorded all these vinyl records of the songs we'd once played together.

C: 平时的生意怎么样？
E: How is business normally?

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 在我的宏愿之中，梦境当如此处，应自由地生长，结出美好的果实，长成如诗的仙境，而我会为之倾尽心血。
E: In my grand ambition, a Dreamscape should be as such: Where life is free to blossom into beautiful fruit, into a sanctuary regaled in poems, and I will spare no effort in achieving this.

C: 人当自由、物应平等，梦中的灵魂，也将获得真正的幸福与和平……
E: When freedom and the material are equal to people, the souls in dreams will also earn true happiness and peace...

C: 生命真是太短暂了，与生命相伴的过去真是太脆弱了。丰饶的追随者们用不朽的身体抵御岁月，记忆的追随者们将岁月封录成册，学会的烛墨学者四处求索记录……
E: Life is far too short, and the past that walks shoulder to shoulder with such lives is far too fragile. The followers of Abundance use their timeless corpus to resist time, the followers of Remembrance seal the past into volumes, and the Candelagraphos scholars of the Guild hurry everywhere to seek records...

C: 也许吧。真正的「美」并不面向大众，但总归有人会理解。
E: Perhaps. Although true beauty does not conform to the masses, there will always be people who are able to understand its meaning.

C: 你忙吧，不打扰了。
E: I'll let you get back to your work.

C: …嗯？您好，{F#美丽的小姐}{M#英俊的先生}，很高兴见到您。
E: ...Oh? Greetings, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome sir}. It's a pleasure to meet you.

C: 偶尔，人们都想疯一疯。
E: People might even want to let loose once in a while.

C: 要让未来在他们眼中保持神秘，这样，才能产生不安。
E: An unknowable future breeds uncertainty.

C: 不知道我描述得算不算清楚，但在我看来…单细胞生物无意识的本能，在遥远的时间以前，就已经概括了我们的许多行为，不是吗？
E: I don't know if my description made sense, but the way I see it: This instinct of a single-celled organism from so long ago has become a crude outline of our behavior.

C: 总之，无论那是一种技术，又或一种「伟力」，只要能够溯源而上，这项发现都够了不起的。
E: Anyway, it doesn't matter if it's man-made or by some kind of "force." If we can trace its origins, we still have a remarkable discovery on our hands.

C: 嗯…这确实是美食，你很有品味，说着我都想家了。
E: Hmm, it does sound delicious. Your taste is excellent, and I'm feeling homesick now.

C: 我得…利用这个机会。既然这种规格的旅游项目一般人根本负担不起，那「直播」或许是个思路——要是运气好，说不定我也能靠着这次旅行出名？
E: I need to... really capitalize on this opportunity. Since trips like this aren't affordable to most, live-streaming it could be something novel. Who knows, if I'm lucky, I might even become famous after this journey!

C: 有些观众会去我的社交账号下狂轰滥炸，他们搞不懂为什么我在节目上表现得那么离谱。太正常了，毕竟他们不知道…真人秀说白了也只是一场「秀」。
E: Some fans would bombard my social media, criticizing my outlandish actions on the show. It's expected, really. They're not aware that a reality show, at its core, is still a show.

C: 上节目的人在演戏，配合宣传的媒体也在演戏。所以我一直都得保持清醒，讨生活而已，只要钱到位，什么秀我都能演得演出。
E: Everyone on TV is playing a part, including the media hyping up the show. I constantly remind myself it's all just work. If the pay is right, I'm game for any circus!

C: 我能明白你的感受…因为我和你都是外来者，没办法融入进去……
E: I understand how you feel. We're both outsiders here, struggling to find our footing...

C: 噢对了，我们也算是投缘，那就免费送你一条投资箴言——
E: By the way, since we've gotten along so well, let me offer you a piece of free investment advice:

C: 我不是来投标的。
E: I'm not here about the bidding.

C: 啾——讨厌，不要学人家说话啾！
E: Tweet... Don't be annoying! Stop talking like me, tweet!

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*！
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*!

C: 调饮和弹琴差不多，都是手工活儿，他人在品尝后露出满足的表情就是最大的满足…都是对我指头灵活性与手臂稳定性的认可。
E: Mixing drinks and playing the bass are no different. I work the magic with my hands. What truly makes me happy is the glow of satisfaction on their faces after tasting my drinks... That's all the approval these dexterous digits of mine need.

C: 您想选用哪一套方案呢？
E: Which design would you like?

C: 船长，目前空艇上的各项工作一切正常，偶尔会有些小问题，正在逐一解决——工作嘛，总是有这样那样的挑战。
E: Everything's been going smoothly on the airship, captain. Hiccups crop up every now and then, but we're slowly ironing them all out. What's work without challenges, right?

C: 您选中哪套方案尽管说，新来的船员们正在摩拳擦掌准备为您效力。小家伙们干劲十足，我保证他们会完成得又快又好。
E: Just let me know which design you've selected. The new crew members are all eagerly awaiting your orders. They are all very enthusiastic, so I can assure you that work will be completed swiftly and with high standards.

C: 你尝试用钟表把戏触碰亚梅塞菈的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，她都不为所动。
E: You attempt to rouse emotions from Amsella with Clockwork, but no matter how much the dial moves, she remains unfazed.

C: 年轻的教授嘴角噙着微笑，眼睛里却燃烧着安静的怒火。
E: A smile hung on the young professor's face, but a quiet rage burned in his eyes.

C: 这个怪谈曾是街头巷尾讨论的对象，但不知为何突然销声匿迹了——简直就像这次的「睡蕉小猴」一样。
E: This ghost story was a hot topic on the streets a while ago, but it suddenly went quiet... It's just like the Slumbernana Monkey incident.

C: 而奇怪的是…如此恶劣的事件，知情者却寥寥无几，甚至就连家族也对此不闻不问——至少表面如此。
E: What's even more strange is that... despite the brutality of these attacks, no one seemed to know about them. Even The Family seemed to be completely oblivious... At least that's how it seemed on the surface.

C: …音乐派对的演出结束了，乐器搬走了，乐队成员都散了，我的心也变得空荡荡的了。
E: The music party's performance has ended, the instruments have been moved away, and the band members have all gone their separate ways. My heart is empty now.

C: 要不，还是老老实实找份工作算了吧？
E: Then, should I just forget about it and look for a job?

C: …你还是自己决定吧。
E: ...You best decide for yourself.

C: 我没什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 旋律可不是什么乐器振动，而是灵魂的碰撞！让那个代表来讨论灵魂，就像把美梦剧团当成人那样不可理喻！
E: Melodies aren't just instruments vibrating. They are collisions among souls! Getting that representative to discuss the soul is as absurd as treating the Sweet Dreams Troupe as human beings!

C: 哎，水平太高，名声太大，能力太强…想要退隐都难啊！
E: *sigh* Too skilled, too famous, too capable... Retreating into obscurity would be impossible!

C: 你感受到某种混杂着不甘与无可奈何的情绪安静飘散开来，最终在你的手中凝聚成形。
E: You sense a certain emotion, a convoluted cocktail of reluctance and helplessness, quietly dissipating, eventually taking shape in your hands.

C: 都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久呢。热情和灵感总是会慢慢磨灭，等到了那个时候，我该靠什么来支撑生活？
E: It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure? Passion and inspiration are being slowly ground to dust — when that time comes, what will I rely on to survive?

C: 还有那个什么睡蕉小猴，很多人…包括我，根本就不知道那是什么玩意！但大家就喜欢跟风，哪怕溢价都要买个玩偶回去，好像这是某种身份的象征一样。
E: And the Slumbernana Monkey... Many people, including me, don't even know what that thing is exactly! But everyone likes to chase the hype — they want it even if it means buying at a premium. It was just like as if it were a status symbol.

C: 对啊，不求靠打赏赚钱，主要是想积攒点人气，要当明星，演技和观众缘二者要兼备才行。
E: Yes, I'm not hoping to earn money from tips. It's mainly to build up some popularity. If I want to become a star, I need both solid acting skills and the right attitude towards the audience.

C: 看到这么多人因为我的作品得到满足，我也就没那么迷茫了——今后我一定要有一间自己的甜品店，让更多人因为美味露出笑容，然后、然后…变得和你们一样有名。
E: I'm less confused now, seeing so many people enjoying my work. I'll definitely have to open a dessert shop of my own in the future so that I can put smiles on more people's faces with tasty desserts, and then... become as famous as you all.

C: 没问题，亲爱的无名客。只要您{RUBY_B#咸}闲{RUBY_E#}，我将知无不{RUBY_B#盐}言{RUBY_E#}。
E: No problem, dear Nameless. As long as you are {RUBY_B#idol}idle{RUBY_E#}, I would speak to you as if you were my {RUBY_B#idle}idol{RUBY_E#}.

C: 从他那里收集到的语言和行为数据，使我学会了处世之道。因此，我至今仍对他怀有感激之情。
E: I learned about the world from the languages and behavioral data he collected. Which is why, to this day, I am ever grateful to him.

C: 想和我谈些什么，要坐下慢慢聊么？
E: What's on your mind? Do you want to sit and talk?

C: 在史诗中浅唱的人偶，战争与历史只余文字。
E: A puppet softly singing an epic saga. Wars and history leave only words.

C: 嘿，朋友，偷听可不是什么好习惯。
E: Hey, friend. Eavesdropping is a bad habit to have.

C: 不用担心，梦里的汽水是没有保质期的，况且你也没有在梦里闹肚子的机能。
E: Don't worry, dream-made soft drinks don't have expiry dates, and you won't be able to suffer a stomach ache in the Dreamscapes anyway.

C: 恍惚中所有烦扰云烟霁散，你的灵魂在冷淡的人造光中随这哼唱呼吸起伏，几欲酣眠。
E: In a daze, you feel all your troubles melt away. Your soul's breath undulates with each hum of the song under this cold, artificial light. You almost fall asleep.

C: 看累了，不看了。
E: My eyes are tired. I'm done looking.

C: 它坚称自己是知名电影《空中钢琴师》的主角，只是因为没有后台而被导演换角。如今，它沉默地拒绝一切表演，等待着愿意为它争取克劳克影业头部合约的经纪人出现。
E: It stubbornly proclaims itself to be the protagonist of the famous movie Airborne Pianist, and its role was changed by the director because of its lack of backing. Now, it silently refuses all performances as a form of protest, waiting for an agent who would help it clinch a top Clock Studios contract.

C: 这些扑满似乎在泳池里开了一场派对，为旁观者带来好运。
E: These trotters appear to be throwing a party by the pool, bequeathing luck upon their spectators.

C: 但你忽然意识到了有哪里不对，你下意识地摸了摸口袋，小脸顿时涨得通红——
E: However, you suddenly notice that something is amiss. You subconsciously touch your pocket, and a flush instantly blossoms across your face.

C: 是知更鸟的演唱会！
E: It's Robin's concert!

C: 读者可是我们的衣食父母，小心一点总没错的。
E: Our readers pay our bills. No harm in being careful.

C: 这还不简单？我没考上好学校，干脆就去玩说唱了。
E: Easy! I didn't make it into any famous school, so I just started doing rap.

C: 懂、懂什么？
E: U—Understand what?

C: 梦里你还要喝零糖？！
E: You drink zero-sugar even in your dream!?

C: 艺术的来源是什么？
E: Where does art come from?

C: 这人怕不是个变态吧？
E: They are a pervert, aren't they?

C: 卖完截止，欲购从速！
E: Grab a can for yourself now!

C: 你买了这么多东西啊？！
E: What!? You bought so much stuff?

C: 卫生不啊…
E: Do you have hygienic issues...?

C: 这可真是个大家伙…
E: Now that's a big one...

C: 影城的人流量很大。
E: The theme park sees a lot of footfalls.

C: 有事就去问左边那个。
E: If you have a problem go ask them on the left.

C: 是怎么变成这样的…
E: How did it end up like this...

C: 没事，反正是在梦里…
E: It's fine, we're in a dream...

C: 得用内置摄像记录下来。
E: I have to record this on my built-in camera.

C: 当然是伟大的、迷人的哈努兄弟——的立牌！
E: Of course it is the great and mesmerizing Hanu's... character stand!

C: 我想我没法拒绝，是吗？
E: I imagine I have no right to refuse, correct?

C: …什么玩意？
E: ...What is that thing?

C: 这块有点老化了…
E: This one's a bit worn out...

C: 快让我离开…
E: Let me leave...

C: 额…您是不是按错了什么，把海选切成往届的录播了？
E: Err... Did you hit something wrong and switch the auditions to a recording of the previous season?

C: 欢迎来到热砂分会场！
E: Welcome to Scorchsand Hall!

C: 本届海选的顶流组合…
E: The most anticipated pair of this festival's auditions...

C: 老牌代表队的发挥都很稳定。
E: The veteran teams' performance has been steady so far.

C: 嘘，别吵别吵。他们不是在整理了嘛，安静点，让我再睡会儿……
E: Shh, stop kicking up a fuss. They're tidying it up now, aren't they? Pipe down and let me sleep a little longer...

C: 等等，我该不会还在做梦吧……
E: Hold on. I can't still be dreaming, can I...

C: 我很抱歉，您的好意我们心领了。但他只想留在船上，谁也劝不动。
E: I'm sorry. We appreciate your concern. It's just that he only wishes to stay on the ship. No one can convince him otherwise.

C: 诶？什么神秘地点？
E: Huh? What mystery location?

C: 但仓促之间，把他们逼急了反而会出岔子…所以我觉得，家族未必会接受。
E: But in urgent times, something could go wrong if they were riled up... I think the Family may not accept the terms.

C: 匹诺康尼~
E: Penacony!

C: 这个月投资回报如何？
E: How's the return on this month's investment?

C: 匹诺康尼~
E: Penacony!

C: 公司高层都到了？
E: The IPC's top brass are here?

C: 无论如何，这是你短暂的校园生活中最为美好的回忆，值得反复回味。
E: No matter what, this was the most treasured memory of your school stint — a scene worth reminiscing on.

C: 开拓者成为了「开拓学科」的研究者，也就变得不再「开拓」了。但至少，你收获了稳稳的幸福。
E: If a Trailblazer becomes a researcher for Trailblazing, they won't be Trailblazing anymore. At the very least, you have acquired safe and stable happiness.

C: 顺着说话者的视线望过去，你见到的是……
E: Following the speaker's line of sight, you see...

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 随后，一股焦糊味充满了你的鼻腔。恭喜！你的好奇心击溃了灯泡的承载能力，报修单将是你对它最后的判词。
E: Then, a burnt smell fills your nostrils. Congratulations! Your curiosity has overwhelmed the lightbulb's capacity, and the repair ticket will be your final verdict on this mechanism.

C: 由于星际和平公司的版权限制，此处无法向你展示实机游玩画面。你自己脑补一下好了。
E: Due to copyright restrictions from Interastral Peace Corporation, we cannot show you actual gameplay footage here. You'll have to imagine it yourself.

C: 它曾刺穿过你的胸膛，因此成了你最贴心的好友。
E: It once pierced your chest, which is why it became your bosom friend.

C: 你想起了在垃圾桶王国的冒险奇旅，想起了并肩作战的伙伴们。
E: You recall the adventurous journey in the Trashcan Kingdom and think of your comrades who fought alongside you.

C: 不准偷玩电脑。
E: No playing with the computer.

C: 聆听星宿之声
E: Listen to the Voice of Constellation

C: 黄金裔陶罐是什么？
E: What is a "Chrysos Heir dolium"?

C: 我挨个征得过他们的同意，我一度想放弃时，还是他们中的某位大人开导我不要为拥抱商业性而内疚自责。
E: I secured permission from each heir individually. Even when I had doubts about commercializing them, one wise heir actually reassured me not to feel guilty.

C: 可…可不兴这么说，传出去以为我透露客户隐私了。
E: Please... don't say anything like that. If that gets out, people might think I've breached my customers' privacy.

C: 我记得表妹和我年纪相仿吧，你怎么不给她介绍？哦，我知道了，怕不是她的「品相」不够好，人家瞧不上。
E: What about my cousin, who's the same age as me? Why didn't you introduce her instead? Let me guess... it's because her appearance doesn't meet his "standards," right?

C: 我就知道你们这些本地人根本瞧不上外邦的流民！假惺惺地做给谁看呢？什么奥赫玛文化传统，我看被历史淘汰的糟粕还差不多！
E: I knew you locals wouldn't treat us outlanders with respect! Who are you trying to impress? Talking about Okhema's culture and history? Hah, sounds more like trash destined to be forgotten by time!

C: 唯有美食与文化不可亵渎…请不要再出现在这家店了，不然后果自负……
E: Food and culture must be respected... Please don't ever show up in my place again, or you'll do it at your own risk...

C: 刚才那家伙可真没礼貌！
E: That guy was terribly rude!

C: 没什么想吃的。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 嗷，呜呜嗷。
E: Awoo, awoo awoo.

C: …什么是本我，自我，超我？
E: ...What id, ego, and superego?

C: 危险肯定是有的，但那小姑娘的能力你又不是不知道，就算真遇上什么发疯的泰坦眷属，想全身而退也不难吧。
E: There are always dangers, but you know how skilled she is, right? Even if she bumps into some wild Titankins, she can probably finagle her way out unscathed.

C: 饿了，有什么吃的吗？
E: I'm starving. Got anything to eat?

C: 我入会！
E: I'll join up!

C: 虽然不知道「领受神谕时的体验」是不是和公司商品一样的常见噱头，但浴盐本身的品质就已经让它物有所值了——只要没有面前这坨会说话的雾。
E: You don't know if an "experience akin to when the prophecy was bestowed" is another one of those gimmicky slogans similar to the commercial spam, but the quality of the bath salts itself proves their worth — if not for the talking mist in front of you.

C: 奥赫玛敞亮的天光里，随处可见你身影
E: Your form is seen everywhere within the divine light of Okhema

C: 我能理解奥赫玛人对尼卡多利的嫌怨，但我也希望你明白，尼卡多利给予翁法罗斯的不止痛苦与恐惧。
E: I can understand the Okhemans' grudge against Nikador. However, I do hope that you will understand that Nikador has gifted more than just suffering and fear to Amphoreus.

C: 奥赫玛所有的藏书我都已经读过，其中尤其偏爱历史与文学。我自己最喜欢的一则故事讲的是公主变成巨龙……
E: I have read all of the books in the Okhema archives. I prefer books on history and culture. My favorite story is about a princess that becomes a dragon...

C: 因此我被奉为「督战圣女」——哀地里亚人在战场上牺牲的将士，将由我赋以独属于死者的抚慰与尊严。
E: So, I was revered as the "Maiden of War"... Only I could grant the deceased Aidonian warriors the comfort and respect that they deserve.

C: …详细说说？
E: ...Do you want to tell me more about it?

C: 你注意到水晶杯上有流光闪过，不知是水晶表面的光芒折射，亦或者饮料本身的奇异之处。
E: You see a flash of light bounce off of the surface of the crystal chalice. You cannot tell if it was light refracting off of the surface of the crystal, or whether there is something unusual about the drink itself.

C: 哦，别在意。这是...法吉娜的祝福！每次演讲前，我都需要这个仪式。你懂的，讨个好彩头。
E: Oh, don't worry about that. It is... a blessing of Phagousa! I have to do this little ritual before every speech I do. You understand, for good luck.

C: 这饮料这么神奇？
E: Is this drink that special?

C: 只有喝下它，我才有勇气四处开巡回演讲。哎…虽然它喝起来无色无味，但这它的神奇毋庸置疑。
E: Drinking it is the only thing that grants me the courage to go on tour with my speeches. Ah... Though it may seem unremarkable when you taste it, its magic is undeniable.

C: 从总体来说，奥赫玛是一个充满机遇的城市。在这里，每个人都有自己的生活之道。
E: Generally speaking, Okhema is a city that is bursting with opportunity. Here, everyone has their own ways of life.

C: 好好好，慢走不送，有空可以多来陪老婆子我唠唠嗑啊~
E: Yes, yes, the exit's that way. If you're free, stop by and keep an old gal company with some gossip, alright~

C: 怎么样…您要是感兴趣，我们可以找个僻静的地方验货——这里人多眼杂，我怕东西被抢。
E: What do you say... If you're interested, we can find some place quiet to inspect the wares... There are too many people around here, and I'm worried about getting mugged.

C: 原来如此，我就说你穿着打扮不像本地人。
E: I see. I was wondering why you aren't dressed up like a local.

C: …应该不会吧？反正不太像是咱有生之年里会发生的事！
E: ...That wouldn't happen, would it? Not in my lifetime, at least!

C: <size=36>啊~极乐！真乃极乐！</size>
E: <size=36>Ahh absolute bliss! 'Tis the pinnacle of bliss!</size>

C: 黄金裔的武器都由你打造吗？
E: You crafted all the Chrysos Heirs' weapons?

C: 稍微讲两句就行！
E: Just for a bit!

C: 门扉时的海水清新如鲜果，明晰时饱含花香，践行时如燧石，离愁时最干涩，幕匿时又有回甘。
E: Seawater collected during the Entry Hour tastes like fresh fruit, Lucid Hour's has floral notes, and the Action Hour tastes like flint. Seawater during the Parting Hour tastes the driest, but the Curtain-Fall Hour has a lingering sweetness.

C: 你捧着瓶身，小心翼翼尝了一口……
E: You lift the bottle and cautiously take a sip...

C: 我来到奥赫玛也有些时日了。如今我不再受传谕职责所囿，可以用预言替居民们解决生活上的小麻烦。
E: I have arrived in Okhema for some time now. I am not bound by the duty to deliver prophecies any longer, so I use them to help citizens resolve what little troubles they encounter in daily life.

C: 希望您不要误会，缇宝大人是个很好的人。只是…我与她们至今仍不知道该如何面对彼此。
E: I hope you won't misunderstand, for Lady Tribbie is a very kind person. It is just... I don't know how to face them, even after all this time.

C: 你听见一阵轻柔的天外之声，像是有人摇动了用花瓣与雨滴做成的风铃。
E: You hear a gentle, celestial sound, like someone shaking chimes made of petals and raindrops.

C: 我在刻法勒的脚下从门扉时蹲守到幕匿时，滴水未进，也没将视线移开过哪怕分毫，终于…终于让我发现了「黎明机器」的秘密！
E: I've been stationed at the base of Kephale from Entry Hour to Curtain-Fall Hour, fasting and unblinking, until at last... I've unraveled the mysteries of the Dawn Device!

C: 拜托，四次了，这个大块头怎么一点反应都没有？
E: Come on, this is the fourth attempt, and this big guy still hasn't reacted?

C: 塔兰顿的神殿，这里没有。有祭司，一半难找，一半渎职。
E: Temple of Talanton, don't exist here. Priests, hard to find, or corrupt.

C: 所以是为何呢？跳过全部推导过程，直接否认结果，这样的质疑怕是构不成你的驳论。
E: And for what reason? I fear that circumventing the process of deduction and directly refuting my conclusion do not, in fact, constitute a rebuttal.

C: 抛开事实不谈，你的论证方式本身就有问题。想要证明某个事物存在，只用找到一个证据就够了，即便现在没有，也无法否认未来可能会出现。
E: Putting the facts aside, your method of proof itself is flawed. If you wish to prove the existence of something, you only need a single piece of evidence. Even if that evidence is not presently available, you cannot deny that it could appear at some point in the future.

C: 无论作何解释，时空都不能成为否定事物存在的理由。
E: No matter which explanation you choose, space-time cannot serve as a reason to deny the existence of something.

C: 虽然我看不到常人眼中的湛蓝色的穹顶，但我能感受到它…对我来说，那是一种...深沉而柔和的灰色。宁静，又带着一丝神秘。
E: Though I can't see the azure dome like others, I can feel it... To me, it appears as a deep, gentle gray — calm and subtly mysterious.

C: 人能吃吗？
E: Can humans eat it?

C: 嘿嘿，实话说，小时候，我被大地兽救过一命，那之后就一直在想着能当个饲养员，改善改善它们的待遇。现在算是如愿以偿了。
E: Heh, well, to be honest, when I was a kid, a dromas saved my life. Ever since, I've wanted to be a caretaker and make things better for them. Now, I've finally made that dream come true.

C: 唔！你的这份迟钝…这份厚脸皮…真令人羡慕。
E: Hmph! Your obliviousness... your shamelessness... how enviable.

C: 想问什么就说吧，别在我伤口上撒盐就好……
E: Feel free to ask whatever you want. Just don't rub salt into my wounds...

C: 不可能，我就是黄金裔！况且，自我决心踏上这条道路，我便无所畏惧，就像神话中真正的英雄一样。我一定会拯救奥赫玛的诸位……
E: No way. I am a Chrysos Heir! Plus, I have decided to take this path for myself. So, I have no fear! Just like those heroes in the myths! I will save everyone in Okhema...

C: 不多打扰了。
E: I won't disturb you any longer.

C: 「生命树种」记录着古生物的信息。起初学者们培育树种，是希望复活已灭绝的生物，但最终得到的结果，却是这样混合了诸多特征的奇特动物。
E: Prehistoric creature information is recorded in the Seed of Life. Initially, scholars grew these seeds in hopes of restoring extinct creatures, but the end result was this wondrous animal — a creature of myriad characteristics.

C: 只是……
E: It's just...

C: 你可能听说过，为了复现那些在黑潮中灭绝的生物，我们在奥赫玛建立了这座花园，用于培育「生命树种」——某种记录着生命信息的物质。
E: You may have heard about the project. We're trying to revive creatures that went extinct from the black tide's destruction by building the Garden in Okhema and sowing the Seed of Life, which have information about life recorded in them.

C: 只要大家喜欢奇美拉，我们的研究…也算是歪打正着吧。
E: As long as everyone likes the chimeras, our research... will at least be progressing on a right path.

C: 你这买卖合法吗？
E: You got a license for this?

C: 怎么，你也想当卫兵？听我一句劝——再理想的工作，时间长了也会让人生厌。
E: Why, you want to be a guard too? Here's a word of advice: Even the most ideal of jobs will become a grind after a while.

C: 好吧，那也没办法。但要是有兴趣的话，可以随时来找我聊天。
E: Alright, that's that then. But if you're ever interested, you can stop by here for a chat with me.

C: 咳咳，从我目前的语音模块工艺水平来看，我建议你没事不要启动这个功能。
E: Cough, considering the current state of my voice production module, I'd advise against using this feature unless absolutely necessary.

C: 好了，我得更新下数据，根据你的情况做点个性化调整。你有需要的话再喊我吧。
E: Alright, I need to refresh the data and tweak some settings tailored to your needs. Just give me a shout if you need anything.

C: 老歌德想向你取消正当权益会社的委托工作，具体原因你还是听他自个儿说吧：「{NICKNAME}，谢谢你对我们会社的倾力相助，只可惜…公司和贝洛伯格有一些产业合作，提供了不少就业岗位，部分社员为了多赚钱，推翻了自己从前的理念。」
E: Old Goethe is looking to terminate his assignment with The Rightful Rights Society. He explains it best himself: "{NICKNAME}, I deeply appreciate all the support you've given our organization, unfortunately... the IPC has entered into several industrial partnerships with Belobog, creating many job opportunities. Sadly, this has caused some of our members to abandon their initial ideals for financial gains."

C: 啊？！请、请等等啊，祭司大人……
E: Huh!? P—Please wait, Lord Priest...

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 呵！坊间遍是这两尊泰坦厮混的野史，一个是木头脑袋，另一个因爱失智，实在上不了台面。
E: Hah! Everyone has heard the stories of these two Titans and their frolicking. One of their brains is as dense as wood, and the other is blinded by love. They have no place on the stage of Titans.

C: 塔拉萨波利斯的贵客，切勿心急，我们还尚未向命运泰坦们求取神谕。
E: Esteemed guest from Thalassopolis, please be patient. We are still yet to consult the Fate Titans for your prophecy.

C: 毕竟这里的路挺复杂，神殿里还有很多地方是禁止入内的，刚来的时候容易走丢，万一惹上什么麻烦就不好了。
E: Given the complexity of the paths here, and with many areas being off-limits, it's easy for newcomers to get lost, which could lead to trouble.

C: 一起去树庭的时候。
E: When we went to the Grove together.

C: 在缇宝大人她们传布了救世的神谕后，塞涅俄丝可是第一个响应号召、击败泰坦的黄金裔哦。
E: When Lady Tribbie spread the prophecy of salvation, Seliose was the first Chrysos Heir to answer their call and defeated a Titan.

C: 缇宝…没想到她还有那样的过去。
E: Tribbie... I didn't expect her to have such a past.

C: …我没有要赔偿。
E: ...I'm not asking for reparations.

C: 怎么样，救救黎明云崖的年轻人，和我聊一会吧？
E: How about it? Save a fellow youth from the Dawncloud and chat with me for a while?

C: 先不聊了，我还有事。
E: Let's talk later. I've got things to do.

C: 但是在这个黑潮泛滥的时代，已经有很多观众不再欢迎爱情剧；面对这样的市场挑战，这个剧作家就必须真正理解观众为什么「不再欢迎爱情剧」。
E: In this age consumed by the black tide, many audiences have lost interest in love stories. For this playwright, the real challenge isn't just writing — they must understand why people have turned away from romance.

C: 讲讲立下战功的英雄…
E: The heroes in war...

C: 铭文写给在奥莱诺斯战役中阵亡之人：
E: This passage is dedicated to those who perished in the Battle of Oleinus:

C: 在这里，即使是最绝望的人，也能找到一丝希望。我见过太多徘徊在生死边缘的灵魂，最终都在刻法勒的见证下重获新生。
E: Here, even the most hopeless soul can find a sliver of hope. I've seen many spirits teetering on the edge of life and death, only to be reborn under Kephale's guidance.

C: 「迷途者」？
E: The lost?

C: 从那以后，我就决定用余生回报它的恩典。虽然…它已经很久没有回应过我的祷告了，说来惭愧，有时连我自己也会感到动摇。
E: Since then, I dedicated the rest of my life to repaying their benevolence, even if it's been long since they last answered my prayers... I'm ashamed to say that sometimes, even I waver.

C: 你看起来很有信心…不过越是寻常之事，就越是不能怠慢。
E: You seem confident... However, the more ordinary the task, the more diligent one should be.

C: 你回去之后，坚持每日敬拜泰坦，对你绝对有好处。记住，唯有虔诚的信徒，才配得上神明的眷顾。
E: When you return, make sure to venerate the Titan daily. It will surely benefit you. Remember, only the devout are worthy of divine favor.

C: 衣匠怎么还在追我！
E: Why is the garmentmaker still chasing me!?

C: 贵客指的应该是亡语蝶？它们并非浪漫的信徒，而是塞纳托斯引渡亡魂的使者。
E: You must be referring to the Eulogistic Butterflies? They are not believers of Romance but messengers of Thanatos, guiding souls to the afterlife.

C: 再见…别忘了回来。
E: Goodbye... Don't forget to come back.

C: 如贵客所愿，我去同若虫们商量一下。
E: As you wish. I'll go discuss it with the nymphs.

C: 如今于圣城中肆虐的战火，较之我幼时在雅努萨波利斯所经历的更加凶暴。
E: The battles currently raging in the city are far more violent than what I experienced as a child in Janusopolis.

C: 如果说海浪是世界最初的乐声，那么用哭泣为世界的终点伴奏，未免太过残忍。
E: If ocean waves were the world's first music, it would be too cruel to accompany the world's end with nothing but weeping.

C: 虚妄的希望是一种毒药。事到如今，我已经不敢期待太多。
E: Empty hope is poisonous. At this point, I dare not expect too much.

C: （继续聆听演奏）
E: (Keep listening)

C: 客人你好——啊，抱歉，称呼习惯了，一时间改不过来。
E: Greetings, guest... ah, apologies, I'm so used to saying that, I couldn't change it in time.

C: 瞧啊，人类最后的庇护所，如今再也庇护不了任何人喽。这样一出大戏，饶是扎格列斯本尊见了，都得赞不绝口吧？
E: Behold — humanity's last sanctuary now shelters none. Even Zagreus would applaud this magnificent spectacle, don't you think?

C: 你对再创世了解多少？
E: What do you know of the Era Nova?

C: 随机的？
E: Or just by random chance?

C: 无论是前往新的世界，还是任由{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}用手遮住我们的双眼，无论怎么样都好……
E: Whether we journey to a new world or {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} draws his hands over our eyes... anything would be better than this endless fight...

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么还在这儿闲逛，不会是…放心不下我吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, still hanging around? Don't tell me.... you're worried about me?

C: 瞧我，等到了新世界，我得先去找那刻夏老师重新拜个师，要是他答应，那我可就成了泰坦的学生了！哈哈，再要找工作岂不是平步青云！
E: When we get to the new world, the first thing I'm going to do is find Professor Anaxa and beg him to take me as his disciple again. If he agrees, I'll be a student of a Titan! Haha, finding a job after that would be smooth sailing!

C: 阿格莱雅大人…她一直想留下些不会被黑潮冲刷的东西，就像把字刻在石头上。哪怕我们无法战胜黑潮，也不该让存在的证明就此消失。
E: Lady Aglaea... she always wanted to leave something that the black tide couldn't wash away, like carving words into stone. Even if we couldn't defeat the black tide, we shouldn't let proof of our existence disappear.

C: 嗯…有位织者自诩博古通今。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的休息室内</color>锐评一位学者的演讲，你可以去指教一二。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who prides on being knowledgeable and insightful. The golden thread brings tidings: They now offer critiques on a scholar's speech <color=#dbc291ff>in the lounge of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you could pick up a few pointers there.

C: 嗯…有位织者热衷于在洗浴中温养身体。金丝带来消息，它正泡在<color=#dbc291ff>一处黄金池中</color>，去问问它体验如何吧。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who loved nourishing their body in baths. The golden threads brought news, it's currently soaking in <color=#dbc291ff>a golden pond</color>. Go ask how the experience is.

C: 嗯…有位织者个性急躁。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>井道顶端</color>，对着迟来的悬台大动肝火呢。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver with an impatient temperament. The golden threads brought news, it's at the <color=#dbc291ff>top of the lift shaft</color>, fuming over the tardy lift platform.

C: 贵客做得真棒。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Well done, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「击败神机之灵，便可将其驯服。若汝并非巨人，需以神体攥拳。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Defeat the spirit of divine machine, and you shall tame it. If you are no giant, then wield the might of the gods with your fists."</color>

C: 我先去忙了。
E: I've got stuff to take care of. See ya.

C: 没问题！真不知道在外面能见识到什么样的人呢。
E: You got it! I can't help wondering the people I'll meet out there.

C: 你要是真去了。求学时，还是得擦亮眼睛，仔细分辨为好。
E: If you really plan to go, you'll need to keep your eyes sharp. Learn what you can, but be careful to discern what's what.

C: 以后要照顾好自己。
E: Take care of yourself, alright?

C: 白厄哥哥，你说…还要过多久，我们才能变得像你一样厉害呢？
E: Hey, Phainon... how much longer do you think it'll take for us to be as amazing as you?

C: 呵呵。那是很久以前的事了。那时嫩芽尚未长成参天大树，树桩中的年轮仍旧能够数清，迷境也不像这般拥挤。
E: Hehe... that was a long time ago. Back then, saplings had yet to stretch toward the sky. You could still count the rings inside a tree stump. And the Maze wasn't nearly as full as it is today.

C: 不好意思，其实连刺刺球都没有迷。我只是在练习餐厅服务员的礼仪。
E: Sorry, memi. Truth is, we don't even have any Quillorbs. I was just practicing my restaurant service lines.

C: 铃铃铃~
E: Ring, ring, ring~

C: 预言中还提到「风铃」和旋律，也许与这只勾着风铃的若虫相关。
E: The prophecy mentions a "wind chime" and melody too. Perhaps it's related to this nymph carrying a wind chime.

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 至于我…我就是家族十几代来公认最具天赋的战士。率军直取坎帕首府、对阵悬锋贼寇九战七胜，这般荣耀的军功不计其数。
E: As for me... I'm recognized as the most gifted warrior in our family in over a dozen generations. I led the army to seize the capital of Campa, fought nine battles against the Kremnoan bandits and won seven... Such honors and feats are too many to count.

C: 聊聊你的将来吧。
E: Let's talk about your future.

C: 在宇宙那么大的舞台上诵诗，确实很吸引人，但、但也很吓人呀！
E: Reciting poetry on a stage like the universe is intriguing, b—but it's also terrifying!

C: 决定了，我要誊抄它个十几本，逢人就发，凯撒大人的光辉事迹值得被每个人歌颂……
E: I've made a decision. I'm going to copy out a dozen of these and hand them to everyone I meet. The Imperator's glorious deeds deserve to be praised by all...

C: 或许让我稍微沉溺一下，也没关系吧……
E: Maybe it will be okay if I slightly indulge myself a little...

C: 法吉娜无法忍受湛蓝被赤红浸染，便动用神力，将军士们的干戈变作葡萄藤，然后那金紫色的葡萄投入大海——
E: Phagousa could not bear to watch the crimson red overwhelm azure blue, and used their divine power to transform the soldiers' weapons into grape vines. Then, they tossed the golden and purple grapes into the sea.

C: 这就没办法了吼，总之，本狮会备好杯子等着阁下的吼——
E: Can't help it then. Anyway, I'll prepare my cups and wait for you, roar—

C: 道理我都懂，但这和你把水泼我头上有什么关系？
E: I get the theory, but what does any of that have to do with you pouring water on my head?

C: 我非常理解你的心情，但很抱歉，我最近的行程确实已经排满了。
E: I completely understand how you are feeling. But I must apologize, my schedule is completely full.

C: 原来如此，我在故乡的城邦曾是一名戏剧评论家，我对这「大法吉娜节」很感兴趣。
E: So that's how it is. I used to be a theater critic in my homeland, so I am rather interested in this "Festival of Phagousa."

C: 大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
E: Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.

C: 这下可伤脑筋了咕。
E: What a headache, hoot.

C: 今天本该是折纸树林期末测验的日子，没想到这群孩子听到考试，趁老鸟不注意一溜烟全飞走了，咕咕咕。
E: Today was supposed to be Paperfold Woods's final exam day, but once those children heard about the exam, they all fled without a trace while I wasn't looking, hoot hoot.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个在等人的孩子，我猜它和朋友约定在<color=#dbc291ff>某个教室</color>门口相见咕。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's waiting for someone. I'm guessing they have arranged to meet their friend at the entrance of <color=#dbc291ff>some classroom</color>, hoot.

C: 猫头鹰老师张开翅膀，紧紧抱住了他的学生，像是把年幼的孩子们牢牢护在羽翼之下，连同他们襁褓中的美梦……
E: Professor Owl spreads his wings and tightly embraces his dear students, as if protecting the young children within his wings, along with the sweet dreams cradled in their hearts...

C: 别看我是个小孩子，我可是能听懂许多珍稀物种的语言的！
E: You might think I am a kid, but I understand many languages spoken by rare species!

C: 这些是你应该做的工作吗？
E: Are these supposed to be your job?

C: 那我就继续了，如果我有打扰到你，请和我讲哦。
E: I should get back to work. Please let me know if I've interrupted you.

C: 科室与科室之间本就研究方法不同，有些时候发生学术冲突很正常。但总是有人喜欢对人不对事，阴阳怪气不说还跑过来欺负人。
E: Different departments adopt different research methods. Academic conflict is normal. But some people just take things too personally and come harass other people.

C: 不仅如此，研究课题进度汇报也暂停了。这句话意味着什么，不用我多说了吧？
E: Moreover, the research progress report is also suspended. You don't need me to spell it out for you, do you?

C: 你算是问对了人。这空间站里的大多数人，都把目光局限于课题研究，而忽视了这里最多的东西……那就是人！
E: You are asking the right person. Most people on the space station put too much focus on research. As a result, they neglect the most important thing here... People!

C: 跟着丹恒走吧，他会引领你们。
E: Follow Dan Heng, he will guide all of you.

C: 那时候我的身体毫无预兆地抽搐了一下，从树上掉了下来，刚好就避开了那道金光。差点我就没命了喀！
E: My body suddenly twitched without warning and pulled me from the tree, just barely dodging that golden beam. Phew, I almost bit the dust there, crrk!

C: 你偷过什么东西？
E: What have you ever stolen?

C: 嗯…有位织者自矜身份。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>大墓的壁画上</color>，得意洋洋地炫耀呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who is quite proud of its station. The golden thread brings tidings: It's flaunting itself <color=#dbc291ff>on the murals of this great tomb</color>.

C: 嗯…总之，{NICKNAME}放心，我们不会让第欧根娜麻烦您这个大忙人的。
E: Hmm... anyway, {NICKNAME}, don't worry. We won't let Diogena bother a busy person like yourself.

C: 这…爸爸妈妈从小就这样说：悬锋的孩子是与利刃一同降生的，注定要手执利刃，也注定要死在利刃之下。
E: This... My parents always said: Children of Kremnos are born with honed blades, destined to wield the blade, and die by it.

C: 什么意思嘛，难道说你们觉得黑土和黄土在大地兽眼中没有市场？
E: What are you trying to say? That dromas doesn't see any value in blacksoil and yellowsoil?

C: 沿着溪流一直走，是一片平坦的原野……
E: Following along the stream, there's a vast, flat plain...

C: 呜嗡？呜嗡…（怎么样，喜欢吗？…没看清吗？呜呜，太遗憾了…没关系，想看多少遍都可以。）
E: Grumph? Grumph... (Well? Do you like it? ...You didn't catch it? Aw... that's too bad... But it's okay! I can do it as many times as you want!)

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「不许吵不许吵，再吵下去，豹豹就给你们每只豹duangduang来一下，把你们平安送上天堂嗷！」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "Hey! No yelling! One more shout and I'll boink on each of you all the way to heaven!" )∋
o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "(Rage levels rising...)" )∋

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「可恶！幸亏豹的脸本身就红通通，不然，真被你这家伙看到脸红的模样了。」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "Argh! Lucky my face is naturally this red, or else you'd actually see me blush!" )∋

C: 跟我说说，你信不过哪个泰坦？还是说你瞧不起拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄？
E: Now, which Titan's power do you doubt? Or perhaps you question the integrity of the great hero who saved Amphoreus?

C: 恭喜你找到工作了！
E: Congrats on finding a job!

C: 需要提醒才能记住的东西，恐怕本来就没有记住的必要吧？
E: If you need a reminder to remember something, maybe it wasn't worth remembering in the first place, huh?

C: 这么拐弯抹角，不像你的风格。是什么愿望，就直接说吧，{NICKNAME}也在听着。
E: Being so roundabout isn't like you at all. Just tell us what you wish for directly. {NICKNAME} is also listening.

C: 事到如今，在我称你或白厄为「救世主」时，已不再心存调侃或过分沉重的敬意……
E: Now, when I call you or Phainon the "Deliverer," there's no trace of mockery in my words, nor any of that burdensome reverence...

C: 一道懒洋洋的声音从半空传来——
E: A lazy voice drifted down from above.

C: 嗯…有位织者独行于朝圣之旅。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>至高的尖刺上</color>探索光的来向呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is on a solitary pilgrimage. The golden thread brings tidings: They're exploring the source of light on <color=#dbc291ff>the highest spire</color>.

C: 嗯…有位织者智慧卓绝。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>密布文字的黑板前</color>惊叹自身的聪明才智呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver of exceptional wisdom. The golden thread brings tidings: They're admiring their own brilliance in front of a <color=#dbc291ff>densely scribbled blackboard</color>.

C: 来自其余泰坦相关城邦的。
E: The ones from the city-states of the other Titans.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 关于姬子…
E: About Himeko...

C: 顺带一提，命途一旦开启，就无法关闭。即使执掌的星神陨落了，命途仍然开放。这就是我们在阿基维利陨落后仍能穿越星际的原因。
E: I should mention that once a Path is open, it cannot be closed, even with the fall of its Aeon. That is how we are still able to travel across the stars, despite Akivili's passing.

C: 瓦尔特先生似乎很渴望冒险…
E: Mr. Yang seems to crave adventure...

C: 这位朋友如今已经离开列车，希望他能在旅途中找到自己想要寻找的东西。
E: This old friend had already left the Express. I hope he can find what he is looking for on his journey.

C: 矿车工学徒
E: Apprentice Mine Cart Operator

C: 滴、答，我们迷钟的平均工作寿命只有一百三十三年，我还有一百二十九年就要被弃用了，我不想报废啊！
E: Tick, tock, the average working lifespan of us Tickers is only a hundred and thirty-three years. I have another hundred and twenty-nine years before I get scrapped! I don't want to be scrapped!

C: 滴、答，怎么办，怎么办，宾客不搭理我，主管不看好我，今年的业绩又要不达标了，不会被开除吧……
E: Tick, tock, what to do? What to do? The guests ignore me, and my manager disapproves of me. My KPI this year is going to suffer yet again. Will I be fired...?

C: 如果我再坏一点，再强大一点，就不会被家族和宾客欺负了，呜呜呜……
E: If I were more evil, more powerful, I wouldn't be pushed around by The Family and guests, boohoo...

C: 我们的命运从诞生起就被决定了，真是太可悲了，不知道人类是不是也一样……
E: Our destinies have been decided since our birth. An absolute tragedy — I wonder if it's the same for humans...

C: 床单铺在地板上，枕头在天花板上飞，苏乐达的瓶盖已经给您提前打开，气都放好了，保证喝起来没味儿！
E: The bedsheet is on the floor and the pillow is on the ceiling. I've opened the SoulGlad bottle for you in advance to let all the carbonation out. It's bound to be flavorless now!

C: 嗯？有什么事吗，找前台的话，在走廊另一侧…啊！怎么这边也报错了！？
E: Mmm? Are you encountering any problems? Just hit up the front desk down the corridor that way... Ah! What's this error doing here!?

C: 你就是伦纳德？
E: Are you Leonard?

C: 至于短信中提到的《太空大战争》是什么…这个解释起来比较复杂，你还是直接看一眼实物吧。
E: As for the Cosmic Warfare mentioned in the message... That's harder to explain, so it's better if you see it with your own eyes.

C: 「哟，你好啊！屏幕那边正在焦头烂额的朋友。」
E: "Hello there, distressed friend at the computer terminal."

C: 难如登天。
E: Hard as diamonds.

C: 就像你看到的…这是挑衅，她整了个面向全空间站的游戏，还把监控室变成了街机厅。
E: It's just as you've seen... One massive taunt. She's developed a game for the entire space station, turning the monitoring room into an arcade.

C: 我想问别的…
E: I want to ask about something else...

C: 我相信他能妥善处理这件事，维修科也在密切关注，如果还是不放心吧，你就多帮帮他吧。
E: I trust he can handle this properly. The Maintenance Department is keeping a close eye on this one. If you're still worried about him, then give him more support.

C: 不，我是于尔丹派来催稿的。
E: No, Uldan sent me to chase you up.

C: 这是你应得的——回见啦，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！
E: You earned it — seeya later, {F#sister}{M#brother}!

C: 当然可以，这些东西很好地记录了地下矿区的生活与工业技术——开设工业展馆的目的就是为了展示这些。
E: Of course! These form a good record of daily life and industrial technology used in the underground mines. The whole point of opening the Industrial Hall is to showcase exhibits such as these.

C: 我会把它们拿去清理修复一下，不久它们就会出现在展台上了。{NICKNAME}，谢谢你带来的「宝藏」。
E: I'm going to take them for cleaning and restoration. They'll be on display soon enough. {NICKNAME}, thanks for bringing me this "treasure".

C: 这玩意型号太老了，我得好好研究一下…你就先来解决这个吧。
E: This model is way out of date. I need to do some research... You take care of this first.

C: 我明白了。那么，接下来是母亲大人执政后的故事——
E: Got it. So, next up, mother's story after she has taken power...

C: …不，我相信你的判断——让我来组织一下语言吧。
E: ...No, I trust your judgment. Let me try and organize the language.

C: 我确定。
E: I'm sure about it.

C: 我有支持希莉儿的证据。
E: I have evidence that supports Cyrille.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了磐岩镇搏击俱乐部门口的景象。
E: A work of photography that captures the entrance view of Boulder Town's Fight Club.

C: 第五任大守护者阿丽娜•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
E: A portrait of Alina Rand, the fifth Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:

C: 「倘若世上确有能供灵魂安眠的温床，愿她这次合上双眼时能与凄凉的命运彻底诀别；愿她能微笑着进入梦乡。」
E: "If there exists a place in the world where souls can rest peacefully, I hope she will bid farewell to her miserable destiny when she closes her eyes. May she go to sleep with a smile on her face."

C: 主题一：「灾难与星核」。
E: Topic 1: "Calamity and Stellaron."

C: 不过，得等我忙完公务。入夜我会去绥园见你们，这样可以吗？
E: However, you'll have to wait until I'm done with work. I will meet you at Fyxestroll Garden tonight. Is that okay with you?

C: 一路上我分文不取，当然当然，如果你要吃点什么记得带上我就好~
E: I won't charge anything for my services... except for food, of course!

C: 没错，金人巷的各位不必担心，是我去打赌的。
E: That's right, no one else in Aurum Alley needs to worry — it's all on me.

C: 我明明只是来金人巷吃小吃的…没想到会撞上这么多事。
E: *sigh* I only came here for the food... I didn't expect to get tangled up in all this dock leasing stuff.

C: 至此，金人巷商会发出正式请求——请帮助商会摆脱危机，复兴金人巷的繁荣！
E: Aurum Alley Merchant Guild would like to issue a formal request... Please help us emerge from this crisis and revitalize Aurum Alley!

C: 我也不和你一般计较。
E: ...I have no quarrel with you.

C: 不信，你们可以问码头工人。
E: If you don't believe me, just ask the dock workers.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 如果你们提供的证据属实，斯科特先生，这是不正当的商业行为，天舶司会继续调查。
E: If the evidence presented is true, Mr. Skott, then this constitutes improper business practices and the Sky-Faring Commission will conduct a follow-up investigation.

C: 小秘书之前跟我打过招呼啦，让我为你们准备些点心，你先去坐下，我一会就端上来。
E: Miss Secretary asked me to prepare some refreshments for you earlier. Make yourselves comfortable — I'll bring them out shortly.

C: 正好，他们来了。
E: Good, they've arrived.

C: …会长，我希望您理解，我绝不是为了掌控金人巷事务的权力而来。我自小听着会长描绘这儿的繁荣，也想为实现这幅图景努力。只是，现在您的想法和我们有了冲突。
E: ...President, I hope you understand that I am in no way vying for power over Aurum Alley. I have listened to the president's vision of prosperity since I was a child, and I want to work to achieve that vision. But currently, your ideas conflict with ours.

C: 恐怕不是吧……
E: I think we just made him surrender...

C: 会长喜欢用他过去的经验和数据来说事，当然，我们也可以。
E: The president likes to quote past experiences and data. We can do that, too.

C: 想想金人巷停满星际货船的样子，这里会成为享誉银河的商业港口，而不是普通的集市。
E: Imagine cargo ships from all corners of the galaxy docking and departing. This place will be transformed into a renowned commercial port, instead of another run-of-the-mill market.

C: 我每次提的你又不用。
E: But you hated the ones I came up with.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 没错，你们要是想继续「码放货物」和完成「物流规划」，就来码头找我吧。
E: That's right. If you wish to continue with the inventory or logistics planning, come and find me.

C: 我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……
E: I'm a dock worker, after all. How could I conspire with the IPC?

C: 诶，不急不急，我们先谈，我们聊完了再找小秘书也不迟……
E: Hey, no rush. Let's just chat for now, and if we want to link up with the secretary after that, then it'll be fine...

C: 你看，误会了不是？朋友，我这也是正经生意，有照经营……
E: Look, this must be a misunderstanding, right? My friend, I'm just an honorable businessman, with a business license and everything...

C: 码头只要长期合作，不接私活。
E: We're not taking on shady gigs. Legit business only.

C: 来吧，拿回你的「货物」，做完你该做的事。
E: C'mon, take back your "goods" and finish what you were meant to do.

C: 朋友你为了帮助我偷运货物，击退了云骑军，真是太靠谱啦。
E: My friend, you even fought off the Cloud Knights just to help me smuggle some goods. You really are reliable!

C: 而且这招阿姨以前用过呀…水军只给你刷些什么「敏感肌也能用」，搞笑吧？
E: Besides, I did try the method you mentioned... But the bots wrote comments like "Specially made for sensitive skin!" They didn't even bother to customize a bit!

C: 啊，我要一份葱醋鸡、一份月华饭，大碗的。
E: Mmm, I'd like one portion of scallion chicken, and one portion of moonlight rice. Large bowls, please.

C: 辛苦你了，今天的客人很多呢，一个人应付那么多事，肯定很不容易。
E: Thanks for your hard work. There were loads of diners today. It's really hard for one person to do everything you did.

C: 这是两码事，不能混为一谈。
E: These are two separate things. Don't mix them up.

C: 这样吧，我拿着「病假证明」，你扮演「审核病假的卜者」，现在就来对质一番。
E: How about this: I'll take a medical certificate, and you play the role of "sick leave auditor-diviner." C'mon, let's play it out.

C: 这份数据记录了同功坊与码头合作以来的营收变化，以及到店游客数量的变化。
E: This record reflects the change in Artistry Hardware's turnover and the increase in customers since it partnered with the dock.

C: 「美食街」金人巷竞争力十足。
E: The Alley's identity as a "food street" is what makes it so competitive.

C: 垣风老哥真是个靠谱的人。
E: Yuanfeng is indeed a reliable partner.

C: 抱歉抱歉，才到岗几天，业务还不太熟练，下次不会了！
E: I'm sorry. I've only been in this role a few days and I'm not very experienced. I'll do better next time!

C: 你什么意思，我还在休假呢。
E: Back to work? I'm still on vacation.

C: 听见没有，一鸟做事一鸟走，我跟你走——
E: You hear me? Leave my friends alone. I'll go with you...

C: 你打出一记右勾拳，紧接着又是一记左勾拳。
E: You throw out a right hook, closely followed by a left hook.

C: 「羽量级」、「轻量级」、「沉量级」、「中量级」、「重量级」——每个排行榜的积分各自独立计算！
E: Featherweight, lightweight, welterweight, middleweight, and heavyweight... And the score on each board is calculated individually!

C: 那是自然，这些报告可都是很珍贵的，其他人可没有世玲这样的天赋！你不信的话就看看！
E: Yes, of course. These reports are all very valuable. No other researcher is as talented as I am. Just take a look, and you will see.

C: 算了，本来我这个发现也不能让内行的家伙知道…你这外行，倒是正好！
E: Ah well, I don't think my discovery can be told to people on the inside, and you, an outsider, are perfect for it!

C: 这可不是恶作剧那么简单！吓死我了！
E: It's not just a simple prank! It scared me half to death!

C: 双开门的衣柜，里面应该可以容纳很多东西。
E: A double-doored wardrobe, it should be able to contain many things.

C: （打开柜子）
E: (Open the wardrobe)

C: 给予回应的，是熟悉的「颤抖」与特殊的「异响」！
E: All I feel is a familiar "shiver" and some "strange sounds"!

C: （怎么会有扑满躲一半还忘记把鼻子藏起来的啊！）
E: (Why is there a Trotter who hid halfway and forgot to hide its snout!?)

C: （真不知道它还披着雷金的外形，做了什么其他的事情……）
E: (I wonder what else it's done in Regin's name...)

C: 但谁又能知道这是不是它的新把戏？而且它这么胆小，只需稍微恐吓一下，一定会露出破绽……
E: But who knows? This might be a new trick. It's also very timid, so much so that it'll break an otherwise perfect disguise with just a little threat...

C: （继续追问这个人没有什么价值了，不如从小朋友这里找找线索吧。）
E: (There's no value in continuing to ask this person. Might as well look for clues from the children.)

C: 看你的样子还算正常我就放心了。要是你出了啥意外，恐怕铁卫也不会放过我。
E: I'm relieved to see you're doing alright. The Silvermane Guards probably wouldn't let me go if something were to happen to you.

C: 太好了！真希望下次听笑话时你也这么爽快。
E: That's great! I hope you'll be just as delighted the next time you hear a joke.

C: 必须有人从通风口潜入对面半区的储藏室、取得控制监狱系统的秘钥——试问谁会比哈努兄弟更擅长这项任务呢？
E: We need someone to sneak through the vent into the storage room located in the other half of the prison and find the key to the prison system. Obviously, Hanu is the best candidate for this mission.

C: 啾！我才没有被困住，我要继续跟那些坏人干架啾！
E: Tweet! Of course I wasn't trapped! I'll keep fighting those bad guys, tweet!

C: 没问题客人，这就为您接入梦泡内容
E: No problem, my dear. I'll load the dream bubble for you.

C: 滴答？不是骚扰，只是我的机械手不擅长操纵手机……
E: Tick-tock? It's not spam, just that my mechanical hands aren't great for using phones...

C: 刚刚的念头逐渐消散…好险，你差点就要和那些迷钟一样开始发癫了。
E: The previous thoughts are fading away... That was close, you almost went mad like those Dream Tickers.

C: 客人，之前您关于《哈努兄弟越狱记》的体验意见已经反馈给梦泡制作组了——几位筑梦师都非常激动呢。
E: Dear guest, the feedback on your playthrough experience for Hanu's Prison Break has been submitted to the dream bubble producers — several Dreamweavers are very excited!

C: 嗯…？这么突然……
E: Oh...? So sudden...

C: 我们出去拼凑现有的线索吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let's piece together the clues we've got, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 你，进来给我跳舞！
E: Hey, you. Come on inside and dance!

C: 来，先试试吧。别紧张，我会手把手教你的。
E: Come on and try it. Don't be nervous, I'll guide you step by step.

C: 没有摔，没有摔…准确说，是捏。我就稍微用了点力，它就碎了。太脆弱了，这可不行。
E: There was no smashing of any kind... To be more precise, I only pinched it, and it shattered after I applied a little pressure. How fragile.

C: 果然欢喜瞬息即逝、当真悲苦方为永恒——谁能告诉我，啊！既然注定要走向毁灭，如我们这般存在，又为何要降生于这不真切的「美梦」之中……
E: As I thought, it is indeed that happiness is transient while sorrow seems everlasting... Who can tell me... if we are doomed for ruin, why were we brought into this illusory "sweet dream" in the first place...?

C: 放心吧，汽水狗狗永远是你最可靠的伙伴！
E: No worries! Soda Doggo will always be your most reliable partner!

C: 我就说，天天守在那个破酒吧里，简直就是在白白浪费你的才华！
E: As I said, staying at that rundown lounge is a total waste of your talent!

C: 更何况，这种供人娱乐的道具在梦境里要多少有多少，就是群会动的物件而已，它们存在的意义就是为宾客服务，值得费这么多心思去维护？
E: Moreover, they're just animated objects to entertain guests. They can be easily replaced. Is it really worth all this trouble to protect them?

C: …舒翁。对不起汪。
E: Woof... I'm so sorry, Siobhan...

C: 但是…不管你们发狂多少万次，我都会留在这里，帮你们找回自己。
E: But... no matter how much you all flip out here, I will stay here and help you find yourselves.

C: 为了拯救濒临闭店的酒吧，人家可是决定成为偶像了呢。
E: I've even decided to become an idol to save our lounge from closing down.

C: 嗨！这次见到的是…啊！星穹列车的列车长帕姆，好久不见，以及这位是…？
E: Hey! This must be... Conductor Pom-Pom of the Express. It has been a while. And this is...?

C: 还以为是礼物呢，结果又是活…
E: I expected a gift, but it looks like another job...

C: 我会效仿忆庭提取忆质的做法，用你熟悉的情景，熟悉的伙伴，构建起你熟悉的「开拓经历」…以一种更加柔和、更加亲切的方式…
E: I'll mimic the memoria extraction process used by the Garden of Recollection and construct a familiar trailblazing experience using situations and companions you're familiar with... I'll use a kinder and gentler approach...

C: 开始「银河强手棋」的冒险。
E: Start Cosmodyssey.

C: 我做到了我能做的，接下来就要多拜托你啦～
E: I've done all I can do. The rest is up to you~

C: 没有线索的条件下做到这一点，您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You found it without any clues! Surely you're a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You're indeed a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 就、就算这样，我们也绝不会出卖《钟表小子》的，请你离开吧！
E: E—Even so, we'll never sell Clockie. Please see yourself out!

C: 你怎么打扮成这样？
E: Why are you dressed like this?

C: 算了，不细想了，我们耗费巨资雇佣的筑梦师团队很快就会修好这里，用不了多久，您就能看到一个全新的克劳克影视乐园！
E: Let's not dwell on this matter anymore. Our Dreamweaver team, whom we hired with great pay, is going to spruce this place up. You'll see an all-new Clock Studios Theme Park soon!

C: 我是匹诺康尼的英雄。
E: I'm the hero of Penacony.

C: 这部影片的导演是我。
E: I'm the director.

C: 这么多年了…他居然还在坚持最初的决定，真是个老顽固……
E: After all these years... he still stands by his decision right from the start. What a stubborn man...

C: 不…我们遇到的困难不是技术上的，而是理念上的。
E: No... The issue is more ideological than technical.

C: 哈哈，那当然，这套影片可谓是《钟表小子》五百年来最精彩的作品了！
E: Haha, that's for sure. This movie is arguably the best work of Clockie in the past 500 years.

C: 哎呀，宝箱被石头老板的手下包围了，快把他们赶跑吧！
E: Oh no, the chest has been surrounded by Boss Stone's lackeys. Get rid of them quickly!

C: 只是…汽水先生被关在哪里呢？
E: But... where is Mr. Soda being held?

C: 哇咔咔，钟表小子，你和你的剧团朋友们要倒大霉了！
E: Mwahaha, Clockie, you and your troupe friends are about to run out of luck!

C: 加油小助手，我看好你哦？
E: Go for it, trusty assistant. I'm counting on you!

C: 滴答！没了苏乐达的美梦小镇，就像是没了机油的钟表，无法继续转动——
E: Tick-tock! A Dreamville without SoulGlad is like a clock without oil — everything comes to a halt...

C: 「最后，石头老板被赶跑了，美梦小镇恢复了和平，汽水先生则开设了汽水工厂 / 在战场上牺牲了 / 成了新的石头老板！」
E: "In the end, Boss Stone was driven off and peace was restored to Dreamville, and Mr. Soda established a soda factory / perished on the battlefield / became the new Boss Stone!"

C: 圆满的爱情。
E: Wholesome love.

C: 「然而石头老板并没有放弃，他发誓一定要夺回这个原本属于自己的地方。他封锁了小镇的资源，发起激烈的进攻…美梦小镇很快陷入了绝境，镇民们争执不断。」
E: "However, Boss Stone had not yet given up, and vowed to take back this place that once belonged to him. He blocked off the town's resources, and launched a punishing offensive... Dreamville soon fell into desperation and the townsfolk bickered endlessly."

C: 没错，就是这样的。
E: Yes. That's it.

C: 哼，不知道为什么，动画里的哈努兄弟只会发出这一种声音，这倒是给我们省了不少配音成本。
E: Hmph, I don't know why, but Brother Hanu only makes this noise in the animation. It actually saves us lots of money on voice acting.

C: 啾…难道只是他喜欢养鸟吗？
E: Tweet... Could it be that he just likes having pet birds?

C: 好呀啾，您想聊点什么？
E: Alright, tweet. What do you want to talk about?

C: 但他已经很久没有接受过采访了，除了比赛之外，人们也没有见过它…真是奇怪！
E: But the hamster hasn't been interviewed in a very long time, and nobody has seen him outside of any races... How weird!

C: 家人们，看我身后的…
E: Hey, fam, look who's behind me...

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 谁会被这样逗笑啦……
E: You seriously think that would make someone laugh?

C: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
E: <size=36>CUT!</size>

C: 一下子切断连接，还有点不适应……
E: Disconnecting from that thing so suddenly has left me feeling slightly disoriented.

C: 哦？刚才是不是有人提到了「高难度动作」？没错，朋友！接下来的剧情正好充满了各种高难度动作！
E: Oh? Did someone say "high-level moves" just now? That's right, pal! The upcoming script is just exploding with all sorts of high-level shenanigans!

C: 二位选手，祝愿你们与钟表小子共度美好的时光！
E: Contestants, may you have a wonderful time with Clockie!

C: 「时间」的试炼…希望会是轻松快乐、健康阳光的休闲游戏。
E: The test of "time"... I hope it's a happy and positive casual game.

C: 愿苏乐达的甜美常伴你左右，愿你的未来如同苏乐达一般香甜美好！
E: May the sweetness of SoulGlad be with you, and your future be as sweet as SoulGlad!

C: 警告：并非『主角』的演员擅自步入片场，将会沦为无名的『配角』，以不幸为剧目增彩。
E: Warning: Non-protagonist actors who trespass on the scene will be demoted to nameless "supporting characters" and will unfortunately not be given any more scenes.

C: 你是虚构史学家？
E: Are you a History Fictionologist?

C: 祂是执掌「终末」的神明，从未来逆时而行。祂会出现于每个「终末」的瞬间，带来{RUBY_B#往昔的记录}未来的预言{RUBY_E#}。
E: THEY are the god of Finality, traveling against time from the future. THEY appear at every moment of Finality, bringing {RUBY_B#records of the past}prophecies of the future{RUBY_E#}.

C: 那你说，我不是游客，我是什么，仙舟的囚犯吗？
E: Yeah, what else would I be? The Xianzhou's prisoner?

C: 没事没事，无论有没有本事，遇到不平事，咱都得管一管的，实在见不得他仗势欺人。
E: Don't worry! I can't stand by and watch someone be bullied. I have to stand up against injustice, no matter what!

C: 那你就谨记于心，好好学剑吧。
E: Then keep that fire burning and learn with all your heart.

C: 下次表扬下次的，这次表扬这次的，不许赊账。
E: No saving allowed! Let's keep it relevant: This time's for now, next time's for later. No IOUs on praise!

C: 那你能赶上约定之日的决斗吗？
E: Will you be ready for the final showdown?

C: 也许，我们还有别的致胜法…
E: Maybe there's another method we can use...

C: 哼，本姑娘没有躲没有藏，你下了战帖，我就前来应战。
E: Hmph, I'm not hiding or backing down. You challenged me, and I'm here to accept it.

C: 妾身曾接诊过一名患者，此人与人决斗前服用该药，打完了架才发现…他已经只剩下上半身了……
E: I had a patient who took some before a fight, only to realize that afterwards... his lower body was missing...

C: 卑鄙的仙舟人！
E: Those vile Xianzhou scoundrels!

C: 我那是不敢来吗？我那是给你一个反悔的机会！没想到你不但没逃走，竟然还敢在这里叫嚣！
E: Too chicken? I was giving you the chance to back out! But you're actually insulting me now, you cheeky...

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 没错，你可以去太卜司里打听打听我的名号。
E: Yep, you're welcome to check out my credentials in the Divination Commission.

C: 够、够了——！你闭嘴，你又怎么会理解我！别说的自己好像什么都清楚一样！
E: E—Enough! Shut up! What do you know about me!? Don't act like you know everything!

C: 当、当然有关系…了！
E: O—Of course it has something to do with me...!

C: 梦茗小姑娘不也是你吗？你辛辛苦苦做好自己的事，被没事找事的领导推翻桌子，打碎茶杯，还说你没有给他「五彩斑斓的黑」，你能受得了吗？
E: What makes you so different from her? How would you feel if you worked so hard to create something, only to have your boss wreck it and overwhelm you with unreasonable demands?

C: 所以阿休是什么样子的？
E: So what does A-Xiu look like?

C: 既然你们向老夫展示了我笃定的「不可能」，为了你们，老夫也应该再试一试。
E: Witnessing what you all have achieved and how you showed me what I once deemed "impossible" has prompted me to try again — for the sake of all of you.

C: 你上班有工资，我们没有…
E: You get paid to work. We don't...

C: 你看看《却邪剑谱》卷首语，是不是写着什么「欲练此功，引刀自戕」？
E: Take a look at what it says at the beginning of this Demon-Binding Blade Technique. Does it say something like "If you wish to master this art, you must use your blade to take your own life"?

C: 没错，这是什么意思呢？
E: It does, what does that mean?

C: 三月小姐，你还记得我们聊过的幻戏故事吧？这些故事总是「福祸相依」，用后来的「幸福」来弥补之前的「不幸」，就好像可以「正负为零」一样。
E: Miss March. You remember the immersia stories that we talked about before, don't you? These stories are always "a combination of blessings and tragedy," using "happiness" in later life to make up for "misfortune" that was experienced previously. It's like adding a positive to a negative to return to zero.

C: 你应该不会主张要用这些垃圾桶的形象收费吧，我只是个穷学生，没那么多钱。
E: You're not planning on charging for the use of these trashcans' images, are you? I'm a student. I really don't have much money...

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了{NICKNAME}的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains {NICKNAME}'s Magic of Friendship.

C: 我还给这动画…写过一点同人文，没想到这种魔法竟然真的存在！
E: I actually... wrote a few fanfics about this anime, too. I never imagined that this kind of magic really existed!

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了佩拉的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains Pela's Magic of Friendship.

C: 还有宝力先生，也让你费心了…谢谢你能把贝洛伯格的安危放在心上。
E: I'd like to thank you for all your effort too, Mr. Pony... Thank you for thinking of Belobog's safety.

C: 因为…因为…因为我赢得了比赛资格？
E: Because... Because... Because I was qualified to participate?

C: （那不是卢卡吗？他怎么跑到罗浮来了？）
E: (Isn't that Luka? Why is he here on the Luofu?)

C: 不必担心，这些都是领导给我的历练！只要这次我能拍到足够震撼人心的节目素材，今年一定可以顺利转正！
E: It'll be fine. It's just my boss trying to mentor me! As long as I get some shots that'll shock and awe, I'm sure I'll be able to clinch a full-time job this year!

C: 我理解你，卢卡选手，我也吃不惯仙舟的食物。
E: I feel you, Luka. I also can't get used to the food on the Xianzhou.

C: 也好，都听你的。
E: That works too. You're the coach after all.

C: 你先回去吧，我想一个人再上街逛逛。
E: You go back first. I'm going to take a stroll along the streets.

C: 是「器质性问题」！意思就是…怎么给你解释呢？其实就是脑子坏掉了。
E: Not that organic! It means... How do I explain this? It means that the brain is broken.

C: 对不起，刚才的话我一句都没听懂……
E: Sorry, I didn't understand a word you just said...

C: 有请比赛双方入场！
E: Both contenders, step onto the stage please!

C: 根据计算，我们首先应当考虑的问题并非情绪，而是——
E: According to calculations, the thing that we should be considering first is not emotions, but...

C: 来，看着我的枪口。走过来，揍我一拳。你敢吗？
E: Come on, look down the barrel of my gun. Walk over here and take a swing at me. You got the guts?

C: 是两位卢卡的粉丝。
E: They're Luka's fans.

C: 受不了了，他散发的沮丧让老子浑身难受。赶紧让老子动手吧。
E: Gah, I can't take it. The depression he's radiating is making even me uncomfortable. Hurry up and lemme at him.

C: 怎么又跑了？算了，也快进入他内心深处了…那里应该就藏着让他失去信心的梦魇。
E: Why'd he run off again? Forget it. We're almost in the depths of his inner world... The nightmare causing his loss of faith should be hiding there.

C: （那位纯美骑士会认可我吗？「纯美骑士团」听起来是个对美学很严格的组织……）
E: (Will I impress the Knight of Beauty? The Knights of Beauty sounds like an organization with high aesthetic standards...)

C: 接下来，挑战「纯美骑士」银枝的选手是，人气爆棚的少年英雄——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: The next contestant to challenge Argenti, the Knight of Beauty, is a super popular young hero — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 准备好了吗？我要开始播放咯。
E: Are you guys ready? I'm going to play it.

C: 公司太伪善了！
E: The IPC is so hypocritical!

C: 这不可能，就像那时面对你的枪，我是不会临阵脱逃的。
E: That's out of the question. I won't back down, just like how I faced your gun last time.

C: 我听人说起过你们世界的遭遇。我明白，你需要这场胜利。只差一步，你就能带着贝洛伯格的名字一同名垂青史。
E: I've heard about what happened to your planet, so I understand how you need this win. Just one more step, and you'll take Belobog's name into the history books with you.

C: 玛吉，我尽力了…像你一样，我赢了。
E: Margie, I tried my best... Just like you, I won.

C: 哈哈，我哪有那个钱啊？况且叽米先生还催我赶紧回去给他写《走近星穹》的台本呢。
E: Haha, how am I going to afford that? Besides, Mr. Owlbert's been urging me to go back and write the next script of Keeping Up With Star Rail for him.

C: 我没听错吧，那狐人姑娘说自己是步离人？
E: Did I hear that right? That foxian girl said she's a borisin?

C: ……总觉得赢得莫名其妙，心里感觉怪怪的。
E: ...I don't feel right about winning in a weird way like this.

C: 看起来慈眉善目的奢摩小姐真是那样可怕的罪犯吗？我实在很好奇。
E: Miss Samatha looks so kind and gentle... is she really such a terrifying criminal? I'm really curious.

C: 瞧瞧，瞧瞧这几个家伙！我嗅到了同类的味道，但也看到他们给自己佩戴的项圈。
E: Look! Look at these people! I thought I smelled our brethren, but I saw that they voluntarily put collars around their own necks.

C: 这样的日子会来的……一定会来的！
E: Such a day will come... It definitely will!

C: 么？么么么！
E: Mehr? Mehrmehrmehr!

C: 我没有什么要澄清的…
E: There's nothing to prove...

C: 选手休息室那个？哦，小孩姐啊，没劲。
E: It's the contestants' lounge? Oh, and it's a kid too. How boring.

C: 前排左手边第三位。
E: Front row, third from the left.

C: 萨姆可能是来找我玩的。
E: SAM might be here to hang out with me.

C: 你清醒点，这根本就不是萨姆。
E: Look closely, this isn't SAM at all.

C: 抱歉，我没绷住，哈哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Sorry, I just can't hold back, hahahahahaha!

C: 尾巴大爷？他怎么也来参加演武仪典了？
E: Mr. Tail? Why is he here participating in the Wardance?

C: 观众朋友们！快用欢呼和掌声掩盖住擂台上尴尬的气氛吧！你们的小叽米要受不了了！
E: My spectating friends! Quickly, use your cheers and applause to overwhelm the awkward air in the ring right now! I just can't take it any longer!

C: 目前我们还无法确定是否会参加复活赛，最终会取决于卢卡选手的状态。
E: We're still not sure if we will participate in the repechage. Ultimately, it boils down to Luka's condition.

C: 为冬城内战感到遗憾…
E: I feel regret for this match between kinsmen...

C: 一群手下败将罢了。
E: They're just a bunch of sore losers.

C: 卢卡用盘外招，真是令人恶心。
E: Luka using underhanded tactics is truly disgusting.

C: 真的耶！枘凿六合真是世界上最好玩的游戏！
E: You're right! Hexanexus truly is the most enjoyable game in the world!

C: 谢谢，开拓者很喜欢。
E: Thank you. The Trailblazer loves it.

C: 还未下定决心么？那便由主公做个示范吧。
E: Does indecision still cloud your minds? Let the Sound Master lead by example, then.

C: 噢…噢。
E: Oh... Oh.

C: 无妨，命名流派并非小事，阁下应当深思而后行。
E: Let us not be hasty. The naming of a school is a monumental task. My lord ought to be more prudent.

C: 我就不该问你们。无论如何，距离首场演出没多少时间，先完成学院的任务再说吧。
E: I never should've asked you all. There's not much time left before the first show. We'll talk about this after finishing the school's task.

C: 若是未经在下的严格特训，即便是主公，也难以驾驭这般忍具。
E: One, including you, would be hard-pressed to master such a ningu without undergoing rigorous training.

C: 哼…哼…哼…哼……哼哼——哼哼哼哼哼…哼哼…哼！
E: Hnngh... Hnngh... Hnngh... Hnngghh... Hhhnngh-hnngh-hnngh-hnngh...Hnngghh... Hnngh!

C: 没关系，能出声就够了。
E: It's okay. It's fine as long as you can make sounds.

C: 实不相瞒，我想拉近和她的关系，但始终找不到什么好办法，你能帮忙支支招嘛？
E: To be honest, I'm trying to get to know her better, but I haven't found a good way. Can you help me out?

C: 咕咕——新来的同学，不要在走廊里乱跑，注意安全咕。
E: Hoot hoot. New student, you should be careful and not run in the hallway, hoot.

C: 我有急事。
E: I'm in a hurry.

C: 你来得正好！最近空间站发生了不少怪事，我正愁找不到人商量呢。
E: You've come at the right time! Plenty of strange things have been happening in the space station recently. I was just dying to talk to someone about it.

C: 我每天都这样。
E: I'm like that every day.

C: 需要再次进行翻译吗？嘶嘶。
E: Do you need another interpretation? Zzztzzt.

C: 好吧，谁说垃圾桶不算是一种重金属呢？
E: Okay, who can claim trashcans aren't a type of heavy metal?

C: 大哥！这个家伙挺不错的诶！
E: Bro! This one's all right!

C: 还有两次？累了。
E: Two more? I'm exhausted.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: …好吧，阁下的想法，在下已经清楚了——但要是音律•修行能变得更有趣，阁下会愿意回来么？
E: ...Fine, I see how you feel... But, if I could make sound training more fun, would you be willing to come back?

C: 垃圾桶在生活中随处可见，却很少有人真正清楚它的价值。
E: One can see trashcans everywhere throughout their lives, but very few people truly understand their value.
...Yeah!

C: 人呢？
E: Where are they?

C: 我已经是个音游高手了。
E: I'm already a rhythm game master.

C: 各位观众有所不知，咱们乐队啊，惯例有三不唱。达凡绮，你可知道是哪三样？
E: This may not be common knowledge, but our band has a policy of not singing three things. Dafanchy, do you know what those are?

C: 在下以「缭乱忍侠」之名承诺——演台开幕之际，在下必定携吉他•忍徒共同登场。
E: I vow on my name as a Dazzling Ninja — When the curtain raises over the stage, I will surely step forth with Ninja Initiate Guitar by my side.

C: 临时登台还请行个方便——
E: Hope you don't mind my last-minute appearance on stage...

C: 狂热也得有个限度吧！演出现场不是法外之地，注意点！
E: There's to be a limit to your enthusiasm! The stage isn't a lawless place! Watch yourself!

C: 来来。请选择你的苏乐达瓶，猜猜看，哪个瓶子里的汽水喷得最高？
E: Come, come. Pick your SoulGlad bottle and have a guess: Which soda will spray the highest?

C: 嘘——我是偷偷溜出来的，借口说房间里太闷，想喝瓶苏乐达，就闲逛到这来了。
E: Shhh... I slipped out saying that the room was too stuffy as an excuse. Then I wanted to drink some SoulGlad, and that's how I ended up here.

C: 真遗憾，所有汽水瓶都喷得同样高。没有人猜对，奖品就只能继续留在我手里了。
E: How unfortunate. All the bottles are spraying at identical heights. No one got it right, and the prize regrettably remains in my hands.

C: 我也是！我喜欢你们的音乐，还想看「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的演出！别让那些坏人得逞啊！
E: Me too! I love your music, and I wanna see Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party perform! Don't let those baddies get their way!

C: 怎么不算呢？
E: Why wouldn't they be?

C: 这复读机又让我想起了那酒馆的传说。据说世界尽头的酒馆对谁都敞开大门，唯独不欢迎一种人——
E: This Echoer reminds me of that tavern's legend again. It's said that the World's End Tavern opens its doors to all, except for a certain type...

C: 能不能回想一下晨练的意义？
E: Did you even understand the whole point of our morning training?

C: 不行，我不同意！都是一个师父，这还怎么对决呀？除非…除非你以后都叫我「师姐」！
E: No, I refuse! What sort of fight would it be if we had the same mentor? Unless... Unless you address me as "senior soror" in future!

C: 这次值日结束以后，我替你值日两次…不，三次！
E: After this one, I'll swap two... no, three Express duties with you!

C: 看来，必须找人凑凑单了——
E: Looks like I have to find more people to order with...

C: 过度曝光的。
E: The overexposed ones.

C: 更换一新。
E: Time for an overhaul.

C: 好闲啊，没什么事做。闲着也是闲着，给留声机换首歌吧。
E: So bored, and nothing to do. Might as well change the song on the phonograph.

C: 丹恒乘客说得对。出门在外，还是要警惕奸商帕！
E: Dan Heng is right. When traveling, buyer beware!

C: 那我坚决支持。
E: In that case, I wholeheartedly support this option.

C: 还是先撤吧…
E: We better just leave...

C: 哎，明天再晚起，帕姆真的会生气…有什么助眠的好法子吗？
E: *sigh* If I wake up late again tomorrow, Pom-Pom's gonna have a real fit... Any good ideas to help a girl sleep?

C: 听冷笑话会不会有冬眠舱的效果？不如去找「闭嘴」聊聊天吧！
E: Would dad jokes have the hibernation cabin's effect? Might as well chat with Shut-It!

C: 喔！交给你了，扭丹大师！
E: Ooh! It's all yours, capsule master!

C: 那太好了。开支越来越大，正需要些*低风险*的工作来回回血。
E: That's fantastic. Our expenses are getting higher — we need some much needed low-risk jobs to pay the bills.

C: 你俩这是…战略换家？
E: You two are... strategically switching allegiances?

C: 好闲啊。
E: I'm so bored.

C: 啾啾，这个道理可要牢牢记住！
E: Tweet, this principle must be firmly remembered!

C: 看来花火当上赞助商了。
E: Looks like Sparkle's become a sponsor.

C: 「梦境变变变」上半场演出结束了。场间休息时，「钟表小子」找到了你们。
E: The first half of Dreamscape Shift is over. During the intermission, Clockie comes up to you.

C: 下半场模仿秀马上开始，咱们就在这儿稍等一会儿吧。
E: The second half is about to begin. Let's just wait around here for a bit.

C: 大道理一套一套的。
E: You sure are waxing eloquence.

C: 纯狱风？
E: Prisoncore?

C: 蹦到宇宙毁灭！！！
E: Dance till the universe is destroyed!!!

C: 哎呀，修身怡情的赛事，倒也不必那么功利，但也愿你能名列前茅。
E: Oh. There's no need to be so practical in a competition that can be enjoyed and cultivates the heart. But I do hope you'll be ranked at the top too.

C: 太好啦，{NICKNAME}，快邀请大家过来吧！
E: Fantastic! {NICKNAME}, hurry up and invite everyone!

C: 大家在你和三月七的指导下，站在了合适的位置。
E: Instructed by you and March 7th, everyone stands in their appropriate spots.

C: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
E: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

C: 撩动万物的斗争者，庇护万邦的守护者啊——请让我族伴你征伐，随你撒下恐惧的种子，点燃战争的火光！
E: The fighter who provokes all life, the guardian who protects all states — please allow my clan to accompany you in conquest, to follow you in sowing seeds of fear, to light the torches of war!

C: 若你愿向我们发起屠戮的「纷争」，那就请允许我们对你张弩竖剑，来换一份战死的荣耀。
E: If you declare the "Strife" of slaughter upon us, please allow us to draw our bows and unsheathe our swords against you, in exchange for a glorious death.

C: 行啊，只要你别被它们干的蠢事吓到了就成！
E: Sure, as long as you don't regret witnessing their witless antics!

C: 嗯…事实是，这只奇美拉小队的工作成绩非常差，排名长期处于垫底状态。就算他没有把管理权转让给你们，队伍迟早也是要解散的。
E: Mm... Honestly, this squad's work output is very poor. Their performance has always ranked the lowest. Even if he didn't relinquish authority to you, the squad would've been disbanded sooner or later.

C: 嗯，灰宝也别紧张，我会帮忙的…要是真、真没做好的话，我来替你挨训！
E: Hmm, you calm down too, Grayie. I'll help out... If they don't do a g—good job, I'll take the punishment in your place!

C: 它跳起来都打不到我的膝盖。
E: It can't hit my knee, even if it jumps up.

C: 你到底在计划些什么？
E: What the heck are you plotting now?

C: （讲点滑稽的…）
E: (Say something comical...)

C: 我回来了？
E: I'm back?

C: 你也知道啊。
E: Ahh, so you know how far I had to run.
o((◉ω◉ ! )o "...Speechless!")∋

C: {NICKNAME}选手以不可阻挡的实力，击败了缇宁选手。这下雅努萨波利斯的双子…双双沉船，我们不得不送别缇宁选手离场。
E: {NICKNAME} has crushed Trinnon with overwhelming power. And just like that, both contenders from Janusopolis have been... eliminated. It's time for us to bid Trinnon farewell.

C: …豹子头•丹恒。
E: Call me... Dan Heng, Seal Master.

C: 比就比，谁怕谁？
E: Let's go. Who's backing down?

C: 慢走一步，赛法利娅。
E: Hold on, Cifera.

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )o「那不是玩偶吗？」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )o "I turn into a plushie!?" )∋

C: 嗷呜～好伙伴，在你醒来之前，请让我为你介绍海豹国的勇士们——
E: Awooo~ Before you wake up, partner, allow me to introduce the brave warriors of the Seal Kingdom—

C: 还有位身手矫捷的游侠，你要找到她，她会带着那金色奖杯骗过命运，不再破碎。
E: As well as the dexterous ranger. You must find her. She will carry the golden trophy and cheat fate, so that it'll no longer break.

C: {F#她}{M#他}已经把你算进队伍里了。
E: {F#She}{M#He} already considers you a part of the team.

C: 那*我们*和小灰是同组对决的对手啦！
E: Then we will go against Little Gray in the same group!

C: 预言中提到「黑潮蚀清波」，浴池就被黑色浴盐污染了。
E: The prophecy said "black tide muddles clear waters," and the bath had been tainted with black bath salts.

C: ——我，决定退出{NICKNAME}的队伍。
E: —I've decided to leave {NICKNAME}'s team.

C: 别担心，大家，*我们*以半神之名保证，所谓「三道灾厄」是假的。
E: Don't worry, everyone. In the name of the demigods, we assure you that these "three calamities" are merely fabrications.

C: 我从未指望过金线能防住翁法罗斯最狡猾的贼——赛飞儿。
E: I never expected the golden thread could stop Amphoreus's most cunning thief — Cipher.

C: 它是寄给星穹列车的，结果打开之后才知道是给你的。
E: It was addressed to the Astral Express, though I only realized it was for you after opening it.

C: 我真的只用玩游戏就行了吗？
E: So all I have to do is play the game?

C: 即便没办法像业界的某些知名项目那样，每年更新七八个大补丁，但日常的维护与优化还是没问题的。
E: Even if we can't churn out seven or eight major updates every year like some big-name projects, regular maintenance and optimization? That's no problem at all.

C: 你很勇敢，也有足够的智慧。踏遍整个银河，千辛万苦寻到这里，想必你也不希望草草收场吧？
E: You have both courage and wisdom. Having traversed the entire cosmos and found this place after many trials, you wouldn't want to wrap this up too quickly either, right?

C: 您准备好了我们这就开始。
E: We're ready to go as soon as you are.

C: 这支队伍砸了重金找公司定制赛车，连其他选手的赛车交付都被推迟了，所以大家都管他们叫「钞人战队」。
E: This team poured a lot of money into their custom car, and even delayed delivery of other racers' cars. That's why everyone calls them the "Fast & Prosperous."

C: 何止是熟人？是Family。
E: Not just a friend, but more like a family.

C: 呵呵，原来如此，我就不继续打听了。
E: Haha, I see. I won't pry any further.

C: 比起工作，更遗憾的是要和它说再见了。
E: Saying goodbye to this car hurts more than returning to work.

C: 哈！我就知道你的游戏品位不会太差。
E: Ha! I knew your taste in games couldn't be that bad.

C: 我才刚开业，诅咒太不吉利了…
E: Great, we just had the grand opening and now there's an unlucky curse...

C: 再也不见。
E: Hope I never see you again.

C: 嘿，是你啊。难怪账账一个劲地把我往这儿领。
