E: Well, look who it is! That explains why Numby insisted on bringing me here.

C: 哎，话归正题，我最近可真是忙坏了。
E: But anyway, I've been absolutely run off my feet lately.

C: 匹诺康尼宣布对宠物用品加征<unbreak>200%</unbreak>关税，家里的「鲱鱼先生」味磨牙棒已经断货一周了！
E: Penacony has just imposed a <unbreak>200%</unbreak> tariff on pet supplies, and the Mr. Herring's chew toys have been unavailable for a week!

C: 五年？！
E: Five what!?

C: （递上调饮。）
E: (Hands over the drink.)

C: 戴着假面的生活，终究不可能长久。
E: You can't live behind a mask forever. Sooner or later, it cracks.

C: 就没点有用的信息吗？
E: Any chance we could get some useful intel?

C: 这份工作太轻松了。
E: This job is far too easy.

C: 下次请写完再发表。
E: Next time, finish it before you publish it.

C: 闭嘴——
E: Shush—

C: 别让我——或者说，别让「我们」失望。
E: So don't let me down, or should I say, don't let "us" down.

C: 没太听懂，还得细品。
E: I didn't quite get that. Need to let it sink in.

C: 你不知道啊？矿工们开采矿脉时，挖出了巨大的地下遗迹。
E: Haven't you heard? When the mineral deposits were being prospected, a huge underground ruin was also dug up.

C: 你不是寻宝者吗？
E: Aren't you a relic hunter yourself?

C: 你和其他寻宝者有什么不同吗？
E: What makes you so different from the others?

C: 行了，想清楚就来找我吧，我带你到遗迹里去。
E: Alright, come find me once you've had a think, and I'll take you down into the ruins.

C: 所以在下才请您过来，讲讲您的英雄故事。在下要是拿到了您这位当事人的第一手材料，那必然能创作出一折精彩的评书啊！
E: And so, I humbly invite you to tell me of your heroic exploits. I'll definitely spin out a brilliant story if I could just get my hands on those first-hand accounts of yours!

C: 西衍先生拿出手机，准备记录下你讲的故事。
E: Mr. Xiyan takes out his phone and prepares to record your tales.

C: 咳咳…「内有神丹脱胎换骨，外有龙尊之力护体，莫说是个小小的令使，就算烬灭祸祖本人，也未必是{NICKNAME}的对手！」
E: Ahem... "With the miracle elixir flowing internally and the high elder's power protecting externally, a mere Emanator — or even the Ruin Author themselves — would prove no match for {NICKNAME}!"

C: 您别害怕，这位是米糕没幻戏社的著名演员石韵老师。
E: Don't be scared! This is Shiyun, a famed actor from the Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club.

C: 无妨，不过还是稍微抓紧点时间把。我晚些时候还要去一个堂会走穴。
E: It's okay, but let's hurry up a bit. I've got a show at a house party tonight.

C: 来吧，宵小之辈！
E: Come and get it, puny worms!

C: 关于特殊委派…
E: About the special assignment...

C: 有件事想麻烦你，我想录几段评书放在店里，可是我与那几位先生都不熟，不知能否拜托你替我到现场录上几段？
E: Hmm... Can I ask you for a favor? I'm thinking of playing some storytelling shows in my store, but I don't know any of the performers. Would you please go to their live show and record a few pieces for me?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。对了，我听素裳姑娘说，他们几位还有不少作品，你要是感兴趣啊，可以到他们那儿再瞧瞧。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. By the way, Sushang told me that those performers have prepared more shows. Feel free to drop by and check them out if you're interested.

C: 我从未如此平静过。
E: I've never been so calm.

C: 简单来说就是，把待鉴定的古董摆在门口，用谛听来识别具体的年限。年限短的属于假古董，那就直接砸烂，最后留下真古董。
E: Here's the plan: I'll place the antiques to be appraised at the door and use Diting to figure out their origin year. If they were made just a few decades ago, I'll smash them. That way, only antiques made centuries ago would be left in my store.

C: 哎呀，输赢都无所谓，玩游戏不就是为了开心嘛。
E: Ah, who cares about winning or losing? Gaming is about having fun!

C: 嗯？
E: Hmm?

C: 至于他们是否得到了那位大守护者的首肯…这我就不方便过问了。
E: As for whether they received the approval of the Supreme Guardian, well, that's beyond my knowledge and involvement.

C: 我没玩过这游戏啊…
E: But I've never played this game before...

C: 那身制服…是给你发消息的公司员工吗？
E: That uniform... Was it him that texted you?

C: 愿赌服输——拿去吧，这就是<color=#dbc291ff>「残响回廊的资格徽章」</color>，恭喜你们！
E: Here, take it — <color=#dbc291ff>the Corridor of Fading Echoes Mastery Mark</color> — you've earned it!

C: 小儿科也挺好，比较适合我这种玩家！
E: Hey! This level of gaming is just perfect for me!

C: 他是谜语人吗？
E: Is he one of The Riddlers?

C: 没错，我们绝不会出卖自己的伙伴！
E: That's right, we'd never sell out our friend!

C: 唉…你问吧。
E: ...Go on then.

C: {NICKNAME}，既然我们拿到资格徽章了，就回列车休息吧……
E: {NICKNAME}, since we've got the Mastery Mark, let's head back to the Express and get some well-earned rest.

C: 所以，我此次特意邀请两位到这里，不为别的，只是为了向二位提出请求——
E: ...That's why I specifically invited the two of you here — to make this request.

C: 答案是——我和那位玩家没有什么特殊的关系。
E: The answer is... there is no special connection.

C: 看来次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神也已经准备好了。
E: Looks like Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is also ready.

C: 就让我公输梁看看——究竟是何人破了老夫的阵～法～
E: I, Gongshu Liang, did forge this tricky road, but who, pray tell, has cracked this old man's code⁓?

E: Here to expand your show biz?

E: My friends, join me in this dance! Let's bring this {RUBY_B#The Elation}exquisite{RUBY_E#} celebration to its climax!

E: I agreed to grant you an audience, not meet you in combat.

E: Oh yeah? Since you're so familiar with the place, you can lead the way and conduct the interviews!

E: Thank you... if we're ever going to find Tail, now's the best chance we have.

E: The Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobus Containment Breach Incident — A.K.A the ghost-hunting squad — is ready for action! Yeahhh⁓!

C: 我承认你成功恶心到我了。

E: We think the Divination Commission has been infiltrated by a heliobus, but we don't know which one.

E: Something's amiss in the Divination Commission — everyone is mumbling to themselves. Is this some workforce overhaul? Did I set a bad example?

C: 不客气啊太卜。对了，您刚刚在岁阳寄体时把我开除了，这个决定应该是动真格的吧。接下来要劳烦您老人家下达一纸书面通知，单方面解除合同。
E: No need to thank me, Master Diviner. By the way, while you were possessed, you fired me from the Commission, so... that counts, right? I'll have to ask you to give me written notice that my contract has been unilaterally terminated.

C: 什么事？

C: 人生和命运也是同样的道理。无论结局是否注定，都值得一过。

C: 我也许该向你收参观的票钱了。

C: 说得没错。
E: Correct.

C: 嘻嘻，难怪我在你身上嗅到了一丝悲伤的味道。哦——我懂了，为了援救无能的弟子，师父不得不亲自上阵交锋吗？真羡慕「熔炬」呀。

E: The general sent us to bring you back...

C: 嗯嗯，只要醒着，咱们裳裳还是非常靠谱的。
E: Haha, right — conscious Sushang is pretty badass.

C: 她认为自己拖累了咱们。

E: So, will you go, Huohuo?

C: 「M」是<unbreak>71839</unbreak>，「N」是<unbreak>7193</unbreak>，「V」是<unbreak>183</unbreak>…而你得到了密码的线索，「保险箱密码是T」。所以，你有头绪了吗？
E: "M" is <unbreak>71839</unbreak>, "N" is <unbreak>7193</unbreak>, "V" is <unbreak>183</unbreak>... You have the clue for the password: "The safe password is 'T.'" So, do you have an idea?

These days, everyone likes playing games where you don't have to think. They like games you can play without looking because they just run themselves without any problems!

E: Everyone <rhythm>must <rhythm>absolutely <rhythm>cherish it

E: Now try without any hints.

C: 梦境酒店的深处，嘻嘻，那里有个长得像闹钟的怪物，就喜欢别人骂它。你呢，过去使劲多喷它几句，说不定…它心情好，就把钱全给你了！
E: In the back of the hotel in the Dreamscape, hehe, there's a monster that looks like an alarm clock and enjoys having people tell it off. So you could go over and spit a few sentences at it. Maybe... that'll put it in a good mood, and then it'll give you all its money!

C: 而现在，表演就要开始，请耐心参与其中。
E: And now, the show is about to begin. Sit tight and join in.

C: 虽是给小孩子看的童谣，但那本书的情节非常精彩动人。一路上，勇者遇到了许多的神奇生物，也见到了各异的美丽风景。
E: Although it's a tale for children, the story is incredibly exciting and engaging. During his journey, the hero encountered so many fantastic creatures and witnessed so many unique and breathtaking places.

C: 拍照吗？好呀好呀，带我一个！知…你要来吗？
E: A photo? Sure thing, count me in! Ro... *ahem*, are you joining in?

E: Ladies and gentlemen! In the previous Wardance, I lost to Luka from Belobog by a narrow margin! Coincidentally, he is here today, and I boldly challenge him again. Luka, would you be willing to teach me a move or two once more?

C: 难道是假面愚者的陷阱？该死，这群家伙肯定选的货到付款。

C: 你到底是怎么搬的？
E: How did you carry this?

C: 我最爱的吃瓜时间。
E: It's my favorite time — Watch the drama unfold.

C: 虽然二世身为有机体，与智械有所不同。但我愿相信，反有机方程之下，仍然存在无法被掩埋的「情感」。

C: 未来是确定的，还是混沌的，这道难题依然无法解答。

C: 竟然两句话就介绍完了…那再补一句吧，我的名字「闭嘴」，来源于姬子小姐对前任主人说的最后一句话。
E: Oh, that only took two sentences. I'll add one more then. I was named after the last thing Miss Himeko said to my previous master: Shush.

C: 呜嗡——（尝尝看，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这是我亲手做的礼物。）
E: Grumph— (Here, try this, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. It's a gift I made myself.)

C: 哎，最近奥赫玛出现了一大批采用最新仿造技术制成的假古董，不光是辨别能力较弱的老人，甚至连一些专业爱好者也难以分清。
E: Recently, Okhema has seen a surge of fakes made with the latest imitation techniques, not just fooling the elderly with weak discernment but even some enthusiasts.

C: 空间站缺冰箱了是吧？
E: Are the rewards from this race any good?

C: 可以为看好的小家伙应援，要是它赢得比赛的话，你就会获得极其丰厚的奖励！
E: You can cheer for a promising little one, and if it wins the competition, you'll receive incredibly generous rewards!

C: 咳咳，在{NICKNAME}前辈面前就别说这种话了，咱们加起来都不如{NICKNAME}一根手指头。
E: Ahem, save the speech in front of {NICKNAME}. The two of us combined don't even measure up to an ounce of {NICKNAME}'s ability.

C: 雨季是凯尔萨斯星最大的威胁。当三折河的干流决堤时，一位巨人用身躯堵住了裂口，为民众争取宝贵的逃命时间。
E: The rainy season is Kalsas's greatest threat. When the main stream of the Three-fold River burst its banks, a giant used its body to block the fissure, buying precious time for people to escape.

C: 呀，{NICKNAME}，见到你真高兴。快来看，要见识下哀丽秘榭的宝物吗？
E: Ah, {NICKNAME}, it's good to see you! Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Aedes Elysiae?

C: 气氛难得，不如让我即兴为你讲个故事吧。
E: This sort of atmosphere is hard to come by... so let me share a story with you.

C: 别担心，那就把它当作睡前故事。我会用很轻、很轻的悄悄话，讲完最后一个句号哦。
E: Don't worry. Just think of it as a bedtime story. I'll whisper it softly and quietly until the final sentence comes to a close.

C: （大家？）
E: (Everyone?)

C: 还有白厄，咱们的好朋友，自称做得一手好菜，现在是餐馆主厨（临时）。
E: And of course, Phainon, our good friend who insists he's a fantastic cook. He's acting as the restaurant's (provisional) head chef.

C: 那就决定啦。{NICKNAME}，你说不定会成为迷境里第一个四星餐馆的主理人哦？
E: Then it's settled! {NICKNAME}, you just might become the very first four-star restaurant owner in the entire Maze!

C: 拒绝！不要再新增任何沙拉啦。
E: No! Absolutely no more salads.

C: 既然思想的火苗已被点燃，我就不打扰各位继续沉思了。
E: Now that the spark of creativity has been lit, I'll leave you to your brainstorming.

C: 缇宝，你忘了件很重要的事。
E: Tribbie, you're forgetting something important.

C: 想吃餐馆的菜，就得付钱哦。就算是小飞儿也不能例外。
E: You want food from the restaurant, you gotta pay. Even you don't get a free pass, Little Ciphy.

C: 缇安，朝面团里，倒了大罐的蜂蜜！
E: Trianne poured an entire jar of honey into the dough!

C: 哎呀，刚才突然肚子疼，稍微离开了会，对不住啊各位。迷！
E: Sorry! I had a sudden stomachache and had to step out for a bit. My bad, everyone. Mem!

C: 嘿，我就说有办法能免费尝到吧。除了致死量的糖分以外，还挺好吃的。
E: Hey, told ya I had a way to score a free bite. Aside from the sugar overload, it's actually not half bad.

C: 既然是灰子的请求，以咱俩的交情，我当然没有不帮的道理，对吧？
E: Since it's Gray Mystery asking, I couldn't possibly say no! With our history, how could I refuse?

C: 那我开始咯。提问！——在金织女士看来，这些果实的神奇之处在哪儿呢？
E: Here we go! First question! Lady Goldweaver, in your opinion, what makes these fruits so wondrous?

C: 太好了！成为四星级餐馆了！
E: That's wonderful! We're a 4-star restaurant now!

C: 举办宴会，桌面上都空着可不行，把装过盘的菜品都端出来吧。
E: We can't have a feast with empty tables. Let's bring out all the dishes that are ready to serve.

C: 敬…相聚的此刻——
E: To... this precious moment of reunion...

C: 少说废话，直接开吃！
E: Enough talk. Let's eat!

C: 也许我们在想同一件事。
E: Perhaps you and I are thinking the same thing.

C: 如今餐馆有两位主厨坐镇，倒是免去了菜品方面的担忧。但…呵，争斗之事怕是难以避免了。
E: Now that we've got two chefs holding the fort, there's no longer any need to worry about menu variety. Though... heh, I suppose some conflict is inevitable.

C: 不过…呵，店长似乎知晓其中的缘由，我也便不多追究了。
E: But... heh, I suspect you already know why that is. So I won't pry.

C: 呵。经营餐馆是迷路迷境的大事，需要认真对待。店长做好开店的准备了迷？
E: Heh. Running a restaurant is a big deal in the Membrance Maze. We need to take it seriously. Are you ready to open for business, mem?

C: 丹恒利用空余时间写的文章被期刊拒稿了，他与编辑「友善且礼貌」地讨论了三个系统时。虽然不形于色，但每个人都看得出，他今天心情非常低落。
E: The article that Dan Heng spent his off-time writing was rejected by the periodical. He then "politely and cordially" discussed it with the editor for 3 system hours. Though he doesn't wear his emotions on his sleeve, everyone can tell that he is feeling quite down today.

C: 集结了旧日的伙伴，放入那一缕「无名的追忆」
E: Having gathered the old companions, now drop in that strand of "Nameless Recollection"

E: Your Best Companion

C: 「伤及万敌的锋刃，必定足以弑神。」\n人们至今仍在找寻。\n然而那也只是他遵循的传统……
E: "A blade that can cut through the mighty must be enough to slay gods."\nThe people to this day still seek it,\nYet it is simply a tradition he follows closely...

C: 他们未能从彼此手中取得一胜，\n也从未留下一负。
E: Neither was able to score a single victory,\nAnd conceded not a single defeat.

C: 曾有人这样猜测，\n他将圣城视作家园，\n是为给自己寻觅归处。
E: Others once guessed,\nHe regards the holy city as his home,\nFor he seeks a land to belong.

C:
人们闭目降生，
是为适应世间光明。
而老去时视力衰微，
是为再度熟悉黑暗。
E:
Humans are born with eyes closed
To accustom to this world's light,
And their sight fades in old age
To reacquaint with night's anthems.

C: 黑潮翻涌，万物消散。
E: The world dissipates in the roiling black tide's requiem.

C: 能否辨得真身并不重要，\n最真挚的笑容才是珍宝。
E: It matters not whether they can tell the trio apart,\nof most importance is their sincere smiles.

C: 「那是缇安！」\n烂漫的孩童举手。
E: "That's Trianne!"\nThe exuberant child raises her hands.

C: 时日推移，她打开花瓣遮掩的心， 那不愿将作品示人的原因终于澄清： 「我的文辞还太过稚嫩…不值过目。」 ——是源于少女的羞愧。
E: As time goes, she finally opens her petal-veiled heart, And the reason behind her reluctance to show her work is finally clear: "My poems are still too green... Not worthy to be art." — It stems from the girl's shame and discomfort.

C: 「倘若还要留下些什么，\n希望有人能将它们记忆。
E: "If there is anything for me to leave behind,\nMay it find a soul to remember.

C: 「第一则谎言名为……」
E: "The first lie is called..."

C:
当微风拂去那缕孤苦，
正如它拂过故乡的麦浪…
无缘黎明的赤子，
终能结束熔心的守望。
E:
When the breeze lifts the weight of loneliness,
as it does the golden waves of wheat in the homeland...
The child, who was denied the light of dawn,
can finally lay down the watch that melted his heart.

C: 「比起货船，或许公司生态舰更适合他。」 ——{NICKNAME} 「为什么？」 ——丹恒 「因为他擅长学小动物说话。」 ——{NICKNAME}
E: "Rather than a freight skiff, maybe an IPC eco-ship would suit him better." — {NICKNAME} "Why?" — Dan Heng "After all, he's got a knack for talking like animals." — {NICKNAME}

C: 容我提醒：\n您的生命已随着<color=#9e5738>「律法」</color>的陨落进入倒计时。\n您将身作<color=#9e5738>「律法」</color>。
E: Allow me to remind you:\nYour life is now on a countdown with the fall of <color=#9e5738>"Law,"</color>\nAnd you will become <color=#9e5738>"Law."</color>

C: 令我在深海无光之地，\n立下碑刻为同伴留念。
E: She commanded me to set up stones and monuments\nIn lightless sea beds to commemorate our friends.

C: 金色琴弦让海列屈拉看见，\n她爱的世界尚未喑哑，\n救世的旅途仍在继续。
E: The golden strings showed Helektra\nThat the world she loved was not yet silent\nAnd the journey of deliverance continued still.

C: 她稚嫩地吟诵祷词——\n「天空呀，应我的祈愿……」
E: Childishly, she recited the words —\n"O Sky, heed my wishes..."

C: 一阵风终将拂过，\n抹去男人所有的足迹。
E: A gust of wind will one day sweep past,\nWiping away {F#all}{M#all of} the man's tracks.

C: 他的友人浴血奋战，\n是为了族人无需再战。
E: His friend fought blood-soaked battles,\nSo their people would need fight no longer.

C: 「远离那渎神的人。否则不幸必如影随形。」\n在他的讲堂前，人们如是提醒。
E: "Keep your distance from that blasphemous one, lest misfortune follows you like a shadow."\nPeople warned each other thus before his lectern.

C: <color=#9e5738>愿用最后的魔术，\n创造断绝神迹的神迹。</color>
E: <color=#9e5738>Using the final trick,\nThey wish to create a miracle to end all miracles.</color>

C: 「去吧。」 织者说， 「城里有三个孩子。」
E: "Go." The Weaver begins. "Go to the three children in the city."

C: 古老的剧场里，\n有剧目万千，有种种悲喜，\n连浪漫的神明也曾是伶人之一。
E: In the ancient theater,\nThere are thousands of plays, millions of shows,\nWhere even the god of romance was once an actor.

C: 于是，翁法罗斯的山川河流、城邦万民皆成「赌资」。一夜之间，无数贵族陨落，无名之辈开始崭露头角。
E: And so, the mountains, rivers, cities and people of Amphoreus all became mere stakes in the game. Overnight, countless aristocrats fell from grace, while nameless figures began to rise to prominence.

C: 相传，赛法利娅曾与刻法勒对赌，夺得了它所背负的一切。在那之后，奥赫玛成为了世间最大的赌坊。无数赌徒心怀希望走上云崖，试图赌得精金良玉、封疆国土…最后却都失望而归。
E: Legend has it that Cifera once gambled against Kephale and won everything they bore. After that, Okhema became the world's largest gambling den. Countless gamblers climbed Dawncloud with hope in their hearts, trying their luck at winning precious metals, jade, and territories... only to leave disappointed.

C: 塞涅俄丝并非半神，却活了将近千余年，坊间传说是她的老朋友荒笛将寿命分给了她。
E: Though not a demigod, Seliose had lived for nearly a thousand years. Rumors said her old friend Terravox shared their lifespan with her.

C: 「缇里西庇俄丝」多次提交新建坐标通道的内部指令，致使其多轨运算逐步陷入瘫痪。\n\n光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年，「缇里西庇俄丝」创建通道，联通「坐标：斯缇科西亚」与「坐标：创世涡心」，指令消耗大量算力。「缇里西庇俄丝」于光历<unbreak>4295</unbreak>年完全静默。
E: "Tribios" submitted multiple internal commands to create new coordinate pathways, causing its multi-track calculations to gradually become paralyzed.\n\nIn Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>, "Tribios" created a pathway connecting "Coordinate: Styxia" and "Coordinate: Vortex of Genesis," consuming massive computational power. "Tribios" completely stopped responding in Light Calendar <unbreak>4295</unbreak>.

C: 关于流萤…你觉得自己可以和她成为朋友。\n你相信自己看人的眼光，也相信自己有足够的人格魅力，能把旅途中擦肩而过的每位少女都留在你的生命中。
E: As for Firefly... You think you can become her friend.\nYou trust your insight into others and believe you have the charisma required to make every young maiden you encounter in your journeys into a persistent presence in your life.

C: 「没想到这个遗迹的结构这么复杂，过去的筑城者到底在贝洛伯格留下了多少秘密…{NICKNAME}，这些秘密就由我们来揭开吧。」
E: "The structure of this ruin is so complicated. How many secrets have the past Architects buried in Belobog... {NICKNAME}, let's unveil these secrets with our hands."

C: 「{NICKNAME}，收获如何？我虽然没在这里找到宝物，但找到了不少新歌的灵感——快来听听，这可是真正的『地下摇滚』！」
E: "{NICKNAME}, how goes it? I didn't find any treasures here, but I gained so much inspiration for new compositions... Have a listen. This is the true Underground Rock!"

C: 「{NICKNAME}，又见面了。在这里常常能看到被困的伤员，这些人为了财宝而不顾自己的安危…真是让人头疼。{NICKNAME}，拜托帮我带他们回去吧。」
E: "We meet again, {NICKNAME}. We keep seeing injured people getting stuck here. They who risk their own safety for treasures... It's really a headache. {NICKNAME}, please help me bring them back."

C: 他经受了那么惨烈的牺牲，却还能保有自己的本心…嗯，本姑娘也一定要做到！
E: He suffered through so much agony but still managed to stay true to his wish... I need to be able to do that, too!

C: 顺利就好。
E: Seamless.

C: 阿刃…人如其名，他的战斗总是让人赏心悦目。
E: Bladie... He takes after his name — his fights are a pleasure to witness.

C: 保持这个状态，继续按，不要停。
E: Gaming is a full-time pursuit.

C: 我…
睡前来一杯混合蔬菜汁吧，有助于入眠。我今天有夜班值勤，明天见。
E: You should have some mixed vegetable juice before bed — it helps you sleep. Well, I'm on night duty tonight. See you tomorrow.

C: 幸运儿会是哪个呢~
E: Who's the lucky one today?

C: 今天来我这儿一起做研究吧——我研究你。
E: Why not come around today and help me with my research? You'll be the subject, by the way.

C: 不错的收获啊。
E: A good haul.

C: 有两把刷子。
E: Not bad at all.

C: 你休息，我站岗，咱们轮着来。
E: Let's take it in turns. You rest, I'll stand guard.

C: 运气来了，挡也挡不住哪~
E: We're on a roll, hehe~

C: 这次又要与你同行片刻了…对吧，饮月君？
E: Yet another journey with you, Imbibitor Lunae.

C: 迈向破灭的路途，没有捷径。
E: There is no shortcut to destruction.

C: 你以前可没这么爱管闲事，景元。
E: Your new-found enthusiasm is amusing, Jing Yuan.

C: 多事。
E: Unnecessary.

C: 我们藉由彼此之手，达成目的。
E: By banding together, we reach our goals.

C: 「剑」之为物，若是久藏匣中，便会鸣动着请求出鞘…可一旦出鞘，不是血染战场，便是剑折锋摧的结局……
E: A sword will vibrate and beg to be unsheathed if it is unused for too long... Once unsheathed, it will either paint the battlefield in blood, or break itself in the process...

C: 太卜司中疏怠荒闲者众多，唯独她在摸鱼偷懒的小道上独树一帜，都快总结出心得法门、开宗立派了！有时我甚至疑心，她是不是能逃过我的卜测……
E: The Divination Commission is full of idlers, but she is the only one who has truly mastered the art of slacking off — and getting away with it... She could write a whole book on the subject! Sometimes I even wonder if she could escape my divination...

C: 「罗浮」上已没有我的对手，但放眼星际之间…可不尽然。
E: There are no more fitting opponents for me on the Luofu, but out there among the stars... there may be someone yet.

C: 我这身本事都是跟着街上的兄弟们学的。原本是打算混口饭吃，谁曾想最近开始混得风生水起了，你说气人不气人？嘿嘿。
E: I learned my juggling skills on the street — my brothers taught me. It started out as a way to survive. Who'd have thought the performances would become so popular? It feels like fate is teasing us sometimes, hehe.

C: 瞧一瞧看一看了哎！
E: Come feast your eyes!

C: 就让你们看看……
E: Time to show you...

C: 不能停…不能停下！
E: Can't stop... Can't stop now!

C: 那一纸永久流放的命令，倒像是对我的特赦…毕竟，我现在在这里，不是么？
E: The eternal banishment decree was like a pardon for me... After all, I'm here now, aren't I?

C: 难得还阳一次便见到你，算是缘分。
E: It's good we could be acquainted. I rarely have the chance to come to your side of the world.

C: 汝可知罪？
E: Do you admit this crime?

C: 还要抵赖？你的恶业清清楚楚。
E: You still deny your sins? They're clear as day.

C: 有时会在本子上记录一些平日的见闻…这样等见到姐姐的时候，便可以讲给她听。
E: Sometimes I record my daily experiences in a book... that way when I see my sister, I can tell her about them.

C: 藿藿：需要上交登记吧…\n尾巴：你发现的就是你的，收着！
E: Huohuo: I should probably report this find...\nTail: You found it! It's yours!

C: 熬夜看恐怖喜剧片能磨砺胆量，再恐怖的地方只要笑一笑就不恐怖了，「嚯嚯嚯嚯嚯嚯嚯！」就像这样。
E: I practice my bravery by watching horror-comedies late at night. When it gets to a scary part, I laugh it off like this... Hehehehehehehe! So, yeah...

C: 炉香袅孤碧，云缕霏数千。
E: Incense ascends, entwined with ethereal clouds.

C: 神清气爽。
E: Refreshed and invigorated.

C: 财不外露，注意安全。
E: Do not flaunt riches. Be careful.

C: 人来人往处，暗影匿其中……
E: Amidst the sea of faces, shadows still lurk...

C: 「鸦羽怪人」这一名号并非形容我的相貌。而是因为我曾用一支羽毛笔送三个恶棍去见了慈怀药王。不要问我为什么用的是羽毛笔，因为它恰好就在桌上。
E: The nickname "Crow-Feather Weirdo" does not refer to my appearance. It refers to when I sent three scoundrels to the Merciful Medicus with just a crow-feather quill. Don't ask me why I used a quill — it just happened to be on the table.

C: 哟，拿出真本事了。
E: Decided to play your ace, huh?

C: 并肩作战的时候不多，珍惜吧。
E: We don't have many opportunities to fight alongside each other. Let's treasure this.

C: 那是什么？有点…感兴趣。
E: Hmm? I wonder what that is?

C: 人要学会「认识自己」。
E: You learn to know yourself before your enemy.

C: 大人物们太清楚这个世界是如何运行的了，所以他们制定规则，判断一件事是否违反了法律，又是否遵守了道德…他们甚至连笑话好不好笑都要管！在我看来这才是最好笑的一点。
E: The big shots think they know how this world ticks, so they're out here making all the rules, judging what's legal, what's moral... they even want a say in what jokes make the cut! To me, that's the real joke.

C: 疼疼疼。
E: Ouch ouch ouch.

C: 他的存在再次证明了…有些人，即使给予一万次选择的机会，他们仍旧会踏上同一条道路。
E: His being yet again demonstrates that... there are those who, despite being offered countless choices, will always choose the same path.

C: 这次想同我了解什么？
E: What would you like to know this time?

C: 一个人的一生，也只能提取出寥寥数份饱含力量的记忆，痛苦的，欢欣的，愤怒的，悲伤的…忆庭的初衷是留存这些记忆，但也逃不过公司为它明码标价的企图。
E: Through the course of one's existence, only a scant number of impactful memories— pain, joy, rage, sorrow, can be harvested... The Garden of Recollection was conceived with the preservation of such memories in mind — yet it isn't immune to the corporation's endeavor to openly profit from it.

C: {NICKNAME}，今天想去哪？一起走走吧。
E: Where do you want to go today, {NICKNAME}? Let's go together.

C: 感激不尽。
E: I can't thank you enough.

C: 他宝贝的！兄弟你总算来了！
E: Fudge me sideways — you're finally here, brother!

C: 东西不错，值多少信用点？
E: Not bad, how many credits is this worth?

C: 救世主，披挂黎明的战衣，吹响前进的号角吧。
E: Don the battle raiment of dawn, Deliverer, and sound the trumpet of advance.

C: 衣物不止是身体、也是心灵的隔阂，宽衣解袍，即可消弭这两重障碍。在神圣的浴场中，你我卸下心防，正如掠过指尖的水，彼此交织，流向未来。
E: Clothes are the barriers between bodies and hearts. Removing clothes would also remove such hindrances. You and I will lower our barriers to each other in the holy baths, like how the waters that trickle along our fingers intertwine and flow toward the future.

C: 跑不掉咯~
E: You can't run~

C: 白厄阁下，受了伤请及时告诉我。
E: If you're wounded, lord Phainon, please let me know as soon as possible.

C: 放在阳光下晒晒，色泽肯定更漂亮~
E: Give it some sunshine and the color will get even prettier~

C: 眼下，不失为助兴的好时机。
E: What better time to play a tune?

C: 天亮了，该醒啦~
E: Rise and shine. Time to wake up~

C: 我一直都想问他一个问题：「大地兽和世界真理的真相都掉到了海里，你先捡哪个？」
E: I've always wanted to ask him this question: "If a dromas and the truth of the world both fell into the sea, which one would you save first?"

C: 凯撒的冠冕，真的很吸睛呀。不如…下次回到哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}也用麦穗给人家编个头环吧？
E: The Imperator's crown really grabs your attention. Maybe... the next time we're in Aedes Elysiae, {NICKNAME} can also make a wreath of wheat for me ♪

C: 看起来不错。
E: Looks good.

C: 角色移动-右
E: Move Character — Right

C: 切换走跑
E: Switch to Running

C: 在「黄金嗷呜大师赛」中，赛事段位达到黄金
E: Reach Gold rank in the Chrysos Awoo Championship

C: 自身初始生命值降低，无法获得治疗和护盾效果，速度提高。受到致命攻击时，对我方全体目标造成冰属性伤害并解除【幻身】状态。
E: This unit's initial HP is reduced, and they cannot receive healing or Shield Effects, but gains a SPD Boost. When receiving a killing blow, deals Ice DMG to all ally targets and dispels the "Phantom Illusion" state.

C: 对敌方全体造成大量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all enemies.

C: 我方【致幻人鱼】受到致命伤害少于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次并通关
E: Clear the stage with ally "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" receiving fatal damage fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 堤溃蚁穴其四
E: Breached Nest (IV)

C: 燕麦粥
E: Oatmeal

C: 唔…申请再来一局！
E: Ugh... One more round!

C: 对战中，我方奇美拉首次<color=#f29e38ff>交换位置</color>后，缇宝会为我方所有奇美拉提升攻击力！

C:
・加拉赫带着列车组来到了无名客们的墓碑前，通过「钟表匠」留下的一枚梦泡，见证了无名客米哈伊尔的故事。
・原来，米沙正是米哈伊尔人生的一个缩影，他将「钟表匠」米哈伊尔的开拓精神传承予你。
・此后，米沙于梦中安然谢幕，加拉赫也在悼念米哈伊尔后坦露旧情，默然退场。
・在此期间，前去寻找梦主的星期日和知更鸟，因遇到的逐梦客们，展开了关于同谐的争辩。
E:
・ Gallagher and the Express Crew arrived at the Nameless' gravestones, where they witnessed the Nameless Mikhail's story through a dream bubble left by the "Watchmaker."
・ As it turns out, Misha was actually a reflection of Mikhail's life, who then passed on the spirit of trailblazing of "Watchmaker" Mikhail to you.
・ Afterward, Misha peacefully bid farewell in the dream, while Gallagher, having mourned Mikhail and revealed his old sentiments, silently disappeared.
・ During this time, Sunday and Robin, who went searching for the Dreammaster, fell into a debate about Harmony for the Dreamchasers they encountered.

C: 成了！成了！
E: It is done! Done it is!

E: After entering the "Gene Duplication" state, the field enters Combustion. "Gene Duplication" is dispelled when all summoned "Juvenile Sting" are defeated. When "Gene Duplication" is dispelled, "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" receives increased DMG, and dispels the "Corrosion" state.

C: 还有别的吗？
E: Anything else she did?

C: 「为何，人们会留恋这片黑暗？」
E: "Why do people long for this darkness?"

C: 抱歉，再提醒我一下吧，记忆有些模糊了。
E: Sorry, could you jog my memory again? It's a little fuzzy.

C: 直觉告诉我，一定是*梦境*出现了什么问题。
E: My intuition tells me that something must be wrong with the dreamscape.

C: 嘘…现在别聊这个。
E: Shh... let's not talk about this right now.

C: 相比一个笃定的回答，这倒令人更加信服。期待你的演出。
E: That's actually more convincing than a straight answer. Looking forward to your performance.

C: 感觉如何，要稍作休息吗？
E: How are you feeling? Need to take a break?

C: 我不那么认为，毕竟，那秘密被冠上了「最为阴暗」的形容。也或许…「遗产」并非仅有一份。走吧，去亲眼看看，我们就能知道了。
E: I don't think so. After all, that secret was branded as "the darkest." And perhaps... the "Legacy" is not one alone. Only by seeing it for ourselves can we know.

C: 「只要做得到」，这可有点模糊。
E: "If possible" is a bit vague.

C: 有关你的记忆不只属于你——我所知甚多，亦预言更远——只要用点手段，死者也能开口说话。
E: You see, memories of you are not yours alone. They travel in other people... Other things. I know much, and I can predict even more. With some help, the dead can be made to speak.

C: 凡是金的
E: How could anything golden

C: 而是她自己的选择，因为她和普通人一样，拥有良知，懂得怜悯。
E: It was her own choice, because like any ordinary person, she had a conscience and knew compassion.

C: 「稳重」了不少呢，还是你的反应变慢了？
E: You've gotten more "composed," or have you just gotten slower?

C: 真聪明呢，给你一点「奖励」，如何？
E: Aren't you clever? How about a little "reward" for that?

C: 砂金先生，你知道自己在说些什么吗？
E: Mr. Aventurine, do you even realize what you're saying?

C: 你的情报……
E: Your intel...

C: （有卡芙卡的「言灵术」，我的认知理应不可能遭到篡改。难道在入梦后，情况不同了？）
E: (With Kafka's Spirit Whisper, my cognition shouldn't be susceptible to distortion. Could things be different now that I'm in a dream?)

C: （原来是这样啊，那么，我也该出发了。）
E: (So that's how it is. Well then, it's time for me to depart.)

C: …寰宇蝗灾？
E: ...The Swarm Disaster?

C: 是啊，别说阻止，我们甚至做不到重新面对他。
E: Indeed. Forget about stopping him. We can't even manage to face him again.

C: 她会死，面对所有想要逃避的东西，第二次死去。
E: She will die. She will die a second time, facing everything she wants to run away from.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>想让你看着我把整个匹诺康尼炸上天</color>。然后，其他人才能开始反击，一块儿醒过来。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I want you to watch me blow up all of Penacony</color>. Only then can everyone else launch a counterattack and wake up together.

C: 在明天，人们会知道：<color=#dbc291ff>世界仍会迎来无数的美好，值得为之而战！</color>
E: Tomorrow, people will know that <color=#dbc291ff>the world will still welcome countless marvels worth fighting for!</color>

C: 那么，作为他的妹妹，你应该猜得到吧？倘若他真能做到，那会是一条怎样的命途？
E: You must have some ideas as his sister, right? If he really managed to do it, what kind of Path would that be?

C: 对啦，当然要从「开始的地方」开始。
E: Right. We should start "where everything began," of course.

C: …艾利欧？
E: ...Elio?

C: 不过，我们其实没办法证明，被抹去的存在是真是假，不是吗？这些给你，忘了我吧。
E: But we can't exactly prove that something erased ever existed in the first place, can we? Here, take these, and forget me.

C: 「看来你经历了许多。」他笑笑，皱纹仿佛斑驳的老树，「现在你应该明白，外面没有我们这些无邦者的容身之处。无论黑潮还是权贵，我都不想为伍。」
E: "Looks like you've been through a lot." He smiles, his wrinkles like the weathered bark of an old tree. "Now you must understand that there's no place for stateless folks like us out there. And I want nothing to do with either the black tide or the privileged elite."

C: 只工作，不玩耍，再聪明的奇美拉也会变傻。灰宝就稍微给它们放个长假吧。
E: All work and no play makes even the smartest chimera dull. Grayie, why don't you give them a nice long break?

C: 咳，敲黑板！现在由缇宝老师来为小灰做说明，要认真听讲哦。
E: Ahem, attention class! Lady Tribbie will now explain everything to you, so pay close attention!

C: 嗷呜。是有些原因的，嗷…还是让它自己给你解释吧。
E: Awoo. There's a reason for this, awoo... I'll let it explain itself.

E: Chimera Rarity Rules
